meaning: 視野良好的地方或位置；一個有利的位置。
sentences: The term vantage refers to a place or position affording a good view; a vantage point. 有利一詞是指提供良好視野的地方或位置；一個有利的位置。
The lesson introduced vantage as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「優勢」這個術語，它是一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 沒有優勢的；不佔便宜的
sentences: The small company was vantageless in the price war. 這家小公司在價格戰中沒有優勢。
He entered the debate in a vantageless position. 他在辯論中處於不利的位置。

meaning: 前臂護具；臂甲
sentences: The reenactor wore a metal vantbrace with the costume. 那位歷史重演者的服裝裡戴著金屬臂甲。
A vantbrace could protect the forearm in battle. 臂甲可以在戰鬥中保護前臂。

meaning: 前部加固用的黃銅件；黃銅護件
sentences: The old chest had a worn vantbrass on the front corner. 那個舊箱子的前角有一塊磨損的黃銅護件。
A polished vantbrass can make an antique look richer. 拋光過的黃銅護件能讓古董看起來更有質感。

meaning: 在前方的；向前的；領先的
sentences: The vanward scouts reached the hill before dawn. 領先的斥候在黎明前抵達山丘。
The vanward position gave the team a clear view of the road. 前方位置讓這支隊伍能清楚看見道路。

meaning: 乏味的；無神的；空洞的
sentences: The speech felt vapid and too polished to be sincere. 那場演講聽起來很空洞，過於修飾反而顯得不真誠。
She refused to waste time on vapid conversation. 她不願把時間浪費在乏味的閒聊上。

meaning: 空洞乏味的特質
sentences: His vapidism made the debate feel empty. 他的空洞乏味讓辯論顯得很空泛。
The writer criticized the vapidism of the speech. 那位作家批評了這場演說的空洞乏味。

meaning: 乏味；空洞
sentences: The movie was criticized for its vapidity. 那部電影因為太空洞而受到批評。
She disliked the vapidity of the conversation. 她不喜歡那場談話的乏味空洞。

meaning: 乏味地；空洞地
sentences: He replied vapidly and gave no real opinion. 他回答得很空洞，沒有真正的意見。
The host smiled vapidly through the long meeting. 主持人在漫長的會議中空洞地微笑著。

meaning: 乏味；空洞
sentences: The speech had a strange vapidness that bored the audience. 那場演講有種奇怪的空洞乏味，讓觀眾覺得無聊。
She complained about the vapidness of the whole show. 她抱怨整場表演都很空洞乏味。

meaning: 以蒸氣或熱汽進行燒灼
sentences: The doctor used vapocauterization to seal the small wound. 醫生用蒸氣燒灼法封住那個小傷口。
Older medical notes mentioned vapocauterization as a treatment method. 較早的醫療筆記把 vapocauterization 記作一種治療方式。

meaning: 與 vapography 有關的
sentences: The report described a vapographic method for tracing steam patterns. 報告中描述了一種記錄蒸氣圖樣的 vapographic 方法。
The lab kept the vapographic plates in a dry drawer. 實驗室把 vapographic 版面放在乾燥的抽屜裡。

meaning: 蒸氣記錄法；蒸氣描寫
sentences: The engineer studied vapography to understand the vapor trail. 工程師研究 vapography 來了解蒸氣軌跡。
The article connected vapography with early laboratory experiments. 那篇文章把 vapography 和早期實驗室研究連結在一起。

meaning: 水氣、蒸汽
sentences: Water vapor began to rise from the pot of hot water on the stove.
The morning sun caused the dense fog to turn into light water vapor.

meaning: 可汽化性
sentences: The liquid showed low vaporability in the test chamber. 那種液體在測試室裡的可汽化性很低。
The engineer measured the vaporability of each sample. 工程師測量了每個樣本的可汽化性。

meaning: 可汽化的
sentences: Water is vaporable under the right heat and pressure. 水在適當的溫度與壓力下是可汽化的。
Only the vaporable liquid was used in the experiment. 只有可汽化的液體被用在這項實驗中。

meaning: 蒸氣浴室；蒸氣室
sentences: They rested in a warm vaporarium after the swim. 游完泳後，他們在溫暖的蒸氣室裡休息。
The hotel advertised a small vaporarium beside the pool. 那家飯店宣傳泳池旁有一間小蒸氣室。

meaning: 像蒸氣般短暫的；蒸氣的
sentences: The poem used a vaporary image of mist and light. 那首詩用了一種像蒸氣般短暫的意象。
The designer wanted a vaporary effect over the stage. 設計師想在舞台上做出一種蒸氣般短暫的效果。

meaning: 使汽化；轉為蒸氣
sentences: Heat can vaporate the liquid in a few minutes. 熱量可以在幾分鐘內使液體汽化。
The machine was designed to vaporate the mixture quickly. 這台機器是用來快速使混合物汽化的。

meaning: 充滿蒸氣的；被蒸氣籠罩的
sentences: The windows were vapored by the morning shower. 窗戶被早晨的蒸氣弄得霧濛濛的。
A vapored mirror made the room look softer. 一面帶著蒸氣的鏡子讓房間看起來更柔和。

meaning: 製造蒸氣的人或裝置
sentences: A small vaporer hummed beside the stove. 爐子旁邊有一台小型蒸氣裝置嗡嗡作響。
The technician checked the vaporer before the lesson began. 課程開始前，技術人員先檢查了那台蒸氣裝置。

meaning: 變成蒸氣的狀態；蒸氣感
sentences: The mist gave the valley a soft vaporescence. 霧氣讓山谷呈現出柔和的蒸氣感。
The artist tried to capture the vaporescence of the lake. 那位畫家試著捕捉湖面的蒸氣感。

meaning: 逐漸汽化的；帶蒸氣感的
sentences: The glass turned vaporescent in the cold air. 那塊玻璃在冷空氣中變得霧氣蒙蒙。
A vaporescent glow covered the surface of the pond. 一層帶蒸氣感的微光覆在池面上。

meaning: 產生蒸氣的
sentences: The factory uses vaporiferous pipes to release steam. 工廠使用會產生蒸氣的管道來釋放蒸汽。
The scientist examined a vaporiferous reaction in the flask. 科學家檢視燒瓶中的一個產生蒸氣的反應。

meaning: 產生蒸氣的特性
sentences: The scientist measured the vaporiferousness of the new material. 科學家測量了新材料的蒸氣生成性。
Its vaporiferousness made the chamber fill quickly with mist. 它的蒸氣生成性讓整個腔室很快充滿霧氣。

meaning: 容易形成蒸氣的；蒸氣狀的
sentences: The fuel gave off a faint vaporific smell. 那種燃料散發出淡淡的易成蒸氣氣味。
The chemist noted a vaporific layer above the liquid. 化學家注意到液體上方有一層蒸氣狀薄層。

meaning: 蒸氣狀的；像蒸氣一樣的
sentences: The fog had a vaporiform shape over the river. 河面上的霧呈現出蒸氣般的形狀。
The artist painted a vaporiform cloud above the house. 畫家在房子上方畫了一朵蒸氣狀的雲。

meaning: 蒸氣計；蒸發量測器
sentences: The lab used a vaporimeter to measure evaporation. 實驗室用蒸氣計來測量蒸發量。
The technician reset the vaporimeter before the next test. 技術人員在下一次測試前重設了蒸氣計。

meaning: 自吹自擂；誇耀言談
sentences: His vaporing filled the room with empty bragging. 他的自吹自擂讓整個房間都充滿了空話。
The teacher asked him to stop the vaporing and answer clearly. 老師叫他停止吹噓，並清楚作答。

meaning: 誇耀地；自吹自擂地
sentences: She spoke vaporingly about her perfect plan. 她誇耀地談論自己完美的計畫。
He vaporingly described a victory that never happened. 他自吹自擂地描述了一場根本沒發生的勝利。

meaning: 誇大的；做作的
sentences: His vaporish manner made the promise sound weak. 他那種誇大又做作的態度讓承諾聽起來很空泛。
The critic called the speech vaporish and hollow. 評論者說那場演說既誇大又空洞。

meaning: 誇張做作；空洞誇口
sentences: The article mocked the speaker's vaporishness. 那篇文章諷刺了演說者的誇張做作。
She disliked the vaporishness of his style. 她不喜歡他那種空洞誇口的風格。

meaning: 蒸氣室；蒸氣容器
sentences: The old house had a small vaporium in the basement. 那棟老房子的地下室裡有一個小型蒸氣室。
The museum displayed a brass vaporium from the 1800s. 博物館展出了一個十九世紀的黃銅蒸氣容器。

meaning: 可汽化的；可蒸發的
sentences: The sample was not vaporizable at room temperature. 這個樣本在室溫下不可汽化。
Only vaporizable liquids were used in the trial. 試驗中只使用可汽化的液體。

meaning: 汽化；蒸發
sentences: The chart showed the vaporization of the alcohol. 圖表顯示了酒精的汽化過程。
We studied vaporization in the chemistry class. 我們在化學課上學習汽化。

meaning: 使汽化；使蒸發
sentences: The machine can vaporize water into a fine mist. 這台機器可以把水汽化成細霧。
Heat will vaporize the solvent very quickly. 熱量會很快使溶劑蒸發。

meaning: 蒸發器；汽化器
sentences: The clinic installed a new vaporizer in each room. 診所為每個房間都裝了一台新的汽化器。
A vaporizer can turn liquid medicine into a mist. 汽化器可以把液體藥物轉成霧狀。

meaning: 無蒸氣的；乾燥的
sentences: The desert air was dry and vaporless. 沙漠裡的空氣乾燥而沒有蒸氣。
The room stayed vaporless because the window was open. 因為窗戶開著，房間裡一直沒有蒸氣。

meaning: 像蒸氣的；飄渺的
sentences: The artist painted a vaporlike cloud over the lake. 畫家在湖面上畫了一朵像蒸氣般飄渺的雲。
A vaporlike haze covered the valley at dawn. 黎明時，一層飄渺的霧氣覆蓋了山谷。

meaning: 蒸氣記錄器；蒸氣圖
sentences: The team built a vaporograph for the experiment. 團隊為實驗做了一台蒸氣記錄器。
The vaporograph showed a thin trail above the liquid. 那張蒸氣圖顯示液體上方有一條細細的軌跡。

meaning: 與蒸氣記錄有關的
sentences: The engineer checked the vaporographic record of the test. 工程師查看了測試的蒸氣記錄。
The lab kept the vaporographic plate beside the notes. 實驗室把蒸氣記錄版和筆記放在一起。

meaning: 多蒸氣的；霧氣濛濛的
sentences: The hills looked vaporose at dawn. 黎明時分，山丘看起來霧氣濃濃。
A vaporose glow covered the harbor after rain. 雨後港口上方籠罩著一層霧氣般的微光。

meaning: 霧氣感；蒸氣濛濛的狀態
sentences: A vaporoseness hung over the field after sunrise. 日出後，田野上仍籠罩著一層霧氣感。
The painter tried to capture the vaporoseness of the coast. 那位畫家想捕捉海岸的霧氣感。

meaning: 蒸氣充滿；霧氣感
sentences: The room had a strange vaporosity after the rain. 雨後，房間裡有種奇怪的蒸氣濃度感。
The novel described the vaporosity of the winter morning. 那本小說描寫了冬日早晨的霧氣感。

meaning: 充滿蒸氣的；霧濛濛的
sentences: The canyon was vaporous in the morning mist. 峽谷在晨霧中顯得霧濛濛的。
Her vaporous dress moved like a cloud. 她那件飄逸的裙子像雲一樣飄動。

meaning: 霧氣般地；飄渺地
sentences: She drifted vaporously through the hallway. 她像霧氣一樣飄忽地走過走廊。
The smoke rose vaporously into the cold air. 煙霧飄渺地升入冷空氣中。

meaning: 蒸氣感；霧濛濛的特性
sentences: The lake had a quiet vaporousness at sunrise. 日出時湖面帶著安靜的霧氣感。
The photographer wanted to preserve the vaporousness of the scene. 那位攝影師想保留場景的霧氣感。

meaning: 不透蒸氣的
sentences: The package was sealed in a vaportight bag. 那個包裹被封在一個不透蒸氣的袋子裡。
A vaportight lid kept the sample dry. 不透蒸氣的蓋子讓樣本保持乾燥。

meaning: 霧氣重的；蒸氣般的
sentences: The mountain air felt cool and vapory. 山裡的空氣感覺涼爽而充滿霧氣。
A vapory mist covered the road after midnight. 半夜過後，一層霧氣籠罩了道路。

meaning: 鞭打的；與責打有關的
sentences: The teacher read the vapulary lines from the old text. 老師念出舊文中與鞭打有關的那些句子。
The book included a vapulary punishment for the rebels. 那本書提到一種與鞭打有關的懲罰。

meaning: 鞭打；責打
sentences: The villain threatened to vapulate the prisoner. 那個反派威脅要鞭打那名囚犯。
The old law said no one may vapulate a child. 舊法規定任何人都不得責打孩子。

meaning: 鞭打；毆打
sentences: The book described the harsh vapulation of captives. 那本書描述了囚犯遭受的殘酷鞭打。
The report condemned vapulation as cruel punishment. 報告譴責鞭打是一種殘酷的懲罰。

meaning: 與鞭打有關的
sentences: The law banned all vapulatory punishment. 法律禁止任何與鞭打相關的刑罰。
The historian studied the vapulatory customs of the period. 那位歷史學家研究了當時與鞭打有關的習俗。

meaning: 瓦拉，一種長度單位
sentences: A vara is still used as a unit of length in some places. 在一些地方，vara 仍被用作長度單位。
The old map marked the street length in varas. 舊地圖上把街道長度標成 varas。

meaning: 與 Varaha 野豬化身有關的
sentences: The sculpture shows a varahan form of the boar god. 這座雕刻呈現出與野豬神 Varaha 有關的形象。
The guide explained the varahan image in the temple carving. 導遊解釋了寺廟雕刻中的 varahan 形象。

meaning: 巨蜥；監視蜥蜴
sentences: A varan crossed the road near the river. 一隻巨蜥穿過了河邊的道路。
The zoo kept a large varan in a warm enclosure. 動物園把一隻大型巨蜥養在溫暖的圍欄裡。

meaning: 瓦朗厄爾，挪威東北部地名
sentences: Varanger is a remote region in far northeastern Norway. Varanger 是挪威極東北的一處偏遠地區。
The ship sailed past Varanger on a cold morning. 那艘船在寒冷的早晨駛過 Varanger。

meaning: 瓦蘭吉人；古代在東歐和拜占庭服役的北方戰士
sentences: The chronicle described the Varangi as northern warriors in foreign service. 那部編年史把 Varangi 描述成在外地服役的北方戰士。
A small band of Varangi guarded the river crossing. 一小隊 Varangi 守衛著河上的渡口。

meaning: 瓦蘭吉人的；與瓦蘭吉人有關的；瓦蘭吉人
sentences: The Varangian served in the imperial guard for many years. 那名瓦蘭吉人曾在帝國禁衛軍中服役多年。
Historians still study Varangian routes between the north and the east. 歷史學家至今仍研究北方與東方之間的瓦蘭吉路線。

meaning: 蜥蜴蜥屬科動物；巨蜥科動物
sentences: The museum displayed a varanid skeleton beside the reptile hall. 博物館在爬蟲館旁展示了一具巨蜥科動物的骨骼。
A varanid can move quickly despite its heavy body. 巨蜥科動物雖然身體笨重，動作卻很快。

meaning: 巨蜥科
sentences: The guide explained that monitor lizards belong to Varanidae. 導覽員解釋說，巨蜥屬於 Varanidae。
Scientists compared several species within Varanidae. 科學家比較了 Varanidae 內的幾個物種。

meaning: 像巨蜥的；巨蜥樣的
sentences: The fossil had a varanoid shape that suggested an ancient reptile. 那塊化石呈現巨蜥樣的外形，顯示它可能是古代爬蟲類。
Researchers noted a varanoid skull in the specimen. 研究人員在標本中注意到一個巨蜥樣的頭骨。

meaning: 巨蜥屬
sentences: Komodo dragons are members of the genus Varanus. 科摩多龍屬於巨蜥屬 Varanus。
The field guide listed Varanus as a group of large lizards. 那本野外圖鑑把 Varanus 列為大型蜥蜴的一個屬。

meaning: 女性名字；瓦爾達
sentences: Varda introduced herself as the new coordinator. Varda 自我介紹說她是新來的協調員。
The office called Varda to confirm the reservation. 辦公室打電話給 Varda 以確認訂位。

meaning: 亞美尼亞教會中的神學博士或高階神職稱號
sentences: The manuscript referred to him as a vardapet. 那份手稿把他稱作 vardapet。
A vardapet was invited to speak at the monastery. 一位 vardapet 被邀請到修道院演講。

meaning: 強健的；有精神的；活潑的
sentences: He still looked vardy after the long climb. 經過長途攀爬後，他看起來仍然很有精神。
The old horse remained vardy and willing to work. 那匹老馬依然強健，也很願意幹活。

meaning: 古語或方言中的變體詞；舊式拼寫
sentences: The editor marked vare as an old spelling variant in the margin. 編輯在頁邊把 vare 標成一種古老的拼寫變體。
The dictionary entry for vare was brief and dated. 詞典裡 vare 這個條目很短，而且帶有年代感。

meaning: 海藻灰；海草燒成的灰
sentences: The old factory used varec as a source of potash. 那座舊工廠把 varec 當作鉀鹽來源。
The beach was covered with dried varec after the storm. 暴風雨過後，海灘上覆蓋著晒乾的海藻灰或海草。

meaning: 光著頭的；赤頭的
sentences: The vareheaded child stood in the doorway, holding his cap. 那個光著頭的孩子站在門口，手裡拿著帽子。
He remained vareheaded even in the cold wind. 即使在冷風裡，他還是保持赤頭。

meaning: 寬鬆上衣；工作罩衫；外套式上衣
sentences: The sailor wore a blue vareuse over his shirt. 那名水手在襯衫外穿了一件藍色罩衫。
A linen vareuse kept the painter's clothes clean. 亞麻罩衫讓那位畫家的衣服保持乾淨。

meaning: 西班牙式便攜櫃；帶抽屜的箱櫃
sentences: The antique dealer opened a small vargueno with brass fittings. 古董商打開了一個帶黃銅配件的小型西班牙便攜櫃。
A vargueno can store papers and jewelry in many tiny drawers. 這種便攜櫃可以把文件和珠寶放進許多小抽屜裡。

meaning: 變體；變形；古舊或方言中的異形詞
sentences: The manuscript preserved a vari of the place name. 那份手稿保留了地名的一個變體寫法。
The lexicographer noted vari alongside the main form. 詞典編纂者把 vari 記在主詞形旁邊。

meaning: 可變的狀態或特徵。
sentences: The term variability refers to the state or characteristic of being variable. 術語“可變性”是指可變的狀態或特徵。
The lesson introduced variability as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了可變性作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 變數、易變的
sentences: The results of the experiment depend on several different variables. 實驗結果取決於幾個不同的變數。
The weather in the mountains is very variable and can change quickly. 山區的天氣非常多變（易變的）。

meaning: 可變性；不穩定性
sentences: The variableness of the weather made the trip difficult. 天氣的多變讓這趟旅行變得很困難。
Engineers studied the variableness of the signal before launch. 工程師在發射前研究了訊號的可變性。

meaning: 多變地；不一致地
sentences: The results changed variably from one test to another. 結果在一次次測試中變化不一。
He was variably helpful depending on his mood. 他的幫助程度會隨心情而不同。

meaning: 瓦蘭吉人；諾斯人的變體稱呼
sentences: The text used Variag for a warrior from the north. 這段文字用 Variag 指稱一名來自北方的戰士。
Scholars traced the name Variag through old chronicles. 學者沿著古編年史追溯 Variag 這個名稱。

meaning: 一般而言，協變和逆變。
sentences: Depending on the variance of the type constructor, the subtyping relation of the simple types may be either preserved, reversed, or ignored for the respective complex types. 根據類型建構函數的變化，對於對應的複雜類型，簡單類型的子類型關係可以被保留、反轉或忽略。
The term variance refers to covariance and contravariance generally. 術語“方差”通常指協方差和逆變。

meaning: 變異；差異；變化
sentences: The variancy in the samples was greater than expected. 樣本之間的差異比預期更大。
The report measured the variancy of the two methods. 報告衡量了兩種方法的差異程度。

meaning: 與類型或規格略有不同的東西。
sentences: All breeds of dog are variants of the species “Canis lupus familiaris”. 所有品種的狗都是「犬狼瘡」物種的變種。
The term variant refers to something that is slightly different from a type or norm. 術語變體是指與類型或規範略有不同的事物。

meaning: 變量；變異值
sentences: Each variate in the model represented a different measurement. 模型中的每個變量代表不同的測量值。
The statisticians compared one variate against another. 統計學家把一個變量和另一個變量作比較。

meaning: 變化、變體
sentences: The study found a significant variation in the local dialects of the region. 研究發現該地區的地方方言存在顯著變化。
There are several variations of the classic recipe that you can try. 你可以嘗試經典食譜的幾種不同變體。

meaning: 變分的；變化的；與變量變化有關的
sentences: The engineer used a variational method to improve the design. 工程師使用變分方法來改良設計。
The article discussed a variational approach to optimization. 那篇文章討論了一種用於最佳化的變分方法。

meaning: 研究變異的人；特別研究語言變異的學者
sentences: The variationist compared how speakers used the same word differently. 那位研究變異的學者比較說話者如何不同地使用同一個詞。
A variationist often studies language in real communities. 研究變異的學者通常會在真實社群中研究語言。

meaning: 多變的；變化多端的
sentences: The writer gave the character a variatious temper. 作者賦予這個角色一種變化多端的脾氣。
His variatious style kept the audience guessing. 他變化多端的風格讓觀眾一直猜不透。

meaning: 變異的；傾向變化的
sentences: The team used a variative strategy to handle each case. 團隊用一種會因情況而變化的策略處理每個案件。
A variative pattern appeared across the different samples. 不同樣本中出現了會變化的模式。

meaning: 以不同方式；變化地
sentences: The rules were applied variatively across the districts. 這些規則在各區被以不同方式施行。
The engine responded variatively to each load setting. 引擎對每個負載設定的反應都不一樣。

meaning: 變速器；變化裝置；使變化的人或物
sentences: The machine used a variator to adjust the speed. 那台機器用變速器來調整速度。
A variator can keep the motion smooth under changing conditions. 在條件改變時，變化裝置可以讓運動保持平順。

meaning: 靜脈曲張樣的；與曲張靜脈有關的
sentences: The doctor described the swollen vein as varical. 醫師把那條腫脹的靜脈描述為 varical。
A varical condition can cause discomfort and pressure. 靜脈曲張樣的情況會造成不適和壓迫感。

meaning: 有斑紋的；有條紋的；變色的
sentences: The cloth had a varicated surface with dark bands. 那塊布表面有斑紋，帶著深色條帶。
The artist liked the varicated pattern on the stone. 那位藝術家喜歡石頭上變化的斑紋圖案。

meaning: 變化；偏離；改變
sentences: The varication in tone made the speech more dramatic. 語氣的變化讓那場演說更有戲劇性。
The report noted a varication from the original plan. 報告指出了和原計畫不一致的變動。

meaning: 水痘
sentences: Chickenpox is the common name for varicella. 水痘是 varicella 的常用名稱。
The nurse explained how varicella spreads through close contact. 護士解釋了 varicella 如何透過近距離接觸傳播。

meaning: 水痘的；與水痘有關的
sentences: The doctor saw a varicellar rash on the child's arm. 醫生在孩子手臂上看見了水痘樣皮疹。
A varicellar infection can leave a patient tired. 水痘感染會讓病人感到疲倦。

meaning: 有水痘樣斑點的；呈水痘狀的
sentences: The skin looked varicellate under the bright lamp. 在亮燈下，那層皮膚看起來有水痘樣斑點。
The pathologist noted a varicellate eruption in the sample. 病理學家在樣本中注意到水痘狀皮疹。

meaning: 水痘樣皮疹；痘樣小斑
sentences: The doctor recorded a mild varicellation on the trunk. 醫生記錄到軀幹上有輕微的水痘樣皮疹。
The old handbook described varicellation as a spotted eruption. 舊手冊把 varicellation 描述為一種帶斑點的疹子。

meaning: 水痘樣的；像水痘的
sentences: The rash was varicelliform and spread in small spots. 那個疹子呈水痘樣，並以小點擴散。
A varicelliform lesion can resemble several childhood rashes. 水痘樣病灶可能像好幾種兒童常見疹子。

meaning: 類水痘的；像水痘的
sentences: The doctor described the spots as varicelloid. 醫生把那些斑點描述成類水痘的。
The child developed a varicelloid rash after the fever. 孩子退燒後出現了類水痘的疹子。

meaning: 水痘的；與水痘有關的
sentences: The report referred to a varicellous eruption in the patient. 報告提到病人出現了與水痘有關的皮疹。
A varicellous illness may begin with fever and fatigue. 水痘相關疾病可能先以發燒和疲倦開始。

meaning: 曲張靜脈；靜脈曲張
sentences: The doctor found varices in the patient's leg veins. 醫師在病人的腿部靜脈中發現了曲張靜脈。
Severe varices can cause pain and swelling. 嚴重的靜脈曲張會造成疼痛和腫脹。

meaning: 靜脈曲張樣的；像靜脈曲張的
sentences: The surgeon noted a variciform swelling near the ankle. 外科醫師注意到腳踝附近有靜脈曲張樣的腫脹。
The tissue had a variciform appearance under the microscope. 那塊組織在顯微鏡下呈現靜脈曲張樣外觀。

meaning: 眼瞼靜脈曲張；眼瞼靜脈膨脹
sentences: The old case report mentioned varicoblepharon of the eyelid. 舊病例報告提到眼瞼的 varicoblepharon。
A doctor rarely sees varicoblepharon in modern practice. 在現代臨床上，醫生很少見到 varicoblepharon。

meaning: 精索靜脈曲張
sentences: The patient was treated for a varicocele. 那位病人接受了精索靜脈曲張的治療。
A varicocele can sometimes cause discomfort or infertility. 精索靜脈曲張有時會造成不適或不孕。

meaning: 靜脈曲張樣的；像曲張靜脈的
sentences: The swelling had a varicoid shape along the leg. 那處腫脹沿著腿部呈靜脈曲張樣形狀。
A varicoid vessel may appear twisted and enlarged. 靜脈曲張樣血管可能看起來扭曲又擴大。

meaning: 多色的；色彩斑斕的
sentences: The bird had varicolored feathers that shone in the light. 那隻鳥有色彩斑斕的羽毛，在光下閃閃發亮。
She bought a varicolored scarf for the winter trip. 她買了一條多色圍巾準備冬季旅行。

meaning: 多彩的；顏色很多的
sentences: The varicolorous mural filled the wall with bright shapes. 那幅多彩壁畫讓整面牆充滿鮮明圖案。
A varicolorous pattern can make a plain room feel lively. 多彩的圖案能讓樸素的房間活潑起來。

meaning: 靜脈曲張的；膨脹扭曲的
sentences: Varicose veins can become painful after standing too long. 久站之後，靜脈曲張可能會變得疼痛。
The nurse explained how varicose swelling develops over time. 護士解釋了靜脈曲張的腫脹如何逐漸形成。

meaning: 有靜脈曲張的；已膨脹扭曲的
sentences: The varicosed vein was visible under the skin. 那條靜脈曲張的血管在皮膚下清楚可見。
A varicosed leg may ache after a long day. 靜脈曲張的腿在忙碌一天後可能會痠痛。

meaning: 靜脈曲張狀態；曲張性
sentences: The doctor measured the varicoseness of the affected vein. 醫生測量了受影響靜脈的曲張程度。
The report described a high degree of varicoseness in the leg. 那份報告描述那條腿有很高程度的靜脈曲張。

meaning: 靜脈曲張症
sentences: The clinic treated the patient for varicosis. 那家診所為病人治療靜脈曲張症。
Varicosis often affects the legs after years of strain. 靜脈曲張症常在多年負擔後影響腿部。

meaning: 靜脈曲張；曲張狀態
sentences: The scan showed a small varicosity near the ankle. 掃描顯示腳踝附近有一處小型靜脈曲張。
The doctor discussed the varicosity before recommending treatment. 醫生在建議治療前先討論了那處靜脈曲張。

meaning: 靜脈曲張切開術；曲張靜脈切開手術
sentences: The surgeon explained the risks of varicotomy before the operation. 外科醫師在手術前解釋了靜脈曲張切開術的風險。
Older medical texts mention varicotomy as a treatment for varicose veins. 較早的醫學文獻把 varicotomy 記作治療靜脈曲張的方法。

meaning: 小靜脈曲張；小型曲張靜脈
sentences: The report noted a varicula on the lower leg. 報告指出小腿上有一處小型曲張靜脈。
A varicula can be tiny but still cause discomfort. 小型曲張靜脈雖然很小，也可能造成不適。

meaning: 多樣的；各式各樣的
sentences: The class read varied articles about the same topic. 這個班級閱讀了關於同一主題的多種文章。
Her schedule stayed varied so she would not get bored. 她的行程安排得很有變化，這樣才不會感到無聊。

meaning: 以不同方式；多樣地
sentences: The students responded variedly to the new teaching style. 學生們對新的教學方式反應不一。
The same melody was played variedly by each musician. 同一段旋律被每位樂手以不同方式演奏。

meaning: 使斑駁多彩；使呈現不同顏色或花紋
sentences: Sunlight can variegate the leaves with bright patches. 陽光會讓葉片呈現斑駁的亮色塊。
The artist tried to variegate the background with softer tones. 那位藝術家試著用較柔和的色調讓背景變得有層次。

meaning: 斑駁的；色彩不一的；多樣的
sentences: The garden was full of variegated leaves and flowers. 花園裡到處都是斑駁的葉子和花朵。
They built a variegated team with people from many fields. 他們組成了一支背景多元的團隊。

meaning: 斑駁；多色變化；變化不一
sentences: The variegation on the plant leaves made them stand out. 那些植物葉片上的斑駁紋路讓它們特別醒目。
The painter used variegation to keep the wall from looking flat. 畫家利用色彩變化，讓牆面看起來不單調。

meaning: 使斑駁多彩的人或事物；變色器
sentences: The designer used a variegator to create a mottled effect. 設計師使用變色器做出斑駁效果。
In the lab, the variegator changed the sample into a mixed pattern. 在實驗室裡，這個變色裝置把樣本變成混合花紋。

meaning: 會變化的事物；造成差異的人或事物
sentences: The weather is a constant varier in mountain travel plans. 天氣在山區旅行計畫裡總是個變動因素。
He was a natural varier, always changing his route home. 他天生就是個愛變換的人，回家的路線總是常常更改。

meaning: 品種的；與變種或種類有關的
sentences: The winery printed varietal information on the label. 那家酒莊把品種資訊印在標籤上。
The botanist gave a varietal description of the sample. 那位植物學家對樣本做了品種說明。

meaning: 以品種方式；依不同變種地
sentences: The grapes were classified varietally by the vineyard. 葡萄園依品種分類這些葡萄。
The sample was handled varietally to preserve each strain. 為了保留每個品系，樣本被依品種方式處理。

meaning: 強調品種差異的觀念或做法；多樣化傾向
sentences: The writer's varietism showed in his love of unusual forms. 這位作家對不尋常形式的喜愛，顯示出他的多樣化傾向。
The museum's varietism kept the exhibition visually lively. 博物館對多樣性的強調，讓展覽在視覺上很有活力。

meaning: 重視多樣性或品種差異的人
sentences: The varietist preferred many small differences over one fixed style. 這位重視多樣性的人偏好多種細微差異，而不是單一固定風格。
As a varietist, she collected plants from many regions. 身為一位重視品種差異的人，她收集了來自許多地區的植物。

meaning: 種類
sentences: The store offers a wide variety of fresh fruit and vegetables. 這家店提供多樣化（種類繁多）的新鮮水果和蔬菜。
Variety is the spice of life, so try to experience new things. 多樣性是生活的調味品，所以試著去體驗新事物。

meaning: 多形的；形狀多樣的
sentences: The sculpture had a variform surface with many curves. 這座雕塑有著多形變化的表面和許多曲線。
Scientists described the cells as variform under the microscope. 科學家在顯微鏡下把這些細胞描述為多形的。

meaning: 具有多種形式的；形態多樣的
sentences: The variformed design made the building look playful. 這種多形態的設計讓建築看起來很活潑。
The map showed a variformed coastline with many bays. 地圖上顯示出一條形態多變、海灣很多的海岸線。

meaning: 多形性；形態多樣的狀態
sentences: The variformity of the shells made the collection impressive. 這些貝殼的多形性讓收藏品很有看頭。
Her study focused on the variformity of mountain flowers. 她的研究聚焦在山地花卉的多形變化。

meaning: 以多種形式；以多樣形態地
sentences: The clay dried variformly across the uneven tray. 泥土在不平整的托盤上以不同形態乾燥。
The pattern spread variformly over the fabric. 圖案以多種形態延展到布料上。

meaning: 漸變；逐步變化；層級變化
sentences: The teacher used varigradation to explain slow changes in color. 老師用漸變來說明顏色的緩慢變化。
The chart showed a clear varigradation from light to dark. 圖表清楚顯示了由淺到深的逐步變化。

meaning: 可變耦合器；可調耦合裝置
sentences: The engineer adjusted the variocoupler to improve the signal. 工程師調整了可變耦合器來改善訊號。
A variocoupler can help fine-tune a radio circuit. 可變耦合器能幫助微調無線電電路。

meaning: 天花
sentences: Variola was once a feared disease across the world. 天花曾經是全世界都害怕的疾病。
The old medical text described variola in great detail. 那本舊醫學書詳細描述了天花。

meaning: 天花的；與天花有關的
sentences: Doctors studied the variolar rash during the outbreak. 醫師在疫情爆發時研究天花樣皮疹。
The report mentioned a variolar infection in the village. 報告提到村子裡有天花感染。

meaning: Variolaria 屬地衣
sentences: The botanist placed the specimen in the genus Variolaria. 那位植物學家把標本歸入 Variolaria 屬。
Variolaria includes lichen species with a pockmarked look. Variolaria 包含外觀有凹點的地衣物種。

meaning: 使感染天花；以天花材料接種
sentences: Early physicians tried to variolate patients as a defense against the disease. 早期醫師曾試圖用天花材料接種病人，以對抗這種疾病。
The manuscript described how to variolate in the old practice. 那份手稿描述了舊時做法中如何進行天花接種。

meaning: 天花接種法；以天花材料作預防性接種
sentences: Variolation was an early method used before modern vaccines. 天花接種法是現代疫苗出現前的一種早期方法。
The lecture explained why variolation was eventually replaced. 這堂課解釋了為什麼天花接種法最後被取代。

meaning: 痘疱；天花疹；小痘
sentences: The doctor noted a tiny variole on the patient’s skin. 醫生注意到病人皮膚上有一個小痘疱。
Older books use variole for a pock or small pustule. 較早期的書會用 variole 指痘疱或小膿皰。

meaning: 天花的；痘疱狀的
sentences: The variolic pattern of the rash concerned the nurse. 那種天花樣的皮疹讓護士很擔心。
The text described a variolic lesion on the arm. 文本描述手臂上出現了痘疱狀病灶。

meaning: 像天花的；痘疱狀的
sentences: The doctor described the scar as varioliform. 醫生把那道疤描述為痘疱狀的。
A varioliform eruption can resemble old pockmarks. 痘疱狀的皮疹看起來可能像舊時的痘疤。

meaning: 杏仁狀斑晶岩；變斑岩
sentences: The geologist labeled the green stone as variolite. 地質學家把那塊綠色石頭標為 variolite。
Variolite often shows spotted or mottled patterns. variolite 常呈現斑點或斑駁的紋理。

meaning: 杏仁狀斑晶岩的；具有變斑岩特徵的
sentences: The rock showed a variolitic texture under the lens. 這塊岩石在放大鏡下呈現變斑岩質地。
The field notes described a variolitic layer in the cliff. 野外筆記描述懸崖中有一層變斑岩層。

meaning: 變斑岩化；形成變斑岩質地的過程
sentences: The report linked variolitization to slow cooling in the lava flow. 報告把變斑岩化與熔岩流中的緩慢冷卻連在一起。
Researchers studied variolitization in the ancient rock sample. 研究人員研究那塊古老岩樣中的變斑岩化現象。

meaning: 天花接種；以天花材料進行預防性接種
sentences: Variolization was an early form of immunization. 天花接種是免疫接種的一種早期形式。
The article compared variolization with modern vaccination. 那篇文章把天花接種與現代疫苗接種做了比較。

meaning: 類天花的病症；輕型天花
sentences: The doctor said the rash looked more like varioloid than true smallpox. 醫生說這種皮疹比較像輕型天花，而不是真正的天花。
Varioloid often produced a milder illness than variola. 類天花病症通常比天花本身輕微。

meaning: 天花的；有痘疹的
sentences: The doctor observed a variolous eruption on the skin. 醫師觀察到皮膚上有天花樣皮疹。
The old manuscript warned of variolous disease in the camp. 那份古手稿警告營地裡有天花疾病。

meaning: 天花疫苗；與天花相關的疫苗材料
sentences: The archive mentioned an early variolovaccine used in experiments. 檔案提到一種早期的天花疫苗，曾用於實驗。
The scientist compared variolovaccine with later vaccine strains. 科學家把天花疫苗和後來的疫苗株做了比較。

meaning: 與天花疫苗相關的牛痘材料；天花與牛痘混合相關物
sentences: The paper used variolovaccinia as a historical medical term. 那篇論文把 variolovaccinia 當作一個歷史醫學術語。
Researchers traced variolovaccinia in the old vaccine records. 研究人員在舊疫苗紀錄中追查 variolovaccinia 的痕跡。

meaning: 變量儀；測變器
sentences: The pilot watched the variometer to track climbing speed. 飛行員盯著變量儀來追蹤爬升速度。
A variometer helps measure small changes in a system. 變量儀能幫助測量系統中的細微變化。

meaning: 含多位編者註解的版本
sentences: The library kept a variorum edition of the poem. 圖書館收藏了一個帶多位編者註解的詩作版本。
Scholars compared notes in the variorum to settle the text. 學者們透過這個註解版本來比對並確定原文。

meaning: 染成多色的；帶有多重色調的
sentences: The cloth was variotinted and looked rich under the light. 那塊布料染成多色，在燈光下看起來很華麗。
He preferred variotinted paper for the art project. 他為了美術作業偏好多色調紙張。

meaning: 各種各樣的
sentences: He has traveled to various countries and seen different cultures. 他曾去過各個（各種各樣的）國家，看過不同的文化。
The study explores the various factors that affect human health. 該研究探索了影響人類健康的各種因素。

meaning: 以各種方式；多種多樣。
sentences: My caravan served variously as a changing room, office and bedroom. 我的露營車分別用作更衣室、辦公室和臥室。
The team responded variously to the change. 團隊對這項變化做出了不同的反應。

meaning: 多樣性；各式各樣
sentences: The variousness of the menu pleased everyone at dinner. 菜單的多樣性讓晚餐的每個人都很滿意。
Her writing showed a variousness of tone and style. 她的寫作呈現出多種語氣和風格。

meaning: 磷鋁石；綠色磷酸鹽礦物
sentences: The jeweler polished a piece of variscite for a pendant. 珠寶匠把一塊磷鋁石打磨成墜飾。
Variscite often appears in a soft green color. 磷鋁石通常呈現柔和的綠色。

meaning: 靜脈曲張；曲張靜脈
sentences: The old medical note used varisse for a swollen vein. 舊醫學筆記用 varisse 指腫脹的靜脈。
She asked the doctor about the painful varisse on her leg. 她向醫生詢問腿上那條疼痛的曲張靜脈。

meaning: 曲張靜脈；靜脈曲張
sentences: The surgeon examined a varix in the patient's leg. 外科醫師檢查了病人腿上的曲張靜脈。
A painful varix can make standing difficult. 疼痛的靜脈曲張會讓人站立困難。

meaning: 流氓；惡棍；卑鄙之人
sentences: The villain treated the messenger like a common varlet. 那個壞蛋把信使當成普通流氓看待。
The play's comic varlet kept causing trouble onstage. 劇中的搞笑惡棍不停在台上惹麻煩。

meaning: 小流氓；卑鄙小人
sentences: The old insult varletaille sounded both comic and rude. 舊式罵詞 varletaille 聽起來既滑稽又粗魯。
The novel used varletaille for a petty, sneaky rogue. 這本小說用 varletaille 來指一個卑鄙又狡猾的小混混。

meaning: 女惡棍；女流氓
sentences: The story's varletess tricked the guards with a smile. 故事裡的女流氓用微笑騙過了守衛。
He called the sharp-tongued thief a varletess. 他把那個口齒伶俐的小偷叫作女惡棍。

meaning: 流氓行為；惡棍群體
sentences: The town blamed the crime wave on a bit of varletry. 這個小鎮把犯罪浪潮歸咎於一群惡徒。
The king promised to drive out all varletry from the court. 國王承諾要把宮廷裡所有的流氓都趕出去。

meaning: 小流氓；小侍從
sentences: The child in the story was a clever little varletto. 故事裡的孩子是一個聰明的小流氓。
The drama used varletto as an affectionate insult. 這齣戲把 varletto 當成帶點戲謔的辱罵詞。

meaning: 害獸；討厭的傢伙
sentences: The farmer trapped the varment before it damaged the crops. 農夫在那隻害獸破壞作物前把它捕住了。
The old man called the noisy boy a varment with a grin. 那位老人笑著把吵鬧的男孩叫作討厭鬼。

meaning: 婆羅門等種姓階層；印度社會的四種社會等級
sentences: The lecture explained the meaning of varna in Hindu society. 這堂課解釋了婆羅門等種姓在印度社會中的意義。
The text linked varna with social class and duty. 文本把 varna 和社會階層及責任連在一起。

meaning: 種姓與人生四期的社會制度
sentences: The book described varnashrama as a traditional social order. 那本書把 varnashrama 描述為一種傳統社會秩序。
Historians studied varnashrama to understand old Hindu society. 歷史學家研究 varnashrama 來理解古代印度社會。

meaning: 清漆，面漆，塗漆於
sentences: Apply a layer of varnish to protect the wood from moisture. 塗上一層清漆以保護木頭不受潮。
He spent the afternoon varnishing the new dining table. 他花了一個下午的時間給新餐桌塗漆。

meaning: 塗過清漆的；表面光亮的
sentences: The varnished table reflected the lamp light clearly. 那張塗過清漆的桌子清楚地映出燈光。
His speech sounded polished and varnished rather than sincere. 他的演說聽起來很修飾、很光鮮，卻不太真誠。

meaning: 上清漆的人；塗漆工
sentences: The varnisher worked carefully along the edge of the cabinet. 塗清漆的人沿著櫃子的邊緣仔細作業。
She hired a varnisher to finish the wooden floor. 她請了一位上清漆的工人來完成木地板。

meaning: 塗清漆；上光漆的動作。
sentences: The varnishing of the table took most of the afternoon. 那張桌子的上漆工作花了大半個下午。
Good varnishing can protect wood from moisture and wear. 良好的上漆能保護木材免於受潮和磨損。

meaning: 像清漆的；有光澤且表面平滑的。
sentences: The surface had a varnishlike shine after it dried. 表面乾掉後呈現出像清漆一樣的光澤。
A varnishlike film covered the old metal handle. 一層像清漆的薄膜覆蓋在舊金屬把手上。

meaning: 上漆；上光漆後形成的層。
sentences: The antique's varnishment made the wood look warmer. 那件古董的上漆層讓木頭看起來更溫潤。
The restorer removed the old varnishment before repainting. 修復師在重新上色前先去掉舊漆層。

meaning: 帶有清漆感的；光亮而略黏的。
sentences: The paint left a varnishy film on the handle. 顏料在把手上留下一層帶漆感的薄膜。
His hair looked varnishy in the bright afternoon light. 在明亮的午後光線下，他的頭髮看起來有點油亮。

meaning: 瑞典語詞形，指應服兵役的；被徵召的。
sentences: The varnpliktige students were expected to report for service. 那些應服兵役的學生被要求報到服役。
The article described the varnpliktige men as conscripts. 那篇文章把 varnpliktige 的男性描述為徵兵役者。

meaning: 一種粗粒火成岩，含斜長石、輝石與相關礦物。
sentences: Geologists identified varnsingite in the quarry sample. 地質學家在採石場樣本中辨認出 varnsingite。
The core showed a layer of varnsingite mixed with other rocks. 岩芯顯示出一層與其他岩石混雜的 varnsingite。

meaning: 與卡斯坦佐·瓦羅里奧有關的；解剖學上的瓦羅里奧式。
sentences: The Varolian bridge is part of the brainstem. 瓦羅里奧橋是腦幹的一部分。
The professor traced the Varolian landmark on the diagram. 教授在圖上指出那個瓦羅里奧式解剖標誌。

meaning: Varronia 屬，一種熱帶灌木或小喬木的屬名。
sentences: The botanist marked the shrub as a Varronia species. 植物學家把那株灌木標記為 Varronia 屬的物種。
Several Varronia plants were growing along the path. 步道旁長著幾株 Varronia 植物。

meaning: 與古羅馬學者馬庫斯·特倫提烏斯·瓦羅有關的；瓦羅式的。
sentences: His Varronian essays followed an older scholarly style. 他那篇瓦羅式文章沿用了較古典的學術風格。
The library displayed a Varronian note on Roman satire. 圖書館展示了一則關於羅馬諷刺的瓦羅式註解。

meaning: 印度曆中的雨季；季風季節。
sentences: The festival began during the varsha season. 節慶在 varsha 雨季開始。
Farmers watch the varsha closely because it affects the crops. 農民密切關注 varsha，因為它會影響作物。

meaning: 代表某個機構（通常是高中、學院或大學）的主要運動隊伍。
sentences: The term varsity refers to the principal sports team representing an institution (usually a high school, college, or university.). 校隊一詞是指代表某個機構（通常是高中、學院或大學）的主要運動隊伍。
The lesson introduced varsity as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了大學作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 華沙的；華沙人的。
sentences: The Varsovian skyline changed quickly after the war. 戰後華沙的天際線迅速改變。
She wrote about Varsovian streets in winter. 她寫下冬天裡華沙街道的樣子。

meaning: 波蘭舞曲式的舞蹈；varsovienne 的另一種拼法。
sentences: The orchestra closed with a lively varsoviana. 管弦樂團用一支活潑的 varsoviana 作結。
We learned a simple varsoviana step in class. 我們在課堂上學了一個簡單的 varsoviana 舞步。

meaning: 印度神話中的水神與宇宙秩序之神。
sentences: In Hindu mythology, Varuna is the god of waters and cosmic order. 在印度神話中，Varuna 是水與宇宙秩序之神。
The poem invokes Varuna to bless the sea voyage. 這首詩呼喚 Varuna 祝福海上的航程。

meaning: 內翻畸形；尤其是 O 形腿或膝內翻。
sentences: The doctor noted a varus deformity in the knee. 醫師注意到那個膝蓋有內翻畸形。
Mild varus can affect the way a person walks. 輕度內翻畸形會影響一個人的走路方式。

meaning: 一年沉積形成的一對或一層層沉積物。
sentences: The lake bed preserved a clear varve from each year. 湖床保存了每年形成的清楚 varve。
Geologists used the varve layers to date the core sample. 地質學家利用 varve 層來判定岩芯樣本年代。

meaning: 呈層狀年沉積的；具 varve 層理的。
sentences: The core sample contained varved clay from the glacial lake. 岩芯樣本含有來自冰川湖的層狀黏土。
Varved sediments can record long climate changes. 層狀年沉積物可以記錄長期氣候變化。

meaning: 各不相同
sentences: The temperatures can vary significantly in this mountain region. 這個山區的氣溫變化可能（各不相同）很大。
Opinions on this controversial issue vary from person to person. 對這個有爭議問題的看法因人而異。

meaning: 以不同方式；程度不一地。
sentences: The colors faded varyingly under the sunlight. 顏色在陽光下褪得程度不一。
The data changed varyingly from one region to another. 數據在不同地區的變化程度各不相同。

meaning: 一種解剖學上的管道或管道狀器官，尤其是輸精管。
sentences: The surgeon tied off the vas during the procedure. 外科醫師在手術中綁住了那條輸精管。
The vas carries sperm away from the testis. 輸精管把精子從睪丸送出。

meaning: 瑞典瓦薩王朝；Vasa 王室。
sentences: The House of Vasa shaped early modern Sweden. 瓦薩王朝塑造了近代早期的瑞典。
A museum exhibit traced the rise of the Vasa dynasty. 博物館展覽追溯了瓦薩王朝的興起。

meaning: vas 的複數；解剖學上的各種管道或血管。
sentences: The diagram showed the vasa running along the organ. 圖示顯示那個器官旁邊有幾條 vasa。
The doctor checked the nearby vasa for blockages. 醫生檢查附近的 vasa 是否有阻塞。

meaning: 與解剖學上的血管或管道有關的。
sentences: The scan showed a vasal obstruction near the organ. 掃描顯示器官附近有一處血管性阻塞。
The doctor looked for a vasal connection before suturing. 醫生在縫合前先找血管連接。

meaning: 古代瓦斯孔人；古伊比利亞的一支民族。
sentences: Historians trace the Vascons to ancient Iberia. 歷史學家把 Vascons 追溯到古代伊比利亞。
The museum panel described the Vascons as mountain dwellers. 博物館展板把 Vascons 描述成山地居民。

meaning: 血管的；與血液、淋巴或植物輸導系統有關的。
sentences: The vascular tissue carries water and nutrients through the plant. 維管組織把水分和養分輸送到植物各處。
She was treated for a vascular condition in her leg. 她因腿部的血管問題接受治療。

meaning: 血管分布；血管豐富程度。
sentences: The scan showed increased vascularity around the lesion. 掃描顯示病灶周圍的血管分布增加了。
Bodybuilders sometimes talk about vascularity in their arms. 健美選手有時會談論手臂的血管線條。

meaning: 血管形成；使組織血管化的過程。
sentences: The wound showed new vascularization during healing. 傷口在癒合過程中出現了新的血管形成。
Vascularization is important for transplanted tissue. 血管化對移植組織很重要。

meaning: 使血管化；使有血管。
sentences: Surgeons may vascularize a graft before transplantation. 外科醫師可能會先讓移植物血管化，再進行移植。
The treatment helped vascularize the healing tissue. 這項治療幫助癒合中的組織形成血管。

meaning: 以血管方式；從血管角度來說。
sentences: The tissue was vascularly well supplied. 那塊組織在血管供應上很充足。
The graft needed to be vascularly connected to survive. 移植物需要在血管上接通才能存活。

meaning: 血管化的；佈滿血管的。
sentences: The vasculated leaf tissue was easy to trace under the microscope. 那片血管化的葉組織在顯微鏡下很容易辨認。
The report described the graft as fully vasculated. 報告把那個移植物描述為已完全血管化。

meaning: 血管系統；器官中的血管分布。
sentences: The surgeon studied the vasculature before making the incision. 外科醫師在切開前先研究血管分布。
The brain has a dense and delicate vasculature. 大腦有密集而精細的血管系統。

meaning: 具血管的；能形成或承載血管的。
sentences: The vasculiferous tissue helped move water through the stem. 那種具血管的組織幫助水分在莖內移動。
A vasculiferous structure can carry fluid efficiently. 具血管的結構能有效輸送液體。

meaning: 血管狀的；像小瓶或花瓶形的。
sentences: The vasculiform pod looked like a tiny vase. 那個血管狀的莢果看起來像一只小花瓶。
Microscopy revealed a vasculiform structure in the tissue. 顯微鏡觀察顯示組織裡有血管狀結構。

meaning: 血管炎；血管發炎。
sentences: The doctor diagnosed a form of vasculitis. 醫師診斷出一種血管炎。
Vasculitis can damage arteries and veins. 血管炎可能會傷害動脈和靜脈。

meaning: 血管生成；胚胎期血管系統的形成與分化。
sentences: Embryonic vasculogenesis builds the first blood vessels. 胚胎期的血管生成會建立最早的血管。
Researchers study vasculogenesis to understand development. 研究人員研究血管生成，以了解發育過程。

meaning: 與血管和淋巴系統有關的。
sentences: The vasculolymphatic channels drained fluid from the tissue. 血管與淋巴通道把組織中的液體引流出去。
The report described a vasculolymphatic pattern of spread. 報告描述了一種血管與淋巴性的擴散模式。

meaning: 控制血管運動的；與血管舒縮有關的。
sentences: The vasculomotor nerves help regulate vessel tone. 血管運動神經幫助調節血管張力。
The team studied a vasculomotor reflex in the lab. 團隊在實驗室研究了一種血管運動反射。

meaning: 多血管的；血管狀的；與植物維管組織有關的。
sentences: The vasculose tissue was easy to trace under the microscope. 那種多血管的組織在顯微鏡下很容易辨認。
Botanists used vasculose to describe the plant tissue. 植物學家用 vasculose 來描述那種植物組織。

meaning: 植物採集箱；植物學家裝標本的小盒子。
sentences: The botanist packed the fern into a vasculum. 植物學家把蕨類裝進採集箱裡。
A brass vasculum hung from the collector's shoulder. 一個黃銅採集箱掛在採集者的肩上。

meaning: 花瓶
sentences: A single red rose stood in a slender glass vase on the table. 一朵紅玫瑰插在桌上細長的玻璃花瓶裡。
Please handle the ancient ceramic vase with extreme care. 請極其小心地處理那個古代陶瓷花瓶。

meaning: 進行輸精管結紮術；切斷輸精管。
sentences: The vet can vasectomize the male animal if needed. 如果需要，獸醫可以替雄性動物做輸精管結紮。
Doctors sometimes vasectomize patients for permanent birth control. 醫生有時會替病人進行輸精管結紮作為永久避孕。

meaning: 輸精管結紮術。
sentences: He chose vasectomy as a permanent form of contraception. 他選擇輸精管結紮作為永久避孕方式。
The vasectomy was done in a short outpatient procedure. 輸精管結紮是在門診的短程序中完成的。

meaning: 一花瓶所能裝的量。
sentences: She placed a vaseful of lilies on the table. 她在桌上放了一花瓶百合。
A vaseful of roses brightened the room instantly. 一花瓶玫瑰立刻讓房間亮了起來。

meaning: 小花瓶；小型花瓶。
sentences: She put a single tulip in a tiny vaselet. 她把一朵鬱金香插進一個小花瓶裡。
The shelf was lined with blue ceramic vaselets. 架子上排著一列藍色陶製小花瓶。

meaning: 像花瓶的；花瓶形的。
sentences: The vase-like jar was taller than it was wide. 那個花瓶形的罐子比寬度高得多。
The opening had a vaselike curve at the top. 開口頂端呈現出花瓶般的弧度。

meaning: 凡士林；石油脂商品名。
sentences: She spread Vaseline on her chapped lips. 她在乾裂的嘴唇上抹了凡士林。
A small jar of Vaseline sat in the bathroom cabinet. 浴室櫃裡放著一小罐凡士林。

meaning: 製作花瓶的人；花瓶製造商。
sentences: The vasemaker sold hand-thrown porcelain pieces. 那位製瓶工匠販售手拉成形的瓷器。
Her grandfather worked as a vasemaker in the old town. 她祖父以前在老城裡當花瓶製造商。

meaning: 製作花瓶；花瓶製造這門工藝。
sentences: The workshop taught vasemaking to new apprentices. 工作坊教新學徒製作花瓶的技藝。
Vasemaking can be both practical and artistic. 製作花瓶既實用又有藝術性。

meaning: 以花瓶狀；像花瓶那樣。
sentences: The bottle narrowed vasewise toward the neck. 那個瓶子朝瓶頸處呈花瓶狀收束。
The pot flared vasewise at the top. 那個陶罐在頂部向外展開成花瓶狀。

meaning: 花瓶插花；將花材安排在花瓶中的裝飾工作。
sentences: She learned vasework from her grandmother. 她向祖母學習花瓶插花。
The florist spent the morning on vasework for the wedding. 花店老闆整個早上都在為婚禮做插花工作。

meaning: 瓦什黑吉石；一種稀有的含水鋁磷酸鹽礦物。
sentences: The mineral dealer labeled the white specimen as vashegyite. 礦石商把那塊白色標本標成 vashegyite。
Vashegyite is a rare mineral of interest to collectors. Vashegyite 是一種令收藏家感興趣的稀有礦物。

meaning: 以血管為中心的；圍繞血管的。
sentences: The vasicentric pattern of cells was easy to see. 那種以血管為中心的細胞排列很容易看出來。
Researchers described the lesion as vasicentric. 研究人員把那個病灶描述成血管中心型。

meaning: vasicine 生物鹼；來自 Justicia adhatoda 等植物的一種喹唑啉生物鹼。
sentences: Researchers isolated vasicine from the plant extract. 研究人員從植物萃取物中分離出 vasicine。
Vasicine is studied for its pharmacological effects. Vasicine 因其藥理作用而受到研究。

meaning: active in or affecting blood vessels
sentences: The report described the compound as vasifactive in the bloodstream. 那份報告把這種化合物描述為會在血流中影響血管的物質。
A vasifactive agent can change vessel tone very quickly. 血管作用性藥物可以很快改變血管張力。

meaning: bearing or containing blood vessels
sentences: The tissue was described as vasiferous because it held many small vessels. 那塊組織因為含有許多小血管而被描述為有血管的。
Surgeons prefer vasiferous grafts when they need rich circulation. 外科醫師在需要良好循環時偏好含血管的移植物。

meaning: shaped like a vessel or tube
sentences: The microscope slide showed a vasiform outline. 顯微鏡切片呈現出器皿狀的輪廓。
Its vasiform cavity made the structure easy to identify. 它那個管狀的腔室讓這個結構很容易辨認。

meaning: causing blood vessels to narrow
sentences: The vasoconstricting spray reduced the redness for a short time. 那種收縮血管的噴劑短時間內減輕了紅腫。
A vasoconstricting response can lower skin blood flow. 收縮血管的反應會降低皮膚的血流。

meaning: narrowing of blood vessels
sentences: Cold weather can trigger vasoconstriction in the fingers. 寒冷天氣會讓手指出現血管收縮。
The doctor explained that vasoconstriction helps preserve heat. 醫生解釋說，血管收縮有助於保留體熱。

meaning: causing blood vessels to constrict
sentences: The medication has a vasoconstrictive effect on the skin. 這種藥物對皮膚有收縮血管的作用。
Doctors monitor vasoconstrictive drugs carefully after surgery. 醫師在手術後會謹慎監測具收縮血管作用的藥物。

meaning: an agent that narrows blood vessels
sentences: The doctor gave him a vasoconstrictor to control the bleeding. 醫生給了他一種血管收縮劑來控制出血。
A vasoconstrictor can raise blood pressure by tightening vessels. 血管收縮劑可以透過收縮血管來升高血壓。

meaning: a crown-like ring of blood vessels
sentences: The anatomy diagram labeled the ring of vessels as a vasocorona. 那張解剖圖把那圈血管標成 vasocorona。
A vasocorona can appear as a halo around a structure. 血管冠有時會像某個結構周圍的光環。

meaning: relating to blood vessels in dentin
sentences: The old dental note used the word vasodentinal for the tissue pattern. 舊牙科筆記用 vasodentinal 來描述那種組織型態。
A vasodentinal change can be seen only under close inspection. 血管性牙本質變化通常要仔細觀察才看得出來。

meaning: dentine with vascular or vessel-like features
sentences: The specimen showed a thin layer of vasodentine. 那份標本顯示出一層薄薄的 vasodentine。
Researchers compared vasodentine with ordinary dentine in the sample. 研究人員把樣本中的 vasodentine 和一般牙本質作比較。

meaning: widening of blood vessels
sentences: The medication caused vasodilatation in the arms and legs. 那種藥物讓手臂和腿的血管擴張。
Vasodilatation can increase blood flow to warm the body. 血管擴張可以增加血流，幫助身體保暖。

meaning: a substance that dilates blood vessels
sentences: The article referred to the new drug as a vasodilatin. 那篇文章把這種新藥稱為血管擴張劑。
A vasodilatin may lower pressure by opening the vessels. 血管擴張劑可以透過打開血管來降低壓力。

meaning: causing blood vessels to widen
sentences: The vasodilating ointment eased the tight feeling in her hands. 那種擴張血管的藥膏減輕了她手部的緊繃感。
A vasodilating response can make the skin look warmer. 擴張血管的反應會讓皮膚看起來更溫暖。

meaning: widening of blood vessels
sentences: Exercise can cause vasodilation in working muscles. 運動會讓正在工作的肌肉出現血管擴張。
Vasodilation is one reason the face may turn red in heat. 血管擴張是人們在高溫下臉變紅的原因之一。

meaning: an agent that widens blood vessels
sentences: The doctor prescribed a vasodilator for his chest pain. 醫生為他的胸痛開了一種血管擴張劑。
A vasodilator helps blood move more easily through narrowed vessels. 血管擴張劑有助於血液更順利通過狹窄的血管。

meaning: a surgical connection between the vas deferens and the epididymis
sentences: The surgeon explained that vasoepididymostomy is a delicate operation. 外科醫師解釋說，vasoepididymostomy 是一種精細手術。
A vasoepididymostomy may be used when the normal passage is blocked. 當正常通道阻塞時，可能會使用 vasoepididymostomy。

meaning: acting on or affecting blood vessels
sentences: The compound was described as vasofactive in the lab report. 實驗報告把這種化合物描述為會作用於血管。
A vasofactive medicine can alter circulation within minutes. 血管作用性藥物可以在幾分鐘內改變循環。

meaning: forming new blood vessels
sentences: The study focused on vasoformative tissue growth. 那項研究聚焦在形成血管的組織生長。
A vasoformative response can help repair damaged tissue. 形成血管的反應有助於修復受損組織。

meaning: a ganglion that controls blood vessels
sentences: The anatomy text referred to a vasoganglion near the nerve bundle. 解剖學課本提到神經束附近有一個 vasoganglion。
A vasoganglion helps regulate vessel tone in a small region. vasoganglion 有助於調節局部區域的血管張力。

meaning: having abnormally high vascular tone
sentences: The doctor used vasohypertonic to describe the tight arterial response. 醫師用 vasohypertonic 來描述那種緊繃的動脈反應。
A vasohypertonic state can restrict blood flow. 血管高張狀態會限制血流。

meaning: having abnormally low vascular tone
sentences: The note described the vessels as vasohypotonic after the shock. 那份記錄在休克後把血管描述為低張狀態。
A vasohypotonic reaction can leave the skin pale and warm. 低張的血管反應可能讓皮膚蒼白而溫熱。

meaning: an agent that inhibits vascular activity
sentences: The researcher identified the chemical as a vasoinhibitor. 研究人員把這種化學物質辨認為血管抑制劑。
A vasoinhibitor may slow the body's normal vessel response. 血管抑制劑可能減慢身體正常的血管反應。

meaning: inhibiting vascular activity
sentences: The medicine had a vasoinhibitory effect on the circulation. 這種藥物對循環有抑制血管的效果。
Doctors watched for vasoinhibitory reactions after the injection. 醫師在注射後留意是否出現抑制血管的反應。

meaning: ligation of a blood vessel or vas deferens
sentences: The surgeon performed vasoligation to stop the leak. 外科醫師進行 vasoligation 來止住滲漏。
Vasoligation is a rare term in modern medical writing. vasoligation 是現代醫學寫作中較少見的術語。

meaning: a ligature applied to a blood vessel or vas deferens
sentences: The old surgical manual mentioned a vasoligature in the procedure. 舊外科手冊在步驟中提到了一個 vasoligature。
A vasoligature can be used to tie off a small vessel. vasoligature 可用來結紮一條小血管。

meaning: rhythmic movement or change in the caliber of blood vessels
sentences: Vasomotion helps vessels adjust to changing conditions. 血管節律運動能幫助血管適應變化的環境。
The chart showed normal vasomotion in the small arteries. 圖表顯示小動脈有正常的 vasomotion。

meaning: controlling the diameter of blood vessels
sentences: The vasomotor nerves help regulate blood flow. 血管運動神經有助於調節血流。
A vasomotor reaction can make the face flush. 血管運動反應會讓臉部泛紅。

meaning: relating to vasomotor activity
sentences: The paper discussed vasomotorial control in the nervous system. 那篇論文討論了神經系統中的血管運動控制。
A vasomotorial disorder may affect temperature regulation. 血管運動障礙可能影響體溫調節。

meaning: relating to vasomotor function
sentences: The doctor noted a vasomotoric change after the shock. 醫師在休克後注意到血管運動性的變化。
Vasomotoric symptoms may come and go quickly. 血管運動性症狀可能來得快、去得也快。

meaning: relating to vasomotor function
sentences: The lecture compared vasomotory and sensory control. 那堂課比較了血管運動性控制和感覺控制。
A vasomotory problem can disturb normal circulation. 血管運動性問題會干擾正常循環。

meaning: a nervous disorder affecting blood vessels
sentences: The specialist suggested vasoneurosis as one possible explanation. 專科醫師把 vasoneurosis 列為一種可能的解釋。
A vasoneurosis may cause unusual changes in vessel tone. vasoneurosis 可能造成血管張力出現異常變化。

meaning: partial paralysis or weakness of vasomotor function
sentences: The report linked vasoparesis to poor vascular response. 報告把 vasoparesis 與不良的血管反應連在一起。
After the injury, vasoparesis made the limb feel cold. 受傷後，vasoparesis 讓那條肢體摸起來很冷。

meaning: an agent that raises blood pressure by constricting vessels
sentences: The ICU team used a vasopressor to keep her pressure stable. 加護病房團隊使用血管加壓劑來維持她的血壓穩定。
A vasopressor is often given in emergencies. 血管加壓劑常用於緊急狀況。

meaning: puncture of a blood vessel or vas deferens
sentences: The old note described a vasopuncture used to relieve pressure. 舊筆記描述了一次用來減壓的 vasopuncture。
A vasopuncture must be done with great care. vasopuncture 必須非常小心地進行。

meaning: a reflex response involving blood vessels
sentences: The vasoreflex helped the body adjust to standing up. 血管反射幫助身體適應站立。
A strong vasoreflex can change blood pressure very quickly. 強烈的血管反射可以很快改變血壓。

meaning: suturing of a blood vessel
sentences: The surgeon repaired the tear with vasorrhaphy. 外科醫師用 vasorrhaphy 修補了那個撕裂處。
Vasorrhaphy is a precise procedure on delicate tissue. vasorrhaphy 是一種針對精細組織的精準手術。

meaning: incision or cutting into a blood vessel or vas deferens
sentences: The medical history mentioned a vasosection years ago. 病歷提到多年前做過 vasosection。
A vasosection may be performed to open the passage. 進行 vasosection 可能是為了打開通道。

meaning: sudden constriction of blood vessels
sentences: The patient developed vasospasm after the procedure. 病人在處置後出現了血管痙攣。
Severe vasospasm can reduce blood supply to the tissue. 嚴重的血管痙攣會減少組織的供血。

meaning: relating to or causing vasospasm
sentences: The study examined vasospastic reactions in cold conditions. 那項研究檢視了寒冷條件下的血管痙攣反應。
A vasospastic episode can cause pain and numbness. 血管痙攣發作可能造成疼痛和麻木。

meaning: an agent that stimulates vascular tone
sentences: The doctor described the supplement as a mild vasostimulant. 醫生把那種補充劑描述為輕微的血管刺激劑。
A vasostimulant can help restore circulation after shock. 血管刺激劑有助於在休克後恢復循環。

meaning: surgical opening into a blood vessel or vas deferens
sentences: The older textbook described a vasostomy in the procedure list. 舊教科書在手術列表中描述了 vasostomy。
A vasostomy creates an opening for drainage or access. vasostomy 會建立一個用於引流或進入的開口。

meaning: incision into a blood vessel or vas deferens
sentences: The surgeon chose vasotomy to reach the blocked channel. 外科醫師選擇 vasotomy 來到達阻塞的通道。
A vasotomy is a small but delicate operation. vasotomy 是一種小而精細的手術。

meaning: increasing vascular tone
sentences: The medicine had a vasotonic effect during the test. 那種藥物在測試中表現出增加血管張力的效果。
A vasotonic response may support blood pressure. 增加血管張力的反應可能有助於維持血壓。

meaning: an instrument used to crush a blood vessel or vas deferens
sentences: The old surgical set included a vasotribe for special cases. 舊式手術器械組裡有一把特殊用途的 vasotribe。
A vasotribe was once used in procedures that needed crushing. vasotribe 過去曾用於需要壓碎的手術程序。

meaning: crushing of a blood vessel or vas deferens
sentences: The term vasotripsy appears in older surgical writing. vasotripsy 這個詞出現在較早期的外科文獻中。
Vasotripsy was used to describe a crushing procedure. vasotripsy 用來描述一種壓碎式手術。

meaning: nourishing or supporting blood vessels
sentences: The supplement was said to have a vasotrophic effect. 那種補充劑被說成具有滋養血管的效果。
Healthy exercise can support vasotrophic function in the body. 規律運動可以幫助身體維持血管營養功能。

meaning: surgical removal of the vas deferens and seminal vesicle
sentences: The specialist explained that vasovesiculectomy is rarely needed. 專科醫師解釋說 vasovesiculectomy 很少需要。
A vasovesiculectomy removes both the vas and the seminal vesicle. vasovesiculectomy 會移除輸精管和精囊。

meaning: an obscure or obsolete medicinal term
sentences: The old pharmacology note mentioned vasquine as a rare term. 舊藥理筆記把 vasquine 當作一個罕見詞。
A student may meet vasquine only in historical dictionaries. 學生可能只會在歷史字典裡看到 vasquine。

meaning: 任何直接下屬都受到對上級的這種誓言的約束。
sentences: The king ordered his vassals to join him on the crusade unless they had a written note signed by the archbishop or pope. 國王命令他的封臣加入他的十字軍東徵，除非他們有大主教或教宗簽署的書面照會。
The term vassal refers to Any direct subordinate bound by such vows to a superior. 附庸一詞是指受上級誓言約束的任何直接下屬。

meaning: the state of being a vassal
sentences: The kingdom's vassalage lasted for many generations. 那個王國的附庸狀態延續了好幾代。
The history lesson explained how vassalage shaped local power. 歷史課解釋了附庸制度如何塑造地方權力。

meaning: the condition or body of vassals
sentences: The poem spoke of the king and his vassaldom. 那首詩提到了國王和他的附庸群。
In medieval writing, vassaldom often implied loyalty and dependence. 在中世紀文獻中，vassaldom 常帶有忠誠與依附的意思。

meaning: 沒有封臣的；不具附庸的
sentences: The kingdom was vassaless after the old alliances collapsed. 舊同盟瓦解後，這個王國變得沒有封臣。
A vassaless ruler had little local support in the region. 一位沒有附庸的統治者在當地幾乎得不到支持。

meaning: 封臣的；附庸的
sentences: The historian described the treaty as vassalic in nature. 那位歷史學家把這份條約描述為具有封臣關係的性質。
The army demanded vassalic loyalty from the smaller states. 軍隊要求小國表現出附庸式的忠誠。

meaning: 附庸關係；臣屬制度
sentences: The book explains how vassalism shaped medieval politics. 那本書解釋了附庸制度如何形塑中世紀政治。
Vassalism often tied military service to land ownership. 附庸關係常把軍事服役和土地所有權綁在一起。

meaning: 附庸身分；臣屬狀態
sentences: His vassality meant he owed service to the lord. 他的附庸身分表示他必須對領主盡義務。
The term vassality appears often in older legal histories. vassality 這個詞常出現在較早的法律史著作中。

meaning: 使成為附庸；使臣服
sentences: The conqueror tried to vassalize the neighboring kingdom. 征服者試圖使鄰國成為附庸。
No empire can vassalize every region forever. 沒有任何帝國能永遠讓每個地區都臣服。

meaning: 沒有封臣的；無附庸的
sentences: The petty king was vassalless and weak. 那位小國王沒有封臣，勢力也很弱。
A vassalless realm can be vulnerable to attack. 沒有附庸的王國可能更容易受到攻擊。

meaning: 封臣群體；附庸階層
sentences: The lord relied on his vassalry for soldiers and taxes. 那位領主仰賴他的封臣群體提供士兵和稅收。
The vassalry gathered in the hall to hear the decree. 封臣們聚集在大廳裡聽取命令。

meaning: 封臣身分；臣屬關係
sentences: He accepted vassalship in exchange for protection. 他接受封臣身分，換取保護。
The contract defined the duties of vassalship clearly. 合約清楚規定了臣屬關係中的義務。

meaning: 男子名；姓氏
sentences: Vassos introduced himself as the new editor. Vassos 自我介紹說他是新來的編輯。
The letter was addressed to Vassos and his family. 那封信是寄給 Vassos 和他的家人的。

meaning: 廣闊的、巨大的、大量的
sentences: The Sahara Desert is a vast area of sand and rock in northern Africa. 撒哈拉沙漠是非洲北部一片廣闊的沙石地帶。
The project will require a vast amount of money and resources to complete. 該專案將需要大量的資金和資源才能完成。

meaning: 毀壞；蹂躪；使荒廢
sentences: The fire vastated the entire hillside village. 那場火災把整個山坡村莊毀壞了。
War can vastate farmland and roads alike. 戰爭能同時蹂躪農地和道路。

meaning: 毀壞；荒廢；蹂躪
sentences: The report described the vastation left by the flood. 那份報告描述了洪水留下的毀壞。
After the battle, vastation spread across the valley. 戰鬥結束後，荒廢蔓延到整個山谷。

meaning: 廣闊；浩瀚
sentences: The vastidity of the desert surprised every traveler. 沙漠的浩瀚讓每位旅人都很驚訝。
She wrote about the vastidity of the night sky. 她寫下夜空的廣闊無垠。

meaning: 廣大地；非常地
sentences: The crowd extended vastily across the square. 人群廣大地延伸到廣場各處。
The forest seemed vastily larger at dusk. 黃昏時，森林看起來大得多。

meaning: 廣闊；無邊無際
sentences: The vastiness of the ocean made him feel small. 海洋的無邊無際讓他覺得自己很渺小。
She paused to admire the vastiness of the plain. 她停下來欣賞平原的遼闊。

meaning: 廣大；浩大；廣闊程度
sentences: The vastitude of the museum collection was impressive. 博物館館藏的廣大規模令人印象深刻。
He wrote about the vastitude of the mountains in winter. 他寫下冬季群山的浩大景象。

meaning: 廣闊；浩瀚
sentences: The poem praised the vastity of the open sea. 那首詩讚美了開闊海洋的浩瀚。
The vastity of the field made the sky feel even larger. 那片原野的遼闊讓天空顯得更大。

meaning: 極大，以極大的方式。
sentences: If someone acts vastly, they do so in a way that is greatly, in a vast manner. 如果某人行動巨大，那麼他們會以一種偉大的方式、以一種巨大的方式這樣做。
The speaker responded vastly during the discussion. 演講者在討論中做出了廣泛的回應。

meaning: 廣大；浩瀚；遼闊
sentences: The vastness of space still amazes scientists. 太空的浩瀚仍然讓科學家驚嘆。
We stood silent before the vastness of the canyon. 面對峽谷的遼闊，我們都沉默了。

meaning: 廣大的；遼闊的
sentences: The vasty plain stretched to the horizon. 那片遼闊的平原一直延伸到地平線。
They crossed a vasty valley under a cold wind. 他們在冷風中穿越一個廣大的山谷。

meaning: 梵語詞，意為財富；亦可指印度神話中的瓦蘇神族
sentences: The glossary notes that vasu can mean wealth in Sanskrit. 詞彙表註明 vasu 在梵語裡可指財富。
A scholar linked vasu to the ancient Vedic pantheon. 一位學者把 vasu 與古代吠陀神系聯繫起來。

meaning: 瓦蘇戴瓦；印度神話與人名
sentences: Vasudeva is a familiar name in Hindu tradition. Vasudeva 是印度傳統中常見的名字。
The text mentioned Vasudeva in a story about Krishna. 文本在一則關於克里希納的故事中提到了 Vasudeva。

meaning: 瓦蘇達拉；印度女性名字，亦可指大地
sentences: Vasundhara greeted the audience with a warm smile. Vasundhara 以溫暖的笑容向觀眾致意。
In Sanskrit poetry, Vasundhara can refer to the earth. 在梵語詩歌裡，Vasundhara 可以指大地。

meaning: 大桶；大缸；槽
sentences: The winemaker poured the juice into a large vat. 釀酒師把果汁倒進一個大桶裡。
The vat was too heavy to move without help. 這個大缸太重，沒有人幫忙搬不動。

meaning: 娑羅雙屬；一種熱帶樹木屬名
sentences: The botanist labeled the specimen as a species of Vateria. 那位植物學家把標本標示為 Vateria 屬植物。
Trees in the genus Vateria grow in tropical forests. Vateria 屬的樹木生長在熱帶森林中。

meaning: 一大桶的量；滿桶
sentences: The chef needed a vatful of soup for the event. 廚師為了活動需要一大桶湯。
A vatful of paint stood ready beside the wall. 牆邊已經放好一滿桶油漆。

meaning: 預言的；神諭的
sentences: Her words had a vatic tone that silenced the room. 她的話帶著預言般的語氣，讓整個房間安靜下來。
The poet liked the vatic style of ancient oracles. 那位詩人喜歡古代神諭那種預言式的風格。

meaning: 預言地；神諭般地
sentences: He spoke vatically, as if he already knew the outcome. 他以預言般的方式說話，彷彿已經知道結果。
The line was delivered vatically and slowly. 那句台詞被以神諭般的語氣慢慢說出。

meaning: 梵蒂岡；教廷所在地
sentences: The delegation traveled to the Vatican for the meeting. 代表團前往梵蒂岡參加會議。
The Vatican issued a brief statement after the event. 事件之後，梵蒂岡發布了一則簡短聲明。

meaning: 與梵蒂岡有關的
sentences: The article used a vaticanal perspective on church affairs. 那篇文章用梵蒂岡相關的角度看待教會事務。
A vaticanal archive stores many important documents. 梵蒂岡相關檔案館保存了許多重要文件。

meaning: 梵蒂岡的；與教廷有關的
sentences: The vaticanic library held several rare manuscripts. 那座梵蒂岡相關圖書館收藏了幾份珍本手稿。
He wrote a vaticanic essay on papal history. 他寫了一篇關於教宗史的梵蒂岡式論文。

meaning: 與梵蒂岡有關的；教廷式的
sentences: The writer gave the chapter a vaticanical title. 那位作者替章節取了一個帶有梵蒂岡色彩的標題。
The old report had a vaticanical focus on doctrine. 那份舊報告以教義為重心，帶有教廷式語氣。

meaning: 教廷主義；擁護梵蒂岡權威的立場
sentences: The essay criticized Vaticanism in modern politics. 那篇文章批評了現代政治中的教廷主義。
Some historians connected Vaticanism with central church control. 有些歷史學家把教廷主義和教會集權聯繫起來。

meaning: 教廷派支持者；研究梵蒂岡事務的人
sentences: The Vaticanist followed every announcement from Rome. 那位教廷派觀察者關注羅馬發出的每一則公告。
A Vaticanist may study papal decisions for years. 研究梵蒂岡事務的人可能會多年研究教宗決策。

meaning: 梵蒂岡化；受教廷影響的過程
sentences: The paper discussed the Vaticanization of local rituals. 那篇論文討論了地方儀式的梵蒂岡化。
Vaticanization can change the tone of a church movement. 梵蒂岡化可能改變教會運動的風格。

meaning: 使梵蒂岡化；使受教廷影響
sentences: Some critics said the policy would Vaticanize the movement. 一些批評者說這項政策會讓該運動梵蒂岡化。
The bishop refused to Vaticanize the local traditions. 主教拒絕讓當地傳統被教廷化。

meaning: 殺害預言者；弒先知
sentences: The novel described the king's crime as a vaticide. 那本小說把國王的罪行描述為弒先知。
The term vaticide is rare in modern English. vaticide 這個詞在現代英語中很罕見。

meaning: 預言的；神諭的
sentences: The old poem has a strong vaticinal mood. 那首舊詩帶有強烈的預言氣氛。
Her vaticinal remarks made everyone uneasy. 她帶有預言意味的話讓大家都不安。

meaning: 預言的；說預言的
sentences: The vaticinant monk spoke in a quiet voice. 那位預言式的修士低聲說話。
The writer gave the character a vaticinant presence. 作者賦予這個角色一種像預言者的氣質。

meaning: 預言；預告
sentences: The oracle seemed to vaticinate a coming storm. 神諭者似乎預告了一場即將來臨的風暴。
He liked to vaticinate events before they happened. 他喜歡在事情發生前就先預言。

meaning: 預言；預告
sentences: Her vaticination about the drought proved correct. 她對乾旱的預言後來被證實是對的。
The text reads like a vaticination of future conflict. 那段文字讀起來像是在預告未來的衝突。

meaning: 預言者；占卜者
sentences: The villagers treated the old man as a vaticinator. 村民把那位老人當作預言者。
A vaticinator in the story warned of danger ahead. 故事中的一位占卜者警告前方有危險。

meaning: 預言的；預示的
sentences: The dream had a vaticinatory quality. 那個夢帶有預示性的質感。
His speech sounded strangely vaticinatory. 他的演講聽起來有種奇特的預言意味。

meaning: 女預言者；女先知
sentences: The village legend spoke of a vaticinatress in the hills. 村裡傳說山中住著一位女預言者。
The play cast her as a wise vaticinatress. 那齣戲把她塑造成一位睿智的女先知。

meaning: 女預言者；女占卜者
sentences: The ancient tale included a powerful vaticinatrix. 那則古老故事裡有一位強大的女預言者。
She was remembered as a mysterious vaticinatrix. 她被人們記成一位神祕的女占卜者。

meaning: 製桶工；製大缸的人
sentences: The vatmaker repaired the wooden barrel by hand. 那位製桶工親手修理木桶。
An experienced vatmaker can shape heavy staves quickly. 有經驗的製桶工能很快做出厚重的桶板。

meaning: 製桶；製缸；桶匠工藝
sentences: He learned vatmaking from his grandfather. 他從祖父那裡學會了製桶。
The workshop still teaches the old vatmaking craft. 那間工坊至今仍教授古老的製桶技藝。

meaning: 看管大桶的人；製桶工
sentences: The vatman checked the fermentation tank every morning. 那位看管大桶的人每天早上都檢查發酵槽。
A vatman in the brewery wore heavy gloves. 釀造廠裡的看桶工戴著厚手套。

meaning: 瓦泰盧圖；古代泰米爾字母書寫系統
sentences: The inscription was written in Vatteluttu. 那段銘文是用 Vatteluttu 書寫的。
Scholars study Vatteluttu to understand early Tamil history. 學者研究 Vatteluttu 以了解早期泰米爾歷史。

meaning: 製桶工；看管桶槽的人
sentences: The vatter inspected the casks before dawn. 那位製桶工在天亮前檢查酒桶。
In the old factory, the vatter handled the heavy vats. 在那座舊工廠裡，看桶槽的人負責處理沉重的大桶。

meaning: 古文字中對字母 V 或 W 的名稱；亦可指相關字母
sentences: The manuscript used vau as an old letter name. 那份手稿用 vau 作為舊式字母名稱。
In some alphabets, vau refers to a Semitic letter. 在某些字母系統裡，vau 指的是閃米特字母。

meaning: 水綿藻屬；一種絲狀藻類
sentences: The biologist observed Vaucheria under the microscope. 生物學家在顯微鏡下觀察 Vaucheria。
Vaucheria often grows in damp soil and shallow water. Vaucheria 常生長在潮濕土壤和淺水中。

meaning: 沃切里亞科，一類絲狀綠藻的科名
sentences: The textbook listed Vaucheriaceae among the early algae families. 那本教科書把 Vaucheriaceae 列為早期的藻類科之一。
Researchers compared Vaucheriaceae with other filamentous algae. 研究人員把 Vaucheriaceae 和其他絲狀藻類作比較。

meaning: 與沃切里亞科有關的；屬於該科的
sentences: The sample showed a vaucheriaceous growth pattern. 這個樣本呈現出與沃切里亞科相關的生長型態。
The guide described the plant as vaucheriaceous in form. 那本指南把這種植物描述成沃切里亞科型的外觀。

meaning: 雜耍劇；歌舞短劇
sentences: The old theater once hosted vaudeville every Saturday night. 這座老劇院以前每週六晚上都上演雜耍劇。
She studied vaudeville history for her performance class. 她為了表演課研究雜耍劇的歷史。

meaning: 雜耍劇演員；歌舞短劇表演者
sentences: The vaudevillian made the crowd laugh with a quick joke. 那位雜耍劇演員用一個俐落的笑話逗樂了觀眾。
He admired the vaudevillian's timing and stage presence. 他很欣賞那位雜耍劇演員的節奏感和舞台魅力。

meaning: 雜耍劇從業者；從事雜耍劇表演或創作的人
sentences: The vaudevillist rewrote the sketch for a smaller stage. 那位雜耍劇從業者把短劇改寫成適合較小舞台的版本。
Every vaudevillist in the troupe knew how to handle a live audience. 團裡每位雜耍劇演員都知道如何應對現場觀眾。

meaning: 與瑞士沃州（Vaud）有關的風俗、風格或特徵
sentences: The article used Vaudism to describe the region's local flavor. 文章用 Vaudism 來描述那個地區的地方特色。
A few historians still mention Vaudism when discussing old Swiss customs. 幾位歷史學者在討論瑞士舊習俗時仍會提到 Vaudism。

meaning: 瓦爾度派教徒；沃州地區的人
sentences: The Vaudois kept their faith despite years of pressure. 瓦爾度派教徒在多年壓力下仍堅持信仰。
The museum display included stories of the Vaudois in the Alps. 博物館展覽裡介紹了阿爾卑斯山地區的瓦爾度派教徒故事。

meaning: 與沃州或 Vaud 地區有關的；帶有地方特色的
sentences: The village festival had a quiet vaudy charm. 那場村莊節慶帶著一種安靜的地方風情。
Her remarks carried a vaudy tone that locals immediately recognized. 她的話帶著一種當地人一聽就懂的地方味道。

meaning: 沃恩，常見的英語姓氏或名字
sentences: Vaughn signed the document at the bottom of the page. Vaughn 在頁面底部簽了文件。
Her teacher said Vaughn was an easy surname to remember. 她的老師說 Vaughn 這個姓氏很容易記。

meaning: 一種深色火成岩
sentences: The rock sample was identified as vaugnerite in the lab. 那塊岩石樣本在實驗室中被確認為 vaugnerite。
Geology students compared vaugnerite with nearby igneous rocks. 地質系學生把 vaugnerite 和附近的火成岩作比較。

meaning: 銀行內或下方用於存放貨幣和其他貴重物品的安全房間；其他設置中的類似房間。
sentences: The bank kept their money safe in a large vault. 銀行將他們的錢安全地存放在一個大金庫中。
The term vault refers to the secure room or rooms in or below a bank used to store currency and other valuables; similar rooms in other settings. 金庫一詞是指銀行內或銀行下方用於存放貨幣和其他貴重物品的安全房間；其他設置中的類似房間。

meaning: 有拱頂的；拱形的
sentences: The chapel had a vaulted ceiling made of stone. 那座小教堂有石製的拱頂天花板。
They stood beneath the vaulted hall and listened to the echo. 他們站在拱形大廳下，聽著回音。

meaning: 以拱形或穹頂般的方式
sentences: The roof rose vaultedly above the old hall. 那個屋頂以拱形向上延伸在老廳堂上方。
The corridor curved vaultedly toward the back of the building. 走廊以穹頂般的弧度向建築物後方延伸。

meaning: 撐竿跳選手；翻越者
sentences: The vaulter cleared the bar on his second try. 那位撐竿跳選手第二次就越過了橫桿。
Every vaulter warmed up carefully before the competition. 每位撐竿跳選手在比賽前都仔細熱身。

meaning: 拱頂結構；撐竿跳；跳躍動作
sentences: The cathedral's vaulting was restored after the fire. 大教堂的拱頂結構在火災後被修復了。
He practiced vaulting on the gym mat before the meet. 他在比賽前先在體操墊上練習撐竿跳。

meaning: 像拱頂的；呈穹頂狀的
sentences: The tunnel opened into a vaultlike chamber. 那條隧道通向一個像拱頂一樣的空間。
A vaultlike roof made the room feel larger than it was. 穹頂狀的屋頂讓房間看起來比實際更大。

meaning: 高而空曠的；像拱頂般的
sentences: The vaulty chamber echoed every footstep. 那個高而空曠的房間會回響每一步聲音。
She admired the vaulty space above the staircase. 她喜歡樓梯上方那種高挑空曠的空間感。

meaning: 吹噓；誇耀
sentences: He likes to vaunt his achievements in every meeting. 他喜歡在每次會議上吹噓自己的成就。
The ad tries to vaunt the product as the best on the market. 這則廣告試圖把產品吹捧成市場上最好的。

meaning: 吹噓；誇示；誇耀之詞
sentences: The speech was full of vauntage and empty claims. 那場演說充滿吹噓和空洞的說法。
His vauntage annoyed everyone at the dinner table. 他的誇耀讓餐桌上的每個人都很反感。

meaning: 被大肆吹捧的；被誇耀的
sentences: The vaunted new system failed on its first day. 那套被大肆吹捧的新系統在第一天就失敗了。
They questioned the vaunted claims made in the brochure. 他們質疑手冊裡那些被誇大的說法。

meaning: 吹牛者；愛誇耀的人
sentences: Nobody trusted the vaunter after his third story. 在他第三次吹牛之後，沒人再相信他。
The vaunter filled the room with loud promises. 那個吹牛者用大聲的承諾塞滿了整個房間。

meaning: 吹牛；誇耀；炫耀的言行
sentences: The review dismissed the speech as pure vauntery. 那篇評論把那場演說斥為純粹的吹牛。
His vauntery became obvious after a few minutes. 幾分鐘後，他的誇耀就變得很明顯。

meaning: 愛吹噓的；自負的；誇耀的
sentences: His vauntful tone made the audience uncomfortable. 他那種愛吹噓的語氣讓觀眾感到不舒服。
The essay criticized the company's vauntful advertising. 那篇文章批評了公司誇耀式的廣告。

meaning: 自誇；吹牛；誇耀的態度
sentences: The coach disliked the vauntiness of the young player. 教練不喜歡那位年輕球員的自誇態度。
There was a hint of vauntiness in the way he spoke. 他說話的方式裡帶著一點自誇。

meaning: 誇耀的；傲慢的
sentences: Her vaunting remarks sounded more arrogant than confident. 她那些誇耀的話聽起來更像傲慢，而不是自信。
The author rejected any vaunting style in the final draft. 作者在定稿中避免任何誇耀的語氣。

meaning: 自誇地；誇耀地；傲慢地
sentences: He spoke vauntingly about a plan he had not finished. 他自誇地談論一個還沒完成的計畫。
The politician vauntingly promised results within a month. 那位政治人物傲慢地保證一個月內就會有成果。

meaning: 外城牆；外圍城牆
sentences: The old fortress still had part of its vauntmure standing. 那座古堡還保留著部分外圍城牆。
Archaeologists traced the line of the vauntmure around the hill. 考古學家沿著山丘追蹤外城牆的走向。

meaning: 自負的；愛吹噓的；傲慢的
sentences: The vaunty reply made the room go silent. 那句自負的回覆讓整個房間都安靜下來。
He tried not to sound vaunty during the interview. 他在面試時盡量不讓自己聽起來太自負。

meaning: 一種稀有的鉛銅鉻酸鹽礦物
sentences: The mineral cabinet included a bright piece of vauquelinite. 那個礦物櫃裡收藏了一塊色澤鮮亮的 vauquelinite。
Collectors value vauquelinite because the crystal is rare and vivid. 收藏家很重視 vauquelinite，因為這種晶體稀有又鮮豔。

meaning: 沃克斯豪爾，倫敦的一個地名
sentences: We took the train to Vauxhall before lunch. 我們在午餐前搭火車去了 Vauxhall。
Vauxhall appears often in stories about London travel. Vauxhall 經常出現在倫敦旅行相關的故事裡。

meaning: 沃克斯豪爾的；沃克斯豪爾居民
sentences: The guide described her as a proud Vauxhallian. 導遊把她描述成一位自豪的 Vauxhallian。
Local newspapers often used Vauxhallian to refer to people from the district. 當地報紙常用 Vauxhallian 指來自該區的人。

meaning: 一種稀有的藍色礦物
sentences: The collector kept a tiny sample of vauxite in a glass box. 收藏家把一小塊 vauxite 放在玻璃盒裡。
Vauxite is known for its striking blue color. vauxite 以醒目的藍色而聞名。

meaning: 小封地騎士；次級封臣
sentences: The medieval vavasor owed service to a greater lord. 那位中世紀的小封地騎士要向更大的領主盡義務。
History books use vavasor when describing feudal ranks. 歷史書在描述封建階級時會用到 vavasor。

meaning: 小封地；次級封臣所持有的領地
sentences: The vavasory was small but strategically placed. 那塊小封地雖小，卻地理位置重要。
A family might inherit a vavasory through feudal service. 一個家族可能因封建服役而繼承小封地。

meaning: 前列；先頭部隊；前線
sentences: The vaward moved ahead of the rest of the army. 先頭部隊走在大軍的前面。
In the story, the scout rode with the vaward at dawn. 在故事裡，斥候清晨和先頭部隊一起出發。

meaning: 風神伐由；印度教中的風之神
sentences: The temple mural showed Vayu carrying the wind across the sky. 寺廟壁畫畫出 Vayu 在天空中帶來風的景象。
Students of mythology learned how Vayu appears in Hindu stories. 神話課學生學習 Vayu 在印度教故事中的形象。

meaning: 瓦津巴人，馬達加斯加早期族群
sentences: The lecture introduced the Vazimba as an early Malagasy people. 那場演講把 Vazimba 介紹為馬達加斯加早期族群。
Stories about the Vazimba are common in local oral history. 關於 Vazimba 的故事在當地口述歷史中很常見。

meaning: 希伯來曆中的閏月；第二個亞達月
sentences: The calendar added Veadar to keep the year aligned. 為了讓年份對齊，曆法加入了 Veadar。
Religious texts sometimes refer to Veadar as an extra month. 宗教文獻有時把 Veadar 稱為額外月份。

meaning: 小牛肉
sentences: The restaurant is famous for its delicious roast veal. 這家餐廳以其美味的烤小牛肉而聞名。
Veal is meat that comes from young calves. 小牛肉是來自幼牛的肉。

meaning: 為小牛肉而飼養的小牛；小牛肉販賣者
sentences: The vealer was kept in a clean, sheltered pen. 那隻供小牛肉用途的小牛被養在乾淨又有遮蔽的圍欄裡。
A vealer at the market sold fresh cuts every morning. 市場裡的一位小牛肉販賣者每天早上賣新鮮肉塊。

meaning: 像小牛肉般的柔嫩；幼嫩
sentences: The chef praised the vealiness of the young meat. 那位主廚稱讚這塊肉有小牛肉般的柔嫩感。
The vealiness of the fruit made it easy to slice. 那水果那種幼嫩的口感讓它很好切。

meaning: 像小牛肉的；柔嫩的
sentences: The veallike texture was soft and easy to chew. 那種像小牛肉的口感柔軟又容易咀嚼。
She preferred veallike cuts for quick cooking. 她比較喜歡像小牛肉一樣柔嫩的肉塊，方便快速烹調。

meaning: 小牛皮；小牛皮革
sentences: The notebook cover was made of dark vealskin. 那本筆記本的封面是用深色小牛皮做的。
Craftsmen valued vealskin for its smooth finish. 工匠很重視小牛皮，因為它表面細緻光滑。

meaning: 像小牛肉的；幼嫩的；柔軟的
sentences: The vealy texture made the dish feel delicate. 那種像小牛肉般柔嫩的口感讓這道菜很細緻。
She described the peach as vealy and sweet. 她形容那顆桃子又幼嫩又甜。

meaning: 稅；賦稅
sentences: The historian explained that vectigal was a Roman tax term. 那位歷史學家解釋說，vectigal 是羅馬時代的稅務用語。
Old legal texts often list vectigal among tribute payments. 古老的法律文獻常把 vectigal 列為貢稅之一。

meaning: 移動感；視覺上被帶動的感覺
sentences: The simulator can create vection even when the body is still. 即使身體不動，模擬器也能產生移動感。
The psychology paper measured vection during the experiment. 那篇心理學論文在實驗中測量了移動感。

meaning: 杠桿；撬棍
sentences: The mechanic used a vectis to lift the heavy panel. 修理工用一根撬棍把沉重的面板撬起來。
In older texts, vectis simply means a lever. 在較早的文獻裡，vectis 就是指杠桿。

meaning: 立體攝影圖像；向量式立體圖
sentences: The museum displayed an old vectograph beside the camera. 博物館把一張老式立體攝影圖和相機一起展示。
Researchers examined the vectograph for printing quality. 研究人員檢查那張立體攝影圖的印刷品質。

meaning: 立體攝影的；向量式圖像的
sentences: The archive stored the vectographic plates in a cool room. 檔案室把立體攝影版片存放在涼爽的房間裡。
The article discussed vectographic methods used in early imaging. 那篇文章討論了早期影像中使用的立體攝影方法。

meaning: 有向量，既有大小又有方向；兩點之間的有符號差。
sentences: Velocity is a vector defined by the speed of an object and its direction. 速度是由物體的速度及其方向定義的向量。
Computers store many types of data as vectors for ease of processing. 計算機將多種類型的資料儲存為向量以便於處理。

meaning: 向量的；矢量的
sentences: The vectorial model worked better than the simple one. 那個向量模型比簡單模型更有效。
Scientists used vectorial analysis to describe the motion. 科學家用向量分析來描述運動。

meaning: 以向量方式；矢量地
sentences: The force was applied vectorially across the surface. 力是以向量方式施加在表面上的。
The software computes the data vectorially for speed. 那套軟體為了速度以向量方式計算資料。

meaning: 運輸；運送；交通手段
sentences: The ancient road served as a vecture for trade goods. 那條古道曾是貨物運輸的通道。
They chose a faster vecture to move the fragile equipment. 他們選擇更快的運輸方式來搬運易碎設備。

meaning: 印度教中的神聖經典總稱
sentences: The teacher introduced the Veda as a sacred Hindu text. 老師把 Veda 介紹為印度教的神聖經典。
He spent years studying the Veda in Sanskrit. 他花了好幾年研究梵文的 Veda。

meaning: 與 Veda 或吠陀時代有關的
sentences: The chant had a Vedaic tone that sounded very old. 那段吟唱帶有很古老的 Vedaic 氣息。
She researched Vedaic rituals for her history paper. 她為歷史報告研究了 Vedaic 儀式。

meaning: 以吠陀經典為基礎的宗教或學說
sentences: Vedaism shaped many early Hindu traditions. Vedaism 形塑了許多早期的印度教傳統。
The book explains how Vedaism influenced ritual life. 這本書解釋 Vedaism 如何影響儀式生活。

meaning: 用來防治害蟲的瓢蟲屬甲蟲
sentences: Farmers released Vedalia to control the scale insects. 農夫放養 Vedalia 來防治介殼蟲。
The vedalia beetle helped save many citrus trees. Vedalia 甲蟲幫助拯救了許多柑橘樹。

meaning: 感受；知覺；苦受
sentences: In Buddhist texts, vedana means feeling or sensation. 在佛教文獻中，vedana 指感受或知覺。
The monk explained vedana as the feeling that follows contact. 那位僧人把 vedana 解釋為接觸之後產生的感受。

meaning: 吠陀的輔助學科之一
sentences: Grammar is counted as a Vedanga in classical learning. 文法在古典學術中被算作一門 Vedanga。
The lecture listed the six Vedangas for the class. 演講為全班列出了六門 Vedanga。

meaning: 根據《奧義書》發展出的印度哲學學派
sentences: Vedanta has influenced many modern thinkers. Vedanta 影響了許多近代思想家。
She studied Vedanta to understand Indian philosophy. 她研究 Vedanta 來理解印度哲學。

meaning: 與 Vedanta 哲學有關的
sentences: The author gave a Vedantic reading of the text. 作者從 Vedantic 的角度解讀那篇文本。
His speech had a calm Vedantic flavor. 他的演說帶有平靜的 Vedantic 氣質。

meaning: Vedanta 的教義或思想體系
sentences: Vedantism became an important part of his studies. Vedantism 成了他研究中的重要部分。
The chapter traces the spread of Vedantism in India. 這一章追溯 Vedantism 在印度的傳播。

meaning: Vedanta 的信徒或研究者
sentences: The professor was a respected Vedantist. 那位教授是一位受敬重的 Vedantist。
Every Vedantist in the room listened carefully. 房間裡每一位 Vedantist 都仔細聆聽。

meaning: 斯里蘭卡的原住民族之一
sentences: The museum showed tools made by the Vedda people. 博物館展示了 Vedda 族群製作的工具。
Her report described the history of the Vedda in Sri Lanka. 她的報告介紹了斯里蘭卡 Vedda 族群的歷史。

meaning: 與 Vedda 相似或有關的
sentences: The older text used Veddoid to describe a related type. 舊文獻用 Veddoid 來描述相關類型。
He marked the term Veddoid as dated in his notes. 他在筆記裡把 Veddoid 標成過時用語。

meaning: 前哨哨兵；騎馬巡邏的警戒兵
sentences: A vedette watched the road from the hilltop. 一名 vedette 在山頂監視道路。
The army sent a vedette ahead to warn of danger. 軍隊派出一名 vedette 先行警戒危險。

meaning: 與吠陀經典有關的
sentences: Vedic hymns are among the oldest Indian texts. Vedic 頌歌是印度最古老的文本之一。
The class discussed Vedic ritual and language. 課堂討論了 Vedic 的儀式與語言。

meaning: 印度寺廟或祭儀中的高台、祭壇
sentences: Flowers were placed on the vedika before the ceremony. 儀式開始前，花被放在 vedika 上。
The shrine stood on a stone vedika near the gate. 那座神龕立在大門附近的石質 vedika 上。

meaning: 古羅馬神祇，為 Vejovis 的另一種拼法
sentences: Vediovis appears in studies of Roman religion. Vediovis 出現在羅馬宗教研究中。
The scholar described Vediovis as an old Roman god. 那位學者把 Vediovis 描述為古羅馬神祇。

meaning: 古代吠陀宗教
sentences: Vedism predates many later Hindu traditions. Vedism 早於許多後來的印度教傳統。
The article explains the beliefs of Vedism. 這篇文章說明了 Vedism 的信仰。

meaning: 吠陀的研究者或權威
sentences: The conference invited a Vedist to speak. 研討會邀請了一位 Vedist 發表演講。
He was known as a careful Vedist and translator. 他以嚴謹的 Vedist 與翻譯者身分聞名。

meaning: 俄羅斯舊制液量單位，約三點二五美制加侖
sentences: The recipe used vedro as an old Russian measure. 那份食譜用 vedro 作為古老的俄羅斯容量單位。
A vedro was roughly equal to a large bucket of water. 一 vedro 大約相當於一大桶水。

meaning: Friulian 語中 vedue 的複數，意為寡婦
sentences: The glossary listed Veduis as a Friulian plural form. 詞彙表把 Veduis 列為 Friulian 語的複數形式。
In the note, Veduis was explained as widows in Friulian. 在註解中，Veduis 被解釋為 Friulian 語的寡婦複數。

meaning: Friulian 語中 vedue 的複數，意為寡婦
sentences: The word veduis means widows in Friulian. veduis 在 Friulian 語中意思是寡婦。
She copied veduis directly from the old dictionary. 她直接把 veduis 從舊字典抄下來。

meaning: 字母 V；V 字形
sentences: The birds flew in a vee across the sky. 鳥群以 V 字形飛過天空。
She drew a vee on the map to show the valley. 她在地圖上畫了一個 vee 來表示山谷。

meaning: 荷蘭語中的泥炭沼澤；沼澤地
sentences: The old map marked a wide veen north of the village. 舊地圖在村子北邊標出一大片 veen。
A veen is a peat bog or fen in Dutch usage. veen 在荷蘭語用法中是泥炭沼澤或沼澤地。

meaning: 副總統；非正式說法
sentences: The veep gave a short speech after the debate. 那位 veep 在辯論後發表了簡短演說。
The newspaper asked who would become the next veep. 報紙問誰會成為下一位 veep。

meaning: 突然改變方向或路線；轉向。
sentences: The car slid on the ice and veered out of control. 汽車在冰上打滑並失去控制。
To veer means to change direction or course suddenly; to swerve. 轉向意味著突然改變方向或航向；轉向。

meaning: 可轉向的；可改變方向的
sentences: The car had a veerable front wheel assembly. 那輛車有可轉向的前輪裝置。
The pilot chose a veerable course through the wind. 飛行員在風中選擇了一條可轉向的航線。

meaning: 偏轉地；轉向地
sentences: The car moved veeringly across the icy road. 那輛車在結冰的路面上偏轉地滑行。
The path veeringly curved toward the river. 那條小路偏斜地彎向河邊。

meaning: 一種北美鶇鳥
sentences: We heard a veery singing in the woods. 我們聽到一隻 veery 在林子裡歌唱。
The veery is known for its clear, flute-like call. veery 以清亮、像長笛一樣的叫聲聞名。

meaning: 織女星；天琴座中最亮的恆星
sentences: Vega shines brightly in the summer sky. Vega 在夏季夜空中閃閃發亮。
The guide pointed out Vega to the students. 導遊把 Vega 指給學生看。

meaning: 一種礦物，為 plumbojarosite 的同義名
sentences: The sample was labeled as vegasite in the lab. 樣本在實驗室中被標記為 vegasite。
Geologists listed vegasite among the rare minerals. 地質學家把 vegasite 列入稀有礦物。

meaning: 蔬菜栽培；種菜的方法
sentences: Vegeculture became the village's main trade. 蔬菜栽培成了村子的主要產業。
The workshop taught vegeculture to local farmers. 工作坊向當地農夫教授 vegeculture。

meaning: 植物性；具植物特徵的狀態
sentences: The essay used vegetability in an old botanical sense. 那篇文章用 vegetability 來表示古老的植物學意思。
Her notes described the vegetability of the landscape. 她的筆記描述了那片景觀的植物性。

meaning: 蔬菜
sentences: Fresh vegetables are an important part of a healthy diet. 新鮮蔬菜是健康飲食的重要組成部分。
What is your favorite vegetable? Mine is broccoli. 你最喜歡什麼蔬菜？我的是花椰菜。

meaning: 像蔬菜的；具蔬菜特徵的
sentences: The fungus had a vegetablelike texture after cooking. 那種菇煮過後有一種像蔬菜的口感。
The patient was in a vegetablelike state after the accident. 那名病人在事故後進入了類似植物狀態。

meaning: 以蔬菜分類地；像蔬菜一樣地
sentences: The menu was arranged vegetablewise on the page. 菜單在頁面上是按蔬菜分類排列的。
The pantry was sorted vegetablewise by type and color. 儲藏室依種類和顏色以蔬菜分類整理。

meaning: 使像蔬菜；把...變得像植物性狀態
sentences: She tried to vegetablize the soup by adding more greens. 她想多加一些青菜，讓湯更有蔬菜風味。
The doctor warned that the injury could vegetablize the patient. 醫生警告這種傷勢可能讓病人進入植物狀態。

meaning: 像蔬菜地；以植物性方式地
sentences: He sat vegetably in front of the television. 他像蔬菜一樣呆坐在電視前。
The roots spread vegetably through the soil. 那些根在土壤中像植物般地擴展。

meaning: 植物的；與植物有關的
sentences: The artist used vegetal patterns in the wallpaper. 那位藝術家在壁紙上用了植物圖案。
The essay described the vegetal world of the forest. 那篇文章描述了森林的植物世界。

meaning: 植物樣的小結構；植物樣形態
sentences: The old glossary listed vegetalcule among rare botanical terms. 舊詞彙表把 vegetalcule 列為罕見的植物學術語。
She guessed the vegetalcule was a tiny plantlike growth. 她猜想那個 vegetalcule 是一個微小的植物樣生長物。

meaning: 植物性；植物狀態
sentences: The paper discussed the vegetality of plant life. 那篇論文討論了植物生命的 vegetality。
The doctor explained vegetality as a state of being vegetative. 醫生把 vegetality 解釋為植物狀態。

meaning: 植物性的；正在生長的
sentences: The vegetant plant had not yet bloomed. 那株 vegetant 的植物還沒有開花。
The report described a vegetant growth on the wall. 報告描述了牆上的 vegetant 生長物。

meaning: 素食者、素食者的
sentences: She became a vegetarian because she wanted to improve her health and protect animals. 她成為一名素食者，因為她想改善健康並保護動物。
This restaurant offers a wide variety of delicious vegetarian dishes. 這家餐廳提供各式各樣美味的素食菜餚。

meaning: 素食主義
sentences: Her vegetarianism made meal planning easy. 她的素食主義讓餐點安排變得簡單。
The book traces the history of vegetarianism. 這本書追溯了素食主義的歷史。

meaning: 無所事事；過著懶散呆滯的生活
sentences: He likes to vegetate on the couch after work. 他下班後喜歡窩在沙發上發呆。
Don't vegetate all weekend if you can go outside. 如果可以出門，就別整個週末都在家裡混日子。

meaning: 植物，統稱。
sentences: There were large amounts of vegetation in the forest. 森林裡有大量的植被。
The term vegetation refers to plants, taken collectively. 植被一詞是指植物的統稱。

meaning: 植被的；與植物生長有關的
sentences: The map showed clear vegetational zones across the region. 地圖顯示了該地區明顯的植被分區。
The report studied vegetational change after the fire. 報告研究了火災後的植被變化。

meaning: 沒有植被的；無草木的
sentences: The mountain slope looked vegetationless and bare. 那座山坡看起來沒有植被而且很光禿。
The desert road ran through a vegetationless plain. 那條沙漠公路穿過一片沒有植被的平原。

meaning: 與植物生長有關的；植物性的
sentences: The area has dense vegetative cover. 這個地區有很密的植物覆蓋。
The doctor discussed vegetative functions in the body. 醫生討論了身體的植物性功能。

meaning: 以營養繁殖方式地；以植物生長方式地
sentences: The plant spreads vegetatively through runners. 這種植物會透過匍匐莖以營養繁殖方式擴散。
The cells were reproducing vegetatively in the lab. 這些細胞在實驗室裡以營養繁殖方式增殖。

meaning: 植物狀態；植物性
sentences: The doctor worried about the patient's vegetativeness. 醫生擔心病人的植物狀態。
The essay examined the vegetativeness of the scene. 那篇文章探討了場景的植物性。

meaning: 活潑的；健壯的；有生氣的
sentences: He returned from the hills looking vegete and strong. 他從山裡回來時看起來很有精神也很健壯。
The old poem praises a vegete youth. 那首古詩讚美一位充滿生氣的青年。

meaning: 活力；健壯；生氣勃勃
sentences: The poem praised the vegeteness of spring. 那首詩讚頌春天的生氣勃勃。
He admired the vegeteness of the young trees. 他欣賞那些小樹的旺盛生機。

meaning: 植物性；植物狀態
sentences: The old philosopher used vegetism to describe plantlike life. 那位老哲學家用 vegetism 來描述植物般的生命。
The essay treated vegetism as an obsolete term. 那篇文章把 vegetism 當作一個過時詞。
