meaning: a fossil sponge genus
sentences: The class discussed Ventriculites as a fossil sponge genus. 課堂上把 Ventriculites 當作一個化石海綿屬來討論。
A specimen from Ventriculites was displayed beside other ancient marine forms. 一件來自 Ventriculites 的標本被放在其他古代海洋生物形態旁展示。

meaning: relating to ventriculitis or Ventriculites
sentences: The article used ventriculitic when describing the inflamed tissue around the ventricle. 那篇文章在描述心室周圍發炎組織時用了 ventriculitic。
A ventriculitic pattern can appear in very specialized medical writing. ventriculitic 的表現常出現在非常專門的醫學寫作裡。

meaning: a family of fossil sponges related to Ventriculites
sentences: The taxonomy chapter placed the fossil group in Ventriculitidae. 那章分類學把那個化石類群放在 Ventriculitidae 裡。
Researchers compared Ventriculitidae with other ancient sponge families. 研究人員將 Ventriculitidae 與其他古代海綿科作比較。

meaning: an image or record of the ventricles
sentences: The cardiologist reviewed the ventriculogram before making a decision. 心臟科醫師在做決定前先看了心室造影圖。
A clear ventriculogram can help show how the heart is moving. 清楚的 ventriculogram 有助於顯示心臟的運動情況。

meaning: imaging or recording of the ventricles
sentences: The hospital used ventriculography to inspect the brain ventricles. 醫院用 ventriculography 來檢查腦室。
Modern medicine often replaces older ventriculography methods with newer scans. 現代醫學常用更新的掃描方式取代較舊的 ventriculography 方法。

meaning: visual examination of the ventricles with a scope
sentences: The surgeon explained that ventriculoscopy would give a closer view of the chamber. 外科醫師解釋說，ventriculoscopy 可以更近距離看清那個腔室。
Few patients ever hear the word ventriculoscopy outside a medical setting. 除了醫療場景外，很少病人會聽到 ventriculoscopy 這個字。

meaning: swollen or belly-shaped; ventricose
sentences: The shell looked ventriculose under the microscope. 那個貝殼在顯微鏡下看起來是 ventriculose 的。
Its ventriculose outline made it easy to distinguish from the flatter specimens. 它那種 ventriculose 的輪廓讓它很容易和較扁平的標本區分開來。

meaning: having a swollen belly; ventricose
sentences: The old description called the creature ventriculous and broad at the middle. 舊描述把那個生物稱為 ventriculous，且中段很寬。
A ventriculous form can look heavy even when the object is small. 即使物體很小，ventriculous 的形態也會讓它看起來很厚重。

meaning: a stomach-like chamber, especially in birds or insects
sentences: The biology text described the ventriculus as part of the digestive tract. 生物課本把 ventriculus 描述成消化道的一部分。
In birds, the ventriculus helps grind food before it moves on. 在鳥類體內，ventriculus 會幫助磨碎食物再往下送。

meaning: lying on the belly; prone
sentences: The diagram showed a ventricumbent animal resting with its belly down. 那張圖畫出一隻以腹部朝下姿勢休息的 ventricumbent 動物。
A ventricumbent position is the same basic idea as lying prone. ventricumbent 的姿勢基本上就是趴臥。

meaning: a duct leading to or from a ventricle or ventral passage
sentences: The author used ventriduct for a small channel near the ventral cavity. 作者用 ventriduct 來指靠近腹側腔室的一條小通道。
A ventriduct is a very specialized anatomical word. ventriduct 是一個非常專門的解剖學用語。

meaning: surgical fixation toward the ventral wall
sentences: The surgeon mentioned ventrifixation as one possible treatment. 外科醫師把 ventrifixation 當成其中一種治療方式提到。
Ventrifixation is a technical term that appears in older surgical texts. Ventrifixation 是一個會出現在較舊外科文獻中的專門術語。

meaning: toward the front and side; ventrolateral
sentences: The arrow on the chart pointed to the ventrilateral edge of the organ. 圖上的箭頭指向器官的 ventrilateral 邊緣。
A ventrilateral view shows both the front and the side at once. ventrilateral 的角度會同時看到前面和側面。

meaning: the act of speaking so the voice seems to come from elsewhere
sentences: The lecture on stagecraft mentioned ventrilocution as an old theatrical trick. 那場舞台技巧講座把 ventrilocution 提到作為一種古老戲劇技巧。
Ventrilocution can make a puppet seem strangely alive. ventrilocution 會讓木偶看起來像真的活過來一樣。

meaning: relating to ventriloquism or ventriloquial speech
sentences: The editor described the performance as ventriloqual and playful. 編輯把那場表演描述成 ventriloqual 且帶有趣味。
A ventriloqual style is meant to hide where the sound really comes from. ventriloqual 的風格就是要把聲音真正來源藏起來。

meaning: in a ventriloquistic manner
sentences: He spoke ventriloqually so the audience would look toward the puppet. 他用 ventriloqually 的方式說話，讓觀眾把視線轉向木偶。
The joke worked because the line was delivered ventriloqually. 這個笑點會成立，是因為那句台詞是用 ventriloqually 的方式說出來的。

meaning: a ventriloquist
sentences: The old playbill called the performer a ventriloque. 舊戲單把那位表演者稱為 ventriloque。
A skilled ventriloque can make a dummy feel unexpectedly real. 技巧好的 ventriloque 能讓人偶顯得意外地真實。

meaning: relating to ventriloquism
sentences: The performer used a ventriloquial trick to hide his mouth movement. 那位表演者用了 ventriloquial 的技巧來掩飾嘴部動作。
The ventriloquial effect made the voice seem to come from the box. 那種 ventriloquial 效果讓聲音好像是從盒子裡傳出來的。

meaning: in a ventriloquistic manner
sentences: She answered ventriloquially and kept her lips almost still. 她幾乎不動嘴唇地用 ventriloquially 的方式回答。
The speaker ventriloquially shifted attention to the puppet beside him. 那位講者用 ventriloquially 的方式把注意力引到身旁的木偶上。

meaning: the art of making the voice seem to come from elsewhere
sentences: The class demonstration showed how ventriloquism works on stage. 課堂示範展示了 ventriloquism 在舞台上如何運作。
Ventriloquism depends on control, timing, and a steady voice. ventriloquism 依賴控制、節奏和穩定的聲音。

meaning: a performer who speaks without moving the lips
sentences: The ventriloquist made the dummy answer every question. 那位腹語師讓人偶回答每一個問題。
A good ventriloquist can distract the audience with humor and timing. 好的腹語師可以靠幽默和節奏分散觀眾注意力。

meaning: having the qualities of ventriloquism
sentences: The film used a ventriloquistic effect to make the toy seem alive. 那部電影用 ventriloquistic 的效果讓玩具看起來像活的一樣。
His ventriloquistic voice change impressed the entire room. 他那種 ventriloquistic 的變聲讓整個房間都很驚訝。

meaning: to speak as a ventriloquist or make the voice seem elsewhere
sentences: He tried to ventriloquize during the rehearsal and made everyone laugh. 他在排練時試著腹語，結果讓大家都笑了。
A skilled performer can ventriloquize without showing much movement. 技巧熟練的表演者可以在幾乎不動作的情況下腹語。

meaning: seeming to speak from a different source; ventriloquial
sentences: The ventriloquous sound seemed to come from behind the curtain. 那個 ventriloquous 的聲音聽起來像是從幕布後面傳來的。
Writers sometimes use ventriloquous to describe a voice that feels displaced. 作家有時會用 ventriloquous 來描述那種聽起來被移位的聲音。

meaning: in a way that suggests ventriloquism
sentences: He replied ventriloquously and pointed at the puppet. 他用 ventriloquously 的方式回答，還指向木偶。
The whisper felt ventriloquously distant in the quiet room. 在安靜的房間裡，那句低語聽起來有種 ventriloquously 的遙遠感。

meaning: ventriloquism; the act or skill of voice throwing
sentences: The show combined ventriloquy with music and comedy. 那場表演把腹語和音樂、喜劇結合在一起。
Ventriloquy has been used in theater for a very long time. 腹語在戲劇中已經使用了很長一段時間。

meaning: situated along the ventral midline
sentences: The diagram marked a ventrimesal line through the middle of the belly side. 圖中標出了一條穿過腹側中央的 ventrimesal 線。
A ventrimesal structure sits right along the midline. ventrimesal 的構造就位於中線上。

meaning: the ventral middle line or midline region
sentences: The textbook referred to the ventrimeson when discussing body symmetry. 課本在討論身體對稱時提到了 ventrimeson。
A tiny mark on the ventrimeson can help orient a specimen. ventrimeson 上的一個小記號可以幫助標本定位。

meaning: ventral; belonging to the belly side
sentences: The ventrine surface was lighter than the dorsal surface. ventrine 的表面比背側更淺色。
The label ventrine appears mostly in technical descriptions. ventrine 這個標籤多半出現在專門描述裡。

meaning: the state of having a large or powerful belly; strong appetite
sentences: The old joke about his ventripotency made the whole table laugh. 關於他 ventripotency 的老笑話讓整桌人都笑了。
In a playful sense, ventripotency can mean a very strong appetite. 用玩笑方式說，ventripotency 可以指很強的食慾。

meaning: having a large belly or a strong appetite
sentences: The comic poem described the king as ventripotent and always hungry. 那首詼諧詩把國王描述成 ventripotent，而且總是很餓。
A ventripotent character is usually exaggerated for humor. ventripotent 的角色通常會被誇張化來製造笑點。

meaning: capable of becoming belly-swollen or abdominally expanded
sentences: The old medical note used ventripotential for tissues that could expand. 那份舊醫學筆記用 ventripotential 來形容可擴張的組織。
A ventripotential form is only a possibility, not a fixed state. ventripotential 只是一種可能性，不是固定狀態。

meaning: a pyramid-shaped structure on the ventral side
sentences: The sketch showed a small ventripyramid at the base of the specimen. 那張草圖在標本底部畫出一個小小的 ventripyramid。
A ventripyramid is the sort of term you only expect in technical notes. ventripyramid 是那種你只會在技術筆記裡看到的詞。

meaning: oriented along the ventral axis
sentences: The annotation marked a ventroaxial alignment in the diagram. 圖中的註記標出了一種 ventroaxial 對齊。
A ventroaxial direction points along the belly side of the body. ventroaxial 的方向是沿著身體腹側走向。

meaning: located toward the ventral armpit region
sentences: The paper referred to a ventroaxillary fold near the front of the limb. 那篇論文提到一條位於肢體前方的 ventroaxillary 摺痕。
Ventroaxillary positioning is a very narrow anatomical idea. ventroaxillary 的定位是一個非常狹窄的解剖概念。

meaning: directed toward the belly and tail end
sentences: The arrow on the chart pointed ventrocaudal across the specimen. 圖上的箭頭沿著標本往 ventrocaudal 方向指去。
A ventrocaudal shift moves downward and toward the rear. ventrocaudal 的移動是往下且朝後方。

meaning: surgical suturing of the bladder through the ventral side
sentences: The surgeon explained that ventrocystorrhaphy was an older operative term. 外科醫師解釋說 ventrocystorrhaphy 是一個較舊的手術術語。
Few people outside surgery ever need the word ventrocystorrhaphy. 除了外科領域外，很少人會需要 ventrocystorrhaphy 這個字。

meaning: toward both the ventral and dorsal directions
sentences: The specimen was rotated ventrodorsad during the demonstration. 示範時，標本被轉向 ventrodorsad。
The line on the chart runs ventrodorsad through the body. 圖上的線條沿著身體以 ventrodorsad 的方向延伸。

meaning: relating to both the belly and back sides
sentences: The ventrodorsal view showed the body from front to back. ventrodorsal 的視角把身體前後兩面都顯示出來。
A ventrodorsal section is common in anatomical diagrams. ventrodorsal 的切面在解剖圖裡很常見。

meaning: in a ventrodorsal direction
sentences: The arrow moved ventrodorsally across the drawing. 箭頭在圖上以 ventrodorsally 的方向移動。
The shell was flattened ventrodorsally rather than side to side. 那個殼是沿著 ventrodorsally 的方向扁平，而不是左右變窄。

meaning: surgical fixation of an organ to the ventral wall
sentences: The chart mentioned ventrofixation as part of the old treatment plan. 病歷把 ventrofixation 列為舊式治療計畫的一部分。
Ventrofixation is rarely used in ordinary conversation. ventrofixation 很少出現在日常對話中。

meaning: surgical fixation of the uterus to the abdominal wall
sentences: The historical note explained ventrohysteropexy as an older gynecologic procedure. 歷史註記把 ventrohysteropexy 解釋為一種較舊的婦科手術。
Modern doctors usually prefer clearer and less archaic procedure names than ventrohysteropexy. 現代醫師通常偏好比 ventrohysteropexy 更清楚、也不那麼古老的手術名稱。

meaning: 腹股溝前腹側的；位於腹部與腹股溝之間的
sentences: The surgeon planned a ventroinguinal approach for the operation. 外科醫師為這場手術規劃了腹股溝前腹側的進路。
A ventroinguinal cut can be used when the lower abdomen must be reached quickly. 當需要迅速進入下腹部時，可以使用腹股溝前腹側的切口。

meaning: 腹側且偏側面的；位於下腹與側邊之間的
sentences: The diagram marked the ventrolateral side of the animal. 圖解標出了那隻動物的腹側偏側面。
A ventrolateral view helps doctors describe body position precisely. 腹側偏側面的視角有助於醫師精確描述身體位置。

meaning: 向腹側偏側地
sentences: The insect moved ventrolaterally across the leaf. 那隻昆蟲向腹側偏側地穿過葉片。
The marker drifted ventrolaterally after the slide was tilted. 載玻片傾斜後，標記向腹側偏側地移動。

meaning: 腹側中線方向的；朝向腹部中央的
sentences: The ventromedial region of the brain is important for appetite. 大腦的腹側中線區域對食慾很重要。
Scientists studied the ventromedial nucleus in the experiment. 科學家在實驗中研究了腹側中線核。

meaning: 腹側中間的；位於腹部正中的
sentences: The ventromedian ridge was visible in the specimen. 標本上可見腹側中央的隆起。
A ventromedian line can help describe anatomy precisely. 腹側正中線有助於精確描述解剖位置。

meaning: 腹側內側的；朝向腹部中間且偏內的
sentences: The ventromesal surface was labeled in the anatomy atlas. 解剖圖譜中標出了腹側內側的表面。
A ventromesal fold runs toward the center of the body. 腹側內側的皺褶朝身體中心延伸。

meaning: 腹側內側的；朝向腹部中線內側的
sentences: The ventromesial edge was marked with a blue pen. 腹側內側的邊緣被藍筆標記出來。
Researchers used ventromesial as a careful anatomical term. 研究人員把 ventromesial 當作精確的解剖術語來使用。

meaning: 腹側脊髓的；與脊髓腹側部分有關的
sentences: The report mentioned the ventromyel region during the scan. 報告在掃描結果中提到了脊髓腹側部分。
Doctors reviewed the ventromyel pathway in the spinal cord. 醫師檢視了脊髓內的腹側通路。

meaning: 腹側後方的；位於腹部後側的
sentences: The ventroposterior corner was shaded in the chart. 圖表中把腹側後方的角落塗上了陰影。
A ventroposterior shift can be seen in some diagrams. 某些圖示中可以看見腹側後方的位移。

meaning: 腹部器官下垂；向腹側下沉的狀態
sentences: The old textbook described ventroptosia as a form of downward displacement. 舊教科書把 ventroptosia 描述成一種下移的狀態。
The patient was examined for possible ventroptosia after the injury. 受傷後，病人接受檢查以確認是否有腹部器官下垂。

meaning: 腹部下垂；器官向腹側移位下垂
sentences: The article used ventroptosis to describe an unusual displacement. 那篇文章用 ventroptosis 來描述一種不尋常的移位。
Surgery may be considered if ventroptosis causes pain or pressure. 如果腹部下垂造成疼痛或壓迫，可能會考慮手術。

meaning: 腹腔檢查；對腹側或腹腔進行的視覺檢查
sentences: The doctor ordered a ventroscopy to inspect the lower abdomen. 醫師安排了腹腔檢查來查看下腹部。
Modern imaging has largely replaced older forms of ventroscopy. 現代影像檢查大致已取代較早期的腹腔視覺檢查。

meaning: 腹側膨起的；腹面鼓起的
sentences: The shell had a ventrose shape that was easy to see. 那個殼呈現腹側膨起的形狀，很容易看出來。
A ventrose leaf curve can help identify the species. 腹面鼓起的葉形有助於辨認物種。

meaning: 腹側膨起；腹面鼓起的狀態
sentences: The botanist noted the ventrosity of the seed pod. 植物學家注意到那個果莢腹側鼓起的形狀。
Its ventrosity made the specimen look slightly swollen. 它腹側膨起的外觀讓標本看起來略微腫起。

meaning: 將器官懸吊於腹壁的手術
sentences: The chart listed ventrosuspension as one possible surgical option. 病歷表把將器官懸吊於腹壁的手術列為一種可能選項。
After ventrosuspension, the patient needed several days of rest. 進行腹壁懸吊手術後，病人需要休息好幾天。

meaning: 腹部切開術；切開腹側的手術
sentences: The surgeon explained that a ventrotomy would open the abdominal wall. 外科醫師解釋，腹部切開術會打開腹壁。
A ventrotomy requires careful planning and sterile technique. 腹部切開術需要仔細規劃與無菌操作。

meaning: 冒險、企業
sentences: Starting a new business is a risky venture that requires careful planning. 創業是一項需要周密計畫的風險投資（企業/冒險）。
They decided to venture into the dark forest despite the warnings. 他們不顧警告，決定去漆黑的森林裡冒險。

meaning: 冒險者；投機者；敢於嘗試的人
sentences: Every venturer in the story wanted a better future. 故事中的每個冒險者都想要更好的未來。
A good venturer weighs risk before making a move. 聰明的冒險者會先衡量風險再行動。

meaning: 愛冒險的；大膽的
sentences: She made a venturesome choice and started her own business. 她做了一個大膽的選擇，開始自己的事業。
Venturesome ideas can lead to real progress when planned well. 若規劃得宜，愛冒險的想法可能帶來真正的進展。

meaning: 大膽地；冒險地
sentences: He venturesomely accepted the difficult challenge. 他大膽地接受了那個艱難的挑戰。
The climber venturesomely moved toward the narrow ledge. 那位攀登者冒險地朝狹窄的岩台前進。

meaning: 愛冒險；大膽果敢
sentences: Her venturesomeness impressed everyone on the team. 她的敢冒險精神讓團隊裡的每個人都印象深刻。
Too much venturesomeness can become careless behavior. 太多的冒險精神可能會變成粗心行事。

meaning: Venturia 屬真菌；一類造成植物病害的菌屬
sentences: Venturia includes fungi that can damage leaves and fruit. Venturia 屬包含會破壞葉片與果實的真菌。
The lab identified the pathogen as Venturia in the sample. 實驗室在樣本中確認了該病原屬於 Venturia。

meaning: 東菱玉；帶有閃亮細片的石英
sentences: The ring was set with a piece of green venturine. 那枚戒指鑲著一塊綠色東菱玉。
Collectors like venturine for its tiny sparkling flecks. 收藏家喜歡東菱玉細小的閃光斑點。

meaning: 敢於冒險的；大膽的
sentences: The venturous team crossed the river at dawn. 那支大膽的隊伍在黎明時分渡過了河流。
Her venturous plan surprised even her closest friends. 她那個敢冒險的計畫連最親近的朋友都感到驚訝。

meaning: 大膽地；冒險地
sentences: He venturously invested all his savings in the project. 他大膽地把全部積蓄投進那個計畫。
The child venturously stepped onto the swinging bridge. 那個孩子冒險地踏上搖晃的吊橋。

meaning: 大膽；冒險精神
sentences: His venturousness made the expedition possible. 他的冒險精神讓這次遠征成為可能。
The article praised the venturousness of the early explorers. 那篇文章稱讚了早期探險者的勇氣。

meaning: 會場、地點
sentences: The city center is an ideal venue for the upcoming international summit. 市中心是即將舉行的國際峰會的理想會場（地點）。
The band is looking for a larger venue for their next concert tonight. 樂隊正在為今晚的下一場音樂會尋找一個更大的場地。

meaning: 小靜脈
sentences: The microscope showed a thin venula near the tissue. 顯微鏡下可見組織附近有一條細小靜脈。
Blood from the capillaries drained into a venula. 血液從毛細血管流入小靜脈。

meaning: 小靜脈的；與小靜脈有關的
sentences: The venular branch carried blood away from the tissue. 小靜脈分支把血液從組織帶走。
A venular pattern can appear clearly under strong light. 在強光下，小靜脈的紋理會很清楚。

meaning: 小靜脈
sentences: Each venule carried blood back toward the larger veins. 每條小靜脈都把血液帶回較大的靜脈。
The pathology report mentioned a damaged venule in the sample. 病理報告提到樣本裡有一條受損的小靜脈。

meaning: 具有小靜脈的；像小靜脈一樣分支的
sentences: The leaf had a venulose surface with fine lines. 那片葉子表面有細小脈絡，看起來很像 venulose 的結構。
Botanists use venulose to describe a finely veined pattern. 植物學家用 venulose 來描述細緻的脈狀紋理。

meaning: 維納斯；金星
sentences: Venus shines brightly in the evening sky. 金星在傍晚的天空中十分明亮。
The statue of Venus stood at the center of the hall. 維納斯雕像立在大廳中央。

meaning: 金星的；金星居民的
sentences: The novel imagined a Venusian city hidden under clouds. 那部小說想像了一座隱藏在雲層下的金星城市。
Scientists discussed whether a Venusian atmosphere could support life. 科學家討論金星大氣是否可能支持生命。

meaning: 優美的；迷人的；有美感的
sentences: The artist described the dancer as venust and graceful. 那位藝術家形容這名舞者優美又迷人。
Her venust handwriting made the page look elegant. 她那優美的字跡讓整頁看起來很典雅。

meaning: 與 Venus 有關的；金星的
sentences: The story described a Venutian landscape of yellow clouds. 那個故事描寫了一片金星般的黃色雲層景觀。
A Venutian colony would face extreme heat and pressure. 金星殖民地將面對極端高溫與壓力。

meaning: 小村落；小聚落
sentences: The old road passed through a quiet venville by the river. 舊道路穿過河邊一座安靜的小村落。
Travelers stopped in the venville to buy fresh bread. 旅人停在那個小聚落買新鮮麵包。

meaning: 維普斯人；維普斯語
sentences: The Veps live mainly in parts of northwestern Russia. 維普斯人主要居住在俄羅斯西北部的一些地區。
The linguist recorded a few Veps words from the village elder. 語言學家向村裡長者記錄了幾個維普斯語詞彙。

meaning: 一位維普斯人；維普斯族成員
sentences: A Vepse speaker helped the researchers understand the dialect. 一位維普斯族語者幫助研究人員理解方言。
The festival welcomed every Vepse from the nearby region. 那場節慶歡迎附近地區的每位維普斯族成員。

meaning: 維普斯的；與維普斯人或維普斯語有關的
sentences: The museum displayed Vepsish clothing and tools. 博物館展出了維普斯族的服飾與工具。
Her Vepsish pronunciation sounded close to the old recordings. 她的維普斯語發音聽起來很接近舊錄音。

meaning: A皮（捲菸用捲紙）。
sentences: The term vera refers to a skin (rolling paper for cigarettes). 維拉一詞指的是皮膚（香菸的捲紙）。
The lesson introduced vera as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了維拉作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 誠實的；真實的；說實話的
sentences: The judge praised the witness for a veracious statement. 法官稱讚那位證人說了一段誠實的證詞。
A veracious account helps readers trust the report. 真實的敘述能讓讀者信任報導。

meaning: 誠實地；真實地
sentences: She veraciously answered every question from the panel. 她誠實地回答了評審提出的每一個問題。
He described the event veraciously, without adding drama. 他真實地描述那場事件，沒有加油添醋。

meaning: 誠實；真實；說真話的性質
sentences: Her veraciousness made her a trusted journalist. 她的誠實讓她成了一位值得信賴的記者。
The committee valued veraciousness over polished but false stories. 委員會重視誠實，而不是包裝過卻不真實的故事。

meaning: 真實；誠實；準確性
sentences: The veracity of the claim was hard to prove. 那項說法的真實性很難證明。
Reporters checked the veracity of every source before publishing. 記者在發表前查核每個來源的準確性。

meaning: 陽台，走廊
sentences: We spent the evening sitting on the veranda, enjoying the breeze. 我們那天晚上坐在陽台上吹風。
The old house has a large wooden veranda that overlooks the garden. 那棟舊房子有一個可以俯瞰花園的大型木製走廊。

meaning: 帶有陽台的；有走廊平台的
sentences: The verandaed house looked cool and inviting in summer. 那棟帶陽台的房子在夏天看起來涼爽又宜人。
A verandaed porch wrapped around the old building. 一條有遮棚的陽台走廊環繞著那棟老建築。

meaning: 立體照相機；立體攝影儀
sentences: The museum displayed an old verascope in the camera case. 博物館在相機展櫃裡展示了一台老式立體照相機。
A verascope was once used to make three-dimensional images. 立體照相機過去曾用來拍攝立體影像。

meaning: 與藜蘆屬或藜蘆醛有關的；veratrum 的
sentences: The chemist discussed a veratral compound in the lecture. 化學家在演講中討論了一種與藜蘆相關的化合物。
A veratral flavor note may appear in some lab notes. 某些實驗筆記中可能會出現 veratral 的氣味描述。

meaning: 藜蘆鹼；一種與藜蘆相關的生物鹼
sentences: The paper isolated veratralbine from the plant extract. 論文從植物萃取物中分離出藜蘆鹼。
Veratralbine was studied for its chemical structure and effects. 研究人員研究了 veratralbine 的化學結構與作用。

meaning: 藜蘆醛；一種芳香族醛類化合物
sentences: The chemist used veratraldehyde as a reaction starting material. 化學家把藜蘆醛當作反應的起始原料。
Veratraldehyde has a distinct aromatic profile in the lab. 藜蘆醛在實驗室裡有明顯的芳香特徵。

meaning: 藜蘆酸鹽；藜蘆酸的酯或鹽類
sentences: The synthesis produced a small amount of veratrate. 合成反應產生了少量藜蘆酸鹽。
Scientists cataloged the veratrate as part of the sample set. 科學家把該藜蘆酸鹽列入樣本集合中。

meaning: 藜蘆鹼混合物；一種有毒生物鹼
sentences: Older medical texts mention veratria as a poisonous alkaloid mixture. 較早的醫學文獻把 veratria 記為一種有毒的生物鹼混合物。
The laboratory stored veratria under strict safety rules. 實驗室依嚴格安全規範保存 veratria。

meaning: 與藜蘆酸有關的
sentences: The veratric acid derivative was measured in the experiment. 實驗中測量了那個與藜蘆酸有關的衍生物。
A veratric compound can appear in botanical chemistry studies. 植物化學研究中可能會出現 veratric 相關化合物。

meaning: 藜蘆定；一種強烈的有毒生物鹼
sentences: The toxicology report listed veratridine among the dangerous compounds. 毒理報告把藜蘆定列為危險化合物之一。
Researchers handled veratridine only inside a secured lab. 研究人員只在安全管制的實驗室內處理 veratridine。

meaning: 由藜蘆屬植物取得的有毒生物鹼
sentences: Veratrine was once used in medicine but is now known as a toxic alkaloid. veratrine 以前曾用於醫藥，但現在已知它是一種有毒生物鹼。
The chemist handled the veratrine sample with extreme care. 那位化學家非常小心地處理 veratrine 樣本。

meaning: 使含有 veratrine；用 veratrine 處理
sentences: Researchers did not want to veratrinize the sample because the compound is toxic. 研究人員不想用 veratrine 處理那個樣本，因為這種化合物有毒。
The old process would veratrinize the extract before testing. 舊式流程會先用 veratrine 處理萃取物，再進行測試。

meaning: 用 veratrine 處理；使呈現 veratrine 的性質
sentences: The lab report warned that the extract should not be veratrized casually. 實驗報告提醒，萃取物不應隨意用 veratrine 處理。
Technicians sometimes veratrize tiny samples for demonstration purposes. 技術人員有時會為示範目的，對少量樣本做 veratrine 處理。

meaning: 藜蘆屬植物中的一種生物鹼
sentences: The plant extract contained veratroidine along with several related compounds. 那份植物萃取物中含有 veratroidine，還有幾種相關化合物。
Scientists studied veratroidine because of its strong biological activity. 科學家研究 veratroidine，是因為它具有強烈的生物活性。

meaning: 一種芳香化學化合物，常作為有機合成的中間體
sentences: The chemist discussed veratrole as a useful intermediate in synthesis. 那位化學家把 veratrole 談成有機合成中的有用中間體。
A faint scent of veratrole came from the laboratory bottle. 實驗室瓶子裡飄出 veratrole 的淡淡氣味。

meaning: 由 veratric acid 衍生的化學基團
sentences: The paper referred to the veratroyl group in the reaction scheme. 那篇論文在反應式中提到 veratroyl 基團。
Chemists tracked the veratroyl substitution through the molecule. 化學家追蹤這個分子中的 veratroyl 取代位置。

meaning: 藜蘆屬，含有多種有毒植物
sentences: Veratrum includes several poisonous species used in botanical studies. Veratrum 包含幾種有毒植物，常用於植物學研究。
The label warned that the specimen belonged to the genus Veratrum. 標籤警告說，這個標本屬於 Veratrum 屬。

meaning: 與 veratric acid 或其衍生基團有關的
sentences: The report described a veratryl derivative in the compound. 報告描述了該化合物中的 veratryl 衍生物。
A veratryl group can appear in several aromatic molecules. veratryl 基團可出現在幾種芳香族分子中。

meaning: 由 veratryl 衍生的亞甲基化基團
sentences: The synthesis included a veratrylidene intermediate. 那個合成步驟包含一個 veratrylidene 中間體。
Chemists used veratrylidene to name a specific structural group. 化學家用 veratrylidene 來指稱某個特定的結構基團。

meaning: 動詞
sentences: A verb is a word that describes an action or a state. 動詞是描述動作或狀態的詞。
In the sentence 'She runs quickly', 'runs' is the main verb. 在「她跑很快」這個句子中，「跑」是主要動詞。

meaning: 口頭的、言辭的
sentences: The two parties reached a verbal agreement before signing the contract. 雙方在簽署合約前達成了一項口頭協議。
She is highly articulate and has excellent verbal communication skills. 她口才流利，具備出色的言辭（口頭）溝通技巧。

meaning: 過度注重字詞；空談
sentences: The essay criticized verbalism and called for clearer thinking. 那篇文章批評空談，並主張更清楚的思考。
Too much verbalism can hide the real issue. 過度講究字詞反而會掩蓋真正的問題。

meaning: 講究字詞的人；善於語言表達的人
sentences: The teacher praised him as a careful verbalist who chose words precisely. 老師稱讚他是個講究字詞、選詞精準的人。
A verbalist may care more about phrasing than about direct action. 善於修辭的人有時會比起直接行動，更在意措辭。

meaning: 語言表達的性質；口頭表達
sentences: The poem relied on verbality rather than imagery. 那首詩更依賴語言表達，而不是意象。
His verbality made the lecture sound polished and formal. 他的口語表達讓演講聽起來很正式、很精緻。

meaning: 用語言表達；把想法說出來
sentences: The therapist encouraged verbalization of difficult feelings. 治療師鼓勵把難以啟齒的感受說出來。
Verbalization can turn a vague thought into a clear idea. 把想法說出來，能讓模糊的念頭變得清楚。

meaning: 用語言表達；把想法說出口
sentences: Please verbalize your concern before the meeting ends. 請在會議結束前把你的疑慮說出來。
Children often verbalize their emotions more freely than adults do. 孩子常常比大人更自在地把情緒說出口。

meaning: 善於表達的人；把事物說出來的人
sentences: He is a strong verbalizer who can describe scenes vividly. 他很會表達，能把場景描述得很生動。
A good verbalizer helps a team share ideas clearly. 善於表達的人能幫助團隊清楚分享點子。

meaning: 以口頭方式；用言語；透過說話。
sentences: Dumbstruck with joy, she was unable to express herself verbally, but the gratitude in her face was evident to all. 她高興得目瞪口呆，無法用言語表達，但臉上的感激之情卻是有目共睹。
If someone acts verbally, they do so in a way that is in a verbal manner; with words; by speaking. 如果某人以口頭方式行事，那麼他們就是以口頭方式這樣做的；用言語；透過說話。

meaning: 偏好用語言或詞句的人；講究字詞的人
sentences: The old critic was known as a verbarian who loved exact wording. 那位老評論家以講究精確措辭的 verbarian 著稱。
A verbarian may spend hours refining a single sentence. 講究字句的人可能會花好幾個小時潤飾一句話。

meaning: 詞彙彙編；用語收藏
sentences: The scholar kept a personal verbarium of unusual words. 那位學者保存了一本個人的罕見詞彙彙編。
A verbarium can help writers find precise terms quickly. 詞彙彙編可以幫助寫作者快速找到精確用語。

meaning: 毛蕊花；毛蕊花屬植物的俗稱
sentences: The herbal note mentioned verbasco as a traditional plant. 那本草本筆記把 verbasco 提為一種傳統植物。
A yellow verbasco plant grew beside the dry road. 一株黃色的 verbasco 植物長在乾燥的路旁。

meaning: 一種植物性三醣
sentences: The study measured verbascose in the seed extract. 那項研究測量了種子萃取物中的 verbascose。
Verbascose is a carbohydrate found in some plants. verbascose 是存在於某些植物中的碳水化合物。

meaning: 毛蕊花屬
sentences: Verbascum includes many tall flowering plants with soft leaves. Verbascum 包含許多高大的開花植物，葉子柔軟。
The botany class identified the specimen as a Verbascum species. 植物學課把這個標本辨認為 Verbascum 屬的一種。

meaning: 把話精確說出；用話語表達
sentences: She tried to verbate the experience as clearly as possible. 她盡量把這段經歷清楚地說出來。
The author chose to verbate the thought in a single line. 作者選擇用一句話把這個想法表達出來。

meaning: 逐字;與原先使用的字完全相同。
sentences: I have copied his speech verbatim, so this is exactly what he said, word for word. 我 逐字複製了他的演講 ，所以這正是他所說的，逐字逐句的。 我逐字複製了他的演講，所以這就是他所說的，一字不差。 我逐字複製了他的演講，所以這就是他所說的，逐字逐句的。
The team responded verbatim to the change. 該團隊逐字回應了這項變化。 該團隊逐字回應了這項變化。 團隊逐字回應了這個改變。

meaning: 馬鞭草
sentences: Verbena is a fragrant flower often grown in gardens. verbena 是一種香味濃郁、常種在花園裡的花。
She planted verbena near the window so the scent could drift inside. 她把 verbena 種在窗邊，讓香氣能飄進室內。

meaning: 馬鞭草科
sentences: The old textbook placed verbena in the family Verbenaceae. 舊教科書把馬鞭草歸在 Verbenaceae 科。
Many aromatic herbs were once grouped in Verbenaceae. 許多芳香草本植物過去曾被歸入 Verbenaceae。

meaning: 馬鞭草科的；類似馬鞭草的
sentences: The shrub had a verbenaceous fragrance after rain. 那株灌木在雨後散發出馬鞭草科植物般的香氣。
Botanists used verbenaceous to describe the flower's family traits. 植物學家用 verbenaceous 來描述這朵花的科屬特徵。

meaning: 像馬鞭草的；類似馬鞭草的
sentences: The leaves had a verbenalike shape and scent. 這些葉子的形狀和香氣都很像馬鞭草。
A verbenalike plant can easily be mistaken for verbena. 類似馬鞭草的植物很容易被誤認成真正的馬鞭草。

meaning: 馬鞭草苷；馬鞭草中的一種成分
sentences: The chemist isolated verbenalin from the herb extract. 那位化學家從草本萃取物中分離出 verbenalin。
Verbenalin is discussed in older herbal medicine texts. 舊式草藥文獻裡常討論 verbenalin。

meaning: 與馬鞭草有關的名稱；古典詞彙中的植物名
sentences: The glossary listed Verbenarius as an old botanical name. 詞彙表把 Verbenarius 列為一個古老的植物名稱。
Scholars traced Verbenarius back to Latin herb literature. 學者把 Verbenarius 追溯到拉丁草藥文獻。

meaning: 馬鞭草酸鹽；馬鞭草酸的衍生物
sentences: The compound was described as a verbenate in the catalog. 那個化合物在目錄中被描述為 verbenate。
A verbenate can be formed from a related aromatic acid. verbenate 可以由相關的芳香酸形成。

meaning: 馬鞭草的舊稱或變體拼法
sentences: The poem used verbene as an old-fashioned name for verbena. 那首詩用 verbene 作為 verbena 的老式名稱。
Verbene appears in some older herbal dictionaries. verbene 出現在一些較早的草本字典裡。

meaning: 一種具有香氣的萜類化合物
sentences: The essential oil contained verbenone and other fragrant compounds. 精油中含有 verbenone 以及其他芳香化合物。
Verbenone is often mentioned in plant chemistry. verbenone 常出現在植物化學的討論中。

meaning: 鞭打；擊打；使響起
sentences: The poet used the word verberate to suggest a hard strike. 那位詩人用 verberate 這個字來表示重擊。
The thunder seemed to verberate through the valley. 雷聲彷彿在山谷間迴響。

meaning: 鞭打；擊打；震動聲
sentences: The speech described the verberation of the waves against the rocks. 那篇演說描述了海浪拍擊岩石的聲響。
The old term verberation refers to striking or beating. 舊詞 verberation 指的是拍打或鞭擊。

meaning: 鞭打的；擊打性的
sentences: The writer chose a verberative style to make the scene feel harsh. 作者選用一種帶有擊打感的風格，讓場景顯得更粗烈。
A verberative motion can be heard more than seen. 帶有擊打感的動作，聽起來往往比看起來更明顯。

meaning: 向日葵科中的一個屬名
sentences: Verbesina grows in warm regions and includes several wild species. Verbesina 生長在溫暖地區，包含幾種野生物種。
The field guide identified the plant as a Verbesina species. 野外圖鑑把這株植物辨認為 Verbesina 屬的一種。

meaning: 冗詞贅語；囉嗦的話
sentences: The editor removed the verbiage to make the report shorter. 編輯刪掉了冗詞贅語，讓報告更精簡。
Too much verbiage can make a simple idea hard to follow. 太多贅語會讓簡單的想法變得難懂。

meaning: 扼殺字義；把詞語用壞的行為
sentences: The article called that sloppy slogan a kind of verbicide. 那篇文章把那句草率的標語稱為一種 verbicide。
Careless overuse can turn a vivid word into verbicide. 不小心地過度使用，會讓原本生動的詞變成 verbicide。

meaning: 語詞培養；講究用詞的習慣
sentences: The author treated language as a form of verbiculture. 那位作者把語言視為一種詞語培養的藝術。
Verbiculture focuses on growing richer and more precise vocabulary. verbiculture 著重培養更豐富、更精準的詞彙。

meaning: 有動詞功能的詞或詞形
sentences: The grammar lesson explained the verbid as a verb-like form. 語法課把 verbid 解釋為具有動詞功能的詞形。
A verbid can behave partly like a noun and partly like a verb. verbid 可能部分像名詞、部分像動詞。

meaning: 動詞化；把字變成動詞的過程
sentences: Verbification often happens when speakers create new actions from nouns. 當說話者從名詞創造新動作時，常會出現 verbification。
The linguist studied verbification in online slang. 那位語言學家研究網路俚語中的 verbification。

meaning: 使動詞化；把名詞變成動詞
sentences: Writers sometimes verbify nouns to create new slang. 作家有時會把名詞動詞化，創造新的俚語。
The team decided to verbify the brand name for fun. 那個團隊決定把品牌名動詞化，當成一種玩笑。

meaning: 反覆機械地重複說話
sentences: The patient began to verbigerate the same phrase over and over. 那位病人開始反覆重複同一句話。
The novel describes a character who seems to verbigerate under stress. 那本小說描寫了一個在壓力下似乎會反覆喃喃重複的人物。

meaning: 機械式重複語句；反覆喃喃重複
sentences: The doctor noted signs of verbigeration in the interview. 醫師在訪談中注意到反覆機械重複語句的現象。
Verbigeration can appear in certain speech disorders. 某些語言障礙中可能會出現 verbigeration。

meaning: 反覆重複語句的；機械式重複的
sentences: The counselor recognized a verbigerative pattern in the speech. 諮商師在那段談話裡察覺到反覆重複的模式。
A verbigerative response can sound empty and stuck. 反覆重複的回應聽起來常會空洞而停滯。

meaning: 以言語表達的；詞語性的
sentences: The professor called the argument highly verbile and abstract. 教授說這個論證非常 verbile，也就是高度依賴言語的抽象表述。
A verbile style can be effective in formal writing. verbile 的寫法在正式書面語中可能很有效。

meaning: 沒有動詞的；缺少動詞的
sentences: The title is verbless, so it reads more like a phrase than a sentence. 這個標題沒有動詞，所以看起來更像片語而不是句子。
Poets sometimes choose a verbless line for emphasis. 詩人有時會刻意使用沒有動詞的句子來強調。

meaning: 崇拜字詞；過度迷戀措辭
sentences: The essay warned against verbolatry in academic writing. 那篇文章警告學術寫作不要陷入對字詞的崇拜。
Verbolatry can make people value wording more than meaning. 過度迷戀措辭會讓人更重視字句而不是意義。

meaning: 對語言或字詞的狂熱；愛說話的癖性
sentences: The writer joked that his verbomania kept him at the keyboard all night. 那位作家開玩笑說，他對字詞的狂熱讓他整晚都坐在鍵盤前。
Verbomania can look like a nonstop urge to talk or write. verbomania 會表現成一種不停想說話或寫字的衝動。

meaning: 對字詞著迷的人；愛說話的人
sentences: He is such a verbomaniac that he collects rare dictionaries. 他是個非常著迷字詞的人，還收藏罕見字典。
The character was written as a verbomaniac who never stopped chatting. 那個角色被寫成一個不停聊天的 verbomaniac。

meaning: 與語言表達和動作反應有關的
sentences: The psychologist studied verbomotor responses in children. 心理學家研究兒童的語言動作反應。
A verbomotor task asks someone to react with words and movement. verbomotor 任務會要求某人用語言和動作做反應。

meaning: 囉嗦的；冗長的
sentences: The report was too verbose and needed editing. 那份報告太冗長，需要編修。
She gave a verbose explanation that could have been much shorter. 她做了一段很囉嗦的說明，其實可以簡短許多。

meaning: 冗長地；囉嗦地
sentences: He explained verbosely, repeating the same point three times. 他解釋得很冗長，把同一個重點重複了三次。
She wrote verbosely about every small detail of the trip. 她把旅程中的每個小細節都寫得很詳盡。

meaning: 冗長；囉嗦
sentences: The verboseness of the report made it harder to follow. 那份報告的冗長讓人更難理解。
He apologized for the verboseness of his email. 他為電子郵件寫得太囉嗦而道歉。

meaning: 冗長；贅述
sentences: The teacher asked him to cut the verbosity from the essay. 老師要他把文章裡的贅述刪掉。
A little verbosity can make a message feel exhausting. 稍微冗長一點就會讓訊息讀起來很累。

meaning: 囉嗦的；多話的
sentences: The old letter sounded verbous and overdecorated. 那封舊信讀起來很囉嗦，修飾也過頭了。
She tried to avoid a verbous style in her writing. 她努力在寫作中避免囉嗦的文風。

meaning: 偏重動詞的；動詞感很強的
sentences: The student's notes felt too verby and lacked nouns. 那位學生的筆記太偏動詞了，缺少名詞。
Her verby style made the scene feel active and fast. 她那種偏動詞的寫法讓場景顯得活躍又快速。

meaning: 小陀螺；旋轉玩具
sentences: The child found a wooden verchok in the toy box. 那孩子在玩具箱裡找到一個木製小陀螺。
He spun the verchok on the table and watched it wobble. 他把小陀螺在桌上轉起來，看著它搖晃。

meaning: 綠色的；青翠的
sentences: The poet used verd to describe the spring hills. 詩人用 verd 來描寫春天的山丘。
A verd field looked fresh under the morning light. 一片青綠的田野在晨光下看起來很清新。

meaning: 青翠；蒼翠；綠意
sentences: The verdancy of the valley impressed every visitor. 山谷的青翠讓每位訪客都印象深刻。
After the rain, the field regained its verdancy. 雨後，田野重新恢復了綠意。

meaning: 顏色為綠色。
sentences: The report describes the result as verdant. 報告將結果描述為翠綠。
Everyone noticed the verdant tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的青翠語氣。

meaning: 青翠地；綠意盎然地
sentences: The garden spread verdantly across the slope. 花園在坡地上青翠地展開。
The vines grew verdantly after the first storm. 第一場暴風雨後，藤蔓長得更加青翠。

meaning: 青翠狀態；綠意盎然
sentences: The verdantness of the park made it feel cool. 公園的青翠感讓那裡顯得很涼爽。
He admired the verdantness of the valley in summer. 他欣賞山谷在夏天的青綠景象。

meaning: 一個少見專名；可作地名或姓氏
sentences: Verdea appeared on the old map as a small settlement. 舊地圖上，Verdea 被標成一個小聚落。
The family name Verdea was written on the invitation. 邀請函上寫著 Verdea 這個姓氏。

meaning: 維代略葡萄；以此葡萄釀成的白葡萄酒
sentences: The winery planted verdelho on the cooler hillside. 那座酒莊把 verdelho 種在較涼的山坡上。
We ordered a glass of verdelho with dinner. 我們晚餐點了一杯 verdelho。

meaning: 皇家森林監管官；森林官
sentences: The verderer inspected the forest boundary at dawn. 那名森林官在清晨巡視森林邊界。
In old England, a verderer helped enforce forest law. 在古英格蘭，森林官負責協助執行森林法。

meaning: 森林官職務；森林官身分
sentences: He was proud to hold the verderership of the park. 他很自豪能擔任那座公園的森林官職務。
The verderership once carried both honor and duty. 這個森林官職務過去同時代表榮譽與責任。

meaning: 綠鏽；綠色銅鹽
sentences: The metal pipe was covered with verdet after years of rain. 那根金屬管多年淋雨後長滿了綠鏽。
The old chemistry book used verdet for a green copper salt. 那本老化學書用 verdet 指一種綠色銅鹽。

meaning: 判決、裁定
sentences: The jury reached a unanimous verdict of not guilty after several hours. 經過數小時後，陪審團一致裁定（判決）無罪。
We are still waiting for the final verdict on the legality of the new policy. 我們仍在等待關於新政策合法性的最後裁定。

meaning: 銅綠；綠銹
sentences: Verdigris coated the statue after decades outdoors. 這座雕像在戶外幾十年後覆上了銅綠。
The painter liked the verdigris color on old rooftops. 那位畫家喜歡舊屋頂上的綠銹色。

meaning: 帶銅綠的；像綠銹一樣的
sentences: The door had a verdigrisy tint around the handle. 門把周圍帶著一種銅綠般的色調。
Her verdigrisy necklace looked beautifully aged. 她那條帶綠銹感的項鍊看起來十分有歲月味。

meaning: 綠黃小鳥；綠背山雀
sentences: A verdin flitted through the desert shrub. 一隻綠黃色的小鳥在沙漠灌木間飛來飛去。
The birdwatcher spotted a verdin near the cactus. 賞鳥者在仙人掌旁看見了一隻 verdin。

meaning: 藍綠色顏料；石青色
sentences: The artist mixed verditer with white for the sky. 畫家把 verditer 和白色混合來畫天空。
Old painters used verditer for a bright blue-green tint. 舊時畫家用 verditer 來取得明亮的藍綠色調。

meaning: 綠蔭；草木繁盛的景象
sentences: The castle was framed by verdoy on both sides. 城堡兩側被綠蔭環繞。
The tapestry showed a field of verdoy behind the knight. 掛毯上騎士身後是一片草木繁盛的景象。

meaning: 行刑者職務；執行死刑的身分
sentences: The novel explored the grim burden of verdugoship. 那部小說探討了行刑者職務的陰暗負擔。
He spoke as if verdugoship were a family duty. 他說話時彷彿行刑者的職責是家族使命。

meaning: 凡爾登；法國的地名
sentences: Verdun is remembered for a major battle in World War I. 凡爾登因第一次世界大戰中的一場大戰而聞名。
The guidebook listed Verdun as an important French city. 旅遊手冊把凡爾登列為法國的重要城市。

meaning: 青翠；綠蔭；草木繁盛
sentences: The verdure of the hillside looked almost unreal. 山坡上的青翠看起來幾乎不真實。
They rested under the verdure of the old trees. 他們在老樹的綠蔭下休息。

meaning: 長滿綠意的；覆以草木的
sentences: The verdured slope hid the path from view. 長滿綠意的山坡把小徑遮住了。
We walked through a verdured garden after the rain. 雨後我們走過一座綠意盎然的花園。

meaning: 沒有綠意的；不生草木的
sentences: The winter field looked verdureless and bare. 冬天的田野看起來沒有綠意，十分裸露。
A verdureless hillside can feel harsh in summer heat. 沒有綠意的山坡在夏日高溫下會顯得很乾硬。

meaning: 青翠茂盛的；草木繁盛的
sentences: The verdurous park shaded the whole street. 那片青綠茂盛的公園為整條街遮了陰。
They found a verdurous trail beside the river. 他們在河邊找到一條草木繁盛的小徑。

meaning: 草木繁盛；青翠茂盛的狀態
sentences: The verdurousness of the forest was its greatest charm. 森林的草木繁盛是它最大的魅力。
The landscape designer aimed for more verdurousness. 景觀設計師希望營造更多的青綠繁茂感。

meaning: 羞怯的；謙遜的；靦腆的
sentences: The child gave a verecund smile and looked away. 那孩子羞怯地笑了一下就移開視線。
His verecund manner made him seem gentle. 他那種靦腆的舉止讓他看起來很溫和。

meaning: 羞怯；謙遜；靦腆
sentences: The heroine's verecundity was part of her charm. 女主角的靦腆也是她魅力的一部分。
The poem praises verecundity more than loud confidence. 那首詩讚美的是含蓄，而不是高調的自信。

meaning: 羞怯；拘謹；靦腆
sentences: His verecundness made introductions awkward at first. 他的靦腆讓一開始的自我介紹有點尷尬。
The speaker's verecundness contrasted with the crowd's noise. 演講者的拘謹和人群的喧鬧形成對比。

meaning: 一個少見的人名或姓氏
sentences: Verek appeared on the guest list as the lead engineer. Verek 出現在賓客名單上，身分是首席工程師。
The surname Verek was written neatly on the label. Verek 這個姓氏被工整地寫在標籤上。

meaning: 海筆狀的；像 Veretillum 的
sentences: The fossil had a veretilliform outline. 這塊化石呈現海筆狀外形。
A veretilliform colony sways gently in the water. 海筆狀群體在水中輕輕搖曳。

meaning: 海筆屬；一種海筆類珊瑚
sentences: The marine biologist identified the specimen as Veretillum. 海洋生物學家把那個標本辨認為 Veretillum。
Veretillum grows on the seafloor and looks like a soft feather. Veretillum 生長在海底，看起來像柔軟的羽毛。

meaning: 海筆屬；一種海筆類珊瑚
sentences: The label used veretillum for the sea-pen genus. 那張標籤用 veretillum 指海筆的屬名。
In the catalog, veretillum appeared beside other coral names. 在目錄中，veretillum 與其他珊瑚名稱並列。

meaning: 非常接近或非常接近；到邊界；接近。
sentences: Eating blowfish verges on insanity. 吃河豚近乎瘋狂。
To verge means to be or come very close; to border; to approach. To verge意味著非常接近或非常接近；到邊界；接近。

meaning: 山牆板；屋簷邊板
sentences: The house had carved vergeboards along the roofline. 這棟房子的屋簷邊緣有雕花山牆板。
A painted vergeboard can add character to a cottage. 彩繪山牆板能替小屋增添特色。

meaning: 趨合；會聚；匯聚
sentences: The vergence of the lines made the drawing look deep. 線條的趨合讓這幅畫看起來很有深度。
Eye vergence helps both eyes focus on one point. 眼球趨合能幫助雙眼對準同一個焦點。

meaning: 趨合；聚攏傾向
sentences: The vergency of the rails was easy to see in the distance. 鐵軌在遠處的趨合很容易看出來。
Scientists measured the vergency of the particles. 科學家測量了粒子的趨合傾向。

meaning: 趨合的；會聚的
sentences: The vergent lines met at the horizon. 趨合的線條在地平線處交會。
A vergent pattern can make a design feel dynamic. 趨合式圖樣能讓設計看起來更有動感。

meaning: 趨合程度；會聚性
sentences: The vergentness of the two roads confused the map reader. 兩條路的趨合感讓看地圖的人很困惑。
The vergentness of the poles was measured in the lab. 實驗室測量了那些桿子的趨合程度。

meaning: 教堂堂役；教堂管理員
sentences: The verger opened the church doors before sunrise. 堂役在日出前打開教堂大門。
A verger guided visitors through the old cathedral. 一位堂役帶領遊客參觀古老的大教堂。

meaning: 女堂役；女性教堂管理員
sentences: The vergeress arranged the candles for the service. 那位女堂役為儀式擺好蠟燭。
People greeted the vergeress with quiet respect. 人們以安靜而尊敬的態度向女堂役致意。

meaning: 堂役職務；堂役工作的制度
sentences: The old parish manual described the duties of vergerism. 舊教區手冊描述了堂役工作的職責。
He treated vergerism as a solemn public service. 他把堂役職務視為一種莊嚴的公共服務。

meaning: 沒有堂役的；缺少教堂管理員的
sentences: The small chapel remained vergerless on weekday mornings. 那座小教堂在平日早晨沒有堂役。
A vergerless ceremony can feel disorganized. 沒有堂役的儀式可能會顯得較混亂。

meaning: 堂役職務；堂役任期
sentences: He served long years in the vergership of the cathedral. 他在大教堂的堂役職務上服務了多年。
The vergership gave him a steady place in parish life. 這份堂役職務讓他在教區生活中有了穩定位置。

meaning: 堂役工作；教堂勤務
sentences: The vergery kept the church orderly during the festival. 堂役工作在節慶期間讓教堂保持井然有序。
He considered vergery an important part of church tradition. 他認為教堂勤務是教會傳統的重要部分。

meaning: 稅；賦稅
sentences: The new vergi increased costs for merchants. 新稅讓商人的成本上升。
Historians noted how vergi affected village trade. 歷史學家指出賦稅如何影響村莊貿易。

meaning: 桿狀的；枝條狀的
sentences: The microscope image showed a vergiform cell. 顯微鏡影像顯示那是一個桿狀細胞。
The plant's vergiform stems were unusually straight. 那株植物桿狀的莖異常筆直。

meaning: 維吉爾式風格；模仿維吉爾的文風
sentences: The essay praised the Vergilianism of the poet's Latin lines. 那篇文章稱讚詩人拉丁詩句中的維吉爾風格。
Vergilianism often emphasizes pastoral beauty and epic dignity. 維吉爾式風格常強調田園美與史詩般的莊嚴。

meaning: 薄冰；透明冰層
sentences: Verglas coated the road before dawn. 黎明前，路面覆上一層薄冰。
The pilot warned of verglas on the runway. 飛行員警告跑道上有薄冰。

meaning: 古高盧人的最高行政官；部落首長
sentences: The vergobret was the highest magistrate in the tribe. vergobret 是部落裡最高的官員。
History books describe the vergobret as both judge and ruler. 歷史書把 vergobret 描述成兼具法官與統治者身分的人。

meaning: very 的古拼法；非常，真地
sentences: The manuscript uses veri as an old spelling of very. 那份手稿把 veri 當作 very 的古拼法。
He wrote veri near the margin to emphasize the degree. 他在頁邊寫下 veri 來強調程度。

meaning: 真實的；誠實的
sentences: The historian aimed for a veridic account of the event. 那位歷史學家力求寫出對事件真實的記述。
Her veridic remarks were direct but helpful. 她誠實的話語雖然直接，卻很有幫助。

meaning: 真實的；與事實相符的
sentences: The witness gave a veridical description of the scene. 那位證人對現場做了與事實相符的描述。
Researchers looked for veridical evidence before drawing conclusions. 研究人員在下結論前尋找真實可信的證據。

meaning: 真實性；與事實相符的程度
sentences: The report questioned the veridicality of the old testimony. 那份報告質疑那段舊證詞的真實性。
Veridicality matters when a claim may affect public trust. 當主張可能影響公眾信任時，真實性就很重要。

meaning: 真實地；誠實地
sentences: She veridically recounted what happened that night. 她誠實地敘述了那晚發生的事。
The article was written veridically, without exaggeration. 那篇文章寫得很真實，沒有誇張。

meaning: 真實性；誠實程度
sentences: The veridicalness of the statement was hard to prove. 那句陳述的真實性很難證明。
The judge focused on the veridicalness of the eyewitness account. 法官聚焦於目擊者證詞的真實程度。

meaning: 誠實的；真實的
sentences: His veridicous tone made the apology believable. 他誠實的語氣讓道歉聽起來可信。
The editor preferred veridicous reporting over flashy headlines. 編輯偏好誠實真實的報導，而不是花俏標題。

meaning: 真誠；真實；真實性
sentences: The speaker's veridity impressed the audience. 那位演講者的真誠打動了觀眾。
The essay praised the veridity of plain language. 那篇文章稱讚平實語言的真實感。

meaning: 可驗證性
sentences: The verifiability of the data made the study stronger. 資料的可驗證性讓這項研究更有說服力。
Good science depends on verifiability and clear methods. 好的科學仰賴可驗證性與清楚的方法。

meaning: 能夠被驗證或確認。
sentences: Do you have verifiable evidence to support that claim? 您有可驗證的證據來支持這項說法嗎？
The report describes the result as verifiable. 報告稱該結果是可驗證的。

meaning: 可驗證性；可核實程度
sentences: The verifiableness of the claim was checked by auditors. 審核人員檢查了那項主張的可驗證性。
Teachers often value verifiableness when grading arguments. 老師在評分論證時常重視可核實程度。

meaning: 可驗證地；可證明地
sentences: The number was verifiably correct after the review. 經過複查後，這個數字可證明是正確的。
She verifiably completed the training before the deadline. 她在期限前確實完成了訓練。

meaning: 驗證；確認
sentences: The technician had to verificate the file before release. 技術人員在發布前必須驗證這個檔案。
The system can verificate the identity of each user. 這套系統可以確認每位使用者的身分。

meaning: 確認；認證。
sentences: The detective needs verification of your whereabouts last night. 偵探需要核實你昨晚的行蹤。
The term verification refers to confirmation; authentication. 驗證一詞是指確認；驗證。

meaning: 用於驗證的；驗證性的
sentences: The committee requested verificative documents for the claim. 委員會要求提供驗證性的文件來支持那項主張。
A verificative test can help confirm a hypothesis. 驗證性測試有助於確認假說。

meaning: 用於驗證的；證明性的
sentences: The laboratory ran a verificatory comparison of the samples. 實驗室對樣本做了驗證性比對。
She offered a verificatory note at the end of her paper. 她在論文末尾附上了證明性的說明。

meaning: 驗證者；核實者
sentences: The verifier checked each record before it was stored. 驗證者在每筆資料儲存前都會檢查。
A password verifier compares the input with saved data. 密碼驗證器會把輸入內容與已儲存資料比對。

meaning: 證實或證明某事的真實性。
sentences: To verify means to substantiate or prove the truth of something. 驗證意味著證實或證明某事的真實性。
People may verify in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據上下文在不同的情況下進行驗證。

meaning: 誠然；的確；真實地
sentences: Verily, the old text says the king returned at dawn. 誠然，這段古文寫著國王在黎明返回。
He verily believed that the story was true. 他確信那個故事是真的。

meaning: 真誠的；真實的；古語中的 truthful
sentences: The critic called the speech verine and plainspoken. 那位評論者說這場演說真誠而直白。
Her verine answer left little room for doubt. 她真實的回答幾乎沒有留下懷疑空間。

meaning: 似真的；看起來真實的
sentences: The novel created a verisimilar portrait of the city. 那本小說塑造了一幅看起來很真實的城市圖景。
A verisimilar explanation often sounds more convincing. 看起來真實的解釋常常更有說服力。

meaning: 看似真實地；似真地
sentences: The actor spoke verisimilarly, without sounding forced. 那位演員說得很自然，看似真實。
The scene was rendered verisimilarly in the film. 電影裡那個場景拍得很逼真。

meaning: 逼真；似真性
sentences: The director cared about verisimilitude in every scene. 導演在每個場景都很重視逼真感。
The painting achieved verisimilitude through careful detail. 那幅畫靠精細的細節達到逼真效果。

meaning: 有逼真感的；看似真實的
sentences: The writer used verisimilitudinous details to build the world. 作家使用具逼真感的細節來建構世界。
The set design looked verisimilitudinous enough to fool viewers. 這個布景逼真得足以騙過觀眾。

meaning: 似真性；逼真程度
sentences: The play gained verisimility from its realistic dialogue. 那齣戲因為對話真實而增加了逼真度。
Verisimility matters when a story aims to feel believable. 當故事想讓人覺得可信時，似真性就很重要。

meaning: 寫實主義；重真實的藝術風格
sentences: The painter embraced verism and avoided idealized forms. 那位畫家採取寫實主義，避免理想化造型。
Verism gives the portrait a stark and honest feel. 寫實風格讓肖像呈現出直接而誠實的感受。

meaning: 寫實主義者；崇尚真實的人
sentences: The novelist was known as a strict verist. 那位小說家以嚴格的寫實主義者著稱。
A verist often prefers blunt truth to decoration. 崇尚真實的人常比起修飾更偏好直接的真相。

meaning: 寫實的；重真實的
sentences: The film used a veristic style to show everyday life. 這部電影以寫實風格呈現日常生活。
Her veristic drawing left out any romantic embellishment. 她的寫實素描沒有任何浪漫修飾。

meaning: 真實性；可成立性
sentences: The court examined the veritability of the witness statement. 法院檢視了證人陳述的真實性。
The claim's veritability depended on outside evidence. 那項主張的真實性取決於外部證據。

meaning: 真的;真的。
sentences: He is a veritable genius. 他是個名副其實的天才。
A fair is a veritable smorgasbord. 博覽會是名副其實的大雜燴。

meaning: 真實性；真確程度
sentences: The veritableness of the rumor was never established. 那個謠言的真實性從未被證實。
The debate turned on the veritableness of the source. 爭論的焦點轉向來源的真確程度。

meaning: 真正地；確實地
sentences: The valley was veritably covered in mist. 那座山谷確實被霧氣覆蓋。
She veritably transformed the team with her leadership. 她的領導確實改變了整個團隊。

meaning: 真實；寫實；尤其指紀錄片式的自然風格
sentences: The documentary aimed for verite instead of spectacle. 那部紀錄片追求真實風格，而不是華麗效果。
Verite gives the story a raw and immediate feel. 寫實風格讓故事帶有直接而原始的感受。

meaning: 求真主義；重視真理的觀點
sentences: The essay defended veritism as an ethical stance. 那篇文章把求真主義辯護為一種倫理立場。
Veritism values honesty over convenience. 求真主義把誠實看得比方便更重要。

meaning: 求真主義者；重視真理的人
sentences: The philosopher was described as a cautious veritist. 那位哲學家被描述為謹慎的求真主義者。
A veritist tries to separate fact from rumor. 重視真理的人會努力把事實與謠言分開。

meaning: 求真主義的；重視真理的
sentences: The report took a veritistic approach to the controversy. 那份報告以求真取向處理這場爭議。
Her veritistic writing left little room for spin. 她那種重真實的寫作幾乎沒有任何粉飾空間。

meaning: 真理；真實；事實
sentences: The teacher reminded the class that verity matters. 老師提醒全班，真理是重要的。
The poem turns on a simple verity about loss. 那首詩圍繞著一個關於失落的簡單事實。

meaning: 未熟葡萄或青果榨出的酸汁
sentences: The recipe called for a spoonful of verjuice. 那份食譜需要一匙未熟果汁。
Chefs use verjuice when they want acidity without vinegar. 廚師想要酸味但不想用醋時，會用 verjuice。

meaning: 鍍金銀；金紅色；鮮紅色
sentences: The bracelet was made of vermeil and looked elegant. 那條手鍊是鍍金銀製成的，看起來很典雅。
The artist chose a warm vermeil to brighten the painting. 畫家選了一種溫暖的金紅色來提亮畫面。

meaning: 研究蠕蟲的人
sentences: The vermeologist spent years studying soil worms. 那位研究蠕蟲的人花了好幾年研究土壤中的蠕蟲。
A dedicated vermeologist can identify many worm species. 專注的蠕蟲學研究者能辨認很多蠕蟲物種。

meaning: 蠕蟲學；研究蠕蟲的學問
sentences: The lecture introduced vermeology as a niche field. 那場演講把蠕蟲學介紹成一門冷門領域。
Vermeology can overlap with ecology and soil science. 蠕蟲學可能與生態學和土壤科學重疊。

meaning: 蠕蟲；舊時用來指一類蠕蟲狀動物
sentences: The museum's old catalog grouped several animals under Vermes. 博物館的舊目錄把幾種動物歸在 Vermes 之下。
Vermes is an outdated classification term today. Vermes 現在已是過時的分類術語。

meaning: 管螺類的；管螺科成員
sentences: The diver found a vermetid attached to the rock. 潛水員發現岩石上附著著一種管螺。
A vermetid shell often grows in a twisted tube shape. 管螺的殼常長成扭曲的管狀。

meaning: 管螺科
sentences: The shell was classified in Vermetidae by the biologist. 那個貝殼被生物學家歸入 Vermetidae。
Members of Vermetidae often live fixed to hard surfaces. Vermetidae 的成員常固定生活在堅硬表面上。

meaning: 管螺科；Vermetidae 的小寫形式
sentences: The database recorded vermetidae in lowercase for consistency. 資料庫為了一致性把 vermetidae 用小寫記錄。
Vermetidae and vermetidae refer to the same taxonomic family here. 這裡的 Vermetidae 和 vermetidae 指的是同一個分類科。

meaning: 管螺屬
sentences: The specimen was identified as a Vermetus species. 那份標本被辨認為 Vermetus 屬的一種。
Vermetus shells often grow in irregular coils. Vermetus 的殼常以不規則的盤繞方式生長。

meaning: 小腦蚓部的；蚓狀的
sentences: The scan showed a small vermian abnormality. 掃描顯示小腦蚓部有一個小異常。
The doctor described the lesion as vermian in shape. 醫師把那個病灶形容為蚓狀。

meaning: 細長麵條；粉絲狀義大利麵
sentences: She cooked vermicelli with garlic and vegetables. 她用蒜頭和蔬菜炒了細麵。
The soup was filled with soft vermicelli. 那碗湯裡滿是柔軟的細麵。

meaning: 殺蠕蟲的；驅蟲的
sentences: The pharmacy sold a vermicidal medicine for livestock. 那家藥局販售一種給牲畜使用的驅蟲藥。
A vermicidal treatment can help remove parasites. 驅蟲治療有助於清除寄生蟲。

meaning: 驅蟲劑；殺蠕蟲的藥物
sentences: The farmer used a vermicide to treat the herd. 農夫用驅蟲劑來治療那群牲畜。
A vermicide should be used carefully and only when needed. 驅蟲劑應謹慎使用，而且只在需要時使用。

meaning: 有蟲的；似蠕蟲的
sentences: The old cellar had a vermicious smell after the rain. 那座舊地窖在雨後有一股像長了蟲的味道。
The creature's vermicious body wriggled through the mud. 那個生物似蠕蟲的身體在泥中扭動前進。

meaning: 小蠕蟲；蟲狀小生物
sentences: The child pointed at a tiny vermicle in the soil. 孩子指著土裡的一條小蠕蟲。
A single vermicle moved across the damp leaf. 一條小蠕蟲在潮濕的葉子上爬過。

meaning: 蠕蟲狀的；蚓狀的
sentences: The artist used a vermicular line to suggest movement. 那位藝術家用蠕蟲狀線條來表現動感。
The worm left a vermicular trail in the sand. 那條蟲在沙上留下蚓狀痕跡。

meaning: 蠕蟲屬樣的分類名；亦可指相關生物類群
sentences: The old textbook listed the species under Vermicularia. 那本舊教科書把該物種列在 Vermicularia 之下。
Vermicularia appears in older biological catalogs and names. Vermicularia 出現在較早的生物學目錄與命名中。

meaning: 像蠕蟲一樣地；以蠕動方式地
sentences: The larva moved vermicularly across the wet leaf. 那隻幼蟲像蠕蟲一樣地在濕葉上移動。
The line of workers moved vermicularly through the narrow tunnel. 那排工人以蠕動般的方式穿過狹窄的隧道。

meaning: 有蠕蟲狀紋理的；蠕蟲狀的
sentences: The shell had a vermiculate pattern on its surface. 那個貝殼表面有蠕蟲狀的紋路。
The artist used a vermiculate design to suggest movement. 那位藝術家用蠕蟲狀的設計來表現動感。

meaning: 有蠕蟲狀紋路的；帶波狀細紋的
sentences: The old stone wall was vermiculated by age and rain. 舊石牆因歲月和雨水而出現蠕蟲狀的細紋。
She noticed a vermiculated finish on the carved wood. 她注意到雕木表面有波狀細紋的處理。

meaning: 蠕蟲狀紋理；蠕動般的紋路
sentences: The carving showed fine vermiculation along the edges. 那件雕刻在邊緣呈現細微的蠕蟲狀紋理。
Engineers studied the vermiculation on the worn metal plate. 工程師研究那塊磨損金屬板上的蠕蟲狀紋路。

meaning: 小蠕蟲；蠕蟲狀細紋
sentences: The biologist pointed to a tiny vermicule in the sample. 那位生物學家指著樣本裡的一隻小蠕蟲。
A delicate vermicule of silver ran through the fabric. 一條細緻的蠕蟲狀銀線穿過那塊布料。

meaning: 蛭石；一種可膨脹的礦物
sentences: The gardener mixed vermiculite into the potting soil. 那位園丁把蛭石混進盆栽土裡。
Vermiculite is often used to improve drainage and insulation. 蛭石常用來改善排水與保溫。

meaning: 有蠕蟲狀紋理的；滿布細小彎曲線條的
sentences: The tablet had a vermiculose surface under the light. 那塊石板在光線下呈現蠕蟲狀紋理的表面。
He sketched a vermiculose border around the map. 他在地圖周圍畫出帶細小彎曲線條的邊框。

meaning: 蠕蟲狀的特性；像小蟲般彎曲的狀態
sentences: The critic described the pattern's vermiculosity as unsettling. 評論者把那種圖案的蠕蟲狀特徵描述得令人不安。
Its vermiculosity made the texture look alive. 它那種像小蟲般彎曲的特性讓紋理看起來像活的一樣。

meaning: 像蠕蟲的；帶有蠕蟲特徵的
sentences: The artist gave the creature a vermiculous shape. 那位藝術家把那生物畫成蠕蟲般的形狀。
A vermiculous trail moved across the damp soil. 一條像蠕蟲一樣的痕跡在潮濕土壤上延伸。

meaning: 蠕蟲形的；像蠕蟲一樣的
sentences: The appendix is a vermiform structure. 闌尾是蠕蟲形的構造。
The sculpture had a vermiform curve running through it. 那件雕塑穿過一道像蠕蟲的曲線。

meaning: 蠕蟲形動物類群；舊式分類名
sentences: The textbook mentioned Vermiformia as an older zoological grouping. 那本教科書把 Vermiformia 提到為較舊的動物分類群。
Researchers no longer use Vermiformia as a modern scientific term. 研究人員如今不再把 Vermiformia 當作現代科學術語。

meaning: 蠕蟲形的；拉丁化的解剖或分類用語
sentences: The Latin label vermiformis appeared in the old notes. 舊筆記中出現了拉丁化的 vermiformis 標記。
The appendix was described as vermiformis in the report. 那份報告把闌尾描述為 vermiformis。

meaning: 蠕蟲形狀；蠕蟲形的狀態
sentences: The scientist noted the vermiformity of the soft tissue. 那位科學家注意到那組織的蠕蟲形狀。
Its vermiformity made the object easy to identify. 它的蠕蟲形外觀讓這個物體很容易辨認。

meaning: 蠕蟲狀的；像蠕蟲的
sentences: The fossil had a vermiformous outline in the clay. 那塊化石在黏土裡呈現蠕蟲狀的輪廓。
A vermiformous branch curled across the path. 一條蠕蟲狀的樹枝彎曲地橫過小徑。

meaning: 驅蟲的；能把寄生蟲趕出的
sentences: The syrup was advertised as vermifugal for children. 那種糖漿被宣傳為兒童用的驅蟲藥。
Herbal remedies were once valued for their vermifugal effect. 草本療法過去常因其驅蟲效果而受重視。

meaning: 驅蟲劑；驅除寄生蟲的藥物
sentences: The vet prescribed a vermifuge for the puppy. 獸醫為那隻小狗開了驅蟲劑。
An old vermifuge recipe appears in the family notebook. 家族筆記裡記著一份古老的驅蟲藥配方。

meaning: 驅蟲的；有驅除寄生蟲作用的
sentences: The herb was said to have vermifugous properties. 據說那種草藥具有驅蟲特性。
Doctors once relied on vermifugous mixtures more often than they do now. 醫師過去比現在更常依賴驅蟲混合藥。

meaning: 帶有蟲類的；產生蟲的
sentences: The vermigerous compost needed more careful handling. 那堆帶有蟲類的堆肥需要更小心處理。
The note described the soil as vermigerous after the flood. 備註把洪水過後的土壤描述成生蟲的。

meaning: 像蟲爬行的；以蠕動方式前進的
sentences: The creature made a vermigrade advance across the sand. 那生物以像蟲爬行的方式在沙地上前進。
The old text described the movement as vermigrade and slow. 舊文獻把那種移動描述成像蟲爬行般緩慢。

meaning: 食蟻獸類；舊式分類中的一群舌長動物
sentences: The article mentioned Vermilingues in an older zoological scheme. 那篇文章在舊式動物分類中提到 Vermilingues。
Scientists now use a different name instead of Vermilingues. 科學家現在改用別的名稱，而不再用 Vermilingues。

meaning: 食蟻獸類群；舊式分類中的舌長獸類
sentences: The museum card placed Vermilinguia in a historical classification chart. 博物館卡片把 Vermilinguia 放在歷史分類圖中。
Vermilinguia is now treated as an outdated zoological term. Vermilinguia 如今被視為過時的動物學術語。

meaning: 與食蟻獸類有關的；舌長型的
sentences: The vermilinguial tongue helped the animal reach deep into the nest. 那種舌長型的舌頭幫助動物伸進巢穴深處。
The researcher studied a vermilinguial feature in the fossil. 研究人員研究化石中的食蟻獸類特徵。

meaning: 朱紅色；朱紅顏料
sentences: She painted the door in bright vermilion. 她把門漆成鮮亮的朱紅色。
The artist mixed vermilion with white to soften the shade. 藝術家把朱紅和白色混合，讓色調柔和一些。

meaning: 淡朱紅色；仿朱紅顏料
sentences: The sample card showed a softer vermilionette tone. 樣本卡上顯示出較柔和的淡朱紅色。
He chose a vermilionette pigment for the sketchbook cover. 他為素描本封面選了一種仿朱紅顏料。

meaning: 使成朱紅色；給上朱紅色
sentences: The decorator decided to vermilionize the small frame. 設計師決定把那個小框漆成朱紅色。
They vermilionized the sign so it would stand out in the crowd. 他們把招牌漆成朱紅色，讓它在人群中更醒目。

meaning: 造成傷害和煩惱的各種常見類型的小昆蟲或其他動物。
sentences: The area was crawling with all sorts of vermin: fleas, lice, mice, and rats to name a few. Thus, we felt as if vermin were crawling over us. 該地區爬滿了各種害蟲：跳蚤、蝨子、老鼠等等。因此，我們感覺好像害蟲在我們身上爬行。
The term vermin refers to Any of various common types of small insects or other animals which cause harm and annoyance. 害蟲一詞是指造成傷害和煩惱的各種常見類型的小昆蟲或其他動物。

meaning: 與蟲或幼蟲有關的；蟲狀的
sentences: The doctor noted a verminal stage in the parasite's life cycle. 醫生注意到寄生蟲生命周期中的蟲狀階段。
A verminal trace appeared in the soft mud after the rain. 雨後，軟泥上出現了與蟲有關的痕跡。

meaning: 使生蟲；使受寄生蟲侵害
sentences: Damp grain can verminate quickly in a warm room. 潮濕的穀物在溫暖的房間裡很快就會生蟲。
The old cellar began to verminate after the flood. 洪水過後，那個舊地窖開始鬧蟲。

meaning: 生蟲；寄生蟲侵害
sentences: The report mentioned vermination in the stored rice. 報告提到儲存白米出現生蟲情況。
Vermination can ruin food if it is not caught early. 如果沒有及早發現，生蟲會毀掉食物。

meaning: 與蟲害有關的人或事物；驅蟲者
sentences: The old manual called him a verminer because he treated infestations. 舊手冊把他稱作 verminer，因為他處理蟲害。
A skilled verminer was called in to save the grain store. 一位熟練的驅蟲者被請來搶救穀倉。

meaning: 殺蟲的；能殺死害蟲的
sentences: The spray had verminicidal ingredients for the basement. 那種噴劑含有殺蟲成分，可用於地下室。
Farmers wanted a verminicidal treatment that was safe for crops. 農夫想要一種對作物安全的殺蟲處理。

meaning: 殺蟲劑；殺死害蟲的藥劑
sentences: The farmer bought a verminicide for the storage shed. 農夫為儲物棚買了一種殺蟲劑。
A strong verminicide can be dangerous if used carelessly. 如果使用不慎，強效殺蟲劑可能很危險。

meaning: 生蟲的；帶有害蟲的
sentences: The verminiferous sacks had to be removed immediately. 那些生蟲的麻袋必須立刻移走。
A verminiferous corner of the attic drew the cat's attention. 閣樓裡一個容易生蟲的角落引起了貓的注意。

meaning: 像害蟲的；下賤似害蟲的
sentences: The novel described the invaders as verminlike and ruthless. 那本小說把入侵者描寫得像害蟲一樣可惡而無情。
The cellar had a verminlike smell that nobody liked. 那個地窖有股像害蟲般令人不喜的味道。

meaning: 像害蟲一樣地；下賤地
sentences: The verminly behavior of the pests ruined the pantry. 那些害蟲般的行徑毀了食品儲藏間。
The writer used verminly to emphasize how repulsive the scene was. 那位作家用 verminly 來強調場景有多麼令人厭惡。

meaning: 蟲病；寄生蟲感染
sentences: The vet treated the dog for verminosis. 獸醫替那隻狗治療蟲病。
The clinic checked for verminosis after the animal lost weight. 動物體重減輕後，診所檢查是否有寄生蟲感染。

meaning: 生蟲的；像害蟲的；肮髒可憎的
sentences: The verminous food had to be thrown away. 那些生蟲的食物只能丟掉。
He described the old shack as verminous and unsafe. 他把那間舊棚屋描述成又髒又有害蟲，不安全。

meaning: 像害蟲般地；骯髒地
sentences: The room had been verminously neglected for years. 那個房間多年來像害蟲般被忽視。
The mice moved verminously through the broken wall. 老鼠像害蟲一樣在破牆間活動。

meaning: 生蟲的狀態；肮髒可憎的性質
sentences: The inspector commented on the verminousness of the basement. 檢查員評論了地下室的生蟲狀態。
Its verminousness made the place hard to clean. 那裡生蟲的狀態讓清理工作很困難。

meaning: 防蟲的；不受害蟲侵害的
sentences: They stored the grain in a verminproof container. 他們把穀物放進防蟲容器裡。
The new box was verminproof and easy to seal. 那個新盒子防蟲，而且容易密封。

meaning: 蟲害多的；像害蟲的
sentences: The verminy garden needed serious treatment. 那座蟲害很多的花園需要徹底處理。
He avoided the verminy storage room behind the shed. 他避開棚屋後面那間蟲害很多的儲藏室。

meaning: 產生蟲的；生蟲的
sentences: The old text described the compost as vermiparous after rain. 舊文獻把雨後的堆肥描述成會生蟲的。
A vermiparous environment can spread pests quickly. 一個容易生蟲的環境會迅速擴散害蟲。

meaning: 會生蟲的性質；產生蟲的狀態
sentences: The vermiparousness of the warm room worried the shop owner. 那間溫暖房間容易生蟲的特性讓店主很擔心。
Researchers tested the vermiparousness of the storage bin. 研究人員測試那個儲存箱是否容易生蟲。

meaning: 蚓部；小腦中線的蟲狀部分
sentences: The scan showed a small lesion in the cerebellar vermis. 掃描顯示小腦蚓部有一個小病灶。
Doctors study the vermis because it helps coordinate movement. 醫生研究蚓部，因為它有助於協調動作。

meaning: 食蟲的；以蠕蟲為食的
sentences: The bird is vermivorous and hunts in soft soil. 那隻鳥以蠕蟲為食，會在鬆軟土壤裡覓食。
A vermivorous animal may also eat small larvae. 食蟲動物也可能吃小型幼蟲。

meaning: 食蟲性；以蠕蟲為食的習性
sentences: The book discussed the vermivorousness of certain birds. 那本書討論了某些鳥類的食蟲性。
Its vermivorousness made the species useful in gardens. 它的食蟲習性讓這種生物在花園裡很有用。

meaning: 蟲狀混合物；蠕動般的混合物
sentences: The lab note described the sample as a dark vermix of mud and fibers. 實驗室筆記把那個樣本描述成泥土與纖維混成的蟲狀混合物。
A strange vermix formed at the bottom of the jar. 罐底形成了一團奇怪的混合物。

meaning: 佛蒙特州；美國東北部一州
sentences: We drove through Vermont during the autumn vacation. 我們在秋假期間開車穿過佛蒙特州。
Vermont is known for maple syrup and mountain scenery. 佛蒙特州以楓糖漿和山景聞名。

meaning: 佛蒙特州居民
sentences: A Vermonter told us the best place to see fall colors. 一位佛蒙特州居民告訴我們哪裡最適合看秋葉變色。
The interview featured a Vermonter who worked on a dairy farm. 那場訪談介紹了一位在乳牛農場工作的佛蒙特州居民。

meaning: 佛蒙特州的；佛蒙特州居民的
sentences: The guide mentioned a Vermontese accent from the region. 那本指南提到那個地區的一種佛蒙特州口音。
She loved the Vermontese style of winter cabin life. 她喜歡佛蒙特州式的冬季小屋生活風格。

meaning: 維莫雷爾噴霧器；一種園藝或葡萄園噴灑器
sentences: The farmer used a vermorel to spray the vineyard. 農夫用一台維莫雷爾噴霧器噴灑葡萄園。
An old vermorel still stood in the shed beside the tools. 工具棚裡還放著一台舊的噴霧器。

meaning: 苦艾酒；加味葡萄酒
sentences: The bartender mixed vermouth with gin and orange bitters. 調酒師把 vermouth 和琴酒、橙味苦精混在一起。
Dry vermouth is common in classic cocktails. 乾式 vermouth 常見於經典雞尾酒。

meaning: 男子名 Vern；Vernon 的簡稱
sentences: The article mentioned Vern in passing. 文章順帶提到了 Vern。
A short note explained why Vern matters here. 一則簡短說明解釋了 Vern 在這裡的重要性。

meaning: 罕見古詞；舊式專門名詞
sentences: The glossary listed vernacle as a rare term. 詞彙表把 vernacle 列為罕見詞。
She wrote vernacle on a study card for later review. 她把 vernacle 寫在學習卡上，留著之後複習。

sentences: a vernacular disease 鄉土病
Something described as vernacular is belonging to the country of one's birth; one's own by birth or by nature. 被描述為白話文的東西屬於一個人的出生國；一個人天生或天生的。

She wrote vernacularism on a study card for later review. 她把 vernacularism 寫在學習卡上，留著之後複習。

sentences: The glossary listed vernacularization as a rare term. 詞彙表把 vernacularization 列為罕見詞。
She wrote vernacularization on a study card for later review. 她把 vernacularization 寫在學習卡上，留著之後複習。

meaning: 使白話化；使本土化表達
sentences: The editor asked the team to vernacularize the draft before publishing. 編輯請團隊在發表前把草稿 vernacularize 一下。
They tried to vernacularize the text for local readers. 他們試著把文章 vernacularize 成更貼近在地讀者的版本。

sentences: He answered vernacularly during the meeting. 他在會議中 vernacularly 回答。

sentences: The editor asked the team to vernaculate the draft before publishing. 編輯請團隊在發表前把草稿 vernaculate 一下。
They tried to vernaculate the text for local readers. 他們試著把文章 vernaculate 成更貼近在地讀者的版本。

meaning: 春天的；春季的
sentences: The garden had a vernal look after the rain. 雨後花園顯得很有 vernal 的春意。
We chose a vernal palette for the poster. 我們替海報選了帶有春天感的 vernal 配色。

sentences: The poem celebrated the vernality of the landscape. 那首詩讚美了景色的春意。
The botanist used vernality to explain the plant's timing. 植物學家用 vernality 來說明植物的時機。

meaning: 春化作用；低溫誘導開花
sentences: The gardener used vernalization to help the seeds flower on time. 園丁利用 vernalization 讓種子準時開花。
Cold storage can support vernalization in some crops. 冷藏有時可以幫助某些作物進行 vernalization。

sentences: The grower wanted to vernalize the seeds before planting. 種植者想在播種前先讓種子 vernalize。

A vernicose surface caught the light in the lab. 實驗室裡那個 vernicose 的表面把光線反射了出來。

meaning: 游標；游標尺
sentences: She checked the measurement with a vernier caliper. 她用 vernier 卡尺檢查測量值。
The vernier let her read the scale more precisely. vernier 讓她能更精準地讀取刻度。

meaning: 卑屈；奴性

sentences: The glossary listed vernition as a rare term. 詞彙表把 vernition 列為罕見詞。
She wrote vernition on a study card for later review. 她把 vernition 寫在學習卡上，留著之後複習。

meaning: 男子名 Vernon；地名
sentences: The article mentioned Vernon in passing. 文章順帶提到了 Vernon。
A short note explained why Vernon matters here. 一則簡短說明解釋了 Vernon 在這裡的重要性。

meaning: 大藍薊屬；紫菀科植物屬
sentences: The botanist identified the plant as Vernonia. 植物學家把這株植物辨認為 Vernonia。
Several Vernonia species grow in warm regions. 幾種 Vernonia 物種生長在溫暖地區。

meaning: 與大藍薊屬有關的
sentences: The old guide used vernoniaceous to describe the sample. 那本舊指南用 vernoniaceous 來描述樣本。
