A violety tint appeared on the horizon. 地平線上出現了一抹紫羅蘭色。

meaning: 小提琴
sentences: She has been learning how to play the violin since she was six. 她從六歲起就在學習彈小提琴。
The sound of the violin echoed through the quiet concert hall. 小提琴聲在安靜的音樂廳內迴盪。

meaning: 小提琴；小型弦樂器
sentences: The old catalog listed a violina among the string instruments. 舊目錄中把 violina 列為弦樂器之一。
He tuned the violina before the concert began. 他在音樂會開始前先調整那把小提琴。

meaning: 小提琴；弦樂器
sentences: The child held a small violine in the school orchestra. 那孩子在學校樂團裡拿著一把小提琴。
A violine can produce a very bright sound. 小提琴可以發出很明亮的音色。

meaning: 小提琴；小型小提琴
sentences: The violinette was made for young students. 那把小提琴是為年輕學生製作的。
She carried the violinette in a narrow case. 她把那把小提琴放在窄長琴盒裡攜帶。

meaning: 小提琴家
sentences: The world-famous violinist gave a brilliant performance at the concert hall. 世界聞名的小提琴家在音樂廳進行了精彩的演出。
She has been practicing for hours every day to become a professional violinist. 她每天練習好幾個小時，想成為一名專業鋼琴家。

meaning: 小提琴的；善於小提琴演奏的
sentences: The passage required a violinistic style of playing. 這段樂句需要很有小提琴特色的演奏方式。

meaning: 像小提琴的
sentences: The instrument had a violinlike shape. 那件樂器的外形很像小提琴。

meaning: 小提琴製作者
sentences: The violinmaker spent months shaping the body of the instrument. 那位小提琴製作者花了好幾個月塑造琴身。

meaning: 小提琴製作

meaning: 中提琴演奏者
sentences: The violist joined the quartet for the evening concert. 那位中提琴演奏者加入四重奏的晚場音樂會。
A good violist must balance power and warmth. 好的中提琴演奏者必須兼顧力度與溫度。

meaning: 維奧爾琴製作者

A violmaker needs knowledge of wood and sound. 維奧爾琴製作者需要懂木材與聲音。

meaning: 維奧爾琴製作

The class introduced the basics of violmaking. 課程介紹了維奧爾琴製作的基本概念。

meaning: 小提琴；維奧爾琴
sentences: The old score asked for a violon and a lute. 那份舊樂譜要求使用小提琴和魯特琴。
A violon was common in many historical ensembles. 小提琴在許多歷史合奏中很常見。

meaning: 大提琴演奏者；大提琴家

meaning: 大提琴
sentences: She practiced the violoncello every evening. 她每晚練習大提琴。
The violoncello added depth to the string section. 大提琴為弦樂聲部增添了厚度。

meaning: 大型低音維奧爾琴；低音弦樂器
sentences: The violone provided the bass line in the early music group. 那把大型低音維奧爾琴在早期音樂團體中負責低音聲部。
A violone can sound deep and resonant. 低音維奧爾琴可以發出深沉而共鳴的聲音。

meaning: 維奧羅塔琴；一種弦樂器
sentences: The violotta was designed to bridge two string voices. Violotta 琴的設計是為了連接兩種弦樂聲部。
Few musicians today know how to play the violotta. 如今懂得演奏 violotta 的音樂家很少。

meaning: 與 violuric acid 有關的
sentences: The chemistry paper discussed a violuric compound. 那篇化學論文討論了一種與 violuric 相關的化合物。
Violuric derivatives are mentioned in older texts. 舊文獻中會提到 violuric 的衍生物。

meaning: viosterol，早期維生素D製劑名稱
sentences: The old pharmacy label mentioned viosterol. 舊藥房標籤上寫著 viosterol。
Viosterol was used in early vitamin D treatments. viosterol 曾用於早期的維生素D治療。

meaning: 重要人物；VIP
sentences: The hotel reserved a private room for the Vip. 飯店為那位重要人物保留了一間私人包廂。
Every Vip received a separate entrance. 每位 VIP 都有獨立入口。

meaning: 蝰蛇科的一種毒蛇。
sentences: The term viper refers to a venomous snake in the family Viperidae. 毒蛇一詞指的是蝰蛇科的毒蛇。
The lesson introduced viper as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 viper，這是一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 蝮蛇屬；毒蛇的一屬
sentences: The snake was classified in the genus Vipera. 那條蛇被歸類在蝮蛇屬 Vipera 中。
Vipera includes several venomous species. Vipera 屬包含幾種有毒蛇類。

meaning: 蝮蛇的；像蝮蛇的

meaning: 雌蝮蛇；母蝮蛇

meaning: 蝰魚；一種深海兇猛魚類
sentences: The documentary showed a viperfish with long fangs. 紀錄片展示了一條長著利牙的蝰魚。
A viperfish lives deep in the ocean. 蝰魚生活在深海中。

meaning: 與蝮蛇有關的；像蝮蛇的

meaning: 蝮蛇科的成員；蝮蛇科的
sentences: The biologist identified the snake as a viperid from the region. 那位生物學家把這條蛇判定為當地的蝮蛇科成員。

meaning: 蝮蛇科

meaning: 蝮蛇形的；像蝮蛇的

meaning: 蝮蛇亞科的一個群組名稱；蝮蛇亞科的
sentences: The catalog listed Viperina as a separate snake group. 目錄把 Viperina 列為一個獨立的蛇類群組。
Researchers used Viperina when discussing older classifications. 研究者在討論舊分類時使用 Viperina 這個名稱。

meaning: 蝮蛇亞科
sentences: Many true vipers are grouped under Viperinae. 許多真蝮蛇被歸在 Viperinae 之下。

meaning: 蝮蛇的；像蝮蛇的
sentences: The poem gave the villain a viperine smile. 那首詩賦予反派一抹像蝮蛇般的微笑。
A viperine snake may lie still before striking quickly. 蝮蛇類的蛇可能先靜止不動，再迅速出擊。

meaning: 像蝮蛇的；陰險的
sentences: His viperish remark made the room go silent. 他那句陰險的話讓整個房間安靜下來。
The dog gave the stranger a viperish stare. 那隻狗對陌生人投以像蝮蛇般的眼神。

meaning: 像蝮蛇地；陰險地
sentences: She viperishly twisted the conversation to avoid the truth. 她陰險地扭轉話題，以避開真相。
The critic spoke viperishly about every flaw in the plan. 那位評論者陰沉地批評計畫中的每個缺點。

meaning: 像蝮蛇的
sentences: The creature had a viperlike head and a narrow jaw. 那個生物有像蝮蛇一樣的頭部和細窄的下顎。

meaning: 小蝮蛇；幼蝮蛇
sentences: The ranger found a viperling hiding under the leaves. 管理員在落葉下發現了一條幼蝮蛇。

meaning: 像蝮蛇的；蝮蛇狀的

meaning: 蝮蛇總科

meaning: 蝮蛇般的；毒辣的
sentences: The viperous insult was meant to hurt his pride. 那句毒辣的侮辱是故意要傷他的自尊。
A viperous creature can strike faster than people expect. 蝮蛇般的生物出擊的速度往往比人們預期更快。

meaning: 毒辣地；像蝮蛇般地
sentences: He viperously attacked the proposal in public. 他在公開場合毒辣地攻擊那項提案。
The snake moved viperously through the dry grass. 那條蛇在乾草間像蝮蛇般地移動。

meaning: 毒辣；蝮蛇般的性質
sentences: The essay described the viperousness of his tone. 那篇文章描述了他語氣中的毒辣。
She was shocked by the viperousness of the comment. 她被那句評論的毒辣程度嚇到了。

meaning: 像蝮蛇的；毒辣的
sentences: The vipery whisper spread fear through the crowd. 那句毒辣的耳語在群眾中散播恐懼。
The vipery glare made everyone step back. 那種像蝮蛇般的怒視讓所有人都退後了一步。

meaning: 像蝮蛇一樣狡猾的；帶毒意的
sentences: The vipolitic remark sounded polite but carried a sting. 那句 vipolitic 的話聽起來客氣，卻帶著刺。
He was known for a vipolitic style of debate. 他以一種陰險狡猾的辯論風格聞名。

meaning: 副總統；副主席
sentences: The vipresident led the meeting while the president was away. 總統不在時，副總統主持了會議。
A vipresident may handle daily duties for the organization. 副主席可能會處理該組織的日常工作。

meaning: 女王；女首領
sentences: The viqueen was greeted with flowers at the gate. 那位女王在門口受到了花束歡迎。
In the legend, a viqueen ruled the island alone. 在傳說中，一位女首領獨自統治那座島嶼。

meaning: 維拉，常作為女性名字
sentences: Vira introduced herself as the new librarian. Vira 自我介紹說她是新來的圖書館員。
The story follows Vira as she moves to a new city. 那個故事描寫 Vira 搬到新城市後的生活。

meaning: 悍婦；潑婦
sentences: The old novel portrayed her as a viragin with a sharp tongue. 那本舊小說把她寫成一個嘴很利的悍婦。
He called the quarrelsome character a viragin in the play. 他在劇中把那個愛爭吵的角色稱為潑婦。

meaning: 悍婦般的；潑婦般的
sentences: The author gave the character a viraginian temper. 作者賦予這個角色一種潑婦般的脾氣。
Her viraginian behavior made every argument worse. 她那種強悍粗暴的行為讓每次爭論都更糟。

meaning: 悍婦性格；潑婦氣質
sentences: The essay examined the viraginity of the heroine in the tale. 那篇文章探討了故事女主角身上的悍婦性格。
Her viraginity was shown in the way she argued back. 她的潑婦氣質從她反擊的方式中顯露出來。

meaning: 像悍婦的；潑婦似的
sentences: The viraginous tone startled the audience. 那種潑婦似的語氣讓觀眾吃了一驚。
He wrote the scene with a viraginous, aggressive energy. 他用一種強悍而咄咄逼人的氣勢寫下那一幕。

meaning: 悍婦；脾氣剛烈的女人
sentences: The virago argued with everyone at the market. 那位悍婦在市場上和每個人爭吵。
In the story, the virago was feared for her fierce words. 在故事裡，那位脾氣剛烈的女人因言語凶狠而令人畏懼。

meaning: 像悍婦的；潑辣的
sentences: Her viragoish retort ended the discussion at once. 她潑辣的反駁立刻結束了那場討論。
The character had a viragoish way of speaking to strangers. 那個角色對陌生人說話時帶著悍婦似的風格。

meaning: 像悍婦的；潑辣的
sentences: The viragolike speech made the room uncomfortable. 那種像悍婦般的說話方式讓房間裡的人都不自在。
He described the scene as viragolike and theatrical. 他把那一幕形容得像悍婦般強悍又戲劇化。

meaning: 悍婦的性格；潑辣氣質
sentences: The essay treated viragoship as a form of defiance. 那篇文章把悍婦氣質視為一種反抗形式。
Her viragoship was obvious in every sharp reply. 她的潑辣氣質從每一句尖銳回應中都看得出來。

meaning: 由病毒引起。
sentences: viral infection 病毒感染
Something described as viral is caused by a virus. 被描述為病毒性的東西是由病毒引起的。

meaning: 病毒目
sentences: The professor explained that Virales is an older viral classification. 教授解釋說，Virales 是一種較舊的病毒分類。
Students wrote Virales in their notes beside other taxonomy terms. 學生把 Virales 寫在筆記中，和其他分類學術語放在一起。

meaning: 維爾比烏斯，羅馬神名；人名
sentences: Virbius appears in Roman myth as a woodland figure. Virbius 在羅馬神話中是一位與森林有關的人物。
The poem used Virbius as a symbol of renewal. 那首詩把 Virbius 當成重生的象徵。

meaning: 轉向；旋轉
sentences: The old ship began to vire toward the harbor. 那艘舊船開始轉向港口。
The dancer seemed to vire gently with the music. 那位舞者似乎隨著音樂輕輕旋轉。

meaning: 一種帶有反覆副歌的抒情詩或歌曲
sentences: The class studied a medieval virelay with repeating lines. 那堂課研究了一首帶有反覆歌詞的中世紀 virelay。
She wrote a short virelay for the recital program. 她為演出節目寫了一首短小的 virelay。

meaning: 病毒血症；病毒在血液中存在的狀態
sentences: The doctor monitored the patient's viremia closely. 醫生密切監測病人的病毒血症狀況。
High viremia can make an infection spread more quickly. 高度病毒血症可能讓感染擴散得更快。

meaning: 病毒血症的；血中帶病毒的
sentences: The viremic phase came early in the illness. 這種疾病在早期就進入病毒血症階段。
A viremic patient may need careful isolation. 血中帶病毒的病人可能需要妥善隔離。

meaning: 青翠的；生氣勃勃的
sentences: The virent meadow looked fresh after the rain. 雨後的草地顯得青翠而清新。
The poet used virent to describe the spring hillside. 詩人用 virent 來描寫春天的山坡。

meaning: 綠鶯；一種小型鳴鳥
sentences: A vireo sang softly from the top of the tree. 一隻綠鶯在樹梢上輕聲鳴唱。
Birdwatchers came to the park hoping to spot a vireo. 賞鳥者來到公園，希望能看到一隻綠鶯。

meaning: 綠鶯科的；與綠鶯有關的
sentences: The guidebook described the bird as vireonine in shape. 那本指南把那隻鳥描述為綠鶯科形態。
A vireonine call is usually soft and brief. 綠鶯科鳥類的叫聲通常柔和而短促。

meaning: 轉綠；變得青綠的過程
sentences: The virescence of the buds signaled the start of spring. 花苞轉綠的過程標誌著春天開始。
The painter liked the subtle virescence of old leaves. 那位畫家喜歡舊葉片那種微妙的青綠變化。

meaning: 發綠的；逐漸變綠的
sentences: The virescent shoots appeared after the first rain. 第一場雨後，嫩芽開始發綠。
A virescent tint covered the edges of the stone. 石頭邊緣覆著一層微微發綠的色調。

meaning: 雲雨尾；落到地面前蒸發掉的雨絲
sentences: The meteorologist pointed out a curtain of virga under the cloud. 氣象學家指出雲底下有一片雨絲尾跡。
Virga can make the sky look rainy without wetting the ground. virga 會讓天空看起來在下雨，卻不一定弄濕地面。

meaning: 細枝般的；棒狀的
sentences: The plant had virgal stems that were thin and stiff. 那株植物有細枝般又纖硬的莖。
The sculpture used a virgal form to suggest a reed. 那件雕塑用棒狀的形式來表現蘆葦。

meaning: 棒狀的；細長的
sentences: The bird carried a virgate twig in its beak. 那隻鳥嘴裡叼著一根細長的樹枝。
The map showed virgate fields stretching to the river. 地圖顯示棒狀的田地一路延伸到河邊。

meaning: 帶條紋的；細長的
sentences: The virgated shell had dark bands across it. 那個帶條紋的貝殼上有深色橫帶。
A virgated leaf can look striped in bright light. 在強光下，帶條紋的葉片會顯得像條紋一樣。

meaning: 形成條紋或細枝的人或物；棒狀體
sentences: The botanist used virgater to describe the thin shoot. 植物學家用 virgater 來描述那根細嫩的新芽。
The drawing showed a virgater beside the main stem. 那幅圖在主莖旁畫出了一個棒狀體。

meaning: 條紋狀；細枝狀；形成條紋或細枝的過程
sentences: The virgation on the leaf made it easy to identify. 葉片上的條紋狀特徵讓它很容易辨認。
Artists sometimes use virgation to describe narrow streaks. 藝術家有時用 virgation 來描述細長的條紋。

meaning: 維吉利亞屬植物；一類樹木
sentences: The gardener planted a virgilia near the fence. 園丁在圍欄旁種了一棵 virgilia。
Virgilia can be grown as an ornamental tree. Virgilia 可以作為觀賞樹栽培。

meaning: 模仿維吉爾風格的寫作；維吉爾式表達
sentences: The article criticized the poem for its Virgilism. 那篇文章批評那首詩過度模仿維吉爾風格。
Students discussed Virgilism in the context of classical literature. 學生們在古典文學脈絡下討論 Virgilism。

meaning: 處女、未開發的
sentences: The project aims to protect the local virgin forest from illegal logging. 該專案旨在保護當地的原始（未開發的）森林免受非法採伐。
White is often used as a symbol of purity and virgin beauty in many cultures. 在許多文化中，白色常被用作純潔與處女之美的象徵。

meaning: 純潔的；未受玷污的
sentences: The virginal snow covered the field before dawn. 黎明前，純白的積雪覆蓋了田野。
The writer used virginal to describe the untouched landscape. 作家用 virginal 來形容未受破壞的風景。

meaning: 維爾吉納爾琴；一種小型鍵盤樂器
sentences: The museum displayed a Virginale from the Baroque period. 博物館展出了一架巴洛克時期的 Virginale。
A Virginale sounds similar to an early harpsichord. Virginale 的音色很像早期的大鍵琴。

meaning: a player of the virginal, an early keyboard instrument
sentences: The museum guide said the virginalist played a small keyboard instrument. 展館導覽員說那位彈羽管鍵琴的人演奏的是一種小型鍵盤樂器。
An old portrait showed a virginalist seated at the instrument. 一幅舊肖像畫中畫著一位彈羽管鍵琴的人坐在樂器前。

meaning: the state of being virginal, chaste, or untouched
sentences: The poem praised her virginality and calm innocence. 那首詩讚美她的純潔與安靜天真。
The story treats virginality as a symbol of purity. 這個故事把 virginality 當作純潔的象徵。

meaning: in a virginal or chaste manner
sentences: She was dressed virginally in a plain white gown. 她穿著一件樸素的白色長袍，顯得很清純。
The room was decorated virginally, with no bright colors. 房間的裝飾很清淡，幾乎沒有鮮豔顏色。

meaning: maidenly, pure, or virginal
sentences: The author used a virgineous image to describe the heroine. 作者用一種少女般純淨的形象來描寫女主角。
Her virgineous manner made her seem shy and untouched. 她那種帶著少女氣息的舉止讓人覺得她害羞又純淨。

meaning: a virginal or inexperienced person
sentences: In the old tale, the virginhead was mocked by the older boys. 在那個舊故事裡，那位天真生嫩的人被較大的男孩取笑。
He spoke like a virginhead who had never left home. 他說話的樣子像個從未離開過家鄉的青澀新人。

meaning: a U.S. state in the eastern United States; also a female given name
sentences: We drove through Virginia on the way to Washington, D.C. 我們開車經過維吉尼亞州前往華盛頓特區。
Virginia is also a popular girl's name in English. Virginia 也是英語裡常見的女性名字。

meaning: a person from Virginia
sentences: The Virginian greeted us with a warm accent. 那位維吉尼亞人用親切的口音向我們打招呼。
She met a Virginian who was visiting the museum. 她遇到一位正在參觀博物館的維吉尼亞州居民。

meaning: of or relating to Virginia
sentences: The Virginid label appeared in an old atlas. 那個與維吉尼亞相關的標記出現在一本舊地圖集裡。
A Virginid accent was mentioned in the manuscript. 手稿裡提到了一種維吉尼亞風格的口音。

meaning: an old medical term for inflammation of the vagina
sentences: The doctor said the term virginitis is now rarely used. 醫生說 virginitis 這個詞現在已經很少使用。
The textbook listed virginitis as an older medical expression. 教科書把 virginitis 列為較舊的醫學說法。

meaning: 處女的狀態或特徵。
sentences: to lose one's virginity 失去童貞
The term virginity refers to the state or characteristic of being a virgin. 童貞一詞是指作為處女的狀態或特徵。

meaning: the state of remaining a virgin
sentences: The story exaggerated his virginityship as if it were a title. 那個故事把他的 virginityship 誇張得像一種頭銜。
She treated virginityship as a private choice. 她把 virginityship 當作一種私人的選擇。

meaning: an obscure or obsolete chemical or mineral name
sentences: The old catalog mentioned virginium in a short note. 舊目錄在一則短註中提到了 virginium。
Virginium appears only in a few historical references. virginium 只出現在少數歷史資料裡。

meaning: resembling a virgin; pure and untouched
sentences: The painting gave the saint a virginlike calm. 那幅畫讓聖徒顯得有一種近乎處女般的寧靜。
Her voice had a virginlike innocence. 她的聲音帶著一種純淨無邪的感覺。

meaning: in a virginal manner
sentences: She smiled virginly at the ceremony. 她在典禮上以一種清純的姿態微笑。
The flowers were arranged virginly in white and green. 那些花以白綠兩色清新地排列著。

meaning: the state of being a virgin
sentences: The old play mocked the idea of virginship. 那部舊劇諷刺了 virginship 這種概念。
He spoke about virginship as if it were sacred. 他談起 virginship 時彷彿那是一件神聖的事。

meaning: the sixth sign of the zodiac or the constellation Virgo
sentences: She was born under Virgo. 她出生在處女座。
The constellation Virgo is easy to spot on a clear night. 在晴朗的夜晚，處女座星座很容易辨認。

meaning: a small rod, twig, or fine line
sentences: The doctor marked the margin with a tiny virgula. 醫生在邊緣處畫了一個小小的斜線記號。
A virgula can mean a small rod or a slash mark. virgula 可以指小木棒或斜線符號。

meaning: rod-shaped or twig-like
sentences: The fossil had a virgular shape. 那塊化石呈現細棍狀。
The algae formed a virgular outline in the sample. 樣本中的藻類形成了細棒狀輪廓。

meaning: a genus of sea pens
sentences: The marine chart listed Virgularia among the sea pens. 海洋圖鑑把 Virgularia 列為海筆的一種。
Virgularia is a genus name used in zoology. Virgularia 是動物學中使用的屬名。

meaning: related to Virgularia or the Virgulariidae
sentences: The specimen showed a virgularian form. 那個標本呈現出與 Virgularia 相關的形態。
The paper described a virgularian colony from deep water. 那篇論文描述了一個來自深海的 virgularian 群體。

meaning: a family of sea pens
sentences: The textbook placed the animal in Virgulariidae. 教科書把那種動物歸入 Virgulariidae。
Virgulariidae includes several delicate sea pens. Virgulariidae 包含幾種細長的海筆。

meaning: marked with little lines or rod-like forms
sentences: The stone had a virgulate pattern across its surface. 那塊石頭表面有細條狀的紋路。
A virgulate margin can look lightly streaked. 帶有 virgulate 邊緣的表面看起來會略有條紋。

meaning: a slash mark (/)
sentences: Please separate the options with a virgule. 請用斜線把選項分開。
The editor inserted a virgule between the two words. 編輯在這兩個詞之間插入了一個斜線。

meaning: a thicket or copse of young shoots
sentences: The path ended in a virgultum of young trees. 小路盡頭是一片幼樹灌叢。
The old Latin text used virgultum for brushwood. 那段拉丁文舊文以 virgultum 表示灌木叢。

meaning: relating to the virial theorem or internal molecular forces
sentences: The virial equation appears in physics and chemistry. virial 方程會出現在物理與化學中。
A virial correction helped improve the model. virial 修正幫助改進了模型。

meaning: a substance that destroys viruses
sentences: The lab tested a new viricide against the sample virus. 實驗室測試了一種新的殺病毒物質對樣本病毒的效果。
A good viricide must work without harming the host. 有效的殺病毒物質必須在不傷害宿主的情況下起作用。

meaning: green; verdant
sentences: The hill looked virid after the spring rain. 春雨過後，那座小丘顯得一片翠綠。
The poet used virid to describe the fresh leaves. 詩人用 virid 來形容嫩葉的綠意。

meaning: greenish; having a green tint
sentences: The glass took on a viridene hue in the light. 玻璃在光線下呈現出綠色的色調。
A viridene cast covered the old photograph. 舊照片蒙上了一層偏綠的色彩。

meaning: the quality of becoming green or greenish
sentences: The painter admired the viridescence of the moss. 畫家欣賞苔蘚逐漸泛綠的質感。
Viridescence can be seen in new spring leaves. 春天新葉會顯出漸綠的特徵。

meaning: turning green or greenish
sentences: The buds looked viridescent after the rain. 雨後花苞看起來有點泛綠。
A viridescent tint spread across the sea. 海面上散開一層淡淡的綠色。

meaning: a blue-green pigment or color
sentences: The artist mixed viridian with white. 那位畫家把翠綠色和白色混在一起。
Viridian gives the landscape a cool, natural tone. 翠綠色讓風景帶出清冷自然的色調。

meaning: producing green color or greenness
sentences: The botanist used viridigenous to describe the plant's pigment. 植物學家用 viridigenous 來形容這種植物的色素。
The old note called the moss viridigenous. 舊筆記把那種苔蘚稱為會產生綠色的。

meaning: an obscure green dye or pigment name
sentences: The catalog listed viridine among the old dyes. 目錄把 viridine 列在舊式染料之中。
Viridine appeared in a small chemistry glossary. viridine 出現在一本小型化學詞彙表裡。

meaning: a green mineral or pigment
sentences: The sample contained traces of viridite. 樣本中含有少量 viridite。
The museum labeled the stone as viridite. 博物館把那塊石頭標成 viridite。

meaning: greenness; freshness
sentences: The viridity of the meadow was striking. 草地的翠綠非常醒目。
Her poem celebrated the viridity of spring. 她的詩歌讚頌春天的青翠。

meaning: producing vigor, force, or vitality
sentences: The writer used virific language to describe the tonic. 作家用帶有活力的語言描述那種補品。
The old essay called exercise a virific habit. 舊文章把運動稱為一種能增強活力的習慣。

meaning: to make vigorous, virile, or strong
sentences: The coach hoped to virify the training routine. 教練希望把訓練流程變得更有活力。
The medicine was said to virify the patient. 那種藥被說成能讓病人恢復精力。

meaning: manly, vigorous, or masculine
sentences: He had a virile voice that filled the room. 他的聲音充滿陽剛而響亮。
The sculpture gave the hero a virile posture. 那座雕像讓英雄呈現出陽剛的姿態。

meaning: in a manly or vigorous way
sentences: He spoke virilely and without hesitation. 他說話時充滿陽剛氣勢，毫不遲疑。
The actor carried himself virilely on stage. 那位演員在舞台上舉止十分剛健。

meaning: manliness or vigor
sentences: The novel praised the virileness of the mountain guide. 那本小說讚美山導的剛健氣質。
His virileness was part of the role he played. 他的陽剛氣度是角色的一部分。

meaning: the process of becoming virile or masculine
sentences: The essay discussed virilescence in ancient ideals. 那篇文章討論古代理想中的陽剛成長。
Virilescence is a rare term in old writing. virilescence 是舊文獻中罕見的詞。

meaning: becoming virile or more masculine
sentences: The character was described as virilescent in the poem. 那首詩把這個角色描寫成逐漸展現陽剛的樣子。
A virilescent style was evident in the early drafts. 早期草稿裡可看出一種逐漸陽剛化的風格。

meaning: to make virile or masculine
sentences: The old theory tried to virilify boys through discipline. 舊理論試圖透過紀律讓男孩變得更陽剛。
The potion was said to virilify the hero. 據說那種藥劑能讓英雄更顯陽剛。

meaning: in a virile, vigorous manner
sentences: He answered viriliously during the debate. 他在辯論中以充滿陽剛與活力的方式回答。
The song was performed viriliously and forcefully. 那首歌的演出充滿剛勁與力量。

meaning: the development of male characteristics, especially in a female
sentences: The doctor explained the symptoms of virilism. 醫生解釋了 virilism 的症狀。
Virilism can be caused by hormonal imbalance. virilism 可能由荷爾蒙失衡引起。

meaning: a supporter of male dominance or masculine ideals
sentences: The essay criticized the virilist tone of the speech. 那篇文章批評那場演說的男性主義語氣。
He was described as a virilist in the old debate. 在那場舊辯論裡，他被描述成男性至上論者。

meaning: manly strength or sexual potency
sentences: The legend praised the king's virility. 傳說讚美國王的陽剛與性能力。
Virility is often associated with confidence and power. virility 常與自信和力量聯想在一起。

meaning: 病毒體
sentences: A virion is a single, complete virus particle outside a host cell. 病毒體是宿主細胞外單個完整的病毒顆粒。
Scientists use electron microscopes to study the structure of a virion. 科學家使用電子顯微鏡來研究病毒體的結構。

meaning: sexually mature or capable of reproduction
sentences: The bird must be viripotent before it can breed. 那隻鳥必須性成熟後才能繁殖。
The old term viripotent is rarely used today. viripotent 這個舊詞今天已很少使用。

meaning: an obscure salt or compound name used in older chemistry
sentences: The chemistry index listed viritrate in a brief entry. 化學索引在一條簡短條目中列出 viritrate。
Viritrate appears only in older technical references. viritrate 只出現在較早期的技術資料中。

meaning: a small whirl, curl, or spiral
sentences: The ribbon formed a tiny virl at the end. 緞帶末端形成了一個小小的旋捲。
The current made a virl in the water. 水流在水面上捲出一個小漩渦。

meaning: a metal ferrule or ring on a shaft or handle
sentences: The craftsman fitted a virole around the handle. 工匠在把手外套上一個金屬箍。
A virole can strengthen the end of a tool. virole 可以加強工具末端。

meaning: affected by or resembling a virus
sentences: The sample looked viroled under the microscope. 在顯微鏡下，這個樣本看起來像被病毒污染了。
Researchers noted a viroled pattern in the cells. 研究人員注意到細胞中有疑似病毒化的樣態。

meaning: relating to virology or the study of viruses
sentences: The lab performed virological testing on the swab. 實驗室對拭子做了病毒學檢測。
She read a virological report before the meeting. 她在會議前閱讀了一份病毒學報告。

meaning: 病毒學家
sentences: The virologist is studying the mutations of the new virus strain. 病毒學家正在研究新病毒株的變異。
She decided to become a virologist to help fight infectious diseases. 她決定成為一名病毒學家以幫助對抗傳染病。

meaning: 病毒學
sentences: Virology is the branch of science that deals with the study of viruses. 病毒學是處理病毒研究的科學分支。
Advances in virology have led to the development of life-saving vaccines. 病毒學的進步促成了救命疫苗的開發。

meaning: a virus particle; a virion
sentences: Scientists counted each viron in the sample. 科學家數算樣本中的每一個病毒粒子。
A single viron can start an infection. 一個病毒粒子就可能引發感染。

meaning: caused by or resembling a virus; viral
sentences: The patient showed virose symptoms after the trip. 病人在旅程後出現疑似病毒性的症狀。
The note described the rash as virose in origin. 筆記將這個皮疹描述為病毒性起源。

meaning: a viral disease or viral infection
sentences: The doctor diagnosed a mild virosis. 醫生診斷出輕微的病毒感染。
The clinic treated the virosis with rest and fluids. 診所以休息和補充水分來處理這種病毒感染。

meaning: viral; poisonous; full of virulence
sentences: The old text used virous to describe the infection. 舊文獻用 virous 來描述這種感染。
The term virous appears in older medical writing. virous 這個字出現在較早的醫學文獻中。

meaning: artistic merit or excellence
sentences: Collectors valued the painting for its virtu. 收藏家看重這幅畫的藝術價值。
The critic praised the virtu of the sculpture. 評論家讚賞那座雕塑的藝術造詣。

meaning: 虛擬的、實質上的
sentences: The museum offers a virtual reality tour of its most famous ancient ruins. 博物館提供了其最著名古蹟的虛擬實境導覽。
Working from home has become a virtual necessity for many employees recently. 遠端辦公在最近已成為許多員工實質上的必需。

meaning: the use or theory of virtual forms or simulated reality
sentences: The artist was drawn to virtualism in new media. 這位藝術家被新媒體中的虛擬主義吸引。
The class discussed virtualism in digital art. 課堂討論了數位藝術中的虛擬主義。

meaning: a person who favors virtualism or virtual art
sentences: A virtualist prefers simulated spaces and digital forms. 虛擬主義者偏好模擬空間和數位形式。
The curator described herself as a virtualist. 策展人把自己描述成一位虛擬主義者。

meaning: the quality or state of being virtual
sentences: The game explores the virtuality of online life. 這款遊戲探討線上生活的虛擬性。
He was fascinated by the virtuality of the experience. 他對這種體驗的虛擬感到著迷。

meaning: to make virtual or to simulate digitally
sentences: The team plans to virtualize the old server. 團隊計畫將舊伺服器虛擬化。
They decided to virtualize the training system. 他們決定把訓練系統虛擬化。

meaning: 幾乎，實際上
sentences: It is virtually impossible to finish this project by tomorrow morning. 要在明天早上之前完成這個專案幾乎是不可能的。
The museum's collection is virtually complete after the latest acquisition. 在最新一次收購後，博物館的收藏實際上已經完整了。

meaning: 美德、德行、長處
sentences: Patience is a virtue that is very important in learning a new language. 耐心是一種美德，在學習新語言時非常重要。
One of the virtues of this new software is its user-friendly interface. 這款新軟體的優點（長處）之一是其用戶友好的界面。

meaning: endowed with virtue or treated as virtuous
sentences: The story described him as virtued and disciplined. 那個故事把他描述成有德行又自律的人。
The writer gave the hero a virtued image. 作者賦予主角一種帶有德性的形象。

meaning: to make virtuous or to lend a moral tone to
sentences: The writer tried to virtuefy the hero in the final chapter. 作者試著在最後一章讓主角更顯高尚。
The editor refused to virtuefy the villain. 編輯拒絕把反派寫得過於高尚。

meaning: the state of lacking virtue
sentences: His virtuelessness made the critics lose respect. 他的缺德讓評論者失去敬意。
The novel warns against virtuelessness in power. 那本小說警告掌權者不要失去德行。

meaning: resistant to moral persuasion or improvement
sentences: The speech was not virtueproof and could be challenged. 那篇演說並非對道德批評毫無漏洞。
No one is truly virtueproof when pressure increases. 壓力一大，沒有人真的能對道德勸說毫無反應。

meaning: lacking virtue; morally empty
sentences: The book portrays a virtuless ruler. 這本書描寫了一位無德的統治者。
He worried that the plan would seem virtuless. 他擔心這個計畫會顯得沒有道德感。

meaning: a female virtuoso; a highly accomplished woman performer
sentences: The virtuosa gave a flawless recital. 那位女高明演奏家帶來了一場完美的演出。
Everyone in the hall admired the virtuosa's control. 大廳裡的每個人都欽佩那位女演奏家的掌控力。

meaning: in the manner of a virtuoso; highly skillful
sentences: Her virtuose passage impressed the jury. 她高超的段落演奏讓評審印象深刻。
The piece ends with a virtuose flourish. 這首曲子以炫技般的收尾結束。

meaning: plural of virtuoso
sentences: The hall was full of virtuosi from around the world. 大廳裡坐滿了來自世界各地的演奏高手。
These virtuosi rehearsed for the concert together. 這些演奏名家一起為音樂會排練。

meaning: showing exceptional technical skill
sentences: He played the violin with virtuosic speed. 他以炫技般的速度拉小提琴。
The solo was virtuosic and precise. 那段獨奏炫技而精準。

meaning: great skill in performing or creating art
sentences: The crowd applauded her virtuosity. 群眾為她的精湛技藝鼓掌。
His virtuosity on the piano was obvious. 他在鋼琴上的高超技藝顯而易見。

meaning: a highly skilled performer or artist
sentences: The pianist is a true virtuoso. 那位鋼琴家是真正的演奏大師。
She was called a virtuoso of the cello. 她被稱為大提琴演奏大師。

meaning: the skill or quality of being a virtuoso
sentences: Years of practice led to real virtuosoship. 經年累月的練習造就了真正的演奏大師技巧。
The review praised his virtuosoship at the keyboard. 評論稱讚他在鍵盤樂器上的大師級功力。

meaning: 有品德的，正直的
sentences: He lived a virtuous life and was respected by everyone in the community. 他過著正直的生活，受到社區每個人的尊重。
She is known for her virtuous character and dedication to charity. 她以其高尚的品格和對慈善的奉獻而聞名。

meaning: resembling virtue or moral goodness
sentences: His virtuouslike manners won the teacher's trust. 他近乎高尚的舉止贏得了老師的信任。
The character had a virtuouslike calm. 這個角色帶著近似高潔的沉穩。

meaning: 有品德地，正直地
sentences: He always strives to act virtuously in both his personal and professional life. 他在個人生活和職業生涯中都始終努力行事正直。
The story's protagonist chooses to live virtuously despite many temptations. 故事的主角儘管面臨許多誘惑，仍選擇正直地生活。

meaning: the quality of being virtuous
sentences: The novel praises the virtuousness of the heroine. 那本小說讚揚女主角的德行。
Her virtuousness made her a model student. 她的品德讓她成為模範學生。

meaning: capable of killing viruses
sentences: The cleaner contains a virucidal ingredient. 這種清潔劑含有殺病毒成分。
Virucidal wipes are used in hospitals. 醫院會使用具有殺病毒效果的濕巾。

meaning: a substance that kills viruses
sentences: The hospital uses a virucide on the counters. 醫院在檯面上使用殺病毒劑。
Scientists compared the new virucide with older products. 科學家把新型殺病毒劑與舊產品作比較。

meaning: smallpox
sentences: Viruela was once a feared disease worldwide. 天花曾是全球令人畏懼的疾病。
Old records describe outbreaks of viruela. 舊紀錄記載了天花的爆發。

meaning: the severity or harmfulness of a disease
sentences: The virulence of the outbreak worried doctors. 這場疫情的毒性和傳染性讓醫生擔心。
Researchers tracked the virulence of the strain. 研究人員追蹤這個菌株的毒性。

meaning: the quality of being virulent
sentences: The report discussed the virulency of the strain. 報告討論了這個菌株的毒性。
Doctors were surprised by the virulency of the symptoms. 醫生對症狀的猛烈程度感到驚訝。

meaning: 劇毒的，致命的，充滿敵意的
sentences: The new strain of the flu is particularly virulent this year. 今年這種新的流感病毒株特別致命。
The politician was met with virulent opposition from his critics. 那位政治家遭到了批評者充滿敵意的反對。

meaning: made virulent or more harmful
sentences: The wound became virulented after several days. 傷口幾天後變得更具毒性。
The older notes described a virulented infection. 舊筆記描述了一種毒性加劇的感染。

meaning: in a harsh, aggressive, or virulent manner
sentences: He argued virulently against the proposal. 他激烈地反對那項提案。
The rumor spread virulently across the town. 那則謠言在鎮上猛烈擴散。

meaning: the state of being virulent
sentences: The virulentness of the criticism surprised the team. 那些批評的猛烈程度讓團隊很意外。
They measured the virulentness of the disease. 他們測量這種疾病的毒性。

meaning: carrying or transmitting a virus
sentences: The mosquito was viruliferous and dangerous. 那隻蚊子帶有病毒，十分危險。
A viruliferous insect can spread disease quickly. 帶病毒的昆蟲可能迅速散播疾病。

meaning: 病毒
sentences: The computer was infected with a dangerous virus that deleted all the files. 電腦感染了一種危險的病毒，刪除了所有文件。
The common cold is caused by a virus and cannot be treated with antibiotics. 普通感冒是由病毒引起的，不能用抗生素治療。

meaning: capable of killing viruses
sentences: The spray has viruscidal power on hard surfaces. 這種噴劑對硬表面具有殺病毒效果。
Viruscidal cleaners are common in clinics. 診所裡常見具有殺病毒效果的清潔劑。

meaning: a virus-killing substance or agent
sentences: The lab tested a new viruscide for public spaces. 實驗室測試了一種新的公共空間殺病毒劑。
They added a viruscide to the cleaning formula. 他們在清潔配方中加入了殺病毒劑。

meaning: having viruses in the blood; viremic
sentences: The patient became virusemic after the infection spread. 感染擴散後，病人出現病毒血症。
Doctors monitored the virusemic stage closely. 醫生密切監測病毒血症階段。

meaning: force or power
sentences: The athlete relied on vis and stamina. 那位運動員依靠力量與耐力。
The old text used vis to mean force. 舊文獻用 vis 來表示力量。

meaning: 簽證
sentences: You need to apply for a tourist visa before you can travel to the country. 在前往該國旅行之前，您需要申請旅遊簽證。
His application for a working visa was approved after several months. 他的工作簽證申請在幾個月後獲得了批准。

meaning: 簽證類別 (修正為 visa category/type)
sentences: You should check which visa diet is most suitable for your trip. 你應該檢查哪種簽證類別最適合你的旅行。
The consultant explained the requirements for each visa diet. 顧問解釋了每種簽證類別的要求。

meaning: 父母簽證
sentences: They applied for a visa parent so their grandparents could visit them. 他們申請了父母簽證，以便祖父母可以來探望他們。
The visa parent allows elderly family members to stay for a longer period. 父母簽證允許年長的家庭成員停留較長時間。

meaning: 簽證處 (修正為 visa office/section)
sentences: He went to the visa yard at the embassy to submit his application. 他去大使館的簽證處提交了申請。
The visa yard is usually very busy during the summer holidays. 簽證處在暑假期間通常非常忙碌。

meaning: 臉龐，面容
sentences: The old man's visage was lined with years of hard work. 那位老人的面容佈滿了多年辛勤工作的皺紋。
She had a calm and peaceful visage as she meditated. 她在冥想時神情（臉龐）平靜祥和。

meaning: having a certain face or expression
sentences: The old king was stern-visaged and quiet. 那位老國王面容嚴峻而寡言。
A kindly visaged nurse greeted the children. 一位面容和善的護士迎接了孩子們。

meaning: a device for recording visual impressions or eye movement
sentences: The researcher used a visagraph to study eye movement. 研究人員使用 visagraph 研究眼球運動。
An early visagraph helped teachers track reading habits. 早期的 visagraph 幫助老師追蹤閱讀習慣。

meaning: a Sanskrit sound represented by a final breathing mark
sentences: The grammar lesson explained the Sanskrit visarga. 語法課解釋了梵語中的 visarga。
Students learned how visarga changes pronunciation. 學生學習了 visarga 如何改變發音。

meaning: a region or people of the central Philippines
sentences: Visaya refers to a region in the central Philippines. Visaya 指的是菲律賓中部的一個地區。
The guide mentioned Visaya in a history chapter. 那本指南在歷史章節中提到了 Visaya。

meaning: relating to the Visayas region or its people
sentences: A Visayan speaker joined the discussion. 一位講維薩亞語的人參與了討論。
The museum showed Visayan artifacts. 博物館展出了維薩亞地區的文物。

meaning: a South American rodent similar to a chinchilla
sentences: A viscacha darted between the rocks. 一隻巖兔在岩石間竄過。
The field guide described the viscacha's habitat. 田野指南描述了巖兔的棲地。

meaning: the internal organs, especially in the abdomen
sentences: The surgeon examined the viscera carefully. 外科醫師仔細檢查內臟。
The diagram labeled the viscera inside the body. 那張圖示標出了體內的內臟。

meaning: 屬於內臟或與內臟相關、由內臟組成或位於內臟之中或之內（「身體的內臟器官，特別是腹腔和胸腔內的內臟器官」）。
sentences: visceral remains 內臟遺骸

Something described as visceral is of or relating to, made up of, or positioned among or within, the viscera (“internal organs of the body, especially those contained within the abdominal and thoracic cavities”). 被描述為內臟的東西是屬於內臟的，或者與內臟相關，由內臟組成，或者位於內臟之中或之內（「身體的內部器官，特別是那些包含在腹腔和胸腔內的器官」）。

meaning: pain in the internal organs
sentences: The patient complained of visceralgia after the meal. 病人吃完飯後訴說內臟疼痛。
The doctor considered visceralgia as a possible diagnosis. 醫生把內臟痛納入可能診斷。

meaning: in a deeply felt or instinctive way
sentences: She reacted viscerally to the bad news. 她對壞消息做出了本能反應。
He felt the warning viscerally before he understood it. 他在真正理解之前就本能地感到警訊。

meaning: to remove the viscera or entrails; to eviscerate
sentences: The hunters viscerated the fish by the river. 獵人們在河邊去除了魚的內臟。
The old manual told workers how to viscerate the animal. 舊手冊教工人如何去除動物內臟。

meaning: the act of removing the viscera or entrails
sentences: The doctor described the visceration of the specimen. 醫生描述了這個標本的內臟剖除情形。
Visceration is a term used in older anatomical texts. visceration 是較早解剖學文獻中的術語。

meaning: relating to the viscera and the pericardium
sentences: The visceripericardial membrane was noted in the study. 研究中提到了這層臟器與心包相關的膜。
The anatomy notes mentioned a visceripericardial connection. 解剖筆記提到了臟器與心包之間的關聯。

meaning: 抑制內臟活動的
sentences: The reflex was described as visceroinhibitory. 那個反射被描述為具有抑制內臟活動的作用。
A visceroinhibitory signal can slow organ activity. 抑制內臟的訊號可以減緩器官活動。

meaning: 控制內臟運動的
sentences: The pathway carries visceromotor impulses. 這條通路傳遞控制內臟運動的衝動。
Researchers studied visceromotor control in the gut. 研究人員研究腸道中的內臟運動控制。

meaning: 與內臟和壁層有關的
sentences: The surgeon described a visceroparietal connection. 外科醫師描述了一種與內臟和壁層相關的連結。
The membrane has both visceroparietal relationships. 這層膜同時具有內臟與壁層的關係。

meaning: 與內臟和腹膜有關的
sentences: The lecture used visceroperitioneal to describe the anatomy. 那堂課用 visceroperitioneal 來描述解剖結構。
A visceroperitioneal fold can be noted in older texts. 舊文獻中有時會提到 visceroperitioneal 的皺摺。

meaning: 與內臟和胸膜有關的
sentences: The report mentioned a visceropleural layer. 報告提到一層與內臟和胸膜有關的組織。
A visceropleural boundary can be discussed in anatomy class. 解剖課上可以討論內臟胸膜的邊界。

meaning: 內臟下垂
sentences: The patient was diagnosed with visceroptosis. 那位病人被診斷出有內臟下垂。
Severe visceroptosis can cause discomfort after meals. 嚴重的內臟下垂可能會在飯後造成不適。

meaning: 患有內臟下垂的；與內臟下垂有關的
sentences: The doctor described the posture as visceroptotic. 醫生把那種姿勢描述為與內臟下垂有關。
A visceroptotic patient may feel pressure in the abdomen. 患有內臟下垂的人可能會覺得腹部有壓迫感。

meaning: 感知內臟的；傳遞內臟感覺的
sentences: The nerve carries viscerosensory information. 那條神經傳遞內臟感覺資訊。
Pain from the stomach can follow a viscerosensory pathway. 來自胃部的疼痛可以沿著內臟感覺路徑傳遞。

meaning: 與內臟和骨骼有關的
sentences: The article discussed visceroskeletal relations in the body. 文章討論了身體中的內臟與骨骼關係。
A visceroskeletal link may be mentioned in anatomy. 解剖學中可能會提到內臟骨骼的連結。

meaning: 與內臟和體壁有關的
sentences: The pain pattern was viscerosomatic. 那種疼痛模式與內臟和體壁有關。
Doctors use viscerosomatic reflexes to explain referred pain. 醫生用內臟體壁反射來解釋牽涉痛。

meaning: 切開內臟的手術
sentences: The old manual mentioned viscerotomy as a risky procedure. 舊手冊把 viscerotomy 描述為一種風險很高的手術。
Modern surgery rarely requires a viscerotomy. 現代外科很少需要切開內臟的手術。

meaning: 內臟型氣質；放鬆、偏好舒適的體質傾向
sentences: The psychologist linked his viscerotonia to a relaxed temperament. 心理學家把他的 viscerotonia 與放鬆的氣質連在一起。
Old body-type theories used viscerotonia to describe comfort-seeking people. 舊式體型理論用 viscerotonia 來描述偏好舒適的人。

meaning: 具有內臟型氣質的；偏向放鬆舒適的
sentences: Her viscerotonic habits made her enjoy good food and rest. 她那種偏向舒適的習慣讓她喜歡美食與休息。
The profile described him as viscerotonic rather than tense. 那份檔案把他描述成偏向放鬆型，而不是緊繃型。

meaning: 滋養內臟的；促進內臟生長的
sentences: The paper described a viscerotrophic hormone. 論文描述了一種滋養內臟的荷爾蒙。
Researchers studied how viscerotrophic factors affect organs. 研究人員研究滋養內臟的因素如何影響器官。

meaning: 趨向內臟的；對內臟有親和性的
sentences: The virus showed viscerotropic behavior in the study. 那種病毒在研究中呈現趨向內臟的特性。
A viscerotropic agent may concentrate in internal organs. 具有內臟趨向性的物質可能會集中在內部器官。

meaning: 與內臟有關的；像內臟的
sentences: The poet used viscerous imagery to suggest bodily depth. 詩人用帶有內臟感的意象來暗示身體深處的感受。
The review noted a viscerous texture in the description. 評論指出那段描述帶有內臟般的質感。

meaning: 黏性的；膠著的
sentences: The syrup stayed viscid even after cooling. 那糖漿冷卻後仍然很黏稠。
A viscid film covered the surface of the bowl. 碗的表面覆著一層黏膩的薄膜。

meaning: 黏稠性；黏性
sentences: The scientist measured the viscidity of the liquid. 科學家測量了那液體的黏稠性。
A rise in temperature changed the viscidity quickly. 溫度上升迅速改變了黏稠度。

meaning: 使變黏稠；使具黏性
sentences: The chemist added an agent to viscidize the solution. 化學家加入一種試劑讓溶液變黏稠。
Heat can viscidize certain plant extracts. 熱可以讓某些植物萃取液變得更黏稠。

meaning: 黏稠地；黏膩地
sentences: The liquid moved viscidly down the glass. 那液體黏稠地沿著玻璃往下流。
The mixture clung viscidly to the spoon. 那混合物黏膩地附著在湯匙上。

meaning: 黏稠度；黏性
sentences: The viscidness of the paste made it hard to spread. 那種糊狀物的黏稠度讓它很難塗抹。
She noted the viscidness of the resin with a spoon. 她用湯匙注意到樹脂的黏稠感。

meaning: 略帶黏性的；稍黏的
sentences: The fruit had a viscidulous surface after washing. 那水果洗過後表面略帶黏性。
A viscidulous film formed on the leaf. 葉片上形成了一層微黏的薄膜。

meaning: 黏液；植物性黏質，尤指槲寄生的黏質
sentences: The mistletoe berry contains a sticky viscin. 槲寄生漿果含有黏性的 viscin。
Birds can spread seeds that are coated with viscin. 鳥類可以傳播包覆著 viscin 的種子。

meaning: 似黏稠物的；膠狀的
sentences: The sample had a viscoidal appearance under the light. 那個樣本在燈光下看起來像膠狀物。
Researchers noted a viscoidal texture in the residue. 研究人員注意到殘留物有一種膠狀質地。

meaning: 使成黏稠狀；使膠化
sentences: The recipe suggests heating the starch to viscolize it. 那份配方建議加熱澱粉使其膠化。
The technician tried to viscolize the mixture before testing it. 技術員嘗試在測試前讓混合物變得黏稠。

meaning: 黏度計
sentences: The lab used a viscometer to test the sample. 實驗室用黏度計測試樣本。
She recorded the reading from the viscometer. 她記錄了黏度計上的讀數。

meaning: 黏度測量的；與黏度計有關的
sentences: The paper described a viscometrical method. 那篇論文描述了一種黏度測量方法。
A viscometrical check was performed on the fluid. 研究人員對液體做了黏度測量檢查。

meaning: 以黏度測量方式；在黏度測量上
sentences: The sample was analyzed viscometrically. 樣本以黏度測量方式進行分析。
The fluid behaved viscometrically as expected. 那種液體的黏度表現符合預期。

meaning: 黏度測量
sentences: The course introduced viscometry as a lab technique. 課程把黏度測量介紹為一種實驗室技術。
Viscometry helps compare the thickness of liquids. 黏度測量有助於比較液體的稠度。

meaning: 子爵的；與子爵有關的
sentences: The family name carried a viscontal history. 這個家族名稱帶有子爵的歷史背景。
The old charter used a viscontal title. 那份舊憲章使用了一個與子爵有關的頭銜。

meaning: 黏度觀測器；流動觀測器
sentences: The engineer checked the flow with a viscoscope. 工程師用黏度觀測器檢查流動情況。
A viscoscope can help compare different fluids. 黏度觀測器可以幫助比較不同液體。

meaning: 黏膠纖維用的半流體纖維素溶液
sentences: The factory produced viscose for rayon making. 工廠生產用來製作嫘縈的 viscose。
She learned that viscose starts as a thick cellulose solution. 她學到 viscose 一開始是一種濃稠的纖維素溶液。

meaning: 黏度計
sentences: The scientist calibrated the viscosimeter before use. 科學家在使用前校準了黏度計。
A viscosimeter gives a precise measure of flow resistance. 黏度計可以精確測量流動阻力。

meaning: 黏度測量法；黏度測定
sentences: The paper compared several methods of viscosimetry. 論文比較了幾種黏度測定方法。
Viscosimetry is useful in chemistry and engineering. 黏度測定在化學與工程上都很有用。

meaning: 黏稠狀態。
sentences: The term viscosity refers to the state of being viscous. 術語黏度是指黏稠的狀態。
The lesson introduced viscosity as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了黏度這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 子爵
sentences: The viscount inherited the title and the estate from his father. 子爵從他父親那裡繼承了頭銜和遺產。
A viscount is a rank of nobility below an earl and above a baron. 子爵是低於伯爵且高於男爵的一個貴族等級。

meaning: 子爵的領地；子爵職位
sentences: The novel described the old viscountcy in detail. 那本小說詳細描寫了古老的子爵領地。
He inherited the viscountcy after his father's death. 父親去世後，他繼承了子爵的頭銜。

meaning: 女子子爵；子爵夫人
sentences: The viscountess greeted the guests at the door. 子爵夫人在門口迎接客人。
In the story, the viscountess managed the estate carefully. 在故事裡，子爵夫人細心管理莊園。

meaning: 子爵職位；子爵爵位
sentences: The viscountship passed to the eldest son. 子爵爵位傳給了長子。
The history book traced the viscountship through generations. 那本歷史書追溯了這個子爵爵位的世代傳承。

meaning: 子爵領地；子爵轄區
sentences: The map marked the old viscounty clearly. 地圖清楚標出了那個舊子爵領地。
The viscounty once controlled the valley road. 那片子爵轄區過去曾控制山谷道路。

meaning: 黏稠的；濃稠的
sentences: The sauce was thick and viscous. 那醬汁又濃又黏稠。
A viscous liquid moves more slowly than water. 黏稠的液體比水流得更慢。

meaning: 黏稠地；濃稠地
sentences: The syrup flowed viscously from the jar. 糖漿黏稠地從罐子裡流出。
The paint spread viscously over the surface. 顏料黏稠地鋪展在表面上。

meaning: 黏稠度；黏性
sentences: The viscousness of the gel made it hard to pour. 凝膠的黏稠度讓它很難倒出。
Scientists compared the viscousness of several samples. 科學家比較了幾個樣本的黏稠度。

meaning: 內臟；內部器官
sentences: The surgeon examined the damaged viscus carefully. 外科醫師仔細檢查受損的內臟。
In anatomy, viscus can refer to an internal organ. 在解剖學中，viscus 可以指一個內部器官。

meaning: 老虎鉗
sentences: The carpenter used a vise to hold the piece of wood firmly in place. 木工用老虎鉗將那塊木頭牢牢固定住。
The memory of the accident was like a vise gripping his mind. 事故的記憶就像一把老虎鉗緊緊攫住他的思緒。

meaning: 智者；賢人
sentences: The old tale praised the viseman who solved the riddle. 那個古老故事稱讚那位解開謎題的智者。
Villagers sought advice from a viseman at dusk. 村民們在黃昏時向一位智者請教。

meaning: 男性名字 Vishal
sentences: Vishal is a common Indian given name. Vishal 是常見的印度男性名字。
Vishal introduced himself at the conference. Vishal 在會議上自我介紹。

meaning: 毗濕奴教徒；毗濕奴派信徒
sentences: A Vishnavite may worship Vishnu daily. 毗濕奴教徒可能每天都會禮敬毗濕奴。
The temple welcomed Vishnavites from many regions. 那座寺廟歡迎來自各地的毗濕奴派信徒。

meaning: 毗濕奴，印度教主神之一
sentences: Vishnu is one of the major deities in Hinduism. 毗濕奴是印度教的重要神祇之一。
The sculpture depicted Vishnu with four arms. 那尊雕像描繪了有四臂的毗濕奴。

meaning: 毗濕奴崇拜；毗濕奴信仰
sentences: The book explained Vishnuism as a devotional tradition. 那本書把 Vishnuism 解釋為一種虔敬傳統。
Vishnuism has many regional forms and rituals. 毗濕奴信仰有許多地區形式與儀式。

meaning: 毗濕奴信徒；毗濕奴派支持者
sentences: Some texts call a devotee of Vishnu a Vishnuite. 有些文獻把毗濕奴的信徒稱作 Vishnuite。
The scholar described himself as a Vishnuite. 那位學者把自己描述為毗濕奴信徒。

meaning: 韋什努礦；一種稀有磷酸鹽礦物
sentences: The geologist labeled the crystal as Vishnuvite. 地質學家把那顆晶體標示為 Vishnuvite。
A sample of Vishnuvite was placed in the mineral tray. 一份 Vishnuvite 樣本被放在礦物托盤中。

meaning: 視覺提升 (修正為 visual elevation/enhancement)
sentences: The new lighting design provides a significant visi elevate to the room. 新的燈光設計為房間提供了顯著的視覺提升。
High-quality graphics can provide a visi elevate to the gaming experience. 高品質的圖像可以提升遊戲體驗。

meaning: 視線延伸 (修正為 visual extension)
sentences: Large windows provide a visi extend from the living room to the garden. 大窗戶提供了從客廳到花園的視線延伸。
The mirror creates a visi extend that makes the small hallway look longer. 鏡子創造了一種視線延伸，讓狹小的走廊看起來更長。

meaning: 事物可見的程度。
sentences: The visibility from that angle was good. 那個角度的能見度很好。
The term visibility refers to the degree to which things may be seen. 術語「可見性」是指事物可以被看到的程度。

meaning: 使可見；使顯現
sentences: The editor wanted to visibilize the hidden data. 編輯想把隱藏的資料顯現出來。
Color can visibilize warning labels on a page. 色彩可以讓頁面上的警示標籤更醒目。

meaning: 可見的
sentences: The mountain peak was barely visible through the thick morning fog. 透過清晨的濃霧，山頂幾乎不可見。
The red light is clearly visible even from a long distance. 紅燈在很遠的地方也能清晰可見。

meaning: 可見性；看得見的狀態
sentences: The visibleness of the sign improved after the rain stopped. 雨停之後，那個標誌的可見性變好了。
Good lighting can increase the visibleness of small details. 良好的照明可以提高細節的可見度。

meaning: 以可見的方式；公開地。
sentences: He was visibly upset while reading the news live on air about the school shooting. 當他在直播中看到有關學校槍擊事件的新聞時，他明顯感到不安。
If someone acts visibly, they do so in a way that is in a visible manner; openly. 如果某人的行為是可見的，那麼他們就是以可見的方式這樣做的；公然。

meaning: 凝視；遠望；看法
sentences: He gave the horizon a long visie before speaking. 他在說話前先長時間凝視地平線。
Her visie on the problem was calmer than mine. 她對這個問題的看法比我冷靜。

meaning: 西哥德人
sentences: The history lesson introduced the Visigoth as one of the Germanic peoples. 歷史課介紹西哥德人是日耳曼民族之一。
A museum exhibit showed artifacts linked to a Visigoth settlement. 博物館展覽展示了與西哥德人聚落相關的文物。

meaning: 西哥德人的；西哥德風格的
sentences: The scholar discussed Visigothic art and architecture. 學者討論了西哥德人的藝術與建築。
The church has a few Visigothic features in its stonework. 那座教堂的石工中帶有一些西哥德風格。

meaning: 可見的；能看見的
sentences: At dusk, the mountain was still visile from the road. 黃昏時，那座山從公路上仍然看得見。
The tiny mark was barely visile under the lamp. 那個小小的痕跡在燈下幾乎看不見。

meaning: 想像
sentences: He has a very clear vision for the future of the company. 他對公司的未來有著非常清晰的願景（想像）。
Regular check-ups are essential for maintaining healthy vision. 定期檢查對於保持健康視力至關重要。

meaning: 與視覺或想像中的圖像有關的
sentences: The poem used visional images to create a dreamlike tone. 那首詩用帶有視覺想像的意象營造夢境般的氛圍。
Her visional memory of the street was unusually clear. 她對那條街的視覺記憶異常清晰。

meaning: 暫時地；臨時地
sentences: The schedule was visionally approved until the final review. 在最終審查前，這份時程先被暫時核准。
We visionally assigned her to the new project team. 我們先暫時把她分到新的專案小組。

meaning: 有遠見地；以想像力地
sentences: He visionarily planned the city decades ahead. 他以很有遠見的方式規劃了這座城市數十年後的樣貌。
The article described how she visionarily shaped the brand. 那篇文章描述她如何以遠見塑造品牌。

meaning: 有遠見；富有想像力
sentences: The leader's visionariness inspired the whole company. 那位領導者的遠見啟發了整家公司。
The essay praised the visionariness of the architect. 那篇文章讚揚了那位建築師的遠見。

meaning: 理想主義或烏托邦。
sentences: a visionary scheme or project 有遠見的計劃或項目
Something described as visionary is idealistic or utopian. 被描述為有遠見的東西是理想主義的或烏托邦的。

meaning: 有構想的；具遠景的
sentences: She gave a visioned answer about the future of the museum. 她對博物館的未來提出了有遠景的回答。
The company hired a visioned designer for the new campaign. 公司為新宣傳活動聘請了一位有遠見的設計師。

meaning: 有遠見的人；擅長構想的人
sentences: The entrepreneur was seen as a visioner in the industry. 那位企業家被視為業界有遠見的人。
A good visioner can turn a vague idea into a plan. 好的遠見者能把模糊的想法變成計畫。

meaning: 與視覺、幻象或構想有關的
sentences: The composer described the piece as visionic and surreal. 作曲家把這首作品形容為帶有視覺幻象感且超現實。
Her visionic style made the presentation memorable. 她那種充滿視覺感的風格讓簡報很難忘。

meaning: 有遠見者；強調願景的人
sentences: The article called her a visionist in modern design. 那篇文章把她稱為現代設計中的願景型人物。
A visionist usually thinks far beyond today's problems. 有遠見的人通常會思考遠超今日問題的事。

meaning: 想像；使具體成形於腦中
sentences: Try to visionize the final layout before you draw it. 在你畫之前，先試著在腦中想像最後的版面。
The coach asked the players to visionize success. 教練要球員先在腦中想像成功。

meaning: 沒有遠見的；缺乏想像力的
sentences: The plan felt visionless and short-sighted. 這份計畫感覺沒有遠見，而且目光短淺。
A visionless policy rarely solves long-term problems. 缺乏遠見的政策很少能解決長期問題。

meaning: 像幻象的；像視覺印象的
sentences: The scene had a visionlike quality in the evening fog. 那個場景在傍晚薄霧中帶有一種如幻象般的質感。
Her memory of the road was visionlike and faint. 她對那條路的記憶像幻影般模糊。

meaning: 兜售願景或空想的人
sentences: The critic dismissed the speaker as a visionmonger. 那位評論者把演講者斥為兜售願景的人。
A visionmonger can sound inspiring without offering details. 兜售願景的人可能聽起來很鼓舞人心，卻不提供細節。

meaning: 防止視覺誤判的；不受幻象影響的
sentences: The design used a visionproof font for the elderly. 這款設計為年長者使用了不易看錯的字體。
No image is completely visionproof in bad lighting. 在光線很差的情況下，沒有圖片能完全避免看錯。

meaning: 訪問

meaning: 拜訪；探視；參訪
sentences: The family planned a visita to the museum after lunch. 這家人計畫午餐後去博物館參訪。

meaning: 可拜訪的；可參觀的

meaning: 屬於聖母訪親會的修女或與其有關的
sentences: A Visitandine introduced the convent's history. 一位聖母訪親會修女介紹了修道院的歷史。

meaning: 來訪者；訪客
sentences: Every visitant must sign the guest book at the entrance. 每位來訪者都必須在入口簽名簿上簽名。
The visitant waited quietly in the hall. 那位訪客安靜地在大廳等候。

meaning: 探視，訪問
sentences: The hospital has strict rules regarding patient visitation hours. 醫院對病人探視時間有嚴格規定。

meaning: 與探訪、視察有關的
sentences: The report included visitational notes from the school. 報告包含了學校的視察紀錄。
A visitational review can reveal hidden problems. 視察式的檢查可以找出隱藏問題。

meaning: 參訪的；探視的；視察的
sentences: The policy was meant to improve visitative supervision. 這項政策旨在改善視察性的監督。

meaning: 視察者；訪察官
sentences: The visitator inspected the site before noon. 那位視察者在中午前巡視了現場。
A visitator once checked the school records by hand. 過去視察官曾經親手檢查學校記錄。

meaning: 視察者的；訪察性的
sentences: The team discussed the visitatorial powers of the office. 團隊討論了該職位的視察權限。
His visitatorial duties covered several institutions. 他的視察職責涵蓋數個機構。

meaning: 拜訪；探訪；參觀
sentences: Their visite to the art gallery lasted an hour. 他們參觀美術館的時間持續了一小時。
She remembered the visite as a peaceful afternoon. 她把那次拜訪記成一個平靜的午後。

meaning: 拜訪過的，參觀過的
sentences: I have visited many interesting places in Europe last year. 我去年去過（拜訪過）歐洲許多有趣的地方。
The most visited tourist attraction in the city is the historic castle. 這座城市遊客最多的景點是那座古堡。

meaning: 被拜訪的人；被探視者
sentences: The visitee welcomed the guests with tea. 那位被拜訪者用茶歡迎客人。
As a visitee, he answered questions politely. 身為被探訪的人，他禮貌地回答問題。

meaning: 訪客；拜訪者
sentences: The visiter left a note at the front desk. 那位訪客在櫃台留了一張紙條。
Every visiter had to wear a badge in the building. 每位拜訪者在大樓內都必須配戴識別證。

meaning: 訪問的，探望中的
sentences: They are currently visiting their grandparents in the countryside. 他們目前正在鄉下探望祖父母。
The visiting professor will give a lecture on economics tomorrow. 客座教授（訪問教授）明天將發表一場關於經濟學的演講。

meaning: 名片
sentences: He handed me his visiting card after our meeting. 開完會後，他遞給我他的名片。
Don't forget to bring your visiting cards to the networking event. 別忘了帶你的名片去社交活動。

meaning: 拜訪；探視；訪問
sentences: The visitment was short but meaningful. 這次拜訪雖短，卻很有意義。
Her visitment to the hospital lifted everyone's mood. 她到醫院探視讓大家的心情都好了一些。

meaning: 遊客
sentences: The museum attracts thousands of visitors from all over the world. 博物館吸引了來自世界各地數以千計的遊客。
Please welcome our visitors and show them around the office. 請歡迎我們的訪客，並帶他們參觀一下辦公室。

meaning: 女訪客；女拜訪者
sentences: The visitoress asked for directions to the museum. 那位女訪客詢問前往博物館的路線。
A visitoress arrived just before the meeting began. 會議開始前不久，一位女訪客抵達了。

meaning: 視察的；訪察者的
sentences: The visitorial report highlighted several issues. 那份視察報告指出了幾個問題。
Visitorial authority can be limited by law. 視察權限可能會受法律限制。

meaning: 訪客身分；訪問職務
sentences: His visitorship gave him access to the archive room. 他的訪客身分讓他得以進入檔案室。
The visitorship was meant to last only one afternoon. 這次訪問身分原本只安排持續一個下午。

meaning: 女訪客；女拜訪者
sentences: The visitress signed the guest register at the gate. 那位女訪客在門口的來賓登記簿上簽名。
A visitress brought flowers to the patient. 一位女訪客帶了花去探望病人。

meaning: 女視察者；女訪察官
sentences: The visitrix toured the school with a clipboard. 那位女視察者拿著板夾巡視學校。
An old record listed her as a visitrix of the monastery. 舊紀錄把她列為修道院的女訪察官。

meaning: 視覺的；看得見的
sentences: The visive effect of the display was striking. 展示效果在視覺上非常醒目。
Artists often use visive contrast to guide attention. 藝術家常用視覺對比來引導注意力。

meaning: 法律用語，指土地或地區；地方
sentences: The visne was noted in the old legal document. 舊法律文件中記載了那片地方。
A visne could be important in a property dispute. 在財產爭議中，地點可能很重要。

meaning: 水貂；歐洲水貂
sentences: The vison was once valued for its fur. 水貂過去因毛皮而受到重視。
The naturalist drew a vison near the riverbank. 那位博物學家在河岸邊畫了一隻水貂。

meaning: 遮陽板，護目鏡
sentences: He lowered the car's sun visor to block the bright sunlight. 他放下了汽車的遮陽板以阻擋強烈的陽光。
The knight's helmet has a metal visor to protect his face. 騎士的頭盔有一個金屬護面（護目鏡）來保護臉部。

meaning: 沒有帽簷的；沒有遮板的
sentences: He wore a visorless cap on the walk home. 他回家路上戴著一頂沒有帽簷的帽子。
The visorless helmet offered a wider field of view. 那頂沒有面罩的頭盔提供更寬的視野。

meaning: 像帽簷的；像遮板的
sentences: The visorlike shade kept the sunlight off her eyes. 那個像帽簷的遮陽片擋住了她眼前的陽光。
The structure had a visorlike edge at the front. 這個結構前端有一道像帽簷的邊緣。

meaning: 探親 (修正為 visit family)
sentences: He plans to visit family in Taiwan during the Lunar New Year. 他計畫在農曆新年期間去台灣探親。
Visiting family is an important tradition for many cultures. 探親對許多文化來說都是一項重要的傳統。

meaning: 願景；透過想像力在未來或回顧中呈現給心靈的視圖。
sentences: a vista of pleasure to come 即將到來的歡樂景象
dim vistas of the past 過去的暗淡景色

meaning: 有景致的；有遠景的
sentences: The vistaed hilltop overlooked the valley. 那座有景致的山頂俯瞰著山谷。
They chose a vistaed route for the afternoon drive. 他們選了一條景致開闊的路線兜風。

meaning: 景色的；視野的
sentences: The artist focused on the vistal composition of the scene. 那位藝術家專注於場景的景觀構圖。
A vistal path led down to the lake. 一條視野開闊的小路通向湖邊。

meaning: 沒有景致的；視野不開闊的
sentences: The vistaless room faced a brick wall. 那間沒有景致的房間正對著磚牆。
She preferred a vistaed room to a vistaless one. 她偏好有景致的房間，不喜歡沒有景致的。

meaning: 公開地；坦率地；在視野中
sentences: He stood vistamente at the center of the square. 他坦然地站在廣場中央。
The monument was vistamente visible from the hill. 那座紀念碑在山丘上清楚可見。

meaning: 稀有專名或地名用字
sentences: Vistlik appeared in the old map notes as a place name. Vistlik 在舊地圖註記中被列為地名。
The archive preserved one mention of Vistlik in a list. 檔案中保留了一次對 Vistlik 的提及。

meaning: 看過的；已見的；證明看過的標記
sentences: The document had a visto mark in the corner. 那份文件角落上有一個已看過的標記。
She treated the visto note as an approval sign. 她把那個看過的註記當作核准訊號。

meaning: 與維斯瓦河地區有關的；維斯圖拉的
sentences: The historian referred to Vistulian settlements. 那位歷史學家提到了與維斯瓦河地區有關的聚落。
Vistulian trade routes connected several towns. 維斯瓦河地區的貿易路線連結了好幾個城鎮。

meaning: 視覺驚嚇 (修正為 visual startle)
sentences: The sudden bright light caused a visu startle in the baby. 突然的強光讓寶寶產生了視覺驚嚇。
Scientists study the visu startle response to understand brain function. 科學家研究視覺驚嚇反應以瞭解大腦功能。

meaning: 視覺的、視力的、形象的
sentences: The teacher used various visual aids, such as charts and diagrams, to help the students. 老師使用各種視覺輔助教具，如圖表，來幫助學生。
Graphic designers are responsible for creating the visual elements of a website. 平面設計師負責創建網站的視覺元素。

meaning: 重視視覺的人；擅長視覺表達的人
sentences: The designer was known as a strong visualist. 那位設計師以強烈的視覺表達著稱。
A visualist often thinks in images rather than words. 擅長視覺的人常用影像而不是文字思考。

meaning: 視覺性；視覺效果
sentences: The visuality of the stage design was impressive. 舞台設計的視覺效果令人印象深刻。
Artists debate how much visuality a work should have. 藝術家常討論作品應該具備多少視覺性。

meaning: 視覺化；將概念轉成可見圖像的過程
sentences: Visualization helped the team understand the data. 視覺化幫助團隊理解資料。
The app uses visualization to show progress clearly. 這個應用程式透過視覺化清楚呈現進度。

meaning: 視覺上感知（某物）；檢視。以看得見的方式描繪（某物）。
sentences: to visualize data using a chart 使用圖表視覺化數據
To visualize means to perceive (something) visually; to see. To depict (something) in a way which can be seen. 視覺化是指用視覺來感知（某物）；檢視。以可見的方式描繪（某物）。

meaning: 將資訊轉成圖像的人或工具
sentences: The data visualizer turned a long report into clear charts. 那個資料視覺化工具把冗長的報告轉成清楚的圖表。
As a visualizer, she preferred diagrams over plain text. 身為善於視覺化的人，她比起純文字更喜歡圖解。

meaning: 透過視覺的方式。
sentences: The radar's detection was confirmed visually, because seeing is believing. 雷達的探測是透過視覺確認的，因為眼見為憑。
If someone acts visually, they do so in a way that is by means of sight. 如果有人以視覺方式行事，他們就是透過視覺來這樣做的。

meaning: 同時涉及視覺與聽覺的
sentences: The lesson used visuoauditory cues to help students remember. 那堂課使用視聽線索幫助學生記憶。
Visuoauditory materials can make a presentation easier to follow. 視聽材料能讓簡報更容易理解。

meaning: 同時涉及視覺與動作感覺的
sentences: The trainer used visuokinesthetic exercises to improve memory. 教練用視動覺練習來提升記憶。
A visuokinesthetic learner benefits from seeing and doing. 視動覺型學習者能從看與做中獲益。

meaning: 測量視覺或視力的儀器
sentences: The researcher checked the subject's vision with a visuometer. 研究人員用視覺測量儀檢查受試者的視力。
A modern visuometer can record eye performance quickly. 現代視覺測量儀可以快速記錄眼睛表現。

meaning: 與視覺心理或視覺意識有關的
sentences: The paper discussed visuopsychic responses to color. 那篇論文討論了對顏色的視覺心理反應。
A visuopsychic effect can influence how a person notices shapes. 視覺心理效應會影響人如何注意形狀。

meaning: 與視覺感覺有關的
sentences: The designer added visuosensory effects to the exhibit. 設計師在展覽中加入了視覺感官效果。
Visuosensory input helps the brain interpret motion and light. 視覺感官輸入有助於大腦解讀動作與光線。

meaning: 傳記；聖人傳記。
sentences: The term vita refers to a hagiography; a biography of a saint. vita一詞指的是聖徒傳記；一位聖人的傳記。
The lesson introduced vita as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了 vita，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 葡萄科
sentences: Grapes belong to the plant family Vitaceae. 葡萄屬於植物科 Vitaceae。
The botanist studied several members of Vitaceae in the field. 那位植物學家在野外研究了幾種葡萄科植物。

meaning: 一種特殊的玻璃名稱
sentences: The brochure described the window as made of Vitaglass. 那份手冊把窗戶描述為由 Vitaglass 製成。
Vitaglass was promoted as a practical material for bright rooms. Vitaglass 被宣傳為適合明亮房間的實用材料。

meaning: 極其重要的、必不可少的、充滿活力的
sentences: Regular exercise and a healthy diet are vital for maintaining good health. 定期運動和健康飲食對於保持良好健康至關重要（極其重要）。
The heart is a vital organ that pumps blood to all parts of the body. 心臟是一個維持生命所必需的（必不可少的）器官，負責將血液泵送到全身各處。

meaning: 充滿生命力的；有活力的
sentences: Her vitalic voice made the room feel lively. 她充滿活力的聲音讓整個房間都活了起來。
The artist painted the dancers in a vitalic style. 那位藝術家以充滿生命力的風格描繪舞者。

meaning: 生機論；主張生命有特殊活力的學說
sentences: The lecture explained vitalism as a historical theory of life. 那堂課把生機論解釋為一種歷史性的生命理論。
Some early scientists believed vitalism could explain living things. 一些早期科學家認為生機論可以解釋生物。

meaning: 生機論者
sentences: The vitalist argued that life was more than chemistry. 那位生機論者主張生命不只是化學。
As a vitalist, he favored theories about a life force. 作為生機論者，他偏好生命力理論。

meaning: 生機論的；與生命活力說有關的
sentences: The author used a vitalistic explanation for growth. 作者用生機論式的解釋來說明成長。
Vitalistic ideas were common in older medical writing. 較早期的醫學著作常見生機論思想。

meaning: 以生機論的方式；充滿生命力地
sentences: The essay explained the body vitalistically, not mechanically. 那篇文章以生機論方式而非機械方式解釋人體。
She spoke vitalistically about nature and growth. 她以充滿生命力的方式談論自然與成長。

meaning: 活力、生命力
sentences: Regular exercise and a healthy diet are essential for maintaining vitality. 定期運動和健康飲食對於維持活力至關重要。
The city center has a unique vitality that attracts many tourists every year. 市中心有一種獨特的生命力，每年吸引許多遊客。

meaning: 活化；使更有活力
sentences: The city plan included the vitalization of old streets. 城市計畫包含老街區的活化。
Regular exercise helps with the vitalization of the body. 規律運動有助於身體活化。

meaning: 使有活力；活化
sentences: A short walk can vitalize your afternoon. 短暫散步可以讓你的下午更有精神。
The new project vitalized the whole department. 這項新計畫讓整個部門重新有了活力。

meaning: 使有活力的人或事物
sentences: Music was the vitalizer that kept the crowd awake. 音樂是讓觀眾保持清醒的活力來源。
She acted as a vitalizer for the tired team. 她成了這支疲憊團隊的活力來源。

meaning: 使有活力的；激勵性的
sentences: The vitalizing air made the hike pleasant. 這股讓人有精神的空氣讓健行變得愉快。
He described the music as vitalizing and fresh. 他形容那段音樂充滿活力且清新。

meaning: 使人振奮地；充滿活力地
sentences: The wind blew vitalizingly across the hilltop. 山頂上吹來令人振奮的風。
She spoke vitalizingly about the future of the school. 她以充滿活力的語氣談論學校的未來。

meaning: 鈷鉻合金
sentences: The implant was made from Vitallium for durability. 那個植入物為了耐用而採用 Vitallium 製成。
Vitallium is often used in medical and dental work. Vitallium 常用於醫療與牙科工作。

meaning: 極其重要地；充滿活力地
sentences: It is vitally important to sleep enough before an exam. 考試前睡眠充足極其重要。
She responded vitally to the challenge and kept going. 她充滿活力地回應挑戰並繼續前進。

meaning: 活力；重要性
sentences: The vitalness of the issue became clear after the accident. 事故之後，這個問題的重要性變得很明顯。
He admired the vitalness of the young performers. 他欣賞那些年輕表演者的活力。

meaning: 生命體徵，要害
sentences: The nurse checked the patient's vitals, including blood pressure and heart rate. 護理師檢查了病人的生命體徵，包括血壓和心率。
A serious injury to any of the body's vitals can be fatal. 身體任何要害部位的嚴重受傷都可能是致命的。

meaning: 維生素同效物；具有同類維生素活性的化合物
sentences: The chemist identified the compound as a vitamer. 化學家把這種化合物判定為維生素同效物。
Different vitamers can perform the same vitamin role. 不同的維生素同效物可以發揮相同的維生素功能。

meaning: 維生素同效物的；與 vitamers 有關的
sentences: The paper compared several vitameric forms of the nutrient. 論文比較了這種營養素的幾種同效物形式。
Vitameric differences can matter in laboratory studies. 在實驗研究中，同效物差異可能很重要。

meaning: 維他命
sentences: Fresh fruit and vegetables are a great source of essential vitamins. 新鮮水果和蔬菜是必需維生素的重要來源。
Taking a daily vitamin supplement can improve your overall health. 每日攝取維生素補充劑能改善妳的整體健康。

meaning: 含維生素的；維生素性的
sentences: The supplement had a vitaminic flavor and smell. 這種補充品帶有維生素般的味道與氣味。
Vitaminic foods are useful in a balanced diet. 含維生素的食物對均衡飲食很有幫助。

meaning: 使富含維生素；加強維生素
sentences: The company decided to vitaminize the cereal. 公司決定讓這種穀片添加維生素。
You can vitaminize a smoothie with fruit and spinach. 你可以用水果和菠菜讓冰沙更富含維生素。

meaning: 維生素學
sentences: She wrote her thesis on vitaminology and nutrition. 她的論文主題是維生素學與營養。
Vitaminology became an important field in modern health science. 維生素學成為現代健康科學的重要領域。

meaning: 生命之路；生存途徑
sentences: The writer used vitapath to describe a person's course in life. 那位作家用 vitapath 形容一個人的人生道路。
A vitapath can include struggle, growth, and change. 一條生命之路可以包含掙扎、成長與改變。

meaning: 生命力衰弱；與生命狀態有關的病態
sentences: The old journal used vitapathy to describe weakness of life force. 舊期刊用 vitapathy 來描述生命力衰弱。
Doctors in the story treated the patient's vitapathy with rest. 故事中的醫生用休息來治療病人的生命虛弱。

meaning: 早期有聲電影系統；Vitaphone
sentences: The museum displayed an old Vitaphone reel. 博物館展示了一卷古老的 Vitaphone 影片。
Vitaphone helped bring synchronized sound to films. Vitaphone 幫助電影實現同步聲音。

meaning: 早期電影放映機
sentences: The old theater used a vitascope to show films. 那家老戲院曾用 vitascope 放映電影。
A vitascope was an important invention in cinema history. vitascope 是電影史上的重要發明。

meaning: 與早期放映機有關的；如電影般的
sentences: The lecture discussed the vitascopic era of film. 那堂課討論了電影的 vitascopic 時代。
Her vitascopic imagination turned the city into a scene. 她電影般的想像把城市變成了一幕場景。

meaning: 一拃；手張開的長度
sentences: The ancient measure of vitasti was roughly a hand span. 古代的 vitasti 大約是一拃的長度。
The carpenter marked a vitasti before cutting the wood. 木匠在鋸木前先量出一拃的距離。

meaning: 迴避的傾向；避開的性質
sentences: The essay described his vitativeness as a way of avoiding conflict. 那篇文章把他的迴避傾向描述成一種避開衝突的方式。
A strong vitativeness can make decision-making difficult. 強烈的迴避傾向會讓做決定變得困難。

meaning: 卵黃的；與蛋黃有關的
sentences: The scientist studied a vitellarian layer in the egg. 科學家研究雞蛋中的卵黃層。
Vitellarian material can be seen in developing embryos. 發育中的胚胎裡可以看到卵黃相關物質。

meaning: 含卵黃的結構；卵黃器
sentences: The vitellarium supplies yolk material in some species. vitellarium 在某些物種中提供卵黃物質。
Researchers identified the vitellarium under the microscope. 研究人員在顯微鏡下辨認出卵黃器。

meaning: 卵黃的；蛋黃狀的
sentences: The embryo had a vitellary layer around it. 胚胎外圍有一層卵黃狀的結構。
A vitellary substance often appears yellowish. 卵黃性的物質通常呈淡黃色。

meaning: 卵黃膜；包覆卵黃的薄膜
sentences: The vitellicle protects the yolk during development. 卵黃膜在發育過程中保護卵黃。
The student drew the vitellicle on the egg diagram. 學生把卵黃膜畫在蛋的示意圖上。

meaning: 含卵黃的；產生卵黃的
sentences: The vitelliferous cells were easy to spot in the sample. 樣本中很容易看出那些含卵黃的細胞。
Many vitelliferous structures are studied in embryology. 許多含卵黃的結構都在胚胎學中研究。

meaning: 產生卵黃的
sentences: The vitelligenous tissue feeds the growing egg cell. 產生卵黃的組織供應正在成長的卵細胞。
Scientists studied vitelligenous processes in the lab. 科學家在實驗室研究產生卵黃的過程。

meaning: 攜帶卵黃的；富含卵黃的
sentences: The vitelligerous cells appeared near the ovary. 那些攜帶卵黃的細胞出現在卵巢附近。
A vitelligerous layer can support embryo growth. 富含卵黃的層可以支持胚胎成長。

meaning: 卵黃蛋白
sentences: The laboratory isolated vitellin from the egg yolk. 實驗室從蛋黃中分離出卵黃蛋白。
Vitellin is important in the nutrition of the embryo. 卵黃蛋白對胚胎的營養很重要。

meaning: 卵黃的；蛋黃狀的
sentences: The vitelline membrane surrounded the egg yolk. 卵黃膜包圍著蛋黃。
The vitelline color gave the sample a warm yellow tint. 卵黃般的顏色讓樣本呈現溫暖的黃色調。

meaning: 卵黃生成物；卵黃原
sentences: The biologist measured vitellogene in the sample. 生物學家在樣本中測量卵黃原。
Vitellogene is associated with yolk formation. 卵黃原與卵黃形成有關。

meaning: 產生卵黃的
sentences: The vitellogenous tissue was active during egg development. 產生卵黃的組織在卵發育時很活躍。
Researchers traced vitellogenous changes across the season. 研究人員追蹤了整個季節的卵黃生成變化。

meaning: 卵黃樣的；富含卵黃的
sentences: The cells had a vitellose appearance under the microscope. 這些細胞在顯微鏡下呈現卵黃樣外觀。
Vitellose material often looks soft and yellow. 卵黃樣物質通常看起來柔軟而偏黃。

meaning: 卵黃；蛋黃
sentences: The vitellus nourishes the embryo inside the egg. 卵黃為蛋內的胚胎提供營養。
The teacher pointed to the vitellus in the diagram. 老師在圖上指著卵黃。

meaning: 一種礦物名稱
sentences: The museum label identified the crystal as viterbite. 博物館標籤把那塊晶體標成 viterbite。
A rare mineral collector asked about the origin of viterbite. 一位稀有礦物收藏家詢問 viterbite 的來源。

meaning: 斐濟的原名；Viti
sentences: Viti is the native name often associated with Fiji. Viti 是常與斐濟相關的本地名稱。
The guide explained how the word Viti appears in local usage. 那位導遊解釋了 Viti 在當地用法中的出現方式。

meaning: 可使失效的；可被削弱的
sentences: The contract contained a vitiable clause that worried the lawyer. 合約裡有一條可能使其失效的條款，律師很擔心。
A small mistake can make an argument vitiable. 一個小錯誤就可能讓論點失去效力。

meaning: 削弱；使無效；敗壞
sentences: A hidden bias can vitiate the results of a survey. 隱藏的偏見會削弱調查結果的可信度。
The storm did not vitiate their plan to meet. 那場風暴並沒有使他們見面的計畫失效。

meaning: 受損的；被敗壞的
sentences: The contract was vitiated by a hidden mistake. 這份合約因一個隱藏錯誤而失效。
A vitiated process can no longer be trusted. 一個受損的流程已經不再可靠。

meaning: 損害；敗壞；使失效
sentences: The vitiation of the evidence ruined the case. 證據被破壞使整個案件失去作用。
Any vitiation in the formula changes the result. 配方中的任何損害都會改變結果。

meaning: 破壞者；使失效的人或事物
sentences: The report identified the vitiator of the water supply. 報告找出了破壞供水的人或因素。
A single vitiator can damage the whole system. 一個破壞因素就可能毀掉整個系統。

meaning: 葡萄園；藤蔓種植地
sentences: The old viticetum was planted on the hillside. 那座古老的葡萄園種在山坡上。
A viticetum needs good drainage and plenty of sun. 葡萄園需要良好的排水和充足的陽光。

meaning: 藤蔓狀的；枝條細長蔓延的
sentences: The plant had a viticulose growth pattern. 這株植物呈現藤蔓狀的生長方式。
Its viticulose branches wrapped around the fence. 它那藤蔓狀的枝條纏住了圍欄。

meaning: 葡萄栽培的；與種葡萄有關的
sentences: The region has strong viticultural traditions. 這個地區有深厚的葡萄栽培傳統。
Viticultural research focuses on soil, climate, and pruning. 葡萄栽培研究著重於土壤、氣候和修剪。

meaning: 葡萄栽培；葡萄種植業
sentences: Viticulture is an important industry in the valley. 葡萄栽培是山谷裡很重要的產業。
She studied viticulture before joining the winery. 她在加入酒莊前先學習了葡萄栽培。

meaning: 葡萄栽培者
sentences: The viticulturer checked the vines at sunrise. 那位葡萄栽培者在日出時查看葡萄藤。
Every viticulturer watches for pests and disease. 每位葡萄栽培者都要注意病蟲害。

meaning: 葡萄栽培專家；葡萄種植者
sentences: The viticulturist advised the farm on pruning methods. 那位葡萄栽培專家為農場提供修剪建議。
A skilled viticulturist can improve both yield and flavor. 熟練的葡萄栽培者能提升產量和風味。

meaning: 產葡萄藤的；長藤蔓的
sentences: The slope is vitiferous and suitable for vineyards. 這片坡地適合長葡萄藤，也很適合葡萄園。
Vitiferous plants spread quickly across the wall. 會長藤的植物很快就爬滿了牆面。

meaning: 白斑的；像白斑病的
sentences: The doctor noticed a vitiliginous patch on the skin. 醫生注意到皮膚上有一塊白斑樣的區域。
Vitiliginous marks can appear gradually over time. 白斑樣斑痕可能會隨時間慢慢出現。

meaning: 白斑病
sentences: Vitiligo can cause pale patches on the skin. 白斑病會使皮膚出現淺色斑塊。
The clinic offered advice for people with vitiligo. 診所為白斑病患者提供建議。

meaning: 白斑樣病變；像白斑病的狀態
sentences: The article described a vitiligoidea in the specimen. 那篇文章描述標本中出現了白斑樣病變。
A vitiligoidea may look similar to ordinary vitiligo. 白斑樣病變看起來可能和一般白斑病很像。

meaning: 敗壞；有害的性質
sentences: The vitiosity of the air damaged the metal tools. 空氣中的有害性質損壞了金屬工具。
The old text warns against moral vitiosity. 舊文獻警告人們要避免道德上的敗壞。

meaning: 葡萄屬
sentences: The grape belongs to the genus Vitis. 葡萄屬於 Vitis 這個屬。
Botanists grouped several vines under Vitis. 植物學家把幾種藤本植物歸在 Vitis 之下。

meaning: 缺陷；瑕疵；錯誤
sentences: The manuscript had a small vitium in the margin. 那份手稿邊緣有一個小瑕疵。
A vitium in the process may ruin the outcome. 流程中的缺陷可能會毀掉結果。

meaning: 與玻璃化學相關的
sentences: The note referred to a vitochemic reaction in the furnace. 筆記提到爐中出現一種與玻璃化學相關的反應。
Vitochemic studies examine how minerals behave in heat. 玻璃化學研究會探討礦物在高溫下如何反應。

meaning: 與玻璃化學相關的
sentences: The vitochemical process changed the surface of the shard. 這種玻璃化學過程改變了碎片表面。
Researchers recorded the vitochemical effects in detail. 研究人員詳細記錄了這種玻璃化學效應。

meaning: 玻璃窗飾；彩色玻璃作品
sentences: The church restored its old vitrage after the fire. 教堂在火災後修復了古老的彩色玻璃窗飾。
A bright vitrage can change the light in a room. 明亮的玻璃窗飾可以改變室內光線。

meaning: 彩繪玻璃窗；彩色玻璃畫
sentences: The cathedral is famous for its blue vitrail. 那座大教堂以藍色彩繪玻璃窗聞名。
Sunlight through the vitrail painted the floor. 陽光穿過彩繪玻璃窗，把地板染上色彩。

meaning: 裝有彩繪玻璃的；以彩繪玻璃裝飾的
sentences: The vitrailed hall glowed in the afternoon sun. 那個裝有彩繪玻璃的廳堂在午後陽光下閃耀。
They admired the vitrailed windows of the chapel. 他們欣賞小教堂的彩繪玻璃窗。

meaning: 彩繪玻璃藝術家；玻璃彩繪師
sentences: The vitrailist designed the window for the museum. 那位彩繪玻璃藝術家為博物館設計了窗戶。
A skilled vitrailist needs patience and steady hands. 熟練的彩繪玻璃師需要耐心和穩定的雙手。

meaning: 亮煤；玻璃光澤的煤層
sentences: The mine produced a band of vitrain. 那座礦坑產出了一層亮煤。
Vitrain has a shiny surface and breaks cleanly. 亮煤表面有光澤，而且斷口俐落。

meaning: 彩繪玻璃窗；彩色玻璃作品
sentences: The museum displayed several medieval vitraux. 博物館展示了好幾扇中世紀彩繪玻璃窗。
The vitraux filled the hall with red and gold light. 那些彩繪玻璃窗讓大廳充滿紅金色的光。

meaning: 像玻璃的；玻璃質的
sentences: The crystal had a clear vitreal shine. 那顆水晶帶有清澈的玻璃質光澤。
The vitreal surface reflected the lamp well. 那個像玻璃的表面很好地反射了燈光。

meaning: 玻璃的；玻璃質的
sentences: The specimen showed a vitrean luster. 那件標本顯出玻璃質光澤。
A vitrean fragment can be brittle and sharp. 玻璃質碎片可能既脆又鋒利。

meaning: 小型玻璃狀構造；微小玻璃體
sentences: The microscope revealed a tiny vitrella in the sample. 顯微鏡在樣本中顯示出一個微小的玻璃狀構造。
A vitrella may form as the material cools. 材料冷卻時可能形成這種微小玻璃體。

meaning: 玻璃狀礦物；玻璃質物質
sentences: The geologist described the shard as a vitremyte. 地質學家把那塊碎片描述為玻璃狀礦物。
A dark vitremyte can look almost like melted glass. 深色玻璃質物質看起來幾乎像融化的玻璃。

meaning: 牙本質玻璃樣的；與玻璃樣牙本質有關的
sentences: The study examined a vitreodentinal layer in the tooth. 這項研究檢視牙齒中的玻璃樣牙本質層。
Vitreodentinal tissue can be unusually hard. 玻璃樣牙本質組織可能特別堅硬。

meaning: 玻璃樣牙本質
sentences: The fossil had a band of vitreodentine. 那個化石有一條玻璃樣牙本質帶。
Vitreodentine is denser than ordinary dentine. 玻璃樣牙本質比一般牙本質更緻密。

meaning: 玻璃電性的；與玻璃摩擦帶電有關的
sentences: The lecture explained vitreoelectric effects in glass. 那場演講解釋了玻璃中的帶電效應。
A vitreoelectric charge can appear after rubbing glass. 玻璃摩擦後可能產生玻璃電性電荷。

meaning: 玻璃質感；玻璃般的性質
sentences: The stone's vitreosity made it look polished. 那塊石頭的玻璃質感讓它看起來像拋光過。
Artists valued the vitreosity of the surface. 藝術家很看重表面的玻璃般質感。

meaning: 玻璃質的；像玻璃的
sentences: The gem had a vitreous shine. 那顆寶石帶有玻璃質光澤。
A vitreous shell can look smooth and clear. 玻璃質外殼看起來可能光滑而透明。

meaning: 像玻璃的；有玻璃質感的
sentences: The sample had a vitreouslike surface. 那個樣本有一層像玻璃的表面。
Its vitreouslike finish caught the light. 它那像玻璃的表面處理會反光。

meaning: 玻璃般地；晶亮地
sentences: The marble shone vitreously under the lamp. 大理石在燈下晶亮地發光。
The surface reflected the room vitreously. 那個表面玻璃般地反射了整個房間。

meaning: 玻璃質感；晶亮的性質
sentences: The vitreousness of the glaze impressed the judge. 那層釉面的玻璃質感讓評審印象深刻。
Vitreousness often suggests a smooth, shiny finish. 玻璃質感通常表示表面光滑而有光澤。

meaning: 變成玻璃狀的過程
sentences: The cooling lava showed signs of vitrescence. 冷卻中的熔岩顯示出玻璃化的跡象。
Vitrescence can happen when a liquid solidifies quickly. 液體快速凝固時可能出現玻璃化過程。

meaning: 玻璃化；漸變成玻璃狀的過程
sentences: The paper discussed vitrescency in volcanic rock. 那篇論文討論了火山岩的玻璃化現象。
Vitrescency changes the texture of the material. 玻璃化會改變材料的質地。

meaning: 玻璃化的；漸呈玻璃狀的
sentences: The lava turned vitrescent as it cooled. 熔岩冷卻時逐漸變成玻璃狀。
A vitrescent surface can be very smooth. 漸呈玻璃狀的表面可能非常平滑。

meaning: 可玻璃化性
sentences: Researchers measured the vitrescibility of the mixture. 研究人員測量了該混合物的可玻璃化性。
High vitrescibility makes cooling behavior important. 高可玻璃化性使冷卻方式變得很重要。

meaning: 可玻璃化的
sentences: The substance is vitrescible under intense heat. 這種物質在高溫下可玻璃化。
Only vitrescible materials respond this way. 只有可玻璃化的材料才會這樣反應。

meaning: 玻璃；玻璃狀物質
sentences: The alchemist spoke of vitreum in the old text. 那位煉金術士在舊文獻中提到 vitreum。
A thin layer of vitreum covered the shard. 一層薄薄的玻璃狀物質覆在碎片上。

meaning: 玻璃的；與玻璃有關的
sentences: The rock had a vitric texture. 這塊岩石有玻璃質的紋理。
Vitric fragments can be sharp and transparent. 玻璃質碎片可能鋒利而透明。

meaning: 玻璃製品；玻璃材料
sentences: The lab stored the vitrics on a padded shelf. 實驗室把玻璃製品放在有墊襯的架子上。
Old vitrics often need careful cleaning. 舊玻璃製品常常需要小心清潔。

meaning: 玻璃化；變成玻璃狀
sentences: The vitrifaction of the slag made it hard to break. 爐渣玻璃化後變得很難敲碎。
Vitrifaction can happen during rapid cooling. 快速冷卻時可能發生玻璃化。

meaning: 玻璃製作；製玻璃工藝
sentences: The workshop taught vitrifacture to new students. 那間工坊教新學員製作玻璃的工藝。
Ancient vitrifacture required high heat and skill. 古代的玻璃製作需要高溫和技藝。

meaning: 可玻璃化性
sentences: The scientists tested the vitrifiability of each sample. 科學家測試了每個樣本的可玻璃化性。
Greater vitrifiability usually means faster solidification. 更高的可玻璃化性通常表示凝固更快。

meaning: 可玻璃化的
sentences: The clay was not easily vitrifiable. 這種黏土不容易玻璃化。
Only vitrifiable substances behave this way. 只有可玻璃化的物質才會這樣表現。

meaning: 玻璃化；變成玻璃狀
sentences: The vitrification of the slag changed its texture completely. 爐渣的玻璃化徹底改變了它的質地。
Vitrification is important in materials science and geology. 玻璃化在材料科學和地質學中都很重要。

meaning: 玻璃形的；像玻璃的
sentences: The mineral formed a vitriform layer. 那種礦物形成了一層玻璃形的結構。
A vitriform surface may look smooth and glossy. 玻璃形表面看起來可能平滑而有光澤。

meaning: 使玻璃化；使變得像玻璃
sentences: The glaze will vitrify in the kiln. 釉料會在窯裡玻璃化。
High heat can vitrify the surface of the clay. 高溫可以使陶土表面玻璃化。

meaning: 玻璃蝸牛屬
sentences: The specimen was classified in the genus Vitrina. 這個標本被歸類為 Vitrina 屬。
Researchers compared Vitrina shells with other glass snails. 研究人員將 Vitrina 的殼和其他玻璃蝸牛比較。

meaning: 玻璃展示櫃；陳列櫃
sentences: The rare coins were kept in a locked vitrine. 這些稀有硬幣被放在上鎖的玻璃展示櫃裡。
A museum vitrine protects delicate objects from dust. 博物館的陳列櫃可以保護脆弱的文物免於灰塵。

meaning: 玻璃狀的；像玻璃的
sentences: The mineral had a vitrinoid sheen under the lamp. 那種礦物在燈下呈現玻璃狀光澤。
A vitrinoid surface often looks smooth and bright. 玻璃狀的表面通常看起來平滑而明亮。

meaning: 硫酸；尖刻的言語
sentences: The old text referred to vitriol as a powerful acid. 那份舊文獻把 vitriol 稱為一種強酸。
Her speech was full of vitriol and anger. 她的演說充滿尖刻的言詞和怒氣。

meaning: 以硫酸處理；尖刻地攻擊
sentences: The writer did not want to vitriolate his opponent in public. 那位作家不想在公開場合尖刻地攻擊對手。
The old process could vitriolate the metal surface. 舊式製程可能會用硫酸處理金屬表面。

meaning: 硫酸處理；尖刻攻擊的行為
sentences: The report described the vitriolation of the sample. 報告描述了樣本的硫酸處理過程。
His vitriolation of the proposal made the room quiet. 他對提案的尖刻批評讓房間裡安靜下來。

meaning: 尖酸刻薄的；充滿硫酸般侵蝕性的
sentences: The columnist wrote a vitriolic attack on the plan. 那位專欄作家對這項計畫寫下尖酸刻薄的攻擊。
His vitriolic remarks hurt everyone in the room. 他尖銳刻薄的話傷害了房間裡的每個人。

meaning: 玻璃狀的；類似玻璃的
sentences: The shard had a vitrioline sparkle in the sun. 那塊碎片在陽光下有玻璃狀的光澤。
A vitrioline texture suggests a smooth, glass-like finish. 玻璃狀的質地通常表示表面平滑、像玻璃。

meaning: 可被硫酸化的；可被尖刻對待的
sentences: The chemist tested whether the compound was vitriolizable. 化學家測試那種化合物是否可被硫酸化。
The fragile topic felt almost vitriolizable in that debate. 在那場辯論裡，這個脆弱的議題似乎很容易被尖刻對待。

meaning: 硫酸化；以硫酸處理的過程
sentences: Vitriolization changed the chemistry of the surface. 硫酸化改變了表面的化學性質。
The old manual warned against accidental vitriolization. 那本舊手冊提醒要避免意外的硫酸化。

meaning: 用硫酸處理；尖刻地抨擊
sentences: The speaker tried not to vitriolize the other side. 演講者試著不尖刻地抨擊另一方。
Factory workers once used acid to vitriolize the material. 工廠工人過去曾用酸來處理材料。

meaning: 使用硫酸處理的人；尖刻批評者
sentences: The editor refused to become a vitriolizer in the debate. 編輯拒絕在辯論中變成尖刻批評者。
An old factory vitriolizer handled dangerous chemicals by hand. 舊工廠裡的硫酸處理者曾徒手接觸危險化學品。

meaning: 玻璃質岩；玻璃狀岩石
sentences: The geologist identified the dark rock as vitrite. 地質學家把那塊深色岩石辨認為 vitrite。
Some vitrite samples cool so quickly that they stay glassy. 有些 vitrite 樣本冷卻得非常快，因此保持玻璃質。

meaning: 含玻璃質的玄武岩
sentences: The sample was labeled as vitrobasalt in the field notes. 野外筆記把這份樣本標成 vitrobasalt。
Vitrobasalt often forms when lava cools very quickly. 玄武質玻璃岩常在熔岩迅速冷卻時形成。

meaning: 玻璃質斑岩
sentences: The cliff contained layers of vitrophyre and ash. 那座峭壁包含玻璃質斑岩與火山灰層。
A thin slice of vitrophyre was placed under the microscope. 一片薄薄的玻璃質斑岩被放到顯微鏡下。

meaning: 具有玻璃質斑狀結構的
sentences: The rock had a vitrophyric texture and a shiny surface. 那塊岩石具有玻璃質斑狀結構，表面很亮。
A vitrophyric layer may contain both crystals and glass. 玻璃質斑狀層可能同時包含晶體和玻璃質部分。

meaning: 玻璃式樣；玻璃版型
sentences: The museum displayed a rare vitrotype from the old workshop. 博物館展出了一件舊工坊留下的稀有 vitrotype。
He described the sample as a vitrotype with a polished finish. 他把那個樣本描述為帶拋光表面的 vitrotype。

meaning: 玻璃狀的；有玻璃光澤的
sentences: The stone had a vitrous sheen in the light. 這塊石頭在光線下有玻璃狀光澤。
A vitrous surface can feel smooth and hard. 玻璃狀的表面通常摸起來平滑而堅硬。

meaning: 與維特魯威或其理念有關的
sentences: The architect admired the Vitruvian idea of proportion. 那位建築師欣賞維特魯威式的比例理念。
A Vitruvian design values balance, symmetry, and harmony. 維特魯威式設計重視平衡、對稱與和諧。

meaning: 維特魯威主義；維特魯威式的建築理念
sentences: The lecture explained how Vitruvianism shaped Renaissance architecture. 那場演講說明了維特魯威主義如何塑造文藝復興建築。
Vitruvianism emphasizes order, proportion, and beauty. 維特魯威主義強調秩序、比例與美感。

meaning: 帶狀花紋；條紋帶
sentences: The shell had a pale vitta along the edge. 那個殼的邊緣有一條淡色帶紋。
A vitta can help identify species in older descriptions. 舊式描述中，帶紋有助於辨識物種。

meaning: 有條紋的；帶紋的
sentences: The leaf was vittate with a dark central stripe. 那片葉子帶有深色中央條紋。
Many vittate insects use stripes for camouflage. 許多帶紋昆蟲用條紋來偽裝。

meaning: 像小牛的；充滿青春活力的
sentences: The poet used vitular to suggest youthful energy. 詩人用 vitular 來表現青春活力。
Her vitular walk made her seem full of life. 她那帶著小牛般活力的步伐讓她看起來充滿生命力。

meaning: 小牛的；似小牛的
sentences: The ancient author used vituline to mean calf-like. 那位古代作者用 vituline 表示像小牛的。
A vituline face can imply youth and softness. 像小牛的面容可以暗示年輕與柔和。

meaning: 應受責罵的；該譴責的
sentences: The delay was vituperable, but it was not deliberate. 這種拖延是應受責罵的，但並非故意。
He called the behavior vituperable and unacceptable. 他說這種行為該受譴責，而且不可接受。

meaning: 嚴厲責罵；惡言批評
sentences: He did not want to vituperate his coworkers in front of others. 他不想在別人面前嚴厲責罵同事。
The critic chose to vituperate the film rather than praise it. 那位評論家選擇惡言批評這部電影，而不是稱讚它。

meaning: 謾罵，責罵
sentences: The politician was met with a torrent of vituperation from the crowd. 那位政治家遭到了人群一連串的謾罵。
He responded to the criticism without stooping to vituperation. 他對批評做出了回應，但並未墮落到與人謾罵。

meaning: 謾罵的，責罵的
sentences: The critic wrote a vituperative review of the new movie. 影評人為那部新電影寫了一篇謾罵式的評論。
He was shocked by the vituperative language used in the email. 他被電子郵件中使用的謾罵語言嚇到了。

meaning: 責罵地；惡言地
sentences: She spoke vituperatively during the argument. 她在爭論中以責罵的語氣說話。
The article attacked the plan vituperatively and unfairly. 那篇文章以惡言而不公平的方式攻擊這項計畫。

meaning: 責罵者；惡言批評的人
sentences: The moderator tried to stop the vituperator immediately. 主持人試著立刻制止那位責罵者。
No one wanted to become a vituperator in the meeting. 沒有人想在會議上成為一個只會惡言批評的人。

meaning: 責罵的；惡言的
sentences: The tone of the review was vituperatory and harsh. 那篇評論的語氣責罵而尖刻。
He avoided vituperatory language in the final draft. 他在最終稿中避免使用惡言的措辭。

meaning: 愛責罵的；喜歡惡言批評的
sentences: The vituperious editor made every meeting stressful. 那位愛責罵的編輯讓每次會議都很有壓力。
His vituperious style alienated many readers. 他那種愛惡言批評的風格讓很多讀者疏遠。

meaning: 寡婦； widow 的外來語形式
sentences: The old note used viuva as the word for widow. 那份舊筆記用 viuva 來表示寡婦。
She read viuva aloud as part of the language lesson. 她把 viuva 大聲讀出來作為語言課的一部分。

meaning: 萬歲...！ （用於表達讚揚或支持）。
sentences: The word viva is used in English writing and speech. viva 這個字用於英文寫作和演講。
The lesson explained how to use viva in context. 本課程解釋瞭如何在上下文中使用 viva。

meaning: 活潑的；生氣勃勃的
sentences: Her vivacious laugh filled the room. 她活潑的笑聲充滿了整個房間。
