The child was vivacious and full of curiosity. 那個孩子活潑又充滿好奇心。

meaning: 活潑地；生氣勃勃地
sentences: She spoke vivaciously to every guest. 她對每位客人都說得活潑而有精神。
The band played vivaciously all night. 那支樂團整晚都演奏得很有活力。

meaning: 活潑；生氣勃勃
sentences: Her vivaciousness made the class easier to enjoy. 她的活潑讓這堂課更容易讓人喜歡。
The actor's vivaciousness was obvious on stage. 那位演員在舞台上顯得生氣勃勃。

meaning: 活潑，快活
sentences: Her natural vivacity and charm made her popular at every party. 她天生的活潑與魅力讓她在每場派對上都很受歡迎。
The children played with great vivacity in the park. 孩子們在公園裡玩得非常快活。

meaning: 隨軍售貨或照料士兵的女子
sentences: The novel described a vivandiere following the regiment. 那本小說描寫一位隨軍售貨的女子跟著團隊前進。
A vivandiere once carried supplies to soldiers on the march. 隨軍售貨女子過去常在行軍時給士兵送補給。

meaning: 飼養活體動植物的場所；生態箱
sentences: The frogs lived in a warm vivarium near the window. 這些青蛙住在窗邊一個溫暖的生態箱裡。
A vivarium can display plants and animals together. 生態箱可以同時展示植物和動物。

meaning: 飼養活體的地方；生物圈養區
sentences: The old vivary held several rare birds. 那座舊的生物圈養區養著幾隻稀有鳥類。
He built a small vivary for reptiles and insects. 他為爬蟲類和昆蟲建了一個小型飼養區。

meaning: 有活力的；堅韌的
sentences: The plant was described as vivax and hard to kill. 那種植物被描述為有活力而且很難養死。
A vivax species can survive in rough conditions. 堅韌的物種能在惡劣環境中存活。

meaning: 萬歲；長久萬歲
sentences: The crowd shouted vive for the champion. 群眾為冠軍高喊萬歲。
He raised his glass and said, "Vive!" 他舉起酒杯說：「萬歲！」

meaning: Vivek，男性名字
sentences: Vivek introduced himself at the conference. Vivek 在會議上自我介紹。
Her teammate Vivek handled the presentation smoothly. 她的隊友 Vivek 把簡報處理得很順。

meaning: 活潑地；生氣勃勃地
sentences: She moved vively across the stage. 她在舞台上生氣勃勃地移動。
The children answered vively and without hesitation. 孩子們回答得很有活力，而且毫不遲疑。

meaning: 生命力；活力
sentences: The poem celebrates the vivency of spring. 那首詩歌頌春天的生命力。
His vivency returned after weeks of rest. 經過幾週休息後，他的活力恢復了。

meaning: 生物；活物
sentences: The text used viver to mean a living being. 那段文字用 viver 來表示一個活物。
An old manuscript mentioned every viver in the garden. 一份古老手稿提到花園裡的每一個生物。

meaning: 靈貓科
sentences: Civets belong to the family Viverridae. 靈貓屬於靈貓科 Viverridae。
The field guide listed Viverridae among carnivorous mammals. 那本野外指南把 Viverridae 列為食肉哺乳動物之一。

meaning: 靈貓狀的；似靈貓的
sentences: The animal had a viverriform body shape. 那隻動物有靈貓狀的體型。
A viverriform face can suggest a narrow snout. 靈貓狀的臉型常暗示口鼻較窄。

meaning: 靈貓亞科
sentences: The cat-like carnivores were grouped in Viverrinae. 這些像貓的食肉動物被歸入靈貓亞科 Viverrinae。
Scientists revised the placement of Viverrinae over time. 科學家隨時間修正了 Viverrinae 的分類位置。

meaning: 靈貓的；與靈貓有關的
sentences: The viverrine animal moved quietly through the brush. 那隻靈貓類動物安靜地穿過灌木叢。
A viverrine snout is often narrow and pointed. 靈貓類的口鼻部通常細長而尖。

meaning: 食物；口糧；生活補給
sentences: The hikers packed vivers for the long climb. 登山客為了長途攀登準備了口糧。
Old texts sometimes used vivers to mean provisions. 舊文獻有時用 vivers 表示補給品。

meaning: 馬的咽喉腫病；馬瘟類疾病
sentences: The vet treated the horse for vives. 獸醫替那匹馬治療 vives。
Old farming manuals warned about vives in cattle and horses. 舊農業手冊提醒要注意牛馬的 vives。

meaning: 藍鐵礦；一種含水磷酸鐵礦物
sentences: The geologist identified the blue crystal as vivianite. 地質學家把那塊藍色晶體判定為藍鐵礦。
Vivianite can darken when it is exposed to air. 藍鐵礦暴露在空氣中時可能會變深色。

meaning: 活體焚燒；對仍活著的對象進行火刑
sentences: The old text used vivicremation for burning a body while still alive. 舊文本用 vivicremation 指仍活著時被焚燒的情況。
The word vivicremation is rare and unsettling. vivicremation 這個字很罕見，也令人不安。

meaning: 生動
sentences: She gave a very vivid and detailed description of her recent trip. 她對最近的旅行做了非常生動詳細的描述。
I have a very vivid memory of my happy childhood in the country. 我對在鄉下度過的快樂童年有著非常生動的回憶。

meaning: 清晰分解；鮮明的分裂或拆解
sentences: The manuscript described vividialysis as a rare kind of division. 那份手稿把 vividialysis 描述成一種罕見的分裂形式。
No common textbook uses vividialysis today. 現代一般教科書不再使用 vividialysis 這個詞。

meaning: 鮮明擴散；清楚而可見的散布
sentences: The report mentioned vividiffusion as a theoretical spread of color. 報告把 vividiffusion 提到為一種理論上的色彩擴散。
The term vividiffusion is not common in modern writing. vividiffusion 這個詞在現代寫作中並不常見。

meaning: 生動剖析；細緻切分
sentences: Her lecture offered a vividissection of the scene. 她的演講對那個場景做了細緻的剖析。
Vividissection is a rare scholarly word. vividissection 是個罕見的學術詞。

meaning: 鮮明度；生動程度
sentences: The vividity of the painting made the room feel alive. 那幅畫的鮮明感讓整個房間都活了起來。
Writers sometimes use vividity to describe strong color or image. 作家有時用 vividity 來描述強烈的色彩或畫面。

meaning: 生動地；鮮明地
sentences: She vividly remembered the rain on the roof. 她清楚地記得雨打在屋頂上的聲音。
The child vividly described the dream to her mother. 那孩子生動地向母親描述那個夢。

meaning: 鮮明度；生動性
sentences: The vividness of the sunset drew everyone outside. 那場日落的鮮明色彩把所有人都吸引到戶外。
He admired the vividness of her storytelling. 他很欣賞她講故事的生動性。

meaning: 賦予生命的；有活力的
sentences: The poem used vivific images of spring and rain. 那首詩使用了充滿生命力的春天與雨水意象。
The author called music a vivific force in the city. 作者把音樂稱為城市中有活力的力量。

meaning: 使有活力；使生氣
sentences: The coach tried to vivificate the tired team with a short speech. 教練試著用簡短的演說讓疲憊的隊伍重新振作。
A good story can vivificate a dull afternoon. 一個好故事可以讓沉悶的午後變得有生氣。

meaning: 賦予生命；活化
sentences: The writer spoke about the vivification of old myths. 作家談到古老神話如何被重新賦予生命。
Vivification can describe art that makes a subject feel alive. vivification 可以描述讓主題顯得活生生的藝術。

meaning: 賦予活力的；使生機勃勃的
sentences: The vivificative speech lifted the audience's spirits. 那段充滿活力的演講振奮了聽眾。
She used a vivificative tone in the final scene. 她在最後一幕使用了充滿生氣的語氣。

meaning: 賦予生命者；活化劑
sentences: The essay described the river as a vivificator of the valley. 那篇文章把河流形容成山谷的生命賦予者。
Sunlight was treated as the main vivificator in the poem. 詩中把陽光當作主要的生命賦予者。

meaning: 使活躍的人或物；活化者
sentences: The new teacher became a vivifier for the whole class. 新老師成了全班氣氛的帶動者。
Music often acts as a vivifier during long work sessions. 音樂常在長時間工作時扮演提振氣氛的角色。

meaning: 使生動；使活化
sentences: The bright curtains vivified the plain room. 鮮亮的窗簾讓單調的房間活潑起來。
A small joke can vivify a serious conversation. 一個小笑話就能讓嚴肅的談話變得有活力。

meaning: 胎生現象；胎生繁殖的狀態
sentences: The article explained viviparism in certain reptiles. 那篇文章解釋了某些爬行類的胎生現象。
Viviparism helps some species protect their young. 胎生現象有助於某些物種保護幼體。

meaning: 胎生性；胎生的特性
sentences: The professor compared viviparity across different animals. 教授比較了不同動物的胎生性。
Viviparity is common in mammals. 胎生性在哺乳類中很常見。

meaning: 胎生的
sentences: Mammals are viviparous animals. 哺乳類是胎生動物。
The lesson contrasted viviparous species with egg-laying ones. 課程把胎生物種和卵生物種作了對比。

meaning: 胎生地；以胎生方式
sentences: The species was said to reproduce viviparously. 這個物種被說成以胎生方式繁殖。
The note used viviparously to describe the birth process. 筆記用 viviparously 來描述生育過程。

meaning: 胎生性；胎生狀態
sentences: Viviparousness is one trait that biologists compare in animals. 胎生性是生物學家比較動物時的一項特徵。
The report discussed the viviparousness of several fish species. 報告討論了幾種魚類的胎生性。

meaning: 胎生現象；種子先在母體內發芽的現象
sentences: The botanist used vivipary to describe the seed's early sprouting. 植物學家用 vivipary 來描述種子過早發芽的現象。
Vivipary can occur in some plants and animals. vivipary 可出現在某些植物和動物中。

meaning: 活體灌注；對活體進行灌流
sentences: The surgeon used the word viviperfuse in the old note. 外科醫師在舊筆記中用了 viviperfuse 這個字。
Researchers sometimes viviperfuse tissues in experimental studies. 研究人員有時在實驗中對組織進行活體灌注。

meaning: 對活體動物進行解剖
sentences: The laboratory did not vivisect any animals for the class. 那個實驗室沒有為了課程而對任何動物做活體解剖。
The scientist refused to vivisect a living creature. 那位科學家拒絕對活體生物進行解剖。

meaning: 活體解剖
sentences: The debate over vivisection lasted for years. 關於活體解剖的爭論持續了好幾年。
Vivisection is a controversial practice. 活體解剖是一種具爭議的做法。

meaning: 活體解剖的；與活體解剖有關的
sentences: The article discussed vivisectional methods in old research. 那篇文章討論了舊研究中的活體解剖方法。
Vivisectional language appears in some historical texts. 一些歷史文本中會出現活體解剖相關用語。

meaning: 以活體解剖方式；活體解剖地
sentences: The procedure was described vivisectionally in the report. 報告以活體解剖式的方式描述了那項程序。
He spoke vivisectionally about the experiment. 他以活體解剖般的語氣談論那個實驗。

meaning: 活體解剖者；活體解剖支持者
sentences: The vivisectionist defended the old laboratory methods. 那位活體解剖者為舊式實驗室方法辯護。
A vivisectionist and an animal rights activist rarely agree. 活體解剖支持者和動物權利倡議者很少同意。

meaning: 活體解剖的；像活體解剖的
sentences: The author used a vivisective image to shock the reader. 作者用一個活體解剖式的意象來震撼讀者。
The term vivisective is rare outside specialist writing. vivisective 這個字很少出現在專業寫作之外。

meaning: 活體解剖者
sentences: The vivisector recorded every step of the trial. 那位活體解剖者記錄了試驗的每一步。
Critics called him a vivisector because of the harsh experiment. 批評者因那場殘酷實驗而稱他為活體解剖者。

meaning: 活體解剖室；進行活體解剖的場所
sentences: The old vivisectorium was shut down decades ago. 那間舊活體解剖室在幾十年前就關閉了。
A vivisectorium was once listed in the hospital's records. 醫院紀錄中曾列出一間活體解剖室。

meaning: 活埋；把活人埋葬
sentences: The dreadful story mentioned vivisepulture as a punishment. 那個可怕的故事把 vivisepulture 當作一種懲罰。
Vivisepulture is a grim word for live burial. vivisepulture 是表示活埋的可怕字眼。

meaning: 雌狐；刁婦
sentences: A vixen slipped through the bushes near the road. 一隻雌狐從路邊的灌木叢中溜過去。
The novel described her as a clever vixen. 那本小說把她寫成一個聰明但刁鑽的女人。

meaning: 像雌狐的；刁鑽的
sentences: He noticed a vixenish smile on her face. 他注意到她臉上帶著一抹像雌狐般狡黠的微笑。
The critic used vixenish to describe the character's temper. 評論者用 vixenish 來描述角色的脾氣。

meaning: 像雌狐般地；刁鑽地
sentences: She answered vixenishly when the question annoyed her. 當問題惹惱她時，她帶著刁鑽的口氣回答。
He laughed vixenishly at the trick he had planned. 他對自己策畫的把戲狡黠地笑了。

meaning: 刁鑽；潑辣；像雌狐般的性情
sentences: The story hints at her vixenishness but also her loneliness. 故事暗示了她的刁鑽，也提到了她的孤獨。
The actor gave the role just enough vixenishness. 那位演員為這個角色注入了恰到好處的刁鑽感。

meaning: 像雌狐的
sentences: The animal's vixenlike eyes made it look alert and sly. 那動物像雌狐般的眼睛讓它看起來警覺又狡猾。
The poet chose a vixenlike image for the heroine. 詩人替女主角選了一個像雌狐的意象。

meaning: 刁鑽地；潑辣地
sentences: She spoke vixenly when the conversation turned tense. 當談話變得緊繃時，她說話變得刁鑽。
The character laughed vixenly after winning the argument. 那個角色在辯論勝出後狡黠地笑了。

meaning: 面具；偽裝
sentences: He wore a dark vizard at the festival. 他在節慶上戴著一個深色面具。
The villain hid behind a vizard of politeness. 那個反派躲在禮貌的偽裝後面。

meaning: 戴面具的；偽裝的
sentences: The vizarded guests entered the hall quietly. 戴著面具的賓客安靜地進入大廳。
A vizarded figure stood near the doorway. 一個戴面具的身影站在門邊。

meaning: 未戴面具的；未偽裝的
sentences: The vizardless actor took a bow at the end. 那位未戴面具的演員在最後鞠了一躬。
Her vizardless honesty surprised the committee. 她毫不掩飾的坦率讓委員會很驚訝。

meaning: 像面具的；面罩狀的
sentences: The shell had a vizardlike pattern across the front. 那個貝殼前方有像面具般的紋路。
A vizardlike shadow covered part of his face. 一片像面具般的陰影遮住了他半張臉。

meaning: 面具商；賣面具的人
sentences: The vizardmonger lined the stall with painted masks. 那位面具商把攤位排滿彩繪面具。
In the old market, a vizardmonger called out to passersby. 在老市場裡，一名賣面具的人向路人吆喝。

meaning: 維齊爾；宰相級大臣
sentences: The vizier advised the ruler on matters of state. 那位維齊爾在國政上向統治者進言。
The story portrayed the vizier as wise and cautious. 故事把那位宰相級大臣寫得既睿智又謹慎。

meaning: 維齊爾職位；宰相任期
sentences: His vizierate lasted through three difficult years. 他的維齊爾任期持續了好幾個艱難的年頭。
The vizierate shaped the politics of the kingdom. 這個宰相職位塑造了王國的政治。

meaning: 宰相之術；輔政之道
sentences: The memoir praised his viziercraft and patience. 回憶錄稱讚了他的輔政能力與耐心。
Viziercraft in the old court required diplomacy and restraint. 舊朝廷中的輔政之道需要外交手腕與克制。

meaning: 維齊爾的；宰相的
sentences: The vizierial chambers were near the palace gate. 維齊爾的官房靠近宮門。
The document described a vizierial seal on the order. 文件描述了命令上有一枚宰相印章。

meaning: 維齊爾職位；宰相職位
sentences: He accepted the viziership after years of service. 經過多年任職後，他接受了維齊爾職位。
The viziership carried both honor and pressure. 這個宰相職位同時帶來榮耀與壓力。

meaning: 宰相術；輔政技巧
sentences: The young adviser studied vizircraft under an older minister. 年輕顧問向一位資深大臣學習宰相術。
Vizircraft was valued in the royal court. 宮廷中很重視輔政技巧。

meaning: 視覺化的 (修正為 visualizing)
sentences: Try vizrtlg your goals to help you stay motivated. 試著將你的目標視覺化，以幫助你保持動力。
He is vizrtlg the final design of the building in his mind. 他正在腦海中構思（視覺化）建築的最終設計。

meaning: 小提琴 (修正為 viola)
sentences: A vjula is slightly larger than a violin and has a deeper sound. 中提琴比小提琴略大，音色也更深沈。
She plays the vjula in the local community orchestra. 她在當地的社區管弦樂團中拉中提琴。

meaning: 弗拉赫人；巴爾幹地區的一支羅曼語族群
sentences: The article discussed the history of the Vlach people. 文章討論了弗拉赫人的歷史。
A Vlach village kept its traditions for centuries. 一個弗拉赫村莊把傳統保留了好幾個世紀。

meaning: 弗拉基米爾；斯拉夫男性名字
sentences: Vladimir introduced himself before the meeting began. 弗拉基米爾在會議開始前做了自我介紹。
The name Vladimir appears in many Slavic countries. Vladimir 這個名字在許多斯拉夫國家都很常見。

meaning: 一個斯拉夫男性名字
sentences: Vladislav introduced himself at the meeting. Vladislav 在會議上自我介紹。
The coach called Vladislav to the front of the room. 教練叫 Vladislav 到房間前方。

meaning: 南部非洲的低地洼地或季節性乾涸沼地
sentences: The guide pointed to a shallow vlei near the road. 導遊指著路邊一處淺洼地。
After the rain, the vlei filled with water and birds. 雨後，那片洼地積滿了水，也引來了鳥群。

meaning: V 領
sentences: He bought a blue vneck sweater for the casual dinner party. 他買了一件藍色的 V 領毛衣去參加非正式的晚宴。
The shop has a great selection of vneck t-shirts in various colors. 這家店有許多不同顏色的 V 領 T 恤可供選擇。

meaning: 一條小河或溪流
sentences: A narrow voar ran behind the old village. 一條狹窄的小河流經舊村莊後方。
The children skipped stones across the voar. 孩子們在那條小河上丟石子打水漂。

meaning: 可用語言表達的性質；可被說出的能力
sentences: The essay discussed the vocability of emotions in poetry. 那篇文章討論了詩歌中情感的可言說性。
Some experiences resist easy vocability, even for skilled writers. 有些經驗即使對擅長寫作的人來說，也很難輕易被言說。

meaning: 詞語；語詞，尤其是作為語音單位的詞
sentences: The teacher asked the class to repeat each vocable clearly. 老師要全班清楚地跟讀每個詞語。
In the song, each vocable was chosen for its sound. 在那首歌裡，每個詞都因其音韻而被選用。

meaning: 用言語；口頭地
sentences: He answered vocably instead of writing a note. 他以口頭方式回答，而不是寫便條。
The witness described the event vocably in court. 證人在法庭上以口頭方式描述了那起事件。

meaning: 與詞彙或字彙有關的
sentences: The article focused on vocabular differences between dialects. 那篇文章聚焦於方言之間的詞彙差異。
A vocabular choice can change the tone of a sentence. 詞彙的選擇可以改變一句話的語氣。

meaning: 詞彙學者；重視字彙的人
sentences: The vocabularian spent years collecting rare terms. 那位詞彙學者花了好幾年蒐集罕見詞語。
As a vocabularian, she cared deeply about word history. 作為一名詞彙研究者，她非常在意字詞的歷史。

meaning: 配有詞彙的；附有字彙說明的
sentences: The vocabularied handout helped students review the lesson. 那份附有詞彙的講義幫助學生複習課文。
Each vocabularied card included a short example sentence. 每張附詞彙的卡片都包含一個簡短例句。

meaning: 詞彙
sentences: Reading books is a great way to expand your English vocabulary. 讀書是擴展英文詞彙量的一種好方法。
The new students are working hard to learn basic vocabulary. 新學生正努力學習基礎詞彙。

meaning: 說話；表達；詞語的組織
sentences: The old manuscript praised clear vocabulation in public speech. 那份舊手稿稱讚公開演說中的清晰表達。
Good vocabulation can make a lecture easier to follow. 良好的表達可以讓演講更容易理解。

meaning: 編詞典者；詞彙研究者
sentences: The vocabulist compiled a list of regional words. 那位詞彙研究者整理了一份地方用語清單。
As a vocabulist, he loved tracing the origin of terms. 作為詞彙研究者，他喜歡追溯詞語的來源。

meaning: 嗓音的、直言不諱的
sentences: The young singer has a very powerful and unique vocal range. 這位年輕歌手有著非常強大且獨特的音域（嗓音範圍）。
The local residents were very vocal about their opposition to the new project. 當地居民對新專案的反對態度非常直言不諱。

meaning: 元音的；與元音相關的
sentences: The linguist described the sound as strongly vocalic. 那位語言學家把那個音描述得很有元音性。
A vocalic ending often changes how a word is pronounced. 帶元音的詞尾常會影響一個字的發音。

meaning: 一種鍵盤樂器或其商品名稱
sentences: The museum displayed an old vocalion in the corner. 博物館在角落展示了一台老式 vocalion。
He played a tune on the vocalion during the recital. 他在演奏會中用 vocalion 彈了一段曲子。

meaning: 發聲練習；用聲音吟唱
sentences: The singer vocalised for ten minutes before the show. 歌手在演出前做了十分鐘發聲練習。
She likes to vocalise the melody before writing lyrics. 她喜歡先用聲音哼旋律，再寫歌詞。

meaning: 聲音的使用；發聲方式；語音特徵
sentences: The study compared regional vocalism across the country. 這項研究比較了全國各地的語音特徵。
Strong vocalism helps a performer project on stage. 強而有力的發聲能幫助表演者在舞台上傳遞聲音。

meaning: 歌手；一個喜歡唱歌的人。
sentences: lead vocalist 主唱
amateur vocalist 業餘歌手

meaning: 與聲樂或發聲有關的
sentences: The coach gave vocalistic exercises to the choir. 教練為合唱團安排了聲樂練習。
A vocalistic approach can reduce strain on the throat. 聲樂式的練習方式可以減少喉嚨負擔。

meaning: 發聲能力；聲音特質
sentences: The actor's vocality made every line easy to hear. 那位演員的發聲能力讓每句台詞都很清楚。
Teachers often train vocality through daily reading aloud. 老師常透過每天朗讀來訓練發聲能力。

meaning: 發聲；聲音化；語音表現
sentences: The vocalization of the vowel was very clear. 那個元音的發聲非常清楚。
Language learners practiced vocalization every morning. 語言學習者每天早上都練習發音。

meaning: 發聲；把想法說出來
sentences: The child learned to vocalize the new word slowly. 孩子學著慢慢把新單字發出來。
It can help to vocalize your concerns before a meeting. 在會議前先把你的擔憂說出來會有幫助。

meaning: 發聲者；發聲裝置
sentences: Each vocalizer in the choir kept the pitch steady. 合唱團裡每位發聲者都穩住了音高。
The machine acted as a vocalizer for the recording. 那台機器在錄音中扮演了發聲裝置的角色。

meaning: 大聲呼喊的人；呼叫者
sentences: The vocaller called the team to gather near the gate. 那位大聲呼喊的人叫大家在大門附近集合。
A vocaller on the dock announced the departure time. 碼頭上的呼喊者宣布了出發時間。

meaning: 以聲音的方式。
sentences: Passengers complained long and vocally about the timetable changes. 乘客們對時刻表的變更提出了長時間的大聲抱怨。
The team responded vocally to the change. 團隊對這項變更做出了口頭回應。

meaning: 能發聲；聲音的鮮明程度
sentences: The vocalness of the flute surprised the audience. 長笛聲音的鮮明程度讓觀眾很驚訝。
The teacher praised the vocalness of her pronunciation. 老師稱讚她發音的清晰度。

meaning: 召喚；呼喚；以言語發出
sentences: The priest was said to vocate the saints in prayer. 據說那位神父會在祈禱中呼喚聖者。
In the old poem, the singer vocated the distant moon. 在那首舊詩裡，歌者呼喚了遠方的月亮。

meaning: 職業、使命感
sentences: She felt a strong vocation to become a doctor and help people in need. 她感到有一種強烈的使命感（職業召喚）想成為一名醫生並幫助有需要的人。
Teaching is not just a job for her; it is a lifelong vocation and passion. 教學對她來說不僅是一份工作，而是一生的事業（使命）。

meaning: 職業的、職業訓練的
sentences: The college offers various vocational courses, such as carpentry and plumbing. 學院提供多種職業課程，如木工和水管工。
Vocational training can help young people gain practical skills for work. 職業訓練可以幫助年輕人獲得實用的工作技能。

meaning: 職業教育主義；重視職業訓練的理念
sentences: The school adopted vocationalism in its new curriculum. 那所學校在新課程中採用了職業教育主義。
Vocationalism can help students connect study with work. 職業教育主義可以幫助學生把學習和工作連結起來。

meaning: 職業化；使具備職業訓練的過程
sentences: The vocationalization of the program improved job placement. 這個計畫的職業化提高了就業安置率。
Education leaders debated the vocationalization of high school courses. 教育領袖討論高中課程的職業化問題。

meaning: 使職業化；使偏向職業訓練
sentences: The district plans to vocationalize part of the curriculum. 該學區計畫把部分課程職業化。
Some critics fear that schools vocationalize too early. 有些批評者擔心學校太早走向職業化。

meaning: 在職業上；以職業方式
sentences: She was vocationally trained in computer repair. 她接受過電腦維修的職業訓練。
The workshop prepared students vocationally for internships. 這場工作坊在職業技能上為學生的實習做準備。

meaning: 呼格的；用來直接稱呼的
sentences: The vocative case is common in older languages. 呼格在較古老的語言中很常見。
A vocative phrase can sound warm or urgent. 呼格詞組可以聽起來親切，也可以聽起來急切。

meaning: 以呼格方式；直接稱呼地
sentences: He spoke vocatively when he called her name. 他在叫她名字時採用了直接稱呼的方式。
The poem opens vocatively with a personal appeal. 那首詩以直接稱呼的方式開頭，帶有個人呼告。

meaning: 黃樹科；一類熱帶植物科名
sentences: The botanist placed the specimen in Vochysiaceae. 植物學家把這份標本歸入黃樹科。
Trees in Vochysiaceae are mostly found in tropical regions. 黃樹科植物多見於熱帶地區。

meaning: 黃樹科的；與黃樹科相關的
sentences: The leaf texture looked vochysiaceous to the expert. 那片葉子的質地讓專家覺得像黃樹科植物。
Its flowers had a vochysiaceous structure. 它的花具有黃樹科植物的結構特徵。

meaning: 與聲音或語言文化有關的
sentences: The paper explored vocicultural change in urban schools. 那篇論文探討了城市學校中的語音文化變化。
A vocicultural approach values speaking style and accent. 語音文化的觀點重視說話風格與口音。

meaning: 大聲喊叫；喧嚷
sentences: The vociferance from the crowd echoed down the street. 群眾的喧嚷聲在街上回盪。
He answered with surprising vociferance for such a small room. 在那麼小的房間裡，他卻大聲地回應。

meaning: 大聲喊叫的；喧嚷的
sentences: The vociferant fans cheered long after the game ended. 那些喧鬧的球迷在比賽結束後還歡呼了很久。
A vociferant protest filled the square at noon. 中午時分，一場喧鬧的抗議充滿了廣場。

meaning: 大聲喊叫；叫喊
sentences: The coach began to vociferate across the field. 教練開始在場上大聲喊叫。
Do not vociferate in the library. 不要在圖書館裡大聲喧嘩。

meaning: 喊叫；大聲喧嚷
sentences: The vociferation from the hall made it hard to concentrate. 大廳裡的喊叫聲讓人難以專心。
His vociferation carried across the entire courtyard. 他的高聲喊叫傳遍了整個中庭。

meaning: 愛大聲喊叫的；喧嚷的
sentences: The vociferative child answered before anyone finished speaking. 那個愛大聲插話的孩子在別人說完前就回答了。
The report described the crowd as vociferative and restless. 報告把那群人描述為喧鬧且坐立不安。

meaning: 大聲喊叫的人；喧嚷者
sentences: The vociferator at the gate asked everyone to stop. 門口那位大聲喊叫的人要求大家停下來。
He was known as a vociferator during the meetings. 會議中他以愛大聲發言而聞名。

meaning: 大聲喊出；喧嚷地表達
sentences: The protesters vociferized their demands at the square. 抗議者在廣場上大聲喊出訴求。
She tends to vociferize when she is excited. 她興奮時常會大聲說話。

meaning: 大聲喧嚷；喧嘩程度
sentences: The vociferosity of the debate grew by the minute. 那場辯論的喧嚷程度逐漸升高。
The crowd's vociferosity made the street feel tense. 群眾的喧嘩使街道氣氛緊繃。

meaning: 大聲喧嚷的；聲音洪亮的
sentences: The vociferous crowd filled the plaza with noise. 那群喧鬧的人把廣場塞滿了聲音。
She became vociferous when the topic turned political. 當話題轉到政治時，她變得非常高聲。

meaning: 大聲地；喧嚷地
sentences: He vociferously defended his idea in the meeting. 他在會議上大聲為自己的想法辯護。
The fans vociferously supported the home team. 球迷們高聲支持主隊。

meaning: 大聲喧嘩；喧鬧程度
sentences: The vociferousness of the room made it hard to think. 房間裡的喧鬧讓人很難思考。
Some leaders mistake vociferousness for conviction. 有些領導者把大聲喧嚷誤認成堅定信念。

meaning: 使發聲；語音化的過程
sentences: The study examined vocification in young children. 這項研究檢視了幼兒的發聲過程。
Careful vocification helps learners build clear speech. 仔細的發聲訓練有助於學習者建立清楚的口語。

meaning: 與聲帶或發聲運動有關的
sentences: The doctor studied vocimotor control in the patient. 醫生研究了病人的發聲運動控制。
Vocimotor exercises can improve clarity of speech. 發聲運動練習可以提升說話清晰度。

meaning: 與聲音、發聲或語音相關的
sentences: The article described a vocular feature of the dialect. 那篇文章描述了方言中的一種發聲特徵。
A vocular response is often easier to hear than a whisper. 發聲明顯的回應通常比耳語更容易聽見。

meaning: 小聲音；細小的發聲
sentences: The singer ended the phrase with a tiny vocule. 歌手以一個很輕的小聲音結束那句。
A soft vocule came from the next room. 隔壁房間傳來一個輕微的小聲音。

meaning: video on demand 的縮寫；隨選影片
sentences: We watched the concert on Vod last night. 我們昨晚透過 Vod 看了那場演唱會。
The service lets users stream shows as Vod. 這個服務讓使用者以隨選影片的方式收看節目。

meaning: 伏特加
sentences: Vodka is a clear distilled alcoholic beverage originating from Europe. 伏特加是一種起源於歐洲的透明蒸餾酒。
They ordered a round of vodka cocktails at the bar. 他們在酒吧點了一輪伏特加調酒。

meaning: 海灣；小港灣
sentences: The map showed a voe cut into the coastline. 地圖上顯示海岸線有一處海灣。
Boats rested quietly in the voe at dusk. 傍晚時分，船隻靜靜停在那個小港灣裡。

meaning: 腳；步；一個舊式或方言中的腳長單位
sentences: The old text used voet as a measure of length. 那份舊文用 voet 作為長度單位。
He stepped back one voet from the table. 他往後退了一個腳長的距離。

meaning: 荷蘭語中的 feet；也可指與腳有關的詞形
sentences: The glossary explained that voeten is the Dutch word for feet. 詞彙表說明 voeten 是荷蘭語中的 feet。
He recognized voeten as a foreign word in the old note. 他在那份舊筆記裡認出 voeten 是一個外來詞。

meaning: 與荷蘭神學家 Voetius 或其學派有關的人或事物
sentences: The article described him as a Voetian in theology. 那篇文章把他描述為神學上的 Voetian。
A Voetian interpretation shaped the discussion in class. 一種 Voetian 式的解讀形塑了課堂上的討論。

meaning: 罕見用語，指緩慢前進或移動
sentences: The cart seemed to vog through the muddy road. 那輛推車似乎在泥濘路上緩慢前進。
They had to vog uphill because the path was steep. 因為坡道太陡，他們只能慢慢往上走。

meaning: 一種礦物名稱
sentences: The geologist labeled the specimen as vogesite. 地質學家把那塊標本標示為 vogesite。
A small sample of vogesite was stored in the cabinet. 一小份 vogesite 樣本被收在櫃子裡。

meaning: 一種稀有礦物名稱
sentences: The collector bought a polished piece of voglite. 收藏家買了一塊拋光過的 voglite。
Researchers recorded voglite alongside other uncommon minerals. 研究人員把 voglite 與其他稀有礦物一起記錄下來。

meaning: 流行的時尚或風格。
sentences: Miniskirts were the vogue in the '60s. 迷你裙是 60 年代的時尚。
The term vogue refers to the prevailing fashion or style. 時尚一詞指的是流行的時尚或風格。

meaning: 時髦的；追隨潮流的
sentences: Her voguey shoes drew attention in the hallway. 她那雙時髦的鞋子在走廊上很吸睛。
The design looked slightly voguey but still practical. 那個設計看起來有點追潮流，但仍然實用。

meaning: 流行的；時髦的
sentences: The shop sold voguish coats for the winter season. 那家店販售冬季流行大衣。
His voguish style changed every time the trend changed. 他的時髦風格會隨著潮流改變。

meaning: 曼西族；與其語言或族群有關的人或事物
sentences: The book included a chapter on the Vogul people. 那本書有一章介紹 Vogul 族群。
A linguist studied Vogul among other Uralic languages. 一位語言學家把 Vogul 和其他烏拉爾語系語言一起研究。

meaning: 嗓音
sentences: She has a beautiful and powerful voice that everyone loves. 她擁有一副每個人都喜愛的優美且強而有力的嗓音。
I heard a strange voice coming from the room next door. 我聽到隔壁房間傳來一聲怪響。

meaning: 具有特定類型的聲音。
sentences: a shrill- voiced little boy 一個聲音尖銳的小男孩
The report describes the result as voiced. 該報告將結果描述為有聲的。

meaning: 聲音洪亮的；有表達力的
sentences: Her voiceful reading filled the room. 她洪亮的朗讀聲充滿了整個房間。
The singer gave a voiceful performance despite the small stage. 這位歌手雖然舞台不大，仍帶來很有表達力的演出。

meaning: 聲音洪亮；有表達力的狀態
sentences: The voicefulness of the chorus carried to the back row. 合唱團的洪亮聲音傳到了最後一排。
He admired the voicefulness of her public speaking. 他欣賞她公開演講時的表達力。

meaning: 無聲的；失聲的；沒有聲音的
sentences: The crowd fell voiceless when the lights went out. 燈一熄，群眾立刻安靜無聲。
She felt voiceless after the long illness. 經過長期生病後，她覺得自己失聲了。

meaning: 無聲地；失聲地
sentences: He stood voicelessly at the door, waiting. 他無聲地站在門口等著。
The child mouthed the words voicelessly during the recital. 那個孩子在表演時只是無聲地動著嘴唇。

meaning: 無聲；失聲；沉默狀態
sentences: The voicelessness of the hall made the scene eerie. 大廳的寂靜讓場面顯得陰森。
The novel explored the voicelessness of people ignored by power. 那本小說探討了被權力忽視者的沉默處境。

meaning: 微弱的聲音；小聲
sentences: A tiny voicelet came from the back of the room. 房間後方傳來一點微弱的聲音。
She heard a voicelet and turned toward the door. 她聽到一絲小聲，便轉向門口。

meaning: 像聲音的；有聲音特徵的
sentences: The instrument produced a voicelike tone. 那件樂器發出像人聲的音色。
He noticed a voicelike echo in the narrow cave. 他注意到狹窄洞穴裡有一種像人聲的回音。

meaning: 發聲者；表達意見的人
sentences: Every voicer in the panel was given two minutes. 小組裡的每位發言者都有兩分鐘時間。
The reporter acted as a voicer for the neighborhood concerns. 那名記者成了社區訴求的發聲者。

meaning: 發聲；表達；賦予聲音
sentences: His voicing of the complaint was calm and clear. 他把抱怨說得冷靜而清楚。
The choir practiced voicing each note with care. 合唱團練習仔細發出每個音。

meaning: 不包含任何內容；空的;未佔用或已滿。
sentences: Today's youth's brains are sucked void of common sense. 現在的年輕人的大腦已經被吸走了，缺乏常識。
Something described as void is containing nothing; empty; not occupied or filled. 被描述為空的東西是指什麼都沒有；空的;未被佔用或填充。

meaning: 可撤銷的；可使無效的
sentences: The contract was voidable because of the error. 因為那個錯誤，合約是可撤銷的。
The lawyer said the clause was voidable under the law. 律師說那項條款依法可被撤銷。

meaning: 可撤銷性；可使無效的性質
sentences: The case turned on the voidableness of the agreement. 這起案件的關鍵在於協議的可撤銷性。
They discussed the voidableness of the old contract. 他們討論了那份舊合約是否可撤銷。

meaning: 使無效；取消；撤銷
sentences: The voidance of the order was announced in court. 法院宣布那項命令無效。
They sought the voidance of the flawed agreement. 他們尋求撤銷那份有瑕疵的協議。

meaning: 被撤銷的；被宣告無效的；中空的
sentences: The voided ticket could not be used again. 那張被作廢的票不能再使用。
A voided pattern appeared on the shield in the drawing. 圖畫中的盾牌上出現了中空的花紋。

meaning: 被撤銷或被作廢的對象
sentences: The lawyer treated the clause as a voidee in the dispute. 律師在爭議中把那條款視為被作廢的對象。
He noted the voidee of the old permit in the file. 他在檔案裡註記了那張舊許可證已失效。

meaning: 使無效的人或事物
sentences: The court saw the forged document as a voider of the deal. 法院認為那份偽造文件使交易失效。
A voider can cancel a promise when the rule is broken. 當規則被違反時，撤銷者可以取消承諾。

meaning: 使無效；排空；作廢
sentences: The voiding of the agreement happened after the appeal. 上訴之後，協議被撤銷了。
The nurse watched the patient during voiding. 護士在病人排空時留意他的狀況。

meaning: 沒有空隙的；完整的；沒有缺口的
sentences: The voidless wall looked solid and heavy. 那道沒有空隙的牆看起來結實而沉重。
She wanted a voidless cover with no gaps at the edges. 她想要一個邊緣沒有縫隙的完整覆蓋物。

meaning: 空虛地；徒然地；無效地
sentences: He stared voidly at the empty desk. 他空虛地盯著那張空桌子。
The promise was made voidly and never kept. 那個承諾只是徒然地說出口，從未兌現。

meaning: 空無；無效；空洞感
sentences: The voidness of the room made it feel cold. 房間的空蕩讓人覺得很冷。
He described the voidness that followed the loss. 他形容了失去之後那種空洞感。

meaning: 薄紗；輕薄織物
sentences: She chose a white voile for the summer curtains. 她為夏天窗簾選了白色薄紗布料。
The dress was made of soft voile and felt light. 那件洋裝用柔軟薄紗做成，穿起來很輕。

meaning: 小型汽車；輕便車
sentences: The antique voiturette sat in the museum hall. 那輛古董小汽車停放在博物館大廳裡。
He drove a voiturette through the narrow village road. 他開著一輛小型汽車穿過狹窄的村路。

meaning: 東歐地區的總督；軍政首長
sentences: The voivode governed the province from the castle. 那位總督從城堡治理省份。
In the history book, the voivode was a powerful official. 在歷史書裡，voivode 是一位權力很大的官員。

meaning: 總督轄區；由 voivode 管轄的行政區
sentences: The voivodeship covered a large stretch of farmland. 那個總督轄區涵蓋了大片農地。
He studied the old voivodeship system in Eastern Europe. 他研究了東歐古老的總督轄區制度。

meaning: 飛行；短距離飛行；短的快速移動
sentences: The bird made a quick vol across the water. 那隻鳥在水面上方快速飛過。
The dancer finished the sequence with a graceful vol. 舞者以優雅的飛躍完成那段動作。

meaning: 可飛行的；可快速移動的
sentences: The little machine looked almost volable in the wind. 那台小機器在風中看起來幾乎能飛。
The engineer tested whether the device was volable enough. 工程師測試那個裝置是否足夠可飛行。

meaning: 善變的；反覆無常的
sentences: His volage temper made the team uneasy. 他反覆無常的脾氣讓團隊很不安。
The story describes a volage lover who cannot stay faithful. 那個故事描寫一位善變、無法專一的情人。

meaning: 飛魚座；南天星座名
sentences: Volans is a small constellation in the southern sky. Volans 是南天的一個小星座。
The astronomer pointed out Volans on the chart. 天文學家在星圖上指出了 Volans。

meaning: 會飛的；輕捷的；快速移動的
sentences: The volant bird vanished into the trees. 那隻會飛的鳥消失在樹林裡。
She made a volant step across the stage. 她輕捷地跨過舞台。

meaning: 輕捷地；快速地；像飛行一樣地
sentences: The athlete moved volantly down the track. 那位運動員輕捷地沿著跑道前進。
The dancers crossed the stage volantly and in unison. 舞者們一致地、輕快地穿過舞台。

meaning: Volapuk 語，一種人工語言
sentences: The museum displayed a book written in Volapuk. 博物館展示了一本用 Volapuk 寫成的書。
He studied Volapuk as part of his language history project. 他把 Volapuk 當作語言史專題的一部分來研究。

meaning: Volapuk 語的使用者；研究 Volapuk 的人
sentences: The old magazine praised each Volapuker in the society. 那本舊雜誌稱讚社團裡的每位 Volapuk 語使用者。
A dedicated Volapuker explained the grammar to the class. 一位投入的 Volapuk 語使用者向全班講解文法。

meaning: Volapuk 語運動；使用人工語言的傾向
sentences: The lecture traced the rise of Volapukism in Europe. 那場演講追溯了歐洲 Volapuk 運動的興起。
Some writers used Volapukism to mean an artificial language craze. 有些作家把 Volapukism 用來指人工語言熱潮。

meaning: Volapuk 語的支持者或使用者
sentences: The Volapukist wrote letters to promote the language. 那位 Volapuk 語支持者寫信推廣這種語言。
Each Volapukist in the group shared a favorite phrase. 團體裡的每位 Volapuk 語支持者都分享了最喜歡的片語。

meaning: 掌側的；手掌或足底一側的
sentences: The doctor checked the volar side of the wrist. 醫生檢查了手腕的掌側。
A volar scar was visible near his thumb. 他的拇指附近可見一處掌側疤痕。

meaning: 一躍；一飛；快速的移動
sentences: The cat made a volata from the table to the shelf. 貓從桌子一躍跳到架子上。
In the poem, the bird's volata symbolized freedom. 在那首詩裡，鳥的一躍象徵自由。

meaning: 會飛的；輕飄的；快速移動的
sentences: The volatic insect darted across the window. 那隻會飛的昆蟲飛快掠過窗前。
His movements looked volatic and almost unreal. 他的動作看起來輕飄而近乎不真實。

meaning: 指一個人，很快就會生氣或暴力。
sentences: a volatile man 一個反覆無常的人
Something described as volatile is of a person, quick to become angry or violent. 被描述為不穩定的事物是指一個人很快就會變得憤怒或暴力。

meaning: 不穩定地；易變地；揮發性地
sentences: The market moved volatilely after the announcement. 公告發布後，市場劇烈波動。
The chemical evaporated volatilely in the warm room. 那種化學物質在溫暖的房間裡迅速揮發。

meaning: 揮發性；不穩定性；易變性
sentences: The volatileness of the liquid made storage difficult. 那種液體的揮發性讓儲存變得困難。
The report noted the volatileness of public opinion. 報告指出民意的易變性。

meaning: 不穩定的狀態。
sentences: The term volatility refers to the state of being volatile. 波動性一詞是指波動的狀態。
The lesson introduced volatility as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了波動性作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 可揮發的；可變成氣體的
sentences: The compound was volatilizable under heat. 這種化合物受熱後可揮發。
Only volatilizable materials were kept in the sealed container. 只有可揮發的材料被放進密封容器裡。

meaning: 揮發；氣化
sentences: The experiment measured the volatilization of the solvent. 實驗測量了溶劑的揮發情形。
Heat caused rapid volatilization in the sample. 加熱使樣本迅速揮發。

meaning: 使揮發；使氣化
sentences: The burner can volatilize the liquid quickly. 這個燃燒器能迅速使液體揮發。
Engineers tried to volatilize the residue before testing. 工程師在測試前試著讓殘留物揮發。

meaning: 使物質揮發的裝置或物質
sentences: The lab used a volatilizer to prepare the sample. 實驗室用一台揮發裝置來準備樣本。
A small volatilizer sat beside the heating plate. 一個小型揮發裝置放在加熱板旁邊。

meaning: 飛行；飛翔
sentences: The bird's volation carried it over the lake. 那隻鳥的飛行帶著它飛過湖面。
The poem describes the volation of swallows at dusk. 那首詩描寫了黃昏時燕子的飛翔。

meaning: 與飛行有關的；飛翔的
sentences: The researcher studied the bird's volational pattern. 研究人員研究那隻鳥的飛行模式。
A volational movement can save energy during long travel. 飛行中的動作可以在長距離移動時節省體力。

meaning: 沃爾博特石，一種含銅礦物
sentences: The geologist identified the green crystal as volborthite. 地質學家把那塊綠色晶體辨認為沃爾博特石。
A small vein of volborthite was found in the rock sample. 在那塊岩樣中發現了一小條沃爾博特石礦脈。

meaning: 古代高盧的一支凱爾特部族
sentences: The historian discussed the Volcae in a lecture on Gaul. 歷史學家在講高盧時提到了 Volcae。
Archaeological notes linked the Volcae to several regions in southern Gaul. 考古筆記把 Volcae 與高盧南部幾個地區聯繫起來。

meaning: 火山；較舊或罕用的 volcano 變體
sentences: The old map labeled the mountain as a volcan. 舊地圖把那座山標成 volcan。
In the glossary, volcan was treated as an archaic form of volcano. 在詞彙表裡，volcan 被當作 volcano 的古老拼法。

meaning: 古羅馬祭祀火神伏爾甘的節日
sentences: Volcanalia honored Vulcan and the power of fire. Volcanalia 是用來敬奉伏爾甘與火的力量的節日。
The museum exhibit included a note about Volcanalia. 博物館展覽裡附有一段關於 Volcanalia 的說明。

meaning: 火山的；與火山有關的
sentences: The report described the island's volcanian landscape. 報告描述了那座島嶼火山性的地貌。
Volcanian ash can spread far beyond the crater. 火山灰可以擴散到火山口之外很遠的地方。

meaning: 屬於或關於一座或多座火山的。
sentences: volcanic heat 火山熱
volcanic activity 火山活動

meaning: 以火山方式；火山地
sentences: The island was volcanically active for centuries. 這座島嶼在幾個世紀中都呈現火山活動。
The region was volcanically shaped by repeated eruptions. 那個地區被多次噴發以火山方式塑造。

meaning: 火山性；火山活動的特性
sentences: The geologist measured the region's volcanicity. 地質學家測量了該地區的火山性。
Volcanicity can change the shape of an island over time. 火山活動會隨時間改變島嶼的形狀。

meaning: 火山活動；火山作用
sentences: Volcanism shaped much of the island's soil. 火山活動塑造了這座島上大部分的土壤。
The book explains how volcanism builds new land. 那本書解釋了火山作用如何形成新的陸地。

meaning: 火山學家；研究火山的人
sentences: A volcanist monitored the crater every morning. 一位火山學家每天早上監測火山口。
The volcanist warned the village about possible eruptions. 那位火山學家警告村民可能會有噴發。

meaning: 火山岩；火山石
sentences: The specimen was identified as volcanite. 那塊標本被鑑定為火山岩。
Builders once used volcanite for its rough, durable texture. 人們過去會利用火山石堅硬粗糙的質地來施工。

meaning: 火山性；火山狀態
sentences: The article used volcanity to describe the mountain chain. 那篇文章用 volcanity 來描述那條山脈的火山性。
Volcanity increased as the hot vents spread across the field. 熱噴口擴散到地表後，火山性也隨之增加。

meaning: 火山化；受火山作用影響而形成的過程
sentences: The study tracked the volcanization of the surrounding terrain. 研究追蹤了周邊地形的火山化過程。
Volcanization can leave behind hardened lava fields. 火山化過程可能留下硬化的熔岩地形。

meaning: 使受火山作用影響；使火山化
sentences: The eruption began to volcanize the surrounding plain. 那次噴發開始使周圍平原火山化。
Scientists studied how lava could volcanize the coastline. 科學家研究熔岩如何使海岸線火山化。

meaning: 火山
sentences: The active volcano erupted suddenly, sending ash and smoke into the sky. 這座活火山突然噴發，將火山灰和煙霧送入天空。
The small village is located at the foot of an ancient dormant volcano. 這個小村莊坐落在一座古老的休眠火山腳下。

meaning: 火山活動論；火山作用
sentences: The textbook explained volcanoism as a geological force. 教科書把 volcanoism 解釋為一種地質力量。
Volcanoism can transform rock, soil, and landscape. 火山作用可以改變岩石、土壤和地貌。

meaning: 火山學的；與火山學有關的
sentences: The volcanological survey lasted three weeks. 那次火山學調查持續了三週。
A volcanological report can help predict hazards. 火山學報告有助於預測災害。

meaning: 火山學家
sentences: The volcanologist took samples from the crater rim. 那位火山學家從火山口邊緣採樣。
A volcanologist must watch both rock and gas activity. 火山學家必須同時觀察岩石與氣體活動。

meaning: 以火山學方式研究；研究火山
sentences: The team planned to volcanologize the island ridge. 團隊打算用火山學方式研究那座島的山脊。
Researchers volcanologize the area before any new construction. 在新的建設開始前，研究人員先研究那個地區的火山情況。

meaning: 火山學
sentences: She chose volcanology as her graduate specialty. 她把火山學當作研究所專業。
Volcanology helps scientists understand eruptions and lava flow. 火山學幫助科學家理解噴發與熔岩流動。

meaning: 羅馬神話中的火神伏爾甘
sentences: Volcanus was associated with fire and metalworking. Volcanus 與火焰和金屬工藝有關。
The sculpture represented Volcanus with a hammer. 那座雕像把 Volcanus 描繪成拿著鐵鎚的形象。

meaning: 田鼠
sentences: A vole darted through the grass at dusk. 黃昏時，一隻田鼠在草叢裡竄過。
The farmer set traps to keep voles away from the roots. 農夫設置陷阱，避免田鼠啃咬根部。

meaning: 一種罕見的化學物質或醣醇
sentences: The chemist isolated volemitol from the sample. 化學家從樣本中分離出 volemitol。
Volemitol was listed in the old laboratory notes. 舊實驗筆記中列出了 volemitol。

meaning: 意願；自願傾向
sentences: The essay explored the volency behind human choices. 那篇文章探討了人類選擇背後的意願。
Strong volency can help a person act decisively. 強烈的意願能幫助一個人果斷行動。

meaning: 願意的；樂意的
sentences: He was volent to help with the extra work. 他很樂意幫忙做額外工作。
The host was volent and kind to every guest. 那位主人對每位客人都很樂意且親切。

meaning: 心甘情願地；樂意地
sentences: She volently agreed to take the early shift. 她心甘情願地答應了早班。
The volunteers worked volently through the night. 志工們整晚都很樂意地工作。

meaning: 鳥舍；養鳥的圍欄
sentences: The garden included a small volery for songbirds. 花園裡有一座供鳴鳥使用的小鳥舍。
Visitors walked past the volery to hear the birds sing. 訪客走過鳥舍旁邊，聆聽鳥兒歌唱。

meaning: 小翼；小片狀或可翻開的部分
sentences: The design used a small volet to cover the opening. 那個設計用一個小翻片遮住開口。
A volet of fabric folded over the pocket edge. 一小片布料折疊在口袋邊緣上。

meaning: 沃里尼石，一種含鈉銅礦物
sentences: The mineral sample was labeled volhynite. 那份礦物樣本被標記為沃里尼石。
Volhynite is rare and usually appears in small crystals. 沃里尼石很罕見，通常以小晶體出現。

meaning: 以意志達到的存在；意志性的臨在
sentences: The philosopher wrote about volipresence in the essay. 那位哲學家在文章裡談到以意志達到的存在。
Volipresence was treated as a metaphor for mental focus. Volipresence 被當作心智專注的隱喻。

meaning: 以意志呈現的；意志性在場的
sentences: The author used volipresent as a philosophical term. 作者把 volipresent 用作哲學術語。
A volipresent image seemed to appear in his mind. 一個意志性出現的影像似乎浮現在他的腦海中。

meaning: 飛行的；會飛的
sentences: The volitant insects moved quickly over the water. 那些會飛的昆蟲迅速掠過水面。
The poem describes a volitant bird above the trees. 那首詩描寫一隻在樹梢上空飛翔的鳥。

meaning: 飛翔；飛行
sentences: The insects seemed to volitate in bright circles. 那些昆蟲似乎繞著明亮的圓圈飛翔。
The old text used volitate to describe swift flight. 舊文獻用 volitate 來描述迅速的飛行。

meaning: 飛行；飛翔的動作
sentences: The volitation of the moth was hard to follow. 那隻飛蛾的飛行很難追蹤。
The scientist recorded the volitation of each bird. 科學家記錄了每隻鳥的飛行情形。

meaning: 與意志或意願有關的
sentences: The book discussed the volitational basis of action. 那本書討論了行動的意志基礎。
Volitational choice can shape a person's habits. 意志性的選擇可以塑造一個人的習慣。

meaning: 意志性；有意願的性質
sentences: The paper measured the volitiency of a decision. 那篇論文衡量了一個決定的意志性。
Volitiency was described as a central trait of the character. 文中把 volitiency 描述為角色的核心特徵。

meaning: 有意志的；願意的
sentences: The volitient speaker changed plans without hesitation. 那位有意志的演講者毫不猶豫地更改了計畫。
She gave a volitient nod before stepping forward. 她在走上前之前堅定地點了頭。

meaning: 選擇的精神力量或能力；意志。
sentences: Out of all the factors that can influence a person’s decision, none can match the power of his or her own volition. 在所有能夠影響一個人決定的因素中，沒有一個因素能夠與他或她自己的意志的力量相提並論。
The term volition refers to The mental power or ability of choosing; the will. 意誌一詞是指選擇的精神力量或能力；意志。

meaning: 意志的；由意志決定的
sentences: The study focused on volitional control in behavior. 這項研究聚焦於行為中的意志控制。
A volitional act can be different from a reflex. 意志行為可能與反射行為不同。

meaning: 主張意志作用的人；意志論者
sentences: The speaker was a volitionalist who valued will above impulse. 那位講者是重視意志勝於衝動的意志論者。
Volitionalists often argue that choice shapes character. 意志論者常主張選擇塑造人格。

meaning: 意志性；意志作用的特質
sentences: The essay examined the volitionality of human choices. 那篇文章探討了人類選擇的意志性。
Volitionality can be hard to measure in a simple test. 意志性很難用簡單測驗來衡量。

meaning: 出於意志地；自願地
sentences: He volitionally chose to stay and help. 他出於自願選擇留下幫忙。
The decision was made volitionally, not by pressure. 那個決定是自願做出的，不是受壓力。

meaning: 意志的；關於意願的
sentences: The author used a volitionary framework in the paper. 作者在文章中採用了意志性的框架。
A volitionary act differs from an automatic response. 意志性的行為與自動反應不同。

meaning: 憑意志決定；以意志驅動
sentences: The writer tried to volitionate the hero into action. 那位作家試著用意志推動主角採取行動。
To volitionate a choice is to act with deliberate will. 憑意志決定一個選擇，就是帶著明確意願去行動。

meaning: 缺乏意志的；非出於意願的
sentences: He seemed volitionless after the long illness. 長期生病後，他看起來缺乏意志。
A volitionless response can sound flat and empty. 沒有意志的回應聽起來會很平淡空洞。

meaning: 表意志的；與意願相關的
sentences: The grammar note marked the phrase as volitive. 那份文法筆記把這個片語標為表意志的用法。
A volitive mood can express desire or command. 表意志的語氣可以表達願望或命令。

meaning: 飛行的；與翅翼有關的
sentences: The author used volitorial imagery for the birds. 作者為那些鳥使用了與飛行相關的意象。
A volitorial insect can change direction quickly. 會飛的昆蟲可以快速改變方向。

meaning: 民族大遷徙時期；各民族遷徙
sentences: The class studied the Volkerwanderung in Europe. 全班研究了歐洲的民族大遷徙時期。
Historians use Volkerwanderung to describe mass movements of peoples. 歷史學家用 Volkerwanderung 來描述大規模族群遷移。

meaning: 許多東西同時爆發或發射。
sentences: a volley of words 一連串的話
volley of insults 一連串的辱罵

meaning: 排球
sentences: They enjoy playing volleyball on the beach every Saturday morning. 他們每週六早上都喜歡在海灘打排球。
He is a talented volleyball player on the university's team. 他是大學校隊中一位有才華的排球員。

meaning: 接球凌空擊球的人；連續發射者
sentences: The volleyer returned the serve with ease. 那位凌空擊球者輕鬆回擊了發球。
A skilled volleyer can control the point quickly. 技術好的截擊者能迅速掌控這一分。

meaning: 凌空擊球；連續發射
sentences: The volleying at the net lasted only a few seconds. 網前的凌空擊球只持續了幾秒鐘。
The volleying of questions made the interview intense. 一連串的提問讓面試變得很緊張。

meaning: 以連續發射或擊球的方式；輪番地
sentences: The guns fired volleyingly across the field. 槍聲在原野上輪番響起。
They asked questions volleyingly until he answered. 他們輪流發問，直到他回答為止。

meaning: a rural district or township in historical Russia
sentences: The volost was administered by local officials in the old system. 那個 volost 在舊制度下由地方官員管理。
He studied how a volost differed from a modern county. 他研究 volost 與現代郡區有何不同。

meaning: to glide downward without engine power
sentences: The pilot had to volplane toward the field after engine trouble. 引擎出問題後，飛行員只好滑翔降落到田野。
Birds can seem to volplane when they descend smoothly in the wind. 鳥類在風中平穩下降時，看起來就像在滑翔。

meaning: a person who volplanes or glides downward in an aircraft
sentences: The old aviation club praised him as a skilled volplanist. 那個老航空俱樂部把他稱為技術高明的滑翔者。
A careful volplanist knows how to keep the descent smooth. 謹慎的滑翔者知道如何讓下降保持平穩。

meaning: an ancient Italic people who lived in central Italy
sentences: The Volsci are often mentioned in Roman history. Volsci 常出現在羅馬史中。
Archaeologists studied artifacts linked to the Volsci. 考古學家研究了與 Volsci 有關的文物。

meaning: a member of or relating to the Volsci
sentences: The historian described the warrior as a Volscian. 那位歷史學家把那名戰士描述成 Volscian。
She compared Volscian traditions with neighboring cultures. 她比較了 Volscian 傳統與鄰近文化。

meaning: a small surgical forceps or tweezers
sentences: The surgeon reached for a volsella during the procedure. 外科醫師在手術中拿起一把 volsella。
A volsella is useful when delicate tissue must be held steady. 當需要穩住細小組織時，volsella 很有用。

meaning: a small forceps or grasping surgical instrument
sentences: The catalog listed a volsellum among the older instruments. 目錄把 volsellum 列為較舊的器械之一。
He used a volsellum to hold the tissue in place. 他用 volsellum 把組織固定住。

meaning: relating to the Volstead Act or to prohibition policy
sentences: The lecture mentioned Volstead in the history of prohibition. 那場演講談到 Volstead 在禁酒史中的角色。
Many people recognized the name Volstead from law textbooks. 許多人從法律教科書裡認識 Volstead 這個名字。

meaning: support for prohibition or the Volstead Act
sentences: The essay criticized Volsteadism as too rigid for modern society. 那篇文章批評 Volsteadism 對現代社會過於僵硬。
He studied how Volsteadism shaped public debate in the 1920s. 他研究 Volsteadism 如何塑造 1920 年代的公共辯論。

meaning: 突然移動以避免推力；招架。
sentences: The term volt refers to a sudden movement to avoid a thrust; a parry. 伏特一詞指的是為了避免推力而突然移動；招架。
The lesson introduced volt as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了伏特作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: Alessandro Volta or something named after him
sentences: Volta is best known for his work on electricity. Volta 最廣為人知的是他對電學的研究。
The textbook used Volta as a landmark name in physics. 那本教科書把 Volta 當成物理學的重要名字。

meaning: produced by voltaic or galvanic electricity
sentences: The experiment used a voltaelectric effect to power the device. 那個實驗利用 voltaelectric 效應為裝置供電。
The paper described a voltaelectric process in simple terms. 那篇論文用簡單方式描述了 voltaelectric 過程。

meaning: electricity generated by chemical action in a voltaic cell
sentences: The lesson explained how voltaelectricity could be produced in a cell. 課程說明了如何在電池中產生 voltaelectricity。
Early scientists studied voltaelectricity as a new source of power. 早期科學家把 voltaelectricity 當作一種新的能量來源來研究。

meaning: an instrument for measuring voltaic electricity
sentences: The lab kept a voltaelectrometer in the oldest cabinet. 那間實驗室把 voltaelectrometer 放在最老的櫃子裡。
A voltaelectrometer can help compare electrical output in tests. voltaelectrometer 可以幫助比較測試中的電輸出。

meaning: relating to the measurement of voltaic electricity
sentences: The report gave a voltaelectrometric description of the device. 報告提供了該裝置的 voltaelectrometric 描述。
She focused on voltaelectrometric readings during the trial. 她在試驗中專注於 voltaelectrometric 讀值。

meaning: 空間中兩點之間的靜電勢差，尤其是帶電導體和中性導體或大地之間的靜電勢差。
sentences: The voltage between the wires is too low to produce a spark. 電線之間的電壓太低，無法產生火花。
Be careful when opening high-voltage equipment. 打開高壓設備時要小心。

meaning: a method or study involving electric imaging or electric tracing
sentences: The article discussed voltagraphy as an early electrical technique. 那篇文章把 voltagraphy 談成一種早期電學技術。
Researchers compared voltagraphy with other imaging methods. 研究人員將 voltagraphy 與其他成像方法比較。

meaning: relating to electric current produced by chemical action
sentences: The voltaic cell changed chemical energy into electricity. 那個 voltaic 電池把化學能轉成電能。
She read about voltaic reactions in an introductory physics class. 她在入門物理課上讀到了 voltaic 反應。

meaning: relating to Voltaire or his ideas
sentences: The writer was known for a Voltairian wit. 那位作家以 Voltairian 式的機智聞名。
The essay praised the Voltairian spirit of tolerance. 那篇文章讚揚了 Voltairian 式的寬容精神。

meaning: to make or become Voltairian in spirit or style
sentences: He tried to Voltairianize the discussion with sharp humor. 他試著用尖銳幽默讓討論帶上 Voltairian 色彩。
The editor said the text should not be too Voltairianized. 編輯說這段文字不應該被過度 Voltairian 化。

meaning: resembling the style or spirit of Voltaire
sentences: The paragraph had a Voltairish touch of irony. 那段文字帶有一點 Voltairish 的諷刺感。
Her Voltairish comments made the audience laugh. 她那種 Voltairish 式的評論讓聽眾笑了。

meaning: the ideas or style associated with Voltaire
sentences: The lecture examined Voltairism as a literary attitude. 那場演講把 Voltairism 當作文學態度來探討。
His library reflected a strong interest in Voltairism. 他的藏書反映出他對 Voltairism 的濃厚興趣。

meaning: the theory or use of voltaic electricity
sentences: The old manual described voltaism in early experiments. 舊手冊把 voltaism 放在早期實驗中說明。
Students compared voltaism with later electrical theories. 學生們比較了 voltaism 與後來的電學理論。

meaning: a mineral containing iron, sulfates, and other elements
sentences: The geologist identified the dark crystal as voltaite. 地質學家把那塊深色晶體辨認為 voltaite。
Voltaite is a rare mineral that appears in specialized collections. voltaite 是一種常見於專門收藏中的稀有礦物。

meaning: an instrument for measuring electric quantity by electrolysis
sentences: The voltameter measured the amount of current in the circuit. voltameter 測量了電路中的電量。
A voltameter can be used in classic electrochemistry lessons. voltameter 可用於經典的電化學課程。

meaning: relating to the measurement of electric current by voltage or electrolysis
sentences: The paper included a voltametric analysis of the sample. 那篇論文包含對樣本的 voltametric 分析。
She reviewed the voltametric curve before presenting the data. 她在報告資料前先檢查 voltametric 曲線。

meaning: an instrument for measuring voltage or electric potential
sentences: The voltammeter showed a stable reading during the test. 測試期間 voltammeter 顯示出穩定的讀值。
An accurate voltammeter is important in the lab. 精準的 voltammeter 對實驗室很重要。

meaning: a molded or formed product made by electrical or shaping process
sentences: The museum displayed a voltaplast from an early workshop. 博物館展出了一件來自早期工坊的 voltaplast。
He treated the voltaplast as a rare technical curiosity. 他把 voltaplast 當作一件罕見的技術奇物。

meaning: a type or copy produced by an electrical or galvanic process
sentences: The archive labeled the plate as a voltatype. 檔案館把那塊版標示為 voltatype。
A voltatype was once useful for making precise duplicates. voltatype 曾經對製作精確複製品很有用。

meaning: the number of broods or generations per year in insects
sentences: The biologist discussed voltinism in moth populations. 生物學家討論了蛾類族群的 voltinism。
Voltinism helps researchers compare insect life cycles. voltinism 有助於研究人員比較昆蟲的生活週期。

meaning: the state or quality of having electric force or potential
sentences: The article used voltivity to describe the changing field. 那篇文章用 voltivity 來描述變化中的電場。
Researchers measured voltivity under different conditions. 研究人員在不同條件下測量 voltivity。

meaning: to electrify or subject to voltaic action
sentences: The inventor hoped to voltize the new material safely. 發明家希望安全地讓新材料 voltize。
The paper explored how to voltize a thin film. 那篇論文探討如何對薄膜進行 voltize。

meaning: an instrument for measuring electric potential difference
sentences: The voltmeter showed a reading of 12 volts. voltmeter 顯示 12 伏特的讀值。
She checked the battery with a voltmeter before the trip. 她在出發前用 voltmeter 檢查電池。

meaning: a rare mineral species
sentences: The mineral cabinet included a sample of voltzite. 礦物櫃裡有一塊 voltzite 樣本。
Collectors value voltzite for its rarity. 收藏家因 voltzite 稀少而看重它。

meaning: to speak fluently and rapidly
sentences: He could volubilate for hours about old books. 他可以就舊書滔滔不絕地說上好幾個小時。
The speaker began to volubilate once the topic changed. 一換話題，演說者就開始流暢而快速地說個不停。

meaning: the quality of speaking easily and fluently
sentences: Her volubility made the interview lively and fast-paced. 她流暢健談的特質讓訪談變得生動又緊湊。
The essay praised his volubility in public debate. 那篇文章稱讚他在公開辯論中的口才流利。

meaning: speaking or expressed with ease and fluency
sentences: She is voluble when talking about history. 她談到歷史時總是口若懸河。
A voluble guest can keep a dinner conversation moving. 健談的來賓可以讓晚餐談話持續順暢。

meaning: the condition of being voluble or fluent in speech
sentences: His volubleness surprised everyone in the room. 他口才流利的程度讓房間裡每個人都很驚訝。
The teacher noticed her volubleness during presentations. 老師注意到她在報告時說話非常流暢。

meaning: in a fluent, talkative, or easy-speaking manner
sentences: She explained the plan volubly and without hesitation. 她流暢地解釋計畫，毫不遲疑。
He spoke volubly after the meeting ended. 會議結束後，他便侃侃而談。

meaning: birdlike or relating to birds
sentences: The carving had a graceful volucrine shape. 那件雕刻呈現出優雅的鳥形輪廓。
The poet used volucrine images to describe the sky. 那位詩人用 volucrine 意象來描寫天空。

meaning: 體積
sentences: Could you please turn down the volume of the radio? It's too loud. 能請妳調低收音機音量（體積）嗎？太響了。
The library has a vast volume of books on history and art. 圖書館有大量關於歷史和藝術的藏書。

meaning: having volume or bulk
sentences: The volumed clouds filled the evening sky. 那些厚重的雲層占滿了傍晚天空。
She preferred volumed skirts for the stage costume. 她偏好有份量感的裙子作為舞台服裝。

meaning: an instrument for measuring volume
sentences: The lab kept a volumenometer for precise measurements. 實驗室備有一台 volumenometer 以做精密測量。
A volumenometer is useful in certain physical experiments. volumenometer 在某些物理實驗中很有用。

meaning: the measurement of volume
sentences: The paper discussed volumenometry in laboratory work. 那篇論文討論了實驗室工作中的 volumenometry。
Students learned how volumenometry supports accurate analysis. 學生學到 volumenometry 如何支持精確分析。

meaning: an instrument or device for viewing or measuring volume
sentences: The inventor presented a volumescope at the exhibition. 發明家在展覽上展示了一台 volumescope。
Engineers used a volumescope to inspect the container size. 工程師用 volumescope 檢查容器大小。

meaning: an instrument for measuring volume
sentences: The volumeter recorded the shape of the sample. volumeter 記錄了樣本的形狀。
She compared the volumeter readings from two trials. 她比較了兩次試驗的 volumeter 讀數。

meaning: relating to the measurement of volume
sentences: The chemist used volumetric analysis in the lab. 化學家在實驗室裡使用體積分析。
Volumetric data can help compare different containers. volumetric 資料有助於比較不同容器。

meaning: relating to volume measurement or bulk
sentences: The report included volumetrical comparisons of each sample. 報告包含每個樣本的 volumetrical 比較。
She focused on volumetrical change over time. 她專注於隨時間變化的 volumetrical 改變。

meaning: in terms of volume or by volume measurement
sentences: The materials were compared volumetrically before testing. 測試前，這些材料先從體積上做比較。
The formula is used volumetrically in the lab. 這個公式在實驗室裡會以體積方式使用。

meaning: the science or practice of measuring volume
sentences: The class introduced volumetry before the lab exercise. 課程在實驗之前先介紹了 volumetry。
Volumetry is useful in chemistry and engineering. volumetry 在化學與工程中都很有用。

meaning: a small volume or small book volume
sentences: The publisher released the poem as a slim volumette. 出版社把這本詩作以薄薄的 volumette 形式出版。
She bought a volumette to carry in her bag. 她買了一冊小 volumette 方便放在包裡。

meaning: relating to bulk, volume, or mass
sentences: The designer studied the voluminal shape of the chair. 設計師研究了那張椅子的 voluminal 形態。
Voluminal differences can matter in industrial packaging. voluminal 差異在工業包裝中可能很重要。

meaning: the quality of being bulky or voluminous
sentences: The voluminosity of the coat made it look dramatic. 那件外套的厚重感讓它看起來很有戲劇性。
She appreciated the voluminosity of the old curtains. 她喜歡那幾幅舊窗簾的厚實感。

meaning: 屬於或關於一個或多個卷。
sentences: The report describes the result as voluminous. 該報告將結果描述為大量的。
Everyone noticed the voluminous tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的冗長語氣。

meaning: in a very wordy or extensive way
sentences: The speaker answered voluminously, giving many details.
她回答得很冗長，把細節都說得很清楚。

meaning: the quality of being large, bulky, or very wordy
sentences: The voluminousness of the report made it hard to read quickly.
那份報告篇幅很長，讓人很難快速讀完。

meaning: a writer or publisher of multi-volume works
sentences: The volumist spent years preparing the final edition.
那位多卷本作者花了好幾年才完成最後的版本。

meaning: an instrument for measuring volume
sentences: The lab checked the sample with a volumometer.
實驗室用容積計檢查那個樣本。

meaning: relating to the measurement of volume
sentences: The team used a volumometrical method to compare the liquids.
團隊使用與體積測量有關的方法來比較那些液體。

meaning: the measurement of volume
sentences: Volumometry helped the lab compare the size of each sample.
容積測定幫助實驗室比較每個樣本的大小。

meaning: voluntary service or a volunteer group
sentences: The voluntariate organized supplies for the local shelter.
志願服務團體為當地收容所整理了物資。

meaning: by choice or without being forced
sentences: She voluntarily stayed late to help finish the project.
她自願留下來，幫忙把專案完成。

meaning: the state of being voluntary or freely chosen
sentences: The voluntariness of the choice made the agreement fair.
這個選擇是自願的，所以協議看起來更公平。

meaning: a belief or policy that stresses voluntary action or will
sentences: The essay discussed voluntarism as a belief in voluntary action.
那篇文章把 voluntarism 解釋為強調自願行動的理念。

meaning: a person who supports voluntarism
sentences: The voluntarist argued that people should cooperate without force.
那位志願主義者主張人們應該在沒有強迫下合作。

meaning: based on voluntary action or will
sentences: The plan took a voluntaristic approach to community work.
那項計畫採取了強調自發行動的方式來做社區工作。

meaning: the quality of being voluntary; willingness
sentences: The voluntarity of the decision was carefully recorded.
這項決定的自願性被仔細記錄下來。

meaning: 自願的、志願的、義務的
sentences: The company established a voluntary retirement scheme for its employees. 公司為員工建立了一項自願退休計畫。
She does a lot of voluntary work for a local charity organization. 她為當地的慈善機構做了很多志願（義務）工作。

meaning: a philosophy that favors voluntary cooperation over coercion
sentences: Voluntaryism emphasizes cooperation without coercion.
voluntaryism 強調不靠強迫的合作。

meaning: a supporter of voluntaryism
sentences: The voluntaryist preferred community solutions over imposed rules.
那位自願合作主義者偏好社群方案，而不是強加的規則。

meaning: showing intention or willingness
sentences: His voluntative nod showed he was ready to help.
他那個表達意願的點頭，表示已準備好幫忙。

meaning: 志工、志願者、自願
sentences: We need more volunteers to help organize the community festival next month. 我們需要更多志工來幫助組織下個月的社區節慶活動。
She volunteered to stay late and help the team finish the project on time. 她自願留下來加班，幫助團隊準時完成專案。

meaning: the practice or spirit of volunteering
sentences: Volunteerism grew after the city launched a public campaign.
市政府發起宣導後，志願服務風氣逐漸興盛。

meaning: in a willing or volunteer manner
sentences: He volunteerly took the first shift when nobody else could.
當沒有人能接班時，他自願接下第一班。

meaning: the service or position of a volunteer
sentences: Her volunteership at the museum lasted all summer.
她在博物館的志工服務持續了一整個夏天。

meaning: pleasure; delight
sentences: The poet used volupt to describe the sweetness of rest.
那位詩人用 volupt 來描述休息的甜美。

meaning: pleasure-seeking or devoted to luxury
sentences: The hotel offered a voluptary sense of comfort.
那家旅館營造出一種追求享受的舒適感。

meaning: pleasure or delight in Latin
sentences: Voluptas appears in old Latin texts about pleasure.
voluptas 這個字出現在談論快樂的古拉丁文中。

meaning: a person devoted to luxury and sensual pleasure
sentences: The novel portrayed him as a voluptuarian who loved comfort above all.
那本小說把他描寫成一個最愛享樂與舒適的人。

meaning: a person devoted to pleasure and luxury
sentences: He was described as a voluptuary who spent his days in luxury.
他被描述成一個整天沉迷於奢華享樂的人。

meaning: to indulge in luxury or pleasure
sentences: They seemed to voluptuate in the warmth of the spa.
他們似乎沉醉在溫泉的舒適之中。

meaning: the quality of being rich, sensuous, or luxurious
sentences: The room had a voluptuosity that made it feel rich and soft.
那個房間有一種柔媚奢華的氣息，讓人覺得很溫暖。

meaning: 以飽滿、慷慨、愉悅的感覺為特徵或標誌。
sentences: The plentiful blankets and the voluptuous pillows of the bed called out to my tired body. 床上豐富的毛毯和舒適的枕頭呼喚著我疲憊的身體。
The report describes the result as voluptuous. 報告將這一結果描述為令人愉悅的。

meaning: in a sensual or luxurious way
sentences: She smiled voluptuously, enjoying the evening music.
她帶著柔媚而愉悅的笑容，享受著晚上的音樂。

meaning: the quality of being full, rich, and sensually attractive
sentences: The painting captured the voluptuousness of the fabric and light.
那幅畫捕捉到布料與光影的豐富柔美。

meaning: pleasure or indulgence
sentences: The writer linked the character's choices to pure volupty.
作者把角色的選擇和純粹的逸樂連在一起。

meaning: the Old Norse poem of prophecy and myth
sentences: Voluspa is an Old Norse poem of prophecy and myth.
Voluspa 是一首充滿預言與神話的古北歐詩篇。

meaning: a spiral shell or scroll-shaped ornament
sentences: A voluta often refers to a spiral shell or ornament.
voluta 通常指螺旋狀的貝殼或裝飾。

meaning: having a volute or spiral shape
sentences: The architect chose a volutate design for the stair rail.
建築師為樓梯扶手選了一種渦卷狀的設計。

meaning: a turning, winding, or spiral movement
sentences: The volutation of the pattern drew the eye inward.
那個圖案的旋卷感把視線引向中心。

meaning: a spiral scroll or coil; a spiral ornament
sentences: The vase had a carved volute on each side.
那只花瓶兩側都有雕刻出的渦卷。

meaning: shaped with a volute or spiral scroll
sentences: The pillars were topped with voluted capitals.
那些柱子的柱頭帶有渦卷形裝飾。

meaning: a family of sea snails with ornate shells
sentences: Volutidae is a family of sea snails with beautifully shaped shells.
Volutidae 是一個擁有漂亮外殼的海螺科。

meaning: shaped like a volute or spiral
sentences: The pendant had a volutiform curve that looked elegant.
那個吊飾有著優雅的渦卷形曲線。

meaning: a phosphate-rich granule found in some cells
sentences: The bacterium stored volutin in small granules.
那種細菌把 volutin 儲存在小顆粒中。

meaning: a turn, winding, or spiral form
sentences: The rope formed a tight volution around the post.
繩子在柱子周圍繞成一個緊密的旋卷。

meaning: resembling a spiral shell or volute
sentences: The shell had a volutoid outline that narrowed at the tip.
那個貝殼的外形像渦卷一樣，末端逐漸收窄。

meaning: a cup-like membrane at the base of certain fungi
sentences: The mushroom grew from a white volva at its base.
那朵菇從基部白色的菌托裡長出來。

meaning: having or enclosed by a volva
sentences: The egg was protected by a volvate membrane.
那個卵被帶菌托樣的包膜保護著。

meaning: a rotating paper wheel or chart used for calculation
sentences: The student rotated the volvelle to find the correct date.
學生轉動那個旋轉紙盤來找出正確日期。

meaning: rolling, turning, or winding
sentences: The volvent line curled around the center of the page.
那條轉動感很強的線條繞著頁面中心盤旋。

meaning: a family of colonial green algae
sentences: Volvocaceae includes several colonial green algae.
Volvocaceae 包含數種群體性綠藻。

meaning: belonging to the Volvocaceae family
sentences: The microscope slide showed a volvocaceous sample.
顯微鏡玻片上顯示的是屬於綠球藻科的樣本。

meaning: a twisting of the intestine that causes obstruction
sentences: The patient was treated quickly for a volvulus.
那位病人因腸扭轉而被迅速治療。

meaning: the plow-shaped bone forming part of the nasal septum
sentences: The vomer forms part of the nasal septum.
犁骨構成了鼻中隔的一部分。

meaning: relating to the vomer bone
sentences: The vomerine ridge was visible in the diagram.
圖中可以看到犁骨的脊線。

meaning: relating to the vomer and the basilar part of the skull
sentences: The surgeon described the vomerobasilar area in the skull diagram.
外科醫師在顱骨圖中描述了犁骨與顱底相關的區域。

meaning: 與犁鼻器有關的
sentences: The biologist examined the vomeronasal organ in the animal. 生物學家檢查了那隻動物的犁鼻器。
The vomeronasal response helps some animals detect chemical signals. 犁鼻器反應能幫助某些動物偵測化學訊號。

meaning: 與犁骨和腭骨有關的
sentences: She traced the vomeropalatine seam on the skull. 她沿著頭骨上的犁腭接縫畫線。
The surgeon described the vomeropalatine region during the exam. 外科醫生在檢查時描述了犁腭區域。

meaning: 膿腔；組織中形成的空洞
sentences: The surgeon drained the vomica carefully. 外科醫生小心地引流那個膿腔。
A large vomica can form when tissue breaks down and fills with pus. 當組織壞死並充滿膿液時，可能形成較大的膿腔。

meaning: 士的寧屬植物中分離出的生物鹼
sentences: Researchers isolated vomicine from the plant extract. 研究人員從植物萃取物中分離出 vomicine。
The chemist mentioned vomicine while discussing alkaloids. 化學家在討論生物鹼時提到了 vomicine。

meaning: 嘔吐
sentences: She felt very nauseous and thought she was going to vomit after the long trip. 長途旅行後她感到非常噁心，覺得自己快要嘔吐了。
The small child vomited several times after eating some spoiled food. 那個小孩在吃了一些變質食物後嘔吐了幾次。

meaning: 會引起嘔吐的；可被吐出的
sentences: The medicine had a vomitable taste and made him gag. 那種藥有會催吐的味道，讓他乾嘔。
The smell was so vomitable that everyone stepped back. 那氣味太令人作嘔了，大家都往後退。

meaning: 嘔吐的人
sentences: The tired vomiter asked for a glass of water. 那個反胃嘔吐的人要了一杯水。
The nurse helped the vomiter sit up slowly. 護士幫那位嘔吐的人慢慢坐起來。

meaning: 嘔吐；吐出胃內容物的動作
sentences: He suffered vomiting after the long ride. 他長途乘車後出現嘔吐。
Vomiting can be a sign of illness or food poisoning. 嘔吐可能是生病或食物中毒的徵兆。

meaning: 作嘔地；帶著想吐的樣子
sentences: She answered vomitingly when the fever made her weak. 她發燒虛弱時，說起話來都帶著作嘔感。
The child moved vomitingly toward the sink after dinner. 那孩子晚飯後作嘔般地走向水槽。

meaning: 嘔吐；嘔吐發作
sentences: The doctor noted a brief episode of vomition. 醫生記錄了一次短暫的嘔吐發作。
Vomition was mentioned in the old medical notes. 舊醫療筆記中提到了嘔吐發作。

meaning: 催吐的；引起嘔吐的
sentences: The vomitive mixture was used to clear the stomach. 這種催吐混合物是用來清空胃部的。
The label warned that the syrup had a vomitive effect. 標籤警告說這種糖漿有催吐效果。

meaning: 令人作嘔的性質；催吐性
sentences: Her vomitiveness made the room hard to stay in. 她那種令人作嘔的感覺讓房間很難待下去。
The vomitiveness of the smell was hard to ignore. 那股味道的噁心程度很難忽視。

meaning: 嘔吐；吐出來的東西
sentences: The old text used vomito for violent vomiting. 舊文獻用 vomito 指劇烈的嘔吐。
The nurse cleaned the vomito from the floor quickly. 護士很快把地板上的嘔吐物清理乾淨。

meaning: 劇院或體育場的出入口通道
sentences: The theater exit was a vomitory that emptied the crowd quickly. 劇院的出口通道讓人群很快散開。
Fans rushed through the vomitory after the match. 比賽結束後，球迷湧過那條出入口通道。

meaning: 嘔吐物；嘔吐行為
sentences: The vomiture stained the floor after the accident. 事故之後，嘔吐物弄髒了地板。
He tried to clean the vomiture before anyone noticed. 他試著在別人發現前把嘔吐物清理掉。

meaning: 嘔吐；吐出來的動作
sentences: The doctor used the term vomiturition in the old report. 醫生在舊報告中使用了 vomiturition 這個術語。
Vomiturition was a rare word in the medical archive. vomiturition 在醫學檔案裡是一個很少見的字。

meaning: 嘔吐物；從胃中吐出的內容物
sentences: The sample contained vomitus from the stomach. 樣本中含有胃裡吐出的內容物。
The clinician documented the color of the vomitus carefully. 臨床醫師仔細記錄了嘔吐物的顏色。

meaning: 一種具催吐性的植物舊稱
sentences: Vomitwort was once listed as an emetic plant name. vomitwort 曾被列為一種催吐植物的名稱。
The herbal guide described vomitwort as an old folk term. 那本草本指南把 vomitwort 描述為一個古老民間用語。

meaning: 冷僻的專名或舊稱
sentences: The archive listed Vondsira as an obscure proper name. 檔案把 Vondsira 列為一個冷僻的專名。
Vondsira appeared only once in the old index. Vondsira 只在舊索引中出現過一次。

meaning: 一種稀有礦物
sentences: The collector labeled the stone vonsenite in the cabinet. 收藏家把櫃中的石頭標記為 vonsenite。
A thin slice of vonsenite was placed beside the other minerals. 一小片 vonsenite 被放在其他礦物旁邊。

meaning: 任何一種神奇的或非理性的解決問題的方法。
sentences: I want a real explanation, not this statistical voodoo. 我想要一個真正的解釋，而不是這種統計巫術。
The term voodoo refers to any sort of magical or irrational approach to a problem. 伏都教一詞指的是任何一種解決問題的神奇或非理性的方法。

meaning: 伏都教的信仰或做法
sentences: The article explained voodooism as a set of voodoo beliefs and practices. 那篇文章把 voodooism 解釋成一套伏都信仰與儀式。
Some people misunderstood voodooism because of old stories. 有些人因為舊故事而誤解了 voodooism。

meaning: 伏都教信徒；伏都教實踐者
sentences: A voodooist led the ritual with drums and chants. 一名伏都教信徒用鼓聲和吟唱主持儀式。
The voodooist explained the tradition to the visitors. 那位伏都教信徒向訪客解釋了傳統。

meaning: 與伏都教有關的；帶有伏都色彩的
sentences: The movie used voodooistic imagery to create mystery. 電影用帶有伏都色彩的意象營造神祕感。
The decoration had a voodooistic feel that some people liked. 那些裝飾帶有伏都風格，有些人很喜歡。

meaning: 貪吃的；貪得無厭的
sentences: The voracious dog finished the meal in seconds. 那隻貪吃的狗幾秒鐘就把食物吃完了。
She was a voracious reader who loved thick novels. 她是個如饑似渴的讀者，特別喜歡厚小說。

meaning: 貪婪地；如饑似渴地
sentences: She read voraciously through the whole vacation. 她整個假期都在如饑似渴地閱讀。
The audience voraciously asked for more details. 觀眾貪婪地要求更多細節。

meaning: 貪吃；貪得無厭的性質
sentences: His voraciousness surprised everyone at the table. 他那種貪得無厭的胃口讓桌上每個人都很驚訝。
The voraciousness of the questions kept the meeting going. 那些問題的追問程度讓會議一直繼續下去。

meaning: 強烈的食慾；貪婪
sentences: The voracity of the crowd emptied the buffet quickly. 人群的貪吃很快就把自助餐掃空。
He showed voracity for knowledge and kept reading. 他展現出對知識的強烈渴求，持續閱讀。

meaning: 有旋渦的；湍急翻騰的
sentences: The river became voraginous after the storm. 暴風雨過後，那條河變得旋渦湍急。
The sea looked voraginous near the rocks. 海面在岩石附近看起來湍急翻騰。

meaning: 旋渦；深淵
sentences: The ship was swallowed by a vorago in the myth. 神話裡，那艘船被一個深淵旋渦吞沒。
The whirlpool acted like a vorago and pulled the raft down. 那個旋渦像深淵一樣把木筏往下拉。

meaning: 貪食的；吞噬的
sentences: The vorant creature devoured everything in sight. 那隻貪食的生物把眼前的一切都吞了下去。
The vorant appetite made the scene almost comic. 那種吞噬般的食慾讓場面幾乎有點滑稽。

meaning: 正手擊球；正手
sentences: He hit a powerful vorhand down the line. 他用正手沿邊線打出一記強勁球。
The coach asked her to improve the vorhand before the match. 教練要求她在比賽前加強正手擊球。

meaning: 先行者；探路的人
sentences: The army sent a vorlooper ahead to scout the road. 軍隊派出先行者到前方探路。
A vorlooper walked in front to warn the group of danger. 一名先行者走在前面提醒隊伍注意危險。

meaning: 冷僻的專名或舊稱
sentences: The old register listed Vorondreo as a rare name. 舊名冊把 Vorondreo 列成一個罕見名字。
Vorondreo appeared once in the historical record. Vorondreo 只在歷史紀錄中出現過一次。

meaning: 鋒利致命的；神話式的利刃
sentences: The hero carried a vorpal blade in the tale. 故事中的英雄拿著一把鋒利致命的劍。
The novel described the monster's vorpal teeth. 小說描寫那怪物有鋒利致命的牙齒。

meaning: 版本 (修正為 version)
sentences: Make sure you are using the latest vorslo of the software. 確保您使用的是軟體的最新版本。
He gave a different vorslo of what happened that night. 他對那天晚上發生的事情給出了不同的說法（版本）。

meaning: 旋風、漩渦或類似的螺旋或柱狀運動物質。
sentences: The term vortex refers to a whirlwind, whirlpool, or similarly moving matter in the form of a spiral or column. 術語「渦旋」是指旋風、漩渦或類似的螺旋或柱狀運動物質。
The lesson introduced vortex as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了渦旋這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 旋渦狀的；繞圈的
sentences: The vortical swirl near the drain grew stronger. 排水口附近的旋渦越來越強。
The smoke formed a vortical pattern above the fire. 煙在火上方形成了旋渦狀的圖樣。

meaning: 以旋渦狀地；繞圈地
sentences: The leaves moved vortically in the wind. 樹葉在風中呈旋渦狀地轉動。
The dust rose vortically from the broken fan. 灰塵從壞掉的風扇旁以旋渦狀升起。

meaning: 小漩渦；旋轉的小渦流
sentences: A tiny vorticel formed in the spinning stream. 旋轉的水流中形成了一個小漩渦。
The scientist pointed to the vorticel on the screen. 科學家指著螢幕上的小漩渦。

meaning: 鐘形蟲屬；一種具柄纖毛原生生物
sentences: The biologist studied a Vorticella under the microscope. 生物學家在顯微鏡下研究一隻鐘形蟲。
Vorticella can attach itself to tiny particles in water. Vorticella 能附著在水中的微小顆粒上。

meaning: 鐘形蟲科原生生物
sentences: The slide contained a vorticellid attached to debris. 載玻片上有一隻附著在碎屑上的鐘形蟲科原生生物。
A vorticellid often appears as a stalked ciliate. 鐘形蟲科原生生物常常看起來像具柄的纖毛蟲。

meaning: 鐘形蟲科；一類具柄纖毛原生生物
sentences: Vorticellidae includes many stalked ciliate protozoans. Vorticellidae 包含許多具柄的纖毛原生生物。
The class notes listed Vorticellidae as an important family. 課堂筆記把 Vorticellidae 列為重要的科。

meaning: vortex 的複數；旋渦
sentences: The boat drifted into the vortices behind the rocks. 小船漂進岩石後方的幾個漩渦。
The scientist mapped the vortices in the fluid flow. 科學家繪出了流體中的多個漩渦。

meaning: 旋渦的；與漩渦有關的
sentences: The vorticial motion was easy to spot in the water. 水中的旋渦狀運動很容易看出來。
The vorticial pattern on the surface kept changing. 表面的旋渦圖樣一直在變化。

meaning: 旋渦形的；漩渦狀的
sentences: The cloud took a vorticiform shape above the sea. 雲在海面上呈現旋渦狀的外形。
The artist painted a vorticiform swirl of blue and gray. 藝術家畫出藍灰色的旋渦形圖案。

meaning: 漩渦主義；一種強調動勢的現代藝術運動
sentences: The exhibit explained Vorticism as a modern art movement. 展覽把 Vorticism 解釋為一場現代藝術運動。
The lecture connected Vorticism with energy and abstraction. 講座把 Vorticism 和能量、抽象表現連在一起。

meaning: 漩渦主義者；Vorticism 的支持者或藝術家
sentences: He was known as a bold Vorticist painter. 他以大膽的漩渦主義畫家聞名。
Each Vorticist in the group used sharp shapes and motion. 團體裡每位漩渦主義者都使用銳利的形狀與動勢。

meaning: 旋轉度；流體的旋渦運動
sentences: The engineer measured the fluid's vorticity. 工程師測量了流體的旋轉度。
The report showed how vorticity changed near the edge. 報告說明了邊緣附近的旋轉度如何變化。

meaning: 旋渦狀的；多漩渦的
sentences: The stream became vorticose after the rocks narrowed it. 河道被岩石收窄後，水流變得旋渦狀。
The painting showed a vorticose pattern in the sky. 那幅畫在天空中呈現旋渦狀的圖案。

meaning: 以旋渦狀地；旋轉地
sentences: Dust rose vorticosely around the broken fan. 破掉的風扇周圍，灰塵呈旋渦狀升起。
The water moved vorticosely through the narrow channel. 水流在狹窄的水道中以旋渦狀前進。

meaning: 與小漩渦有關的；呈旋渦狀的
sentences: The vorticular currents pushed the boat sideways. 那些旋渦狀水流把船推向側邊。
The scientist described the vorticular flow in the tube. 科學家描述了管內的旋渦狀流動。

meaning: 以旋渦狀地；以漩渦方式
sentences: Smoke rose vorticularly from the chimney. 煙從煙囪中以旋渦般的方式升起。
The paint spread vorticularly across the surface. 顏料以旋渦狀在表面擴散開來。

meaning: 旋暈的；頭暈目眩的
sentences: After the fall, he felt vortiginous and dizzy. 跌倒後，他感到旋暈又頭暈。
The vortiginous feeling passed after he sat down. 他坐下後，那種頭暈目眩的感覺就過去了。

meaning: the Roman god of changing seasons and gardens
sentences: Vortumnus was honored in Roman stories as a god of the seasons.
在羅馬傳說中，Vortumnus 是掌管四季變化的神。

meaning: relating to the Vosges region or mountains in eastern France
sentences: The guide described the Vosgian hills as quiet and forested.
導遊形容這些屬於 Vosgian 地區的丘陵安靜又多林。

meaning: formal vows, promises, or wishes
sentences: The old manuscript listed several vota from the ceremony.
那份古老手稿列出了儀式中的幾個誓願。

meaning: able or suitable to be voted on
sentences: The committee decided the proposal was votable after revision.
委員會認為這個提案修改後可以付諸表決。

meaning: relating to a vow or vow-making

那首詩用一種近似誓願的語氣，顯得莊嚴而神聖。

meaning: in a vowed, solemn, or vow-related manner
sentences: She spoke votally, as if she were making a promise.
她以一種近乎立誓的方式說話，好像正在許下承諾。

meaning: a woman who makes vows or is devoted to a cause
sentences: The novel presents her as a votaress devoted to the temple.
那本小說把她寫成一位獻身於神殿的女誓願者。

meaning: a person devoted by vow or promise

那位僧人被描述成一個嚴守誓約的人。

meaning: a devoted follower or adherent

他是古典音樂的忠實追隨者，幾乎每場音樂會都參加。

meaning: the act of voting or casting votes
sentences: The votation began after the debate ended.
辯論結束後就開始進行投票。

meaning: 投票
sentences: Every citizen has the right to vote in a democratic election. 每一位公民都有權在民主選舉中投票。
The board of directors will vote on the new proposal tomorrow. 董事會將在明天對新提案進行投票。

meaning: a ballot or expression of choice

在勢均力敵的選舉裡，每一票都很重要。

meaning: a person who is eligible to vote

書記在發票前先核對每一位具投票資格的人。

meaning: lacking the right or power to vote
sentences: The voteless residents asked for fair representation.
沒有投票權的居民要求得到公平的代表權。

meaning: 選民
sentences: The candidates are trying to attract more young voters lately. 候選人們最近正試圖吸引更多的年輕選民。
Every eligible voter has the right to participate in election. 每位合資格的選民都有權參加選舉。

meaning: 持有者擁有作為企業所有者投票的相關權利。
sentences: The cumulative voting preferred stock remains voting until all cumulative dividends are paid. 累積 投票權 優先股仍維持 投票權 ，直至支付所有累積股利。 累積投票權優先股仍維持投票權，直到支付所有累積股利。 累積投票權優先股仍維持投票權，約定支付所有累積股利。
The report describes the result as voting. 報告將結果描述為投票。 報告將結果描述為投票。 報告將結果描述為投票。

meaning: relating to vows or votive offerings
sentences: The altar had a Votish inscription carved into the stone.
祭壇石面上刻著與誓願相關的銘文。

meaning: dedicated or offered in fulfillment of a vow

教堂在雕像旁放了一支小小的祈願蠟燭。

meaning: in a votive or vowed manner
sentences: The lamp was placed votively beside the altar.
那盞燈是以祈願供奉的方式放在祭壇旁。

meaning: the quality of being votive or devoted
sentences: The essay discussed the votiveness of ancient offerings.
那篇文章討論了古代供物所帶有的誓願性。

meaning: an instrument for recording votes
sentences: The meeting used a votometer to tally each choice quickly.
會議用投票計數器快速統計每一項選擇。

meaning: a female votary or devotee
sentences: The old text called her a votress of the shrine.
那本古書把她稱為神殿的女信奉者。

meaning: an older name for the Udmurt people or their language
sentences: The historian used Votyak as an older ethnonym in the article.
那位歷史學家在文章中用 Votyak 作為舊稱族名。

meaning: 後面常跟for。作證或作證；擔保或贊助。
sentences: I can vouch that he wasn’t at the scene of the crime. 我可以保證他不在犯罪現場。
People often vouch when the situation calls for it. 人們經常在情況需要時提供擔保。

meaning: able to be vouched for or verified
sentences: The witness said the account was vouchable by the records.
證人說這份說法可以由紀錄查證。

meaning: a person vouched for or defended by another
sentences: The vouchee was protected by a stronger ally in court.
那名被擔保的人在法庭上受到更強勢盟友的保護。

meaning: 代金券
sentences: The store gave her a ten-dollar voucher as a reward for her loyalty. 商店送給她一張十美元的代金券作為忠誠度獎勵。
Please present your gift voucher at the checkout to receive your discount. 請在結帳時出示您的禮券（代金券）以獲得折扣。

meaning: a woman who provides a voucher or guarantee

那位提供保證的女士簽了表格以確認安排。

meaning: an act of vouching or guaranteeing

他對那位客人的擔保讓爭議很快平息。

meaning: the act of vouchsafing something

meaning: a medieval pole weapon with a curved blade

博物館展示了一把中世紀的長柄鉤刃武器。

meaning: a commune and wine village in Burgundy, France
sentences: Vougeot is known for its famous red wines.
Vougeot 以著名的紅酒聞名。

meaning: the parliament of Greece
sentences: The Vouli met to debate the new policy.
希臘國會為了新政策而開會辯論。

meaning: a wedge-shaped stone or block forming part of an arch

每一塊拱楔石都支撐著門上的拱形結構。

meaning: 發誓、誓言
sentences: They vowed to love and support each other through thick and thin. 他們發誓無論貧富貴賤都會彼此相愛、互相支持。

meaning: promised solemnly or declared by vow

她發誓要在午夜前完成工作。

meaning: 母音
sentences: The word 'apple' begins with a vowel, so we use 'an' before it. 「apple」這個單字以母音開頭，所以我們在它前面用「an」。
English has five primary vowel letters: A, E, I, O, and U. 英語有五個主要母音字母：A、E、I、O 和 U。

meaning: having a vowel-like quality
sentences: His pronunciation sounded slightly vowelish to the teacher.
老師覺得他的發音有點像母音化。

meaning: the use or dominance of vowel sounds

那位語言學家在方言研究中討論了母音化現象。

meaning: a person who studies or favors vowels

那位研究母音的人記錄了每一次發音變化。

meaning: the process of adding or emphasizing vowels

meaning: to add vowels to a word or text

老師要學生替那些借用詞加上母音。

meaning: lacking vowels

那道謎題把詞組寫成沒有母音的形式。

meaning: the state of lacking vowels
sentences: The vowellessness of the note made it hard to read.
那張便條沒有母音，讓人很難辨認。

meaning: resembling a vowel
sentences: The singer held a vowellike sound at the end of the line.
那位歌手在句尾拉出一個很像母音的聲音。

meaning: having many vowels or vowel-like sounds
sentences: The word looked surprisingly vowely on the page.
那個字在頁面上看起來有很多母音。

meaning: one who makes a vow
sentences: The vower spoke quietly before the ceremony began.
儀式開始前，那位立誓的人低聲說話。

meaning: a woman who makes vows; a female devotee
sentences: The vowess dedicated her life to the order.
那位女誓願者把一生奉獻給修道團體。

meaning: without a vow or promise
sentences: He felt vowless after leaving the monastery.
離開修道院後，他覺得自己不再受誓約拘束。

meaning: one who makes vows
sentences: The vowmaker repeated the pledge in front of the group.
那位立誓者在大家面前再次重申承諾。

meaning: the act of making a vow
sentences: The ritual included vowmaking before the altar.
儀式內容包含在祭壇前立誓。

meaning: 航程
sentences: The professor discussed the concept of 'voyage' in great detail. 教授非常詳細地討論了「voyage」的概念。
Does the definition of 'voyage' change depending on the context? 「voyage」的定義會根據語境而改變嗎？

meaning: fit for voyaging or travel
sentences: The captain said the waters were voyageable after dawn.
船長說天亮後那片水域就適合航行了。

meaning: 航行者，旅客
sentences: The early voyagers used the stars to navigate the open seas. 早期的航行者利用星星在公海上導航。
Voyager 1 is a space probe that has traveled beyond our solar system. 航海家 1 號是一個已經旅行到太陽系以外的太空探測器。

meaning: the power of clairvoyance or foreseeing
sentences: The novel describes her as having a strange voyance.
小說把她寫成擁有奇異預知力的人。

meaning: a person who gains sexual pleasure from watching others privately
sentences: The film portrays the voyeur as a deeply troubled man.
那部電影把那個偷窺者描寫成一個內心扭曲的人。

meaning: the practice of deriving sexual pleasure from watching others
sentences: The article warned against voyeurism in online culture.
那篇文章警告不要在網路文化中養成偷窺癖。

meaning: seaweed used as fertilizer
sentences: Farmers once spread vraic on the fields as fertilizer.
過去農民會把海藻肥料撒在田裡。

meaning: a person who gathers seaweed
sentences: The old record described a vraicker working on the shore. 舊紀錄描述了一位在海岸工作的海藻採集者。
The museum exhibit explained how a vraicker collected seaweed by hand. 博物館展覽說明了海藻採集者如何徒手收集海藻。

meaning: the gathering of seaweed
sentences: The village still remembered vraicking after the storm. 那個村莊在暴風雨後仍記得採海藻這件事。
The guidebook described vraicking as an old coastal practice. 這本指南把採海藻描述成一種古老的沿海習俗。

meaning: a rare mineral
sentences: The mineral cabinet labeled the sample as vrbaite. 礦物櫃把那個樣本標示為 vrbaite。
Geology students studied vrbaite under a microscope. 地質學學生在顯微鏡下研究 vrbaite。

meaning: increase; in Sanskrit grammar, a lengthened form
sentences: The lesson explained vriddhi as a type of increase in Sanskrit grammar. 那堂課把 vriddhi 解釋為梵語文法中的一種增長形式。
Linguists discussed vriddhi in the phonology seminar. 語言學家在音韻學研討會上討論 vriddhi。

meaning: an old or dialect form of brother
sentences: The old poem used vrother as a dialect form of brother. 那首舊詩把 vrother 當作 brother 的方言拼法。
He wrote vrother in the margin to note the historical spelling. 他在頁邊寫下 vrother 來標記歷史拼寫。

meaning: 可見的 (修正為 visible)
sentences: The mountain peak was clearly vsbla from our hotel balcony. 從我們飯店的陽台可以清晰地看到山頂。
There was no vsbla damage to the car after the minor accident. 在輕微事故後，汽車沒有明顯（可見）的損壞。

meaning: a surname or personal name
sentences: Vu signed the letter at the bottom of the page. Vu 在頁面底部簽了名。

meaning: a small cavity in rock, often lined with crystals
sentences: The rock face hid a tiny vug filled with crystals. 岩壁裡藏著一個充滿水晶的小空洞。

meaning: full of vugs
